authors_text: Fangzheng Sun,Yang Liu,Jian-Xun Wang,Hao Sun
title: Symbolic Physics Learner: Discovering governing equations via Monte Carlo tree search
title_zh: 符号物理学习者：通过蒙特卡罗树搜索发现控制方程
abstract: Nonlinear dynamics is ubiquitous in nature and commonly seen in various science and engineering disciplines. Distilling analytical expressions that govern nonlinear dynamics from limited data remains vital but challenging. To tackle this fundamental issue, we propose a novel Symbolic Physics Learner (SPL) machine to discover the mathematical structure of nonlinear dynamics. The key concept is to interpret mathematical operations and system state variables by computational rules and symbols, establish symbolic reasoning of mathematical formulas via expression trees, and employ a Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) agent to explore optimal expression trees based on measurement data. The MCTS agent obtains an optimistic selection policy through the traversal of expression trees, featuring the one that maps to the arithmetic expression of underlying physics. Salient features of the proposed framework include search flexibility and enforcement of parsimony for discovered equations. The efficacy and superiority of the SPL machine are demonstrated by numerical examples, compared with state-of-the-art baselines.

Salient features of the proposed framework include search flexibility and enforcement of parsimony for discovered equations. The efficacy and superiority of the SPL machine are demonstrated by numerical examples, compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 非线性动力学在自然界中无处不在，在各种科学和工程学科中都很常见。从有限的数据中提取控制非线性动力学的解析表达式仍然至关重要但具有挑战性。为了解决这个基本问题，我们提出了一种新颖的符号物理学习器（SPL）机器来发现非线性动力学的数学结构。其关键概念是通过计算规则和符号解释数学运算和系统状态变量，通过表达式树建立数学公式的符号推理，并采用蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）代理基于测量数据探索最优表达式树。 MCTS 代理通过遍历表达式树获得乐观选择策略，其特征是映射到底层物理算术表达式的策略。所提出的框架的显着特征包括搜索灵活性和对发现的方程的简约性的执行。与最先进的基线相比，通过数值示例证明了 SPL 机器的功效和优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于蒙特卡洛树搜索的符号物理学习器，用于从有限数据中发现非线性动力学的数学表达式。
AI.motivation: 非线性动力学广泛存在但难以从有限数据中提炼解析表达式，需开发新方法揭示其数学结构。
AI.method: 通过符号运算规则与表达式树构建数学公式，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索代理探索最优表达式树并映射物理方程。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了SPL在发现物理方程上的有效性，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过灵活搜索与简洁性约束，为科学发现提供了高效符号推理工具。

authors_text: Rafael B. Audibert,Henrique Lemos,Pedro Avelar,Anderson R. Tavares,Luís C. Lamb
title: On the Evolution of A.I. and Machine Learning: Towards a Meta-level Measuring and Understanding Impact, Influence, and Leadership at Premier A.I. Conferences
title_zh: 论人工智能的演变和机器学习：迈向元级别衡量和理解 Premier A.I. 的影响力、影响力和领导力会议
comment: 125 pages, 57 figures, 11 tables. Published in The Journal of Applied Logics - IFCoLog Journal of Logics and their Applications
comments: 125 pages, 57 figures, 11 tables. Published in The Journal of Applied Logics - IFCoLog Journal of Logics and their Applications
abstract: Artificial Intelligence is now recognized as a general-purpose technology with ample impact on human life. This work aims at understanding the evolution of AI and, in particular Machine learning, from the perspective of researchers' contributions to the field. In order to do so, we present several measures allowing the analyses of AI and machine learning researchers' impact, influence, and leadership over the last decades. This work also contributes, to a certain extent, to shed new light on the history and evolution of AI by exploring the dynamics involved in the field's evolution by looking at papers published at the flagship AI and machine learning conferences since the first International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) held in 1969. AI development and evolution have led to increasing research output, reflected in the number of articles published over the last sixty years. We construct comprehensive citation collaboration and paper-author datasets and compute corresponding centrality measures to carry out our analyses. These analyses allow a better understanding of how AI has reached its current state of affairs in research. Throughout the process, we correlate these datasets with the work of the ACM Turing Award winners and the so-called two AI winters the field has gone through. We also look at self-citation trends and new authors' behaviors. Finally, we present a novel way to infer the country of affiliation of a paper from its organization. Therefore, this work provides a deep analysis of Artificial Intelligence history from information gathered and analysed from large technical venues datasets and suggests novel insights that can contribute to understanding and measuring AI's evolution.

abstract_zh: 人工智能现已被认为是一种对人类生活产生巨大影响的通用技术。这项工作旨在从研究人员对该领域的贡献的角度理解人工智能，特别是机器学习的演变。为此，我们提出了几种措施，可以分析人工智能和机器学习研究人员在过去几十年中的影响力、影响力和领导力。这项工作在一定程度上也有助于通过研究自 1969 年第一届国际人工智能联合会议（IJCAI）以来在旗舰人工智能和机器学习会议上发表的论文来探索该领域演变的动态，从而为人工智能的历史和演变提供新的视角。人工智能的发展和演变导致了研究成果的增加，这反映在过去 60 年发表的文章数量上。我们构建全面的引文协作和论文作者数据集，并计算相应的中心性度量来进行我们的分析。这些分析可以让我们更好地了解人工智能如何达到目前的研究状况。在整个过程中，我们将这些数据集与 ACM 图灵奖获得者的工作以及该领域经历的所谓的两个人工智能冬天联系起来。我们还关注自引趋势和新作者的行为。最后，我们提出了一种从论文的组织中推断其所属国家的新颖方法。因此，这项工作通过从大型技术场所数据集中收集和分析的信息，对人工智能的历史进行了深入分析，并提出了有助于理解和衡量人工智能演变的新颖见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析顶级AI会议论文数据，研究人工智能与机器学习领域研究人员的影响力、领导力及学科演变历程。
AI.motivation: 人工智能作为通用技术对人类社会影响深远，需从研究者贡献角度系统理解其发展历程与关键转折点。
AI.method: 构建论文-作者-引用协作数据集，计算中心性指标，结合图灵奖得主成果及AI寒冬事件进行关联分析，并提出基于机构信息推断论文所属国家的新方法。
AI.result: 揭示了六十年来AI研究产出增长规律，发现自我引用趋势变化、新作者参与模式，验证了会议数据与学科发展阶段的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模会议数据的量化分析，为理解AI学科演化提供了新视角，展示了基于计算社会学方法研究技术发展史的可行性。

authors_text: Sixian Wang,Jincheng Dai,Zijian Liang,Kai Niu,Zhongwei Si,Chao Dong,Xiaoqi Qin,Ping Zhang
title: Wireless Deep Video Semantic Transmission
title_zh: 无线深度视频语义传输
abstract: In this paper, we design a new class of high-efficiency deep joint source-channel coding methods to achieve end-to-end video transmission over wireless channels. The proposed methods exploit nonlinear transform and conditional coding architecture to adaptively extract semantic features across video frames, and transmit semantic feature domain representations over wireless channels via deep joint source-channel coding. Our framework is collected under the name deep video semantic transmission (DVST). In particular, benefiting from the strong temporal prior provided by the feature domain context, the learned nonlinear transform function becomes temporally adaptive, resulting in a richer and more accurate entropy model guiding the transmission of current frame. Accordingly, a novel rate adaptive transmission mechanism is developed to customize deep joint source-channel coding for video sources. It learns to allocate the limited channel bandwidth within and among video frames to maximize the overall transmission performance. The whole DVST design is formulated as an optimization problem whose goal is to minimize the end-to-end transmission rate-distortion performance under perceptual quality metrics or machine vision task performance metrics. Across standard video source test sequences and various communication scenarios, experiments show that our DVST can generally surpass traditional wireless video coded transmission schemes. The proposed DVST framework can well support future semantic communications due to its video content-aware and machine vision task integration abilities.
summary: In this paper, we design a new class of high-efficiency deep joint source-channel coding methods to achieve end-to-end video transmission over wireless channels. The proposed methods exploit nonlinear transform and conditional coding architecture to adaptively extract semantic features across video frames, and transmit semantic feature domain representations over wireless channels via deep joint source-channel coding. Our framework is collected under the name deep video semantic transmission (DVST). In particular, benefiting from the strong temporal prior provided by the feature domain context, the learned nonlinear transform function becomes temporally adaptive, resulting in a richer and more accurate entropy model guiding the transmission of current frame. Accordingly, a novel rate adaptive transmission mechanism is developed to customize deep joint source-channel coding for video sources. It learns to allocate the limited channel bandwidth within and among video frames to maximize the overall transmission performance. The whole DVST design is formulated as an optimization problem whose goal is to minimize the end-to-end transmission rate-distortion performance under perceptual quality metrics or machine vision task performance metrics. Across standard video source test sequences and various communication scenarios, experiments show that our DVST can generally surpass traditional wireless video coded transmission schemes. The proposed DVST framework can well support future semantic communications due to its video content-aware and machine vision task integration abilities.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们设计了一类新型的高效深度联合源信道编码方法，以实现无线信道上的端到端视频传输。所提出的方法利用非线性变换和条件编码架构来自适应地提取跨视频帧的语义特征，并通过深度联合源信道编码在无线信道上传输语义特征域表示。我们的框架被命名为深度视频语义传输（DVST）。特别是，受益于特征域上下文提供的强时间先验，学习的非线性变换函数变得时间自适应，从而产生更丰富、更准确的熵模型来指导当前帧的传输。因此，开发了一种新颖的速率自适应传输机制来为视频源定制深度联合源通道编码。它学习在视频帧内和视频帧之间分配有限的通道带宽，以最大限度地提高整体传输性能。整个DVST设计被表述为一个优化问题，其目标是在感知质量指标或机器视觉任务性能指标下最小化端到端传输速率失真性能。通过标准视频源测试序列和各种通信场景，实验表明我们的DVST总体上可以超越传统的无线视频编码传输方案。由于其视频内容感知和机器视觉任务集成能力，所提出的 DVST 框架可以很好地支持未来的语义通信。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DVST的深度视频语义传输框架，通过非线性变换和条件编码架构实现无线信道下的高效端到端视频传输。
AI.motivation: 传统无线视频传输方案效率有限，难以适应语义通信需求，需通过语义特征提取与自适应编码提升传输性能。
AI.method: 设计非线性变换与条件编码架构，利用视频帧间时序先验实现语义特征域表示，结合自适应率分配机制优化信道带宽利用。
AI.result: 在标准视频序列和多种通信场景下，DVST方案优于传统无线视频编码传输方法，显著提升传输效率与感知质量。
AI.conclusion: DVST框架通过内容感知与机器视觉任务集成，为未来语义通信提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Wireless Deep Video Semantic Transmission 无线深度视频语义传输 In this paper, we design a new class of high-efficiency deep joint source-channel coding methods to achieve end-to-end video transmission over wireless channels. The proposed methods exploit nonlinear transform and conditional coding architecture to adaptively extract semantic features across video frames, and transmit semantic feature domain representations over wireless channels via deep joint source-channel coding. Our framework is collected under the name deep video semantic transmission (DVST). In particular, benefiting from the strong temporal prior provided by the feature domain context, the learned nonlinear transform function becomes temporally adaptive, resulting in a richer and more accurate entropy model guiding the transmission of current frame. Accordingly, a novel rate adaptive transmission mechanism is developed to customize deep joint source-channel coding for video sources. It learns to allocate the limited channel bandwidth within and among video frames to maximize the overall transmission performance. The whole DVST design is formulated as an optimization problem whose goal is to minimize the end-to-end transmission rate-distortion performance under perceptual quality metrics or machine vision task performance metrics. Across standard video source test sequences and various communication scenarios, experiments show that our DVST can generally surpass traditional wireless video coded transmission schemes. The proposed DVST framework can well support future semantic communications due to its video content-aware and machine vision task integration abilities. 在本文中，我们设计了一类新型的高效深度联合源信道编码方法，以实现无线信道上的端到端视频传输。所提出的方法利用非线性变换和条件编码架构来自适应地提取跨视频帧的语义特征，并通过深度联合源信道编码在无线信道上传输语义特征域表示。我们的框架被命名为深度视频语义传输（DVST）。特别是，受益于特征域上下文提供的强时间先验，学习的非线性变换函数变得时间自适应，从而产生更丰富、更准确的熵模型来指导当前帧的传输。因此，开发了一种新颖的速率自适应传输机制来为视频源定制深度联合源通道编码。它学习在视频帧内和视频帧之间分配有限的通道带宽，以最大限度地提高整体传输性能。整个DVST设计被表述为一个优化问题，其目标是在感知质量指标或机器视觉任务性能指标下最小化端到端传输速率失真性能。通过标准视频源测试序列和各种通信场景，实验表明我们的DVST总体上可以超越传统的无线视频编码传输方案。由于其视频内容感知和机器视觉任务集成能力，所提出的 DVST 框架可以很好地支持未来的语义通信。 本文提出一种名为DVST的深度视频语义传输框架，通过非线性变换和条件编码架构实现无线信道下的高效端到端视频传输。 Sixian Wang,Jincheng Dai,Zijian Liang,Kai Niu,Zhongwei Si,Chao Dong,Xiaoqi Qin,Ping Zhang cs.CV,cs.IT

authors_text: Peipei Zhu,Xiao Wang,Lin Zhu,Zhenglong Sun,Weishi Zheng,Yaowei Wang,Changwen Chen
title: Prompt-based Learning for Unpaired Image Captioning
title_zh: 不配对图像字幕的基于提示的学习
abstract: Unpaired Image Captioning (UIC) has been developed to learn image descriptions from unaligned vision-language sample pairs. Existing works usually tackle this task using adversarial learning and visual concept reward based on reinforcement learning. However, these existing works were only able to learn limited cross-domain information in vision and language domains, which restrains the captioning performance of UIC. Inspired by the success of Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models (VL-PTMs) in this research, we attempt to infer the cross-domain cue information about a given image from the large VL-PTMs for the UIC task. This research is also motivated by recent successes of prompt learning in many downstream multi-modal tasks, including image-text retrieval and vision question answering. In this work, a semantic prompt is introduced and aggregated with visual features for more accurate caption prediction under the adversarial learning framework. In addition, a metric prompt is designed to select high-quality pseudo image-caption samples obtained from the basic captioning model and refine the model in an iterative manner. Extensive experiments on the COCO and Flickr30K datasets validate the promising captioning ability of the proposed model. We expect that the proposed prompt-based UIC model will stimulate a new line of research for the VL-PTMs based captioning.
summary: Unpaired Image Captioning (UIC) has been developed to learn image descriptions from unaligned vision-language sample pairs. Existing works usually tackle this task using adversarial learning and visual concept reward based on reinforcement learning. However, these existing works were only able to learn limited cross-domain information in vision and language domains, which restrains the captioning performance of UIC. Inspired by the success of Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models (VL-PTMs) in this research, we attempt to infer the cross-domain cue information about a given image from the large VL-PTMs for the UIC task. This research is also motivated by recent successes of prompt learning in many downstream multi-modal tasks, including image-text retrieval and vision question answering. In this work, a semantic prompt is introduced and aggregated with visual features for more accurate caption prediction under the adversarial learning framework. In addition, a metric prompt is designed to select high-quality pseudo image-caption samples obtained from the basic captioning model and refine the model in an iterative manner. Extensive experiments on the COCO and Flickr30K datasets validate the promising captioning ability of the proposed model. We expect that the proposed prompt-based UIC model will stimulate a new line of research for the VL-PTMs based captioning.
abstract_zh: 不成对图像描述 (UIC) 的开发目的是从不对齐的视觉语言样本对中学习图像描述。现有的作品通常使用基于强化学习的对抗性学习和视觉概念奖励来解决这一任务。然而，这些现有的工作只能学习有限的视觉和语言领域的跨域信息，这限制了UIC的字幕性能。受到本研究中视觉语言预训练模型 (VL-PTM) 成功的启发，我们尝试从 UIC 任务的大型 VL-PTM 中推断给定图像的跨域线索信息。这项研究的动力还源于最近在许多下游多模态任务中即时学习的成功，包括图像文本检索和视觉问答。在这项工作中，引入了语义提示并将其与视觉特征聚合，以便在对抗性学习框架下进行更准确的字幕预测。此外，还设计了度量提示来选择从基本字幕模型获得的高质量伪图像字幕样本，并以迭代方式细化模型。在 COCO 和 Flickr30K 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了所提出模型的有前途的字幕能力。我们预计所提出的基于提示的 UIC 模型将激发基于 VL-PTM 的字幕的新研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示学习的无配对图像字幕生成方法，通过引入语义提示和度量提示提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无配对图像字幕生成方法在跨模态信息学习上存在局限，而视觉-语言预训练模型（VL-PTMs）和提示学习在多模态任务中的成功启发了本研究。
AI.method: 提出语义提示与视觉特征融合的对抗学习框架，并设计度量提示迭代筛选高质量伪样本进行模型优化。
AI.result: 在COCO和Flickr30K数据集上的实验验证了所提模型在字幕生成任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该提示学习框架为基于VL-PTMs的字幕生成提供了新思路，有望推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Heng Zhou,Chunna Tian,Zhenxi Zhang,Chengyang Li,Yongqiang Xie,Zhongbo Li
title: PixelGame: Infrared small target segmentation as a Nash equilibrium
title_zh: PixelGame：红外小目标分割作为纳什均衡
abstract: A key challenge of infrared small target segmentation (ISTS) is to balance false negative pixels (FNs) and false positive pixels (FPs). Traditional methods combine FNs and FPs into a single objective by weighted sum, and the optimization process is decided by one actor. Minimizing FNs and FPs with the same strategy leads to antagonistic decisions. To address this problem, we propose a competitive game framework (pixelGame) from a novel perspective for ISTS. In pixelGame, FNs and FPs are controlled by different player whose goal is to minimize their own utility function. FNs-player and FPs-player are designed with different strategies: One is to minimize FNs and the other is to minimize FPs. The utility function drives the evolution of the two participants in competition. We consider the Nash equilibrium of pixelGame as the optimal solution. In addition, we propose maximum information modulation (MIM) to highlight the tar-get information. MIM effectively focuses on the salient region including small targets. Extensive experiments on two standard public datasets prove the effectiveness of our method. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves better performance in terms of F1-measure (F1) and the intersection of union (IoU).
summary: A key challenge of infrared small target segmentation (ISTS) is to balance false negative pixels (FNs) and false positive pixels (FPs). Traditional methods combine FNs and FPs into a single objective by weighted sum, and the optimization process is decided by one actor. Minimizing FNs and FPs with the same strategy leads to antagonistic decisions. To address this problem, we propose a competitive game framework (pixelGame) from a novel perspective for ISTS. In pixelGame, FNs and FPs are controlled by different player whose goal is to minimize their own utility function. FNs-player and FPs-player are designed with different strategies: One is to minimize FNs and the other is to minimize FPs. The utility function drives the evolution of the two participants in competition. We consider the Nash equilibrium of pixelGame as the optimal solution. In addition, we propose maximum information modulation (MIM) to highlight the tar-get information. MIM effectively focuses on the salient region including small targets. Extensive experiments on two standard public datasets prove the effectiveness of our method. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves better performance in terms of F1-measure (F1) and the intersection of union (IoU).
abstract_zh: 红外小目标分割（ISTS）的一个关键挑战是平衡假阴性像素（FN）和假阳性像素（FP）。传统方法通过加权和将 FN 和 FP 合并为一个目标，优化过程由一个参与者决定。使用相同的策略最小化 FN 和 FP 会导致对抗性决策。为了解决这个问题，我们从一个新颖的角度为 ISTS 提出了一个竞技游戏框架（pixelGame）。在 PixelGame 中，FN 和 FP 由不同的玩家控制，其目标是最小化自己的效用函数。 FNs-player 和 FPs-player 采用不同的策略设计：一种是最小化 FN，另一种是最小化 FP。效用函数驱动着竞争中两个参与者的进化。我们将pixelGame的纳什均衡视为最优解。此外，我们提出最大信息调制（MIM）来突出目标信息。 MIM 有效地聚焦于显着区域，包括小目标。对两个标准公共数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 F1 测度（F1）和并集交集（IoU）方面取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将红外小目标分割问题建模为纳什均衡博弈，通过竞争框架平衡误检与漏检。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过加权和处理误检(FP)与漏检(FN)，但单一优化策略导致二者对抗，难以达到理想平衡。
AI.method: 提出pixelGame竞争框架，由两个独立玩家分别最小化FN和FP，结合纳什均衡理论求解，并设计最大信息调制(MIM)增强目标特征。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上实验表明，该方法在F1值和IoU指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过博弈论视角建模分割任务，结合信息增强技术，有效解决了红外小目标分割中FN与FP的平衡难题。

search_text: PixelGame: Infrared small target segmentation as a Nash equilibrium PixelGame：红外小目标分割作为纳什均衡 A key challenge of infrared small target segmentation (ISTS) is to balance false negative pixels (FNs) and false positive pixels (FPs). Traditional methods combine FNs and FPs into a single objective by weighted sum, and the optimization process is decided by one actor. Minimizing FNs and FPs with the same strategy leads to antagonistic decisions. To address this problem, we propose a competitive game framework (pixelGame) from a novel perspective for ISTS. In pixelGame, FNs and FPs are controlled by different player whose goal is to minimize their own utility function. FNs-player and FPs-player are designed with different strategies: One is to minimize FNs and the other is to minimize FPs. The utility function drives the evolution of the two participants in competition. We consider the Nash equilibrium of pixelGame as the optimal solution. In addition, we propose maximum information modulation (MIM) to highlight the tar-get information. MIM effectively focuses on the salient region including small targets. Extensive experiments on two standard public datasets prove the effectiveness of our method. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves better performance in terms of F1-measure (F1) and the intersection of union (IoU). 红外小目标分割（ISTS）的一个关键挑战是平衡假阴性像素（FN）和假阳性像素（FP）。传统方法通过加权和将 FN 和 FP 合并为一个目标，优化过程由一个参与者决定。使用相同的策略最小化 FN 和 FP 会导致对抗性决策。为了解决这个问题，我们从一个新颖的角度为 ISTS 提出了一个竞技游戏框架（pixelGame）。在 PixelGame 中，FN 和 FP 由不同的玩家控制，其目标是最小化自己的效用函数。 FNs-player 和 FPs-player 采用不同的策略设计：一种是最小化 FN，另一种是最小化 FP。效用函数驱动着竞争中两个参与者的进化。我们将pixelGame的纳什均衡视为最优解。此外，我们提出最大信息调制（MIM）来突出目标信息。 MIM 有效地聚焦于显着区域，包括小目标。对两个标准公共数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。与其他最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在 F1 测度（F1）和并集交集（IoU）方面取得了更好的性能。 本文将红外小目标分割问题建模为纳什均衡博弈，通过竞争框架平衡误检与漏检。 Heng Zhou,Chunna Tian,Zhenxi Zhang,Chengyang Li,Yongqiang Xie,Zhongbo Li cs.CV

authors_text: Bijie Bai,Yi Luo,Tianyi Gan,Jingtian Hu,Yuhang Li,Yifan Zhao,Deniz Mengu,Mona Jarrahi,Aydogan Ozcan
title: To image, or not to image: Class-specific diffractive cameras with all-optical erasure of undesired objects
title_zh: 成像或不成像：特定类别的衍射相机，可全光学擦除不需要的物体
abstract: Privacy protection is a growing concern in the digital era, with machine vision techniques widely used throughout public and private settings. Existing methods address this growing problem by, e.g., encrypting camera images or obscuring/blurring the imaged information through digital algorithms. Here, we demonstrate a camera design that performs class-specific imaging of target objects with instantaneous all-optical erasure of other classes of objects. This diffractive camera consists of transmissive surfaces structured using deep learning to perform selective imaging of target classes of objects positioned at its input field-of-view. After their fabrication, the thin diffractive layers collectively perform optical mode filtering to accurately form images of the objects that belong to a target data class or group of classes, while instantaneously erasing objects of the other data classes at the output field-of-view. Using the same framework, we also demonstrate the design of class-specific permutation cameras, where the objects of a target data class are pixel-wise permuted for all-optical class-specific encryption, while the other objects are irreversibly erased from the output image. The success of class-specific diffractive cameras was experimentally demonstrated using terahertz (THz) waves and 3D-printed diffractive layers that selectively imaged only one class of the MNIST handwritten digit dataset, all-optically erasing the other handwritten digits. This diffractive camera design can be scaled to different parts of the electromagnetic spectrum, including, e.g., the visible and infrared wavelengths, to provide transformative opportunities for privacy-preserving digital cameras and task-specific data-efficient imaging.
summary: Privacy protection is a growing concern in the digital era, with machine vision techniques widely used throughout public and private settings. Existing methods address this growing problem by, e.g., encrypting camera images or obscuring/blurring the imaged information through digital algorithms. Here, we demonstrate a camera design that performs class-specific imaging of target objects with instantaneous all-optical erasure of other classes of objects. This diffractive camera consists of transmissive surfaces structured using deep learning to perform selective imaging of target classes of objects positioned at its input field-of-view. After their fabrication, the thin diffractive layers collectively perform optical mode filtering to accurately form images of the objects that belong to a target data class or group of classes, while instantaneously erasing objects of the other data classes at the output field-of-view. Using the same framework, we also demonstrate the design of class-specific permutation cameras, where the objects of a target data class are pixel-wise permuted for all-optical class-specific encryption, while the other objects are irreversibly erased from the output image. The success of class-specific diffractive cameras was experimentally demonstrated using terahertz (THz) waves and 3D-printed diffractive layers that selectively imaged only one class of the MNIST handwritten digit dataset, all-optically erasing the other handwritten digits. This diffractive camera design can be scaled to different parts of the electromagnetic spectrum, including, e.g., the visible and infrared wavelengths, to provide transformative opportunities for privacy-preserving digital cameras and task-specific data-efficient imaging.
abstract_zh: 在数字时代，隐私保护越来越受到关注，机器视觉技术在公共和私人环境中广泛使用。现有方法通过例如加密相机图像或通过数字算法模糊/模糊成像信息来解决这个日益严重的问题。在这里，我们演示了一种相机设计，该设计可以对目标物体执行特定类别的成像，同时对其他类别的物体进行即时全光学擦除。该衍射相机由使用深度学习构建的透射表面组成，可对位于其输入视场的目标类别物体进行选择性成像。制造完成后，薄衍射层共同执行光学模式滤波，以准确地形成属于目标数据类或类组的对象的图像，同时在输出视场处立即擦除其他数据类的对象。使用相同的框架，我们还演示了特定于类的排列相机的设计，其中目标数据类的对象按像素排列以实现全光学特定于类的加密，而其他对象则从输出图像中不可逆地删除。使用太赫兹 (THz) 波和 3D 打印衍射层进行实验证明了特定类别衍射相机的成功，这些衍射层仅选择性地对 MNIST 手写数字数据集的一类进行成像，并以全光学方式擦除其他手写数字。这种衍射相机设计可以扩展到电磁频谱的不同部分，包括可见光和红外波长，为隐私保护数码相机和特定任务的数据高效成像提供变革机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于衍射光学的相机设计，能够选择性地对特定类别物体成像并光学擦除其他类别物体。
AI.motivation: 随着机器视觉技术的普及，隐私保护需求日益增长。现有方法如加密或数字模糊存在效率或安全性不足的问题，需开发新型光学解决方案。
AI.method: 利用深度学习设计透射式衍射层结构，通过光学模式过滤实现目标类别物体成像，同时瞬时擦除其他类别物体。实验采用太赫兹波和3D打印衍射层验证。
AI.result: 成功演示了仅对MNIST手写数字数据集中的特定类别成像，其他数字被光学擦除。该设计可扩展至可见光和红外波段。
AI.conclusion: 该衍射相机为隐私保护和任务专用成像提供了变革性方案，具有跨电磁波谱的应用潜力。

authors_text: Jun Wang,Sixian Wang,Jincheng Dai,Zhongwei Si,Dekun Zhou,Kai Niu
title: Perceptual Learned Source-Channel Coding for High-Fidelity Image Semantic Transmission
title_zh: 用于高保真图像语义传输的感知学习源通道编码
abstract: As one novel approach to realize end-to-end wireless image semantic transmission, deep learning-based joint source-channel coding (deep JSCC) method is emerging in both deep learning and communication communities. However, current deep JSCC image transmission systems are typically optimized for traditional distortion metrics such as peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) or multi-scale structural similarity (MS-SSIM). But for low transmission rates, due to the imperfect wireless channel, these distortion metrics lose significance as they favor pixel-wise preservation. To account for human visual perception in semantic communications, it is of great importance to develop new deep JSCC systems optimized beyond traditional PSNR and MS-SSIM metrics. In this paper, we introduce adversarial losses to optimize deep JSCC, which tends to preserve global semantic information and local texture. Our new deep JSCC architecture combines encoder, wireless channel, decoder/generator, and discriminator, which are jointly learned under both perceptual and adversarial losses. Our method yields human visually much more pleasing results than state-of-the-art engineered image coded transmission systems and traditional deep JSCC systems. A user study confirms that achieving the perceptually similar end-to-end image transmission quality, the proposed method can save about 50\% wireless channel bandwidth cost.
summary: As one novel approach to realize end-to-end wireless image semantic transmission, deep learning-based joint source-channel coding (deep JSCC) method is emerging in both deep learning and communication communities. However, current deep JSCC image transmission systems are typically optimized for traditional distortion metrics such as peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) or multi-scale structural similarity (MS-SSIM). But for low transmission rates, due to the imperfect wireless channel, these distortion metrics lose significance as they favor pixel-wise preservation. To account for human visual perception in semantic communications, it is of great importance to develop new deep JSCC systems optimized beyond traditional PSNR and MS-SSIM metrics. In this paper, we introduce adversarial losses to optimize deep JSCC, which tends to preserve global semantic information and local texture. Our new deep JSCC architecture combines encoder, wireless channel, decoder/generator, and discriminator, which are jointly learned under both perceptual and adversarial losses. Our method yields human visually much more pleasing results than state-of-the-art engineered image coded transmission systems and traditional deep JSCC systems. A user study confirms that achieving the perceptually similar end-to-end image transmission quality, the proposed method can save about 50\% wireless channel bandwidth cost.
abstract_zh: 作为一种实现端到端无线图像语义传输的新颖方法，基于深度学习的联合源信道编码（深度JSCC）方法正在深度学习和通信领域兴起。然而，当前的深度 JSCC 图像传输系统通常针对传统失真指标进行优化，例如峰值信噪比 (PSNR) 或多尺度结构相似性 (MS-SSIM)。但对于低传输速率，由于无线信道不完善，这些失真指标失去了意义，因为它们有利于像素级的保存。为了解释语义通信中的人类视觉感知，开发超越传统 PSNR 和 MS-SSIM 指标的新深度 JSCC 系统非常重要。在本文中，我们引入对抗性损失来优化深度 JSCC，这往往会保留全局语义信息和局部纹理。我们新的深度 JSCC 架构结合了编码器、无线通道、解码器/生成器和鉴别器，它们是在感知和对抗损失下共同学习的。与最先进的工程图像编码传输系统和传统的深度 JSCC 系统相比，我们的方法产生的人类视觉效果更加令人愉悦。用户研究证实，在实现感知上相似的端到端图像传输质量时，该方法可以节省约 50% 的无线信道带宽成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感知学习的联合源信道编码方法，用于实现高保真图像语义传输。
AI.motivation: 现有深度联合源信道编码（deep JSCC）系统优化传统失真指标（如PSNR/MS-SSIM），但在低传输率场景下难以满足人类视觉感知需求，需开发超越像素级优化的新方法。
AI.method: 引入对抗损失函数构建新型深度JSCC架构，结合编码器、无线信道、解码器/生成器和判别器，通过感知损失与对抗损失联合训练保留全局语义与局部纹理。
AI.result: 用户研究证实该方法在保证感知质量的前提下可节省约50%无线信道带宽，视觉效果优于现有工程化图像传输系统和传统深度JSCC方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于感知优化的深度JSCC框架有效提升了语义通信的视觉质量与传输效率，为低带宽场景下的高保真图像传输提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 引入对抗损失函数构建新型深度JSCC架构，结合编码器、无线信道、解码器/生成器和判别器，通过感知损失与对抗损失联合训练保留全局语义与局部纹理。
ai_content_json.result: 用户研究证实该方法在保证感知质量的前提下可节省约50%无线信道带宽，视觉效果优于现有工程化图像传输系统和传统深度JSCC方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 基于感知优化的深度JSCC框架有效提升了语义通信的视觉质量与传输效率，为低带宽场景下的高保真图像传输提供了新思路。

search_text: Perceptual Learned Source-Channel Coding for High-Fidelity Image Semantic Transmission 用于高保真图像语义传输的感知学习源通道编码 As one novel approach to realize end-to-end wireless image semantic transmission, deep learning-based joint source-channel coding (deep JSCC) method is emerging in both deep learning and communication communities. However, current deep JSCC image transmission systems are typically optimized for traditional distortion metrics such as peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) or multi-scale structural similarity (MS-SSIM). But for low transmission rates, due to the imperfect wireless channel, these distortion metrics lose significance as they favor pixel-wise preservation. To account for human visual perception in semantic communications, it is of great importance to develop new deep JSCC systems optimized beyond traditional PSNR and MS-SSIM metrics. In this paper, we introduce adversarial losses to optimize deep JSCC, which tends to preserve global semantic information and local texture. Our new deep JSCC architecture combines encoder, wireless channel, decoder/generator, and discriminator, which are jointly learned under both perceptual and adversarial losses. Our method yields human visually much more pleasing results than state-of-the-art engineered image coded transmission systems and traditional deep JSCC systems. A user study confirms that achieving the perceptually similar end-to-end image transmission quality, the proposed method can save about 50\% wireless channel bandwidth cost. 作为一种实现端到端无线图像语义传输的新颖方法，基于深度学习的联合源信道编码（深度JSCC）方法正在深度学习和通信领域兴起。然而，当前的深度 JSCC 图像传输系统通常针对传统失真指标进行优化，例如峰值信噪比 (PSNR) 或多尺度结构相似性 (MS-SSIM)。但对于低传输速率，由于无线信道不完善，这些失真指标失去了意义，因为它们有利于像素级的保存。为了解释语义通信中的人类视觉感知，开发超越传统 PSNR 和 MS-SSIM 指标的新深度 JSCC 系统非常重要。在本文中，我们引入对抗性损失来优化深度 JSCC，这往往会保留全局语义信息和局部纹理。我们新的深度 JSCC 架构结合了编码器、无线通道、解码器/生成器和鉴别器，它们是在感知和对抗损失下共同学习的。与最先进的工程图像编码传输系统和传统的深度 JSCC 系统相比，我们的方法产生的人类视觉效果更加令人愉悦。用户研究证实，在实现感知上相似的端到端图像传输质量时，该方法可以节省约 50% 的无线信道带宽成本。 本文提出一种基于感知学习的联合源信道编码方法，用于实现高保真图像语义传输。 Jun Wang,Sixian Wang,Jincheng Dai,Zhongwei Si,Dekun Zhou,Kai Niu cs.CV,cs.IT

authors_text: Junfu Liu,Di Qiu,Pengfei Yan,Xiaolin Wei
title: Learn to Cluster Faces via Pairwise Classification
title_zh: 学习通过成对分类对人脸进行聚类
abstract: Face clustering plays an essential role in exploiting massive unlabeled face data. Recently, graph-based face clustering methods are getting popular for their satisfying performances. However, they usually suffer from excessive memory consumption especially on large-scale graphs, and rely on empirical thresholds to determine the connectivities between samples in inference, which restricts their applications in various real-world scenes. To address such problems, in this paper, we explore face clustering from the pairwise angle. Specifically, we formulate the face clustering task as a pairwise relationship classification task, avoiding the memory-consuming learning on large-scale graphs. The classifier can directly determine the relationship between samples and is enhanced by taking advantage of the contextual information. Moreover, to further facilitate the efficiency of our method, we propose a rank-weighted density to guide the selection of pairs sent to the classifier. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on several public clustering benchmarks at the fastest speed and shows a great advantage in comparison with graph-based clustering methods on memory consumption.
summary: Face clustering plays an essential role in exploiting massive unlabeled face data. Recently, graph-based face clustering methods are getting popular for their satisfying performances. However, they usually suffer from excessive memory consumption especially on large-scale graphs, and rely on empirical thresholds to determine the connectivities between samples in inference, which restricts their applications in various real-world scenes. To address such problems, in this paper, we explore face clustering from the pairwise angle. Specifically, we formulate the face clustering task as a pairwise relationship classification task, avoiding the memory-consuming learning on large-scale graphs. The classifier can directly determine the relationship between samples and is enhanced by taking advantage of the contextual information. Moreover, to further facilitate the efficiency of our method, we propose a rank-weighted density to guide the selection of pairs sent to the classifier. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on several public clustering benchmarks at the fastest speed and shows a great advantage in comparison with graph-based clustering methods on memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 人脸聚类在利用大量未标记人脸数据方面发挥着重要作用。最近，基于图的人脸聚类方法因其令人满意的性能而变得流行。然而，它们通常会消耗过多的内存，尤其是在大规模图上，并且依赖经验阈值来确定推理中样本之间的连接性，这限制了它们在各种现实场景中的应用。为了解决此类问题，在本文中，我们从成对角度探索人脸聚类。具体来说，我们将人脸聚类任务制定为成对关系分类任务，避免大规模图上的内存消耗学习。分类器可以直接确定样本之间的关系，并通过利用上下文信息来增强分类器。此外，为了进一步提高我们方法的效率，我们提出了排名加权密度来指导发送到分类器的对的选择。实验结果表明，我们的方法以最快的速度在多个公共聚类基准上实现了最先进的性能，并且在内存消耗方面与基于图的聚类方法相比显示出巨大的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过成对分类学习人脸聚类的方法，避免传统图基方法的高内存消耗问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图基人脸聚类方法在处理大规模数据时面临内存消耗过大且依赖经验阈值的问题，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 将人脸聚类任务转化为成对关系分类问题，利用分类器直接判断样本关系，并通过秩加权密度策略优化成对样本选择。
AI.result: 在多个公开聚类基准测试中达到最先进性能，速度最快且内存消耗显著低于图基方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过成对分类框架有效解决了传统图基聚类的内存与阈值依赖问题，具有更高的实用价值。

authors_text: Jaemin Cho,Seunghyun Yoon,Ajinkya Kale,Franck Dernoncourt,Trung Bui,Mohit Bansal
title: Fine-grained Image Captioning with CLIP Reward
title_zh: 具有 CLIP 奖励的细粒度图像字幕
abstract: Modern image captioning models are usually trained with text similarity objectives. However, since reference captions in public datasets often describe the most salient common objects, models trained with text similarity objectives tend to ignore specific and detailed aspects of an image that distinguish it from others. Toward more descriptive and distinctive caption generation, we propose using CLIP, a multimodal encoder trained on huge image-text pairs from web, to calculate multimodal similarity and use it as a reward function. We also propose a simple finetuning strategy of the CLIP text encoder to improve grammar that does not require extra text annotation. This completely eliminates the need for reference captions during the reward computation. To comprehensively evaluate descriptive captions, we introduce FineCapEval, a new dataset for caption evaluation with fine-grained criteria: overall, background, object, relations. In our experiments on text-to-image retrieval and FineCapEval, the proposed CLIP-guided model generates more distinctive captions than the CIDEr-optimized model. We also show that our unsupervised grammar finetuning of the CLIP text encoder alleviates the degeneration problem of the naive CLIP reward. Lastly, we show human analysis where the annotators strongly prefer the CLIP reward to the CIDEr and MLE objectives according to various criteria. Code and Data: https://github.com/j-min/CLIP-Caption-Reward
summary: Modern image captioning models are usually trained with text similarity objectives. However, since reference captions in public datasets often describe the most salient common objects, models trained with text similarity objectives tend to ignore specific and detailed aspects of an image that distinguish it from others. Toward more descriptive and distinctive caption generation, we propose using CLIP, a multimodal encoder trained on huge image-text pairs from web, to calculate multimodal similarity and use it as a reward function. We also propose a simple finetuning strategy of the CLIP text encoder to improve grammar that does not require extra text annotation. This completely eliminates the need for reference captions during the reward computation. To comprehensively evaluate descriptive captions, we introduce FineCapEval, a new dataset for caption evaluation with fine-grained criteria: overall, background, object, relations. In our experiments on text-to-image retrieval and FineCapEval, the proposed CLIP-guided model generates more distinctive captions than the CIDEr-optimized model. We also show that our unsupervised grammar finetuning of the CLIP text encoder alleviates the degeneration problem of the naive CLIP reward. Lastly, we show human analysis where the annotators strongly prefer the CLIP reward to the CIDEr and MLE objectives according to various criteria. Code and Data: https://github.com/j-min/CLIP-Caption-Reward
abstract_zh: 现代图像字幕模型通常以文本相似性目标进行训练。然而，由于公共数据集中的参考标题通常描述最显着的常见对象，因此以文本相似性目标训练的模型往往会忽略图像与其他图像区分开来的特定和详细方面。为了生成更具描述性和独特的标题，我们建议使用 CLIP（一种在网络上的巨大图像文本对上进行训练的多模态编码器）来计算多模态相似性并将其用作奖励函数。我们还提出了一种简单的 CLIP 文本编码器微调策略，以改进不需要额外文本注释的语法。这完全消除了奖励计算期间对参考标题的需要。为了全面评估描述性字幕，我们引入了 FineCapEval，这是一个用于字幕评估的新数据集，具有细粒度的标准：整体、背景、对象、关系。在我们关于文本到图像检索和 FineCapEval 的实验中，所提出的 CLIP 引导模型比 CIDEr 优化模型生成了更独特的标题。我们还表明，我们对 CLIP 文本编码器的无监督语法微调减轻了朴素 CLIP 奖励的退化问题。最后，我们展示了人类分析，其中注释者根据各种标准强烈倾向于 CLIP 奖励而不是 CIDEr 和 MLE 目标。代码和数据：https://github.com/j-min/CLIP-Caption-Reward

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CLIP奖励函数的细粒度图像描述生成方法，通过多模态相似度计算优化描述生成，减少对参考文本的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统图像描述模型因依赖参考文本中的显著对象描述，常忽略图像的细节特征。为生成更具区分度的描述，需引入无需参考文本的多模态奖励机制。
AI.method: 使用CLIP计算图像-文本多模态相似度作为奖励函数，并对CLIP文本编码器进行无监督微调以提升语法质量。同时构建FineCapEval数据集进行细粒度评估。
AI.result: 在文本到图像检索和FineCapEval任务中，CLIP引导模型生成的描述显著优于CIDEr优化模型，且无监督微调有效缓解了CLIP奖励的退化问题。人类评估显示CLIP奖励在多维度指标上更受青睐。
AI.conclusion: CLIP奖励机制能有效提升图像描述的细粒度和区分度，无需依赖参考文本即可实现高质量描述生成。

We also show that our unsupervised grammar finetuning of the CLIP text encoder alleviates the degeneration problem of the naive CLIP reward. Lastly, we show human analysis where the annotators strongly prefer the CLIP reward to the CIDEr and MLE objectives according to various criteria. Code and Data: https://github.com/j-min/CLIP-Caption-Reward 现代图像字幕模型通常以文本相似性目标进行训练。然而，由于公共数据集中的参考标题通常描述最显着的常见对象，因此以文本相似性目标训练的模型往往会忽略图像与其他图像区分开来的特定和详细方面。为了生成更具描述性和独特的标题，我们建议使用 CLIP（一种在网络上的巨大图像文本对上进行训练的多模态编码器）来计算多模态相似性并将其用作奖励函数。我们还提出了一种简单的 CLIP 文本编码器微调策略，以改进不需要额外文本注释的语法。这完全消除了奖励计算期间对参考标题的需要。为了全面评估描述性字幕，我们引入了 FineCapEval，这是一个用于字幕评估的新数据集，具有细粒度的标准：整体、背景、对象、关系。在我们关于文本到图像检索和 FineCapEval 的实验中，所提出的 CLIP 引导模型比 CIDEr 优化模型生成了更独特的标题。我们还表明，我们对 CLIP 文本编码器的无监督语法微调减轻了朴素 CLIP 奖励的退化问题。最后，我们展示了人类分析，其中注释者根据各种标准强烈倾向于 CLIP 奖励而不是 CIDEr 和 MLE 目标。代码和数据：https://github.com/j-min/CLIP-Caption-Reward 本文提出一种基于CLIP奖励函数的细粒度图像描述生成方法，通过多模态相似度计算优化描述生成，减少对参考文本的依赖。 Jaemin Cho,Seunghyun Yoon,Ajinkya Kale,Franck Dernoncourt,Trung Bui,Mohit Bansal cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Lavanya Umapathy,Zhiyang Fu,Rohit Philip,Diego Martin,Maria Altbach,Ali Bilgin
title: Learning to segment with limited annotations: Self-supervised pretraining with regression and contrastive loss in MRI
title_zh: 学习使用有限注释进行分割：在 MRI 中进行回归和对比损失的自我监督预训练
comment: Presented at the Annual Conference of International Society for Magnetic Resonance in Medicine, London, UK. May 2022
comments: Presented at the Annual Conference of International Society for Magnetic Resonance in Medicine, London, UK. May 2022
abstract: Obtaining manual annotations for large datasets for supervised training of deep learning (DL) models is challenging. The availability of large unlabeled datasets compared to labeled ones motivate the use of self-supervised pretraining to initialize DL models for subsequent segmentation tasks. In this work, we consider two pre-training approaches for driving a DL model to learn different representations using: a) regression loss that exploits spatial dependencies within an image and b) contrastive loss that exploits semantic similarity between pairs of images. The effect of pretraining techniques is evaluated in two downstream segmentation applications using Magnetic Resonance (MR) images: a) liver segmentation in abdominal T2-weighted MR images and b) prostate segmentation in T2-weighted MR images of the prostate. We observed that DL models pretrained using self-supervision can be finetuned for comparable performance with fewer labeled datasets. Additionally, we also observed that initializing the DL model using contrastive loss based pretraining performed better than the regression loss.
summary: Obtaining manual annotations for large datasets for supervised training of deep learning (DL) models is challenging. The availability of large unlabeled datasets compared to labeled ones motivate the use of self-supervised pretraining to initialize DL models for subsequent segmentation tasks. In this work, we consider two pre-training approaches for driving a DL model to learn different representations using: a) regression loss that exploits spatial dependencies within an image and b) contrastive loss that exploits semantic similarity between pairs of images. The effect of pretraining techniques is evaluated in two downstream segmentation applications using Magnetic Resonance (MR) images: a) liver segmentation in abdominal T2-weighted MR images and b) prostate segmentation in T2-weighted MR images of the prostate. We observed that DL models pretrained using self-supervision can be finetuned for comparable performance with fewer labeled datasets. Additionally, we also observed that initializing the DL model using contrastive loss based pretraining performed better than the regression loss.
abstract_zh: 为深度学习 (DL) 模型的监督训练获取大型数据集的手动注释具有挑战性。与标记数据集相比，大量未标记数据集的可用性促使人们使用自监督预训练来初始化后续分割任务的深度学习模型。在这项工作中，我们考虑了两种预训练方法来驱动深度学习模型学习不同的表示：a）利用图像内的空间依赖性的回归损失和b）利用图像对之间的语义相似性的对比损失。使用磁共振（MR）图像在两个下游分割应用中评估预训练技术的效果：a）腹部T2加权MR图像中的肝脏分割和b）前列腺T2加权MR图像中的前列腺分割。我们观察到，使用自我监督预训练的深度学习模型可以通过更少的标记数据集进行微调，以获得可比的性能。此外，我们还观察到，使用基于对比损失的预训练来初始化 DL 模型比回归损失表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过自监督预训练结合回归损失和对比损失，提升MRI图像分割任务在有限标注数据下的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型训练依赖大量标注数据，而医学图像标注成本高昂，因此需利用未标注数据进行自监督预训练以减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 采用两种预训练方法：基于图像空间依赖关系的回归损失和基于图像语义相似性的对比损失，分别预训练模型后，在肝脏和前列腺分割任务中进行微调。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用对比损失预训练的模型在少量标注数据下可达到与传统方法相当的分割效果，且对比损失预训练优于回归损失预训练。
AI.conclusion: 对比损失驱动的自监督预训练能更有效提升医学图像分割模型在有限标注场景下的性能，为标注数据稀缺任务提供可行方案。

authors_text: Seongmin Park,Jihwa Lee
title: Unsupervised Abstractive Dialogue Summarization with Word Graphs and POV Conversion
title_zh: 使用词图和 POV 转换进行无监督抽象对话摘要
abstract: We advance the state-of-the-art in unsupervised abstractive dialogue summarization by utilizing multi-sentence compression graphs. Starting from well-founded assumptions about word graphs, we present simple but reliable path-reranking and topic segmentation schemes. Robustness of our method is demonstrated on datasets across multiple domains, including meetings, interviews, movie scripts, and day-to-day conversations. We also identify possible avenues to augment our heuristic-based system with deep learning. We open-source our code, to provide a strong, reproducible baseline for future research into unsupervised dialogue summarization.
summary: We advance the state-of-the-art in unsupervised abstractive dialogue summarization by utilizing multi-sentence compression graphs. Starting from well-founded assumptions about word graphs, we present simple but reliable path-reranking and topic segmentation schemes. Robustness of our method is demonstrated on datasets across multiple domains, including meetings, interviews, movie scripts, and day-to-day conversations. We also identify possible avenues to augment our heuristic-based system with deep learning. We open-source our code, to provide a strong, reproducible baseline for future research into unsupervised dialogue summarization.
abstract_zh: 我们通过利用多句子压缩图来推进无监督抽象对话摘要的最先进技术。从关于词图的有根据的假设出发，我们提出了简单但可靠的路径重排序和主题分割方案。我们的方法的稳健性在多个领域的数据集上得到了证明，包括会议、采访、电影剧本和日常对话。我们还确定了通过深度学习增强启发式系统的可能途径。我们开源我们的代码，为未来的无监督对话摘要研究提供强大的、可重复的基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于词图和视角转换的无监督抽象对话摘要方法
AI.motivation: 现有无监督对话摘要方法存在质量不稳定、领域适应性差等问题，需提升摘要生成的鲁棒性和通用性
AI.method: 构建多句压缩词图，结合路径重排序与主题分割策略，采用启发式规则与深度学习结合的混合方法
AI.result: 在会议、访谈、剧本等多领域数据集验证方法有效性，开源代码为后续研究提供可复现基线
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无监督对话摘要提供可靠解决方案，未来可探索更深度的神经网络融合方案

authors_text: Faraz Waseem,Sanjit Menon,Haotian Xu,Debashis Mondal
title: VizInspect Pro -- Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) solution
title_zh: VizInspect Pro -- 自动光学检测 (AOI) 解决方案
abstract: Traditional vision based Automated Optical Inspection (referred to as AOI in paper) systems present multiple challenges in factory settings including inability to scale across multiple product lines, requirement of vendor programming expertise, little tolerance to variations and lack of cloud connectivity for aggregated insights. The lack of flexibility in these systems presents a unique opportunity for a deep learning based AOI system specifically for factory automation. The proposed solution, VizInspect pro is a generic computer vision based AOI solution built on top of Leo - An edge AI platform. Innovative features that overcome challenges of traditional vision systems include deep learning based image analysis which combines the power of self-learning with high speed and accuracy, an intuitive user interface to configure inspection profiles in minutes without ML or vision expertise and the ability to solve complex inspection challenges while being tolerant to deviations and unpredictable defects. This solution has been validated by multiple external enterprise customers with confirmed value propositions. In this paper we show you how this solution and platform solved problems around model development, deployment, scaling multiple inferences and visualizations.
summary: Traditional vision based Automated Optical Inspection (referred to as AOI in paper) systems present multiple challenges in factory settings including inability to scale across multiple product lines, requirement of vendor programming expertise, little tolerance to variations and lack of cloud connectivity for aggregated insights. The lack of flexibility in these systems presents a unique opportunity for a deep learning based AOI system specifically for factory automation. The proposed solution, VizInspect pro is a generic computer vision based AOI solution built on top of Leo - An edge AI platform. Innovative features that overcome challenges of traditional vision systems include deep learning based image analysis which combines the power of self-learning with high speed and accuracy, an intuitive user interface to configure inspection profiles in minutes without ML or vision expertise and the ability to solve complex inspection challenges while being tolerant to deviations and unpredictable defects. This solution has been validated by multiple external enterprise customers with confirmed value propositions. In this paper we show you how this solution and platform solved problems around model development, deployment, scaling multiple inferences and visualizations.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于视觉的自动光学检测（在论文中称为 AOI）系统在工厂环境中面临多种挑战，包括无法跨多个产品线扩展、需要供应商编程专业知识、对变化的容忍度较低以及缺乏聚合洞察的云连接。这些系统缺乏灵活性，为专门针对工厂自动化的基于深度学习的 AOI 系统提供了独特的机会。所提出的解决方案 VizInspect pro 是一种基于通用计算机视觉的 AOI 解决方案，构建在 Leo（边缘人工智能平台）之上。克服传统视觉系统挑战的创新功能包括基于深度学习的图像分析，它将自学习的力量与高速和准确相结合，直观的用户界面，无需机器学习或视觉专业知识即可在几分钟内配置检查配置文件，以及解决复杂检查挑战的能力，同时容忍偏差和不可预测的缺陷。该解决方案已得到多个外部企业客户的验证，并具有确认的价值主张。在本文中，我们向您展示该解决方案和平台如何解决模型开发、部署、扩展多个推理和可视化方面的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动化光学检测（AOI）解决方案VizInspect Pro，旨在解决传统视觉检测系统的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统AOI系统存在跨产品线扩展困难、依赖厂商编程专长、对变异容忍度低以及缺乏云连接等问题，亟需一种更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Leo边缘AI平台构建通用计算机视觉AOI系统，结合深度学习图像分析、直观用户界面及复杂检测容忍能力。
AI.result: 通过多家企业客户验证，成功解决了模型开发、部署、多推理扩展及可视化等实际问题。
AI.conclusion: VizInspect Pro通过深度学习与边缘AI技术有效克服了传统AOI的挑战，提供了可扩展且易用的工厂自动化检测方案。

search_text: VizInspect Pro -- Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) solution VizInspect Pro -- 自动光学检测 (AOI) 解决方案 Traditional vision based Automated Optical Inspection (referred to as AOI in paper) systems present multiple challenges in factory settings including inability to scale across multiple product lines, requirement of vendor programming expertise, little tolerance to variations and lack of cloud connectivity for aggregated insights. The lack of flexibility in these systems presents a unique opportunity for a deep learning based AOI system specifically for factory automation. The proposed solution, VizInspect pro is a generic computer vision based AOI solution built on top of Leo - An edge AI platform. Innovative features that overcome challenges of traditional vision systems include deep learning based image analysis which combines the power of self-learning with high speed and accuracy, an intuitive user interface to configure inspection profiles in minutes without ML or vision expertise and the ability to solve complex inspection challenges while being tolerant to deviations and unpredictable defects. This solution has been validated by multiple external enterprise customers with confirmed value propositions. In this paper we show you how this solution and platform solved problems around model development, deployment, scaling multiple inferences and visualizations. 传统的基于视觉的自动光学检测（在论文中称为 AOI）系统在工厂环境中面临多种挑战，包括无法跨多个产品线扩展、需要供应商编程专业知识、对变化的容忍度较低以及缺乏聚合洞察的云连接。这些系统缺乏灵活性，为专门针对工厂自动化的基于深度学习的 AOI 系统提供了独特的机会。所提出的解决方案 VizInspect pro 是一种基于通用计算机视觉的 AOI 解决方案，构建在 Leo（边缘人工智能平台）之上。克服传统视觉系统挑战的创新功能包括基于深度学习的图像分析，它将自学习的力量与高速和准确相结合，直观的用户界面，无需机器学习或视觉专业知识即可在几分钟内配置检查配置文件，以及解决复杂检查挑战的能力，同时容忍偏差和不可预测的缺陷。该解决方案已得到多个外部企业客户的验证，并具有确认的价值主张。在本文中，我们向您展示该解决方案和平台如何解决模型开发、部署、扩展多个推理和可视化方面的问题。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动化光学检测（AOI）解决方案VizInspect Pro，旨在解决传统视觉检测系统的局限性。 Faraz Waseem,Sanjit Menon,Haotian Xu,Debashis Mondal cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Niladri S. Chatterji,Saminul Haque,Tatsunori Hashimoto
title: Undersampling is a Minimax Optimal Robustness Intervention in Nonparametric Classification
title_zh: 欠采样是非参数分类中的极小极大最优鲁棒性干预
abstract: While a broad range of techniques have been proposed to tackle distribution shift, the simple baseline of training on an $\textit{undersampled}$ balanced dataset often achieves close to state-of-the-art-accuracy across several popular benchmarks. This is rather surprising, since undersampling algorithms discard excess majority group data. To understand this phenomenon, we ask if learning is fundamentally constrained by a lack of minority group samples. We prove that this is indeed the case in the setting of nonparametric binary classification. Our results show that in the worst case, an algorithm cannot outperform undersampling unless there is a high degree of overlap between the train and test distributions (which is unlikely to be the case in real-world datasets), or if the algorithm leverages additional structure about the distribution shift. In particular, in the case of label shift we show that there is always an undersampling algorithm that is minimax optimal. In the case of group-covariate shift we show that there is an undersampling algorithm that is minimax optimal when the overlap between the group distributions is small. We also perform an experimental case study on a label shift dataset and find that in line with our theory, the test accuracy of robust neural network classifiers is constrained by the number of minority samples.
summary: While a broad range of techniques have been proposed to tackle distribution shift, the simple baseline of training on an $\textit{undersampled}$ balanced dataset often achieves close to state-of-the-art-accuracy across several popular benchmarks. This is rather surprising, since undersampling algorithms discard excess majority group data. To understand this phenomenon, we ask if learning is fundamentally constrained by a lack of minority group samples. We prove that this is indeed the case in the setting of nonparametric binary classification. Our results show that in the worst case, an algorithm cannot outperform undersampling unless there is a high degree of overlap between the train and test distributions (which is unlikely to be the case in real-world datasets), or if the algorithm leverages additional structure about the distribution shift. In particular, in the case of label shift we show that there is always an undersampling algorithm that is minimax optimal. In the case of group-covariate shift we show that there is an undersampling algorithm that is minimax optimal when the overlap between the group distributions is small. We also perform an experimental case study on a label shift dataset and find that in line with our theory, the test accuracy of robust neural network classifiers is constrained by the number of minority samples.
abstract_zh: 虽然已经提出了广泛的技术来解决分布偏移问题，但在 $\textit{undersampled}$ 平衡数据集上进行简单的训练基线通常可以在几个流行的基准测试中达到接近最先进的精度。这是相当令人惊讶的，因为欠采样算法会丢弃多余的多数群体数据。为了理解这一现象，我们要问学习是否从根本上受到少数群体样本缺乏的限制。我们证明在非参数二元分类的设置中确实是这种情况。我们的结果表明，在最坏的情况下，除非训练分布和测试分布之间存在高度重叠（现实数据集中不太可能出现这种情况），或者算法利用有关分布偏移的附加结构，否则算法无法优于欠采样。特别是，在标签移位的情况下，我们表明总是存在一种最小最大最优的欠采样算法。在组协变量移位的情况下，我们表明，当组分布之间的重叠很小时，存在一种最小最大最优的欠采样算法。我们还对标签移位数据集进行了实验案例研究，发现根据我们的理论，鲁棒神经网络分类器的测试准确性受到少数样本数量的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在非参数分类中，欠采样作为应对分布偏移的最优鲁棒性干预方法的理论依据。
AI.motivation: 尽管欠采样方法简单且丢弃多数类样本，但其在多个基准测试中表现接近最先进水平，这与直觉相悖，需探究其背后理论原因。
AI.method: 通过非参数二分类框架的理论分析，证明学习性能受限于少数类样本数量，并推导欠采样在标签偏移和群体协变量偏移场景下的最小最大优化性。
AI.result: 理论证明欠采样在标签偏移下始终是最优的，且在群体协变量偏移下当分布重叠较小时亦然；实验验证了鲁棒神经网络分类器的测试精度受少数类样本数量限制。
AI.conclusion: 欠采样在特定分布偏移条件下具有理论最优性，解释了其在实际数据集中的经验有效性，为鲁棒分类提供了新视角。

authors_text: Tao Pu,Tianshui Chen,Hefeng Wu,Yukai Shi,Zhijing Yang,Liang Lin
title: Dual-Perspective Semantic-Aware Representation Blending for Multi-Label Image Recognition with Partial Labels
title_zh: 用于部分标签多标签图像识别的双视角语义感知表示混合
comment: Technical Report. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.02172
comments: Technical Report. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.02172
abstract: Despite achieving impressive progress, current multi-label image recognition (MLR) algorithms heavily depend on large-scale datasets with complete labels, making collecting large-scale datasets extremely time-consuming and labor-intensive. Training the multi-label image recognition models with partial labels (MLR-PL) is an alternative way, in which merely some labels are known while others are unknown for each image. However, current MLP-PL algorithms rely on pre-trained image similarity models or iteratively updating the image classification models to generate pseudo labels for the unknown labels. Thus, they depend on a certain amount of annotations and inevitably suffer from obvious performance drops, especially when the known label proportion is low. To address this dilemma, we propose a dual-perspective semantic-aware representation blending (DSRB) that blends multi-granularity category-specific semantic representation across different images, from instance and prototype perspective respectively, to transfer information of known labels to complement unknown labels. Specifically, an instance-perspective representation blending (IPRB) module is designed to blend the representations of the known labels in an image with the representations of the corresponding unknown labels in another image to complement these unknown labels. Meanwhile, a prototype-perspective representation blending (PPRB) module is introduced to learn more stable representation prototypes for each category and blends the representation of unknown labels with the prototypes of corresponding labels, in a location-sensitive manner, to complement these unknown labels. Extensive experiments on the MS-COCO, Visual Genome, and Pascal VOC 2007 datasets show that the proposed DSRB consistently outperforms current state-of-the-art algorithms on all known label proportion settings.
summary: Despite achieving impressive progress, current multi-label image recognition (MLR) algorithms heavily depend on large-scale datasets with complete labels, making collecting large-scale datasets extremely time-consuming and labor-intensive. Training the multi-label image recognition models with partial labels (MLR-PL) is an alternative way, in which merely some labels are known while others are unknown for each image. However, current MLP-PL algorithms rely on pre-trained image similarity models or iteratively updating the image classification models to generate pseudo labels for the unknown labels. Thus, they depend on a certain amount of annotations and inevitably suffer from obvious performance drops, especially when the known label proportion is low. To address this dilemma, we propose a dual-perspective semantic-aware representation blending (DSRB) that blends multi-granularity category-specific semantic representation across different images, from instance and prototype perspective respectively, to transfer information of known labels to complement unknown labels. Specifically, an instance-perspective representation blending (IPRB) module is designed to blend the representations of the known labels in an image with the representations of the corresponding unknown labels in another image to complement these unknown labels. Meanwhile, a prototype-perspective representation blending (PPRB) module is introduced to learn more stable representation prototypes for each category and blends the representation of unknown labels with the prototypes of corresponding labels, in a location-sensitive manner, to complement these unknown labels. Extensive experiments on the MS-COCO, Visual Genome, and Pascal VOC 2007 datasets show that the proposed DSRB consistently outperforms current state-of-the-art algorithms on all known label proportion settings.
abstract_zh: 尽管取得了令人瞩目的进展，但当前的多标签图像识别（MLR）算法严重依赖于具有完整标签的大规模数据集，使得收集大规模数据集极其耗时且费力。使用部分标签训练多标签图像识别模型（MLR-PL）是另一种方法，其中每个图像仅知道一些标签，而其他标签则未知。然而，当前的MLP-PL算法依赖于预先训练的图像相似性模型或迭代更新图像分类模型来为未知标签生成伪标签。因此，它们依赖于一定数量的注释，并且不可避免地会遭受明显的性能下降，特别是当已知标签比例较低时。为了解决这个困境，我们提出了一种双视角语义感知表示混合（DSRB），它分别从实例和原型角度混合不同图像之间的多粒度类别特定语义表示，以传输已知标签的信息来补充未知标签。具体来说，实例视角表示混合（IPRB）模块被设计为将图像中已知标签的表示与另一图像中相应未知标签的表示混合以补充这些未知标签。同时，引入原型透视表示混合（PPRB）模块来学习每个类别更稳定的表示原型，并以位置敏感的方式将未知标签的表示与相应标签的原型混合，以补充这些未知标签。对 MS-COCO、Visual Genome 和 Pascal VOC 2007 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 DSRB 在所有已知标签比例设置上始终优于当前最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双视角语义感知表示融合方法（DSRB），用于解决多标签图像识别中部分标签（Partial Labels）的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有部分标签多标签图像识别方法依赖预训练模型或迭代生成伪标签，需大量标注且在已知标签比例低时性能显著下降，亟需无需额外标注且能有效传递已知标签信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计双模块框架：实例视角表示融合（IPRB）跨图像混合已知标签与未知标签表示，原型视角表示融合（PPRB）通过稳定类别原型以位置敏感方式补全未知标签。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO、Visual Genome和Pascal VOC 2007数据集上，DSRB在所有已知标签比例设置下均优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: DSRB通过双视角语义表示融合有效解决部分标签问题，在无额外标注情况下提升多标签图像识别性能。

ai_content_json.conclusion: DSRB通过双视角语义表示融合有效解决部分标签问题，在无额外标注情况下提升多标签图像识别性能。

search_text: Dual-Perspective Semantic-Aware Representation Blending for Multi-Label Image Recognition with Partial Labels 用于部分标签多标签图像识别的双视角语义感知表示混合 Despite achieving impressive progress, current multi-label image recognition (MLR) algorithms heavily depend on large-scale datasets with complete labels, making collecting large-scale datasets extremely time-consuming and labor-intensive. Training the multi-label image recognition models with partial labels (MLR-PL) is an alternative way, in which merely some labels are known while others are unknown for each image. However, current MLP-PL algorithms rely on pre-trained image similarity models or iteratively updating the image classification models to generate pseudo labels for the unknown labels. Thus, they depend on a certain amount of annotations and inevitably suffer from obvious performance drops, especially when the known label proportion is low. To address this dilemma, we propose a dual-perspective semantic-aware representation blending (DSRB) that blends multi-granularity category-specific semantic representation across different images, from instance and prototype perspective respectively, to transfer information of known labels to complement unknown labels. Specifically, an instance-perspective representation blending (IPRB) module is designed to blend the representations of the known labels in an image with the representations of the corresponding unknown labels in another image to complement these unknown labels. Meanwhile, a prototype-perspective representation blending (PPRB) module is introduced to learn more stable representation prototypes for each category and blends the representation of unknown labels with the prototypes of corresponding labels, in a location-sensitive manner, to complement these unknown labels. Extensive experiments on the MS-COCO, Visual Genome, and Pascal VOC 2007 datasets show that the proposed DSRB consistently outperforms current state-of-the-art algorithms on all known label proportion settings. 尽管取得了令人瞩目的进展，但当前的多标签图像识别（MLR）算法严重依赖于具有完整标签的大规模数据集，使得收集大规模数据集极其耗时且费力。使用部分标签训练多标签图像识别模型（MLR-PL）是另一种方法，其中每个图像仅知道一些标签，而其他标签则未知。然而，当前的MLP-PL算法依赖于预先训练的图像相似性模型或迭代更新图像分类模型来为未知标签生成伪标签。因此，它们依赖于一定数量的注释，并且不可避免地会遭受明显的性能下降，特别是当已知标签比例较低时。为了解决这个困境，我们提出了一种双视角语义感知表示混合（DSRB），它分别从实例和原型角度混合不同图像之间的多粒度类别特定语义表示，以传输已知标签的信息来补充未知标签。具体来说，实例视角表示混合（IPRB）模块被设计为将图像中已知标签的表示与另一图像中相应未知标签的表示混合以补充这些未知标签。同时，引入原型透视表示混合（PPRB）模块来学习每个类别更稳定的表示原型，并以位置敏感的方式将未知标签的表示与相应标签的原型混合，以补充这些未知标签。对 MS-COCO、Visual Genome 和 Pascal VOC 2007 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 DSRB 在所有已知标签比例设置上始终优于当前最先进的算法。 本文提出一种双视角语义感知表示融合方法（DSRB），用于解决多标签图像识别中部分标签（Partial Labels）的挑战。 Tao Pu,Tianshui Chen,Hefeng Wu,Yukai Shi,Zhijing Yang,Liang Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Mingxuan Lu,Zhichao Han,Susie Xi Rao,Zitao Zhang,Yang Zhao,Yinan Shan,Ramesh Raghunathan,Ce Zhang,Jiawei Jiang
title: BRIGHT -- Graph Neural Networks in Real-Time Fraud Detection
title_zh: BRIGHT——实时欺诈检测中的图神经网络
abstract: Detecting fraudulent transactions is an essential component to control risk in e-commerce marketplaces. Apart from rule-based and machine learning filters that are already deployed in production, we want to enable efficient real-time inference with graph neural networks (GNNs), which is useful to catch multihop risk propagation in a transaction graph. However, two challenges arise in the implementation of GNNs in production. First, future information in a dynamic graph should not be considered in message passing to predict the past. Second, the latency of graph query and GNN model inference is usually up to hundreds of milliseconds, which is costly for some critical online services. To tackle these challenges, we propose a Batch and Real-time Inception GrapH Topology (BRIGHT) framework to conduct an end-to-end GNN learning that allows efficient online real-time inference. BRIGHT framework consists of a graph transformation module (Two-Stage Directed Graph) and a corresponding GNN architecture (Lambda Neural Network). The Two-Stage Directed Graph guarantees that the information passed through neighbors is only from the historical payment transactions. It consists of two subgraphs representing historical relationships and real-time links, respectively. The Lambda Neural Network decouples inference into two stages: batch inference of entity embeddings and real-time inference of transaction prediction. Our experiments show that BRIGHT outperforms the baseline models by >2\% in average w.r.t.~precision. Furthermore, BRIGHT is computationally efficient for real-time fraud detection. Regarding end-to-end performance (including neighbor query and inference), BRIGHT can reduce the P99 latency by >75\%. For the inference stage, our speedup is on average 7.8$\times$ compared to the traditional GNN.
summary: Detecting fraudulent transactions is an essential component to control risk in e-commerce marketplaces. Apart from rule-based and machine learning filters that are already deployed in production, we want to enable efficient real-time inference with graph neural networks (GNNs), which is useful to catch multihop risk propagation in a transaction graph. However, two challenges arise in the implementation of GNNs in production. First, future information in a dynamic graph should not be considered in message passing to predict the past. Second, the latency of graph query and GNN model inference is usually up to hundreds of milliseconds, which is costly for some critical online services. To tackle these challenges, we propose a Batch and Real-time Inception GrapH Topology (BRIGHT) framework to conduct an end-to-end GNN learning that allows efficient online real-time inference. BRIGHT framework consists of a graph transformation module (Two-Stage Directed Graph) and a corresponding GNN architecture (Lambda Neural Network). The Two-Stage Directed Graph guarantees that the information passed through neighbors is only from the historical payment transactions. It consists of two subgraphs representing historical relationships and real-time links, respectively. The Lambda Neural Network decouples inference into two stages: batch inference of entity embeddings and real-time inference of transaction prediction. Our experiments show that BRIGHT outperforms the baseline models by >2\% in average w.r.t.~precision. Furthermore, BRIGHT is computationally efficient for real-time fraud detection. Regarding end-to-end performance (including neighbor query and inference), BRIGHT can reduce the P99 latency by >75\%. For the inference stage, our speedup is on average 7.8$\times$ compared to the traditional GNN.
abstract_zh: 检测欺诈交易是控制​​电子商务市场风险的重要组成部分。除了已经在生产中部署的基于规则和机器学习过滤器之外，我们还希望通过图神经网络（GNN）实现高效的实时推理，这对于捕获交易图中的多跳风险传播很有用。然而，在生产中实施 GNN 时出现了两个挑战。首先，在消息传递中不应考虑动态图中的未来信息来预测过去。其次，图查询和GNN模型推理的延迟通常高达数百毫秒，这对于一些关键的在线服务来说成本高昂。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了批量和实时初始图拓扑（BRIGHT）框架来进行端到端的 GNN 学习，从而实现高效的在线实时推理。 BRIGHT框架由图转换模块（两阶段有向图）和相应的GNN架构（Lambda神经网络）组成。两阶段有向图保证通过邻居传递的信息仅来自历史支付交易。它由两个子图组成，分别代表历史关系和实时链接。 Lambda 神经网络将推理解耦为两个阶段：实体嵌入的批量推理和交易预测的实时推理。我们的实验表明，BRIGHT 在平均精度方面优于基线模型 >2%。此外，BRIGHT 在实时欺诈检测方面具有计算效率。在端到端性能（包括邻居查询和推理）方面，BRIGHT 可以将 P99 延迟降低 >75\%。对于推理阶段，与传统 GNN 相比，我们的平均加速比为 7.8$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BRIGHT框架，通过图神经网络实现实时欺诈交易检测，解决动态图中信息时序约束和高延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有欺诈检测方法难以捕捉多跳风险传播，而GNN在实时场景下面临未来信息干扰和高延迟两大挑战。
AI.method: 设计两阶段有向图结构分离历史与实时数据，结合Lambda神经网络分阶段处理实体嵌入与交易预测。
AI.result: 在精度上超越基线模型2%，端到端延迟P99降低75%，推理阶段速度提升7.8倍。
AI.conclusion: BRIGHT有效解决了GNN在实时欺诈检测中的时序约束与效率问题，具有显著应用价值。

authors_text: Zheqi Shen,Zijin Wan,Yan Gu,Yihan Sun
title: Many Sequential Iterative Algorithms Can Be Parallel and (Nearly) Work-efficient
title_zh: 许多顺序迭代算法可以并行并且（几乎）高效工作
abstract: To design efficient parallel algorithms, some recent papers showed that many sequential iterative algorithms can be directly parallelized but there are still challenges in achieving work-efficiency and high-parallelism. Work-efficiency can be hard for certain problems where the number of dependences is asymptotically more than optimal sequential work bound. To achieve high-parallelism, we want to process as many objects as possible in parallel. The goal is to achieve $\tilde{O}(D)$ span for a problem with the deepest dependence length $D$. We refer to this property as round-efficiency. In this paper, we show work-efficient and round-efficient algorithms for a variety of classic problems and propose general approaches to do so. To efficiently parallelize many sequential iterative algorithms, we propose the phase-parallel framework. The framework assigns a rank to each object and processes them accordingly. All objects with the same rank can be processed in parallel. To enable work-efficiency and high parallelism, we use two types of general techniques. Type 1 algorithms aim to use range queries to extract all objects with the same rank, such that we avoid evaluating all the dependences. We discuss activity selection, unlimited knapsack, and more using Type 1 framework. Type 2 algorithms aim to wake up an object when the last object it depends on is finished. We discuss activity selection, longest increasing subsequence (LIS), and many other algorithms using Type 2 framework. All of our algorithms are (nearly) work-efficient and round-efficient. Many of them improve previous best bounds, and some of them are the first to achieve work-efficiency with round-efficiency. We also implement many of them. On inputs with reasonable dependence depth, our algorithms are highly parallelized and significantly outperform their sequential counterparts.
summary: To design efficient parallel algorithms, some recent papers showed that many sequential iterative algorithms can be directly parallelized but there are still challenges in achieving work-efficiency and high-parallelism. Work-efficiency can be hard for certain problems where the number of dependences is asymptotically more than optimal sequential work bound. To achieve high-parallelism, we want to process as many objects as possible in parallel. The goal is to achieve $\tilde{O}(D)$ span for a problem with the deepest dependence length $D$. We refer to this property as round-efficiency. In this paper, we show work-efficient and round-efficient algorithms for a variety of classic problems and propose general approaches to do so. To efficiently parallelize many sequential iterative algorithms, we propose the phase-parallel framework. The framework assigns a rank to each object and processes them accordingly. All objects with the same rank can be processed in parallel. To enable work-efficiency and high parallelism, we use two types of general techniques. Type 1 algorithms aim to use range queries to extract all objects with the same rank, such that we avoid evaluating all the dependences. We discuss activity selection, unlimited knapsack, and more using Type 1 framework. Type 2 algorithms aim to wake up an object when the last object it depends on is finished. We discuss activity selection, longest increasing subsequence (LIS), and many other algorithms using Type 2 framework. All of our algorithms are (nearly) work-efficient and round-efficient. Many of them improve previous best bounds, and some of them are the first to achieve work-efficiency with round-efficiency. We also implement many of them. On inputs with reasonable dependence depth, our algorithms are highly parallelized and significantly outperform their sequential counterparts.
abstract_zh: 为了设计高效的并行算法，最近的一些论文表明，许多顺序迭代算法可以直接并行化，但在实现工作效率和高并行性方面仍然存在挑战。对于某些问题来说，工作效率可能会很困难，因为这些问题的依赖性数量渐近超过最佳顺序工作界限。为了实现高并行性，我们希望并行处理尽可能多的对象。目标是针对具有最深依赖长度 $D$ 的问题实现 $\tilde{O}(D)$ 跨度。我们将此属性称为回合效率。在本文中，我们展示了针对各种经典问题的工作高效和轮次高效的算法，并提出了实现此目的的通用方法。为了有效地并行化许多顺序迭代算法，我们提出了相位并行框架。该框架为每个对象分配一个等级并相应地处理它们。所有具有相同等级的对象都可以并行处理。为了实现工作效率和高并行性，我们使用两种通用技术。类型 1 算法旨在使用范围查询来提取具有相同排名的所有对象，这样我们就可以避免评估所有依赖关系。我们使用类型 1 框架讨论活动选择、无限背包等。类型 2 算法旨在当对象所依赖的最后一个对象完成时唤醒该对象。我们使用 Type 2 框架讨论活动选择、最长递增子序列 (LIS) 和许多其他算法。我们所有的算法（几乎）都具有工作效率和轮效率。他们中的许多人改进了以前的最佳界限，其中一些人首次以回合效率实现了工作效率。我们还实施了其中许多措施。在具有合理依赖深度的输入上，我们的算法是高度并行的，并且显着优于顺序算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种相位并行框架，将多种顺序迭代算法高效并行化，并实现接近工作效率和轮次效率。
AI.motivation: 现有并行算法在处理依赖关系复杂的问题时难以兼顾工作效率与高并行度，需解决深度依赖链带来的性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计相位并行框架，通过对象排名分组并行处理，结合两类通用技术：类型1使用范围查询减少依赖评估，类型2通过依赖完成状态唤醒对象。
AI.result: 为经典问题（如活动选择、最长递增子序列）提供了近似工作高效且轮次高效的算法，部分算法首次实现双效合一，并在实际测试中显著超越顺序算法。
AI.conclusion: 相位并行框架有效平衡了并行性与工作量，为顺序迭代算法的并行化提供了普适性方案，推动了高效并行计算的发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种相位并行框架，将多种顺序迭代算法高效并行化，并实现接近工作效率和轮次效率。

ai_content.result: 为经典问题（如活动选择、最长递增子序列）提供了近似工作高效且轮次高效的算法，部分算法首次实现双效合一，并在实际测试中显著超越顺序算法。
ai_content.conclusion: 相位并行框架有效平衡了并行性与工作量，为顺序迭代算法的并行化提供了普适性方案，推动了高效并行计算的发展。

search_text: Many Sequential Iterative Algorithms Can Be Parallel and (Nearly) Work-efficient 许多顺序迭代算法可以并行并且（几乎）高效工作 To design efficient parallel algorithms, some recent papers showed that many sequential iterative algorithms can be directly parallelized but there are still challenges in achieving work-efficiency and high-parallelism. Work-efficiency can be hard for certain problems where the number of dependences is asymptotically more than optimal sequential work bound. To achieve high-parallelism, we want to process as many objects as possible in parallel. The goal is to achieve $\tilde{O}(D)$ span for a problem with the deepest dependence length $D$. We refer to this property as round-efficiency. In this paper, we show work-efficient and round-efficient algorithms for a variety of classic problems and propose general approaches to do so. To efficiently parallelize many sequential iterative algorithms, we propose the phase-parallel framework. The framework assigns a rank to each object and processes them accordingly. All objects with the same rank can be processed in parallel. To enable work-efficiency and high parallelism, we use two types of general techniques. Type 1 algorithms aim to use range queries to extract all objects with the same rank, such that we avoid evaluating all the dependences. We discuss activity selection, unlimited knapsack, and more using Type 1 framework. Type 2 algorithms aim to wake up an object when the last object it depends on is finished. We discuss activity selection, longest increasing subsequence (LIS), and many other algorithms using Type 2 framework. All of our algorithms are (nearly) work-efficient and round-efficient. Many of them improve previous best bounds, and some of them are the first to achieve work-efficiency with round-efficiency. We also implement many of them. On inputs with reasonable dependence depth, our algorithms are highly parallelized and significantly outperform their sequential counterparts. 为了设计高效的并行算法，最近的一些论文表明，许多顺序迭代算法可以直接并行化，但在实现工作效率和高并行性方面仍然存在挑战。对于某些问题来说，工作效率可能会很困难，因为这些问题的依赖性数量渐近超过最佳顺序工作界限。为了实现高并行性，我们希望并行处理尽可能多的对象。目标是针对具有最深依赖长度 $D$ 的问题实现 $\tilde{O}(D)$ 跨度。我们将此属性称为回合效率。在本文中，我们展示了针对各种经典问题的工作高效和轮次高效的算法，并提出了实现此目的的通用方法。为了有效地并行化许多顺序迭代算法，我们提出了相位并行框架。该框架为每个对象分配一个等级并相应地处理它们。所有具有相同等级的对象都可以并行处理。为了实现工作效率和高并行性，我们使用两种通用技术。类型 1 算法旨在使用范围查询来提取具有相同排名的所有对象，这样我们就可以避免评估所有依赖关系。我们使用类型 1 框架讨论活动选择、无限背包等。类型 2 算法旨在当对象所依赖的最后一个对象完成时唤醒该对象。我们使用 Type 2 框架讨论活动选择、最长递增子序列 (LIS) 和许多其他算法。我们所有的算法（几乎）都具有工作效率和轮效率。他们中的许多人改进了以前的最佳界限，其中一些人首次以回合效率实现了工作效率。我们还实施了其中许多措施。在具有合理依赖深度的输入上，我们的算法是高度并行的，并且显着优于顺序算法。 本文提出了一种相位并行框架，将多种顺序迭代算法高效并行化，并实现接近工作效率和轮次效率。 Zheqi Shen,Zijin Wan,Yan Gu,Yihan Sun cs.DS,cs.DC

authors_text: Amir Joudaki,Hadi Daneshmand,Francis Bach
title: On Bridging the Gap between Mean Field and Finite Width in Deep Random Neural Networks with Batch Normalization
title_zh: 利用批量归一化弥合深度随机神经网络中平均场和有限宽度之间的差距
abstract: Mean field theory is widely used in the theoretical studies of neural networks. In this paper, we analyze the role of depth in the concentration of mean-field predictions, specifically for deep multilayer perceptron (MLP) with batch normalization (BN) at initialization. By scaling the network width to infinity, it is postulated that the mean-field predictions suffer from layer-wise errors that amplify with depth. We demonstrate that BN stabilizes the distribution of representations that avoids the error propagation of mean-field predictions. This stabilization, which is characterized by a geometric mixing property, allows us to establish concentration bounds for mean field predictions in infinitely-deep neural networks with a finite width.
summary: Mean field theory is widely used in the theoretical studies of neural networks. In this paper, we analyze the role of depth in the concentration of mean-field predictions, specifically for deep multilayer perceptron (MLP) with batch normalization (BN) at initialization. By scaling the network width to infinity, it is postulated that the mean-field predictions suffer from layer-wise errors that amplify with depth. We demonstrate that BN stabilizes the distribution of representations that avoids the error propagation of mean-field predictions. This stabilization, which is characterized by a geometric mixing property, allows us to establish concentration bounds for mean field predictions in infinitely-deep neural networks with a finite width.
abstract_zh: 平均场理论广泛应用于神经网络的理论研究中。在本文中，我们分析了深度在平均场预测浓度中的作用，特别是对于初始化时具有批量归一化（BN）的深度多层感知器（MLP）。通过将网络宽度缩放至无穷大，假设平均场预测会遭受随深度放大的逐层误差。我们证明 BN 稳定了表示的分布，避免了平均场预测的误差传播。这种以几何混合特性为特征的稳定性使我们能够在具有有限宽度的无限深神经网络中建立平均场预测的浓度界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了批量归一化（BN）在无限深度神经网络中如何弥合均场理论与有限宽度之间的差距，分析深度对均场预测集中性的影响。
AI.motivation: 均场理论在神经网络理论研究中广泛应用，但其在深度网络中可能因层间误差累积导致预测偏差，而BN的引入可能缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 通过将网络宽度扩展至无穷大，分析深度对均场预测误差的影响，并利用几何混合特性证明BN如何稳定表示分布以抑制误差传播。
AI.result: BN通过稳定表示分布避免了均场预测的误差传播，从而在有限宽度的无限深度网络中建立了均场预测的集中性界。
AI.conclusion: BN的引入有效缓解了均场理论在深度网络中的误差放大问题，为理解深度神经网络的动态提供了理论支持。
