authors_text: Carlos Gómez-Huélamo,Marcos V. Conde,Miguel Ortiz
title: Exploring Map-based Features for Efficient Attention-based Vehicle Motion Prediction
title_zh: 探索基于地图的特征以实现基于注意力的高效车辆运动预测
abstract: Motion prediction (MP) of multiple agents is a crucial task in arbitrarily complex environments, from social robots to self-driving cars. Current approaches tackle this problem using end-to-end networks, where the input data is usually a rendered top-view of the scene and the past trajectories of all the agents; leveraging this information is a must to obtain optimal performance. In that sense, a reliable Autonomous Driving (AD) system must produce reasonable predictions on time, however, despite many of these approaches use simple ConvNets and LSTMs, models might not be efficient enough for real-time applications when using both sources of information (map and trajectory history). Moreover, the performance of these models highly depends on the amount of training data, which can be expensive (particularly the annotated HD maps). In this work, we explore how to achieve competitive performance on the Argoverse 1.0 Benchmark using efficient attention-based models, which take as input the past trajectories and map-based features from minimal map information to ensure efficient and reliable MP. These features represent interpretable information as the driveable area and plausible goal points, in opposition to black-box CNN-based methods for map processing.
summary: Motion prediction (MP) of multiple agents is a crucial task in arbitrarily complex environments, from social robots to self-driving cars. Current approaches tackle this problem using end-to-end networks, where the input data is usually a rendered top-view of the scene and the past trajectories of all the agents; leveraging this information is a must to obtain optimal performance. In that sense, a reliable Autonomous Driving (AD) system must produce reasonable predictions on time, however, despite many of these approaches use simple ConvNets and LSTMs, models might not be efficient enough for real-time applications when using both sources of information (map and trajectory history). Moreover, the performance of these models highly depends on the amount of training data, which can be expensive (particularly the annotated HD maps). In this work, we explore how to achieve competitive performance on the Argoverse 1.0 Benchmark using efficient attention-based models, which take as input the past trajectories and map-based features from minimal map information to ensure efficient and reliable MP. These features represent interpretable information as the driveable area and plausible goal points, in opposition to black-box CNN-based methods for map processing.
abstract_zh: 从社交机器人到自动驾驶汽车，多个智能体的运动预测（MP）是任意复杂环境中的一项关键任务。当前的方法使用端到端网络来解决这个问题，其中输入数据通常是场景的渲染顶视图和所有代理的过去轨迹；要获得最佳性能，必须利用此信息。从这个意义上说，可靠的自动驾驶 (AD) 系统必须按时产生合理的预测，然而，尽管其中许多方法使用简单的 ConvNet 和 LSTM，但在使用两种信息源（地图和轨迹历史记录）时，模型对于实时应用程序可能不够高效。此外，这些模型的性能很大程度上取决于训练数据量，而训练数据量可能很昂贵（特别是带注释的高清地图）。在这项工作中，我们探索如何使用高效的基于注意力的模型在 Argoverse 1.0 基准上实现竞争性能，该模型将过去的轨迹和基于最少地图信息的基于地图的特征作为输入，以确保高效可靠的 MP。这些特征将可解释的信息表示为可行驶区域和合理的目标点，这与基于 CNN 的黑盒地图处理方法相反。

AI.tldr: 本文探索使用基于注意力机制的高效模型，结合历史轨迹与地图特征进行车辆运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖端到端网络处理地图和轨迹信息，但效率不足且需要大量标注数据，成本高昂。
AI.method: 设计注意力机制模型，输入历史轨迹及可行驶区域、目标点等地图特征，提升预测效率与可解释性。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 1.0基准上达到竞争力的预测性能，同时降低计算资源需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于地图特征的注意力模型可有效平衡预测精度与效率，减少对高成本标注数据的依赖。

Moreover, the performance of these models highly depends on the amount of training data, which can be expensive (particularly the annotated HD maps). In this work, we explore how to achieve competitive performance on the Argoverse 1.0 Benchmark using efficient attention-based models, which take as input the past trajectories and map-based features from minimal map information to ensure efficient and reliable MP. These features represent interpretable information as the driveable area and plausible goal points, in opposition to black-box CNN-based methods for map processing. 从社交机器人到自动驾驶汽车，多个智能体的运动预测（MP）是任意复杂环境中的一项关键任务。当前的方法使用端到端网络来解决这个问题，其中输入数据通常是场景的渲染顶视图和所有代理的过去轨迹；要获得最佳性能，必须利用此信息。从这个意义上说，可靠的自动驾驶 (AD) 系统必须按时产生合理的预测，然而，尽管其中许多方法使用简单的 ConvNet 和 LSTM，但在使用两种信息源（地图和轨迹历史记录）时，模型对于实时应用程序可能不够高效。此外，这些模型的性能很大程度上取决于训练数据量，而训练数据量可能很昂贵（特别是带注释的高清地图）。在这项工作中，我们探索如何使用高效的基于注意力的模型在 Argoverse 1.0 基准上实现竞争性能，该模型将过去的轨迹和基于最少地图信息的基于地图的特征作为输入，以确保高效可靠的 MP。这些特征将可解释的信息表示为可行驶区域和合理的目标点，这与基于 CNN 的黑盒地图处理方法相反。 本文探索使用基于注意力机制的高效模型，结合历史轨迹与地图特征进行车辆运动预测。 Carlos Gómez-Huélamo,Marcos V. Conde,Miguel Ortiz cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Paula Maddigan,Teo Susnjak
title: Forecasting Patient Demand at Urgent Care Clinics using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习预测紧急护理诊所的患者需求
abstract: Urgent care clinics and emergency departments around the world periodically suffer from extended wait times beyond patient expectations due to inadequate staffing levels. These delays have been linked with adverse clinical outcomes. Previous research into forecasting demand this domain has mostly used a collection of statistical techniques, with machine learning approaches only now beginning to emerge in recent literature. The forecasting problem for this domain is difficult and has also been complicated by the COVID-19 pandemic which has introduced an additional complexity to this estimation due to typical demand patterns being disrupted. This study explores the ability of machine learning methods to generate accurate patient presentations at two large urgent care clinics located in Auckland, New Zealand. A number of machine learning algorithms were explored in order to determine the most effective technique for this problem domain, with the task of making forecasts of daily patient demand three months in advance. The study also performed an in-depth analysis into the model behaviour in respect to the exploration of which features are most effective at predicting demand and which features are capable of adaptation to the volatility caused by the COVID-19 pandemic lockdowns. The results showed that ensemble-based methods delivered the most accurate and consistent solutions on average, generating improvements in the range of 23%-27% over the existing in-house methods for estimating the daily demand.
summary: Urgent care clinics and emergency departments around the world periodically suffer from extended wait times beyond patient expectations due to inadequate staffing levels. These delays have been linked with adverse clinical outcomes. Previous research into forecasting demand this domain has mostly used a collection of statistical techniques, with machine learning approaches only now beginning to emerge in recent literature. The forecasting problem for this domain is difficult and has also been complicated by the COVID-19 pandemic which has introduced an additional complexity to this estimation due to typical demand patterns being disrupted. This study explores the ability of machine learning methods to generate accurate patient presentations at two large urgent care clinics located in Auckland, New Zealand. A number of machine learning algorithms were explored in order to determine the most effective technique for this problem domain, with the task of making forecasts of daily patient demand three months in advance. The study also performed an in-depth analysis into the model behaviour in respect to the exploration of which features are most effective at predicting demand and which features are capable of adaptation to the volatility caused by the COVID-19 pandemic lockdowns. The results showed that ensemble-based methods delivered the most accurate and consistent solutions on average, generating improvements in the range of 23%-27% over the existing in-house methods for estimating the daily demand.
abstract_zh: 由于人员配备不足，世界各地的紧急护理诊所和急诊科经常会遇到超出患者预期的等待时间延长的情况。这些延误与不良的临床结果有关。先前对该领域的需求预测的研究主要使用了一系列统计技术，而机器学习方法现在才开始在最近的文献中出现。该领域的预测问题很困难，而且由于 COVID-19 大流行而变得更加复杂，由于典型的需求模式被打乱，这给这一估计带来了额外的复杂性。本研究探讨了机器学习方法在位于新西兰奥克兰的两家大型紧急护理诊所生成准确的患者演示的能力。为了确定该问题领域最有效的技术，我们探索了许多机器学习算法，其任务是提前三个月预测每日患者需求。该研究还对模型行为进行了深入分析，探索哪些特征在预测需求方面最有效，以及哪些特征能够适应 COVID-19 大流行封锁造成的波动。结果表明，基于集成的方法平均提供了最准确和一致的解决方案，比现有的内部每日需求估算方法提高了 23%-27%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用机器学习方法预测新西兰奥克兰两家大型急诊诊所的患者需求，旨在提高预测准确性以优化人员配置。
AI.motivation: 急诊诊所因人员不足导致患者等待时间过长，可能引发不良临床结果。传统统计方法预测效果有限，且新冠疫情加剧了需求模式的不确定性，需探索更有效的机器学习解决方案。
AI.method: 测试多种机器学习算法，重点分析集成方法（如随机森林、梯度提升）的预测效果，并探讨特征重要性及模型对疫情封锁导致的需求波动的适应能力。
AI.result: 集成方法平均比现有内部预测方法提升23%-27%的准确性，且能有效适应疫情带来的需求波动。
AI.conclusion: 集成机器学习模型在急诊患者需求预测中表现最优，结合特征分析可增强模型鲁棒性，为应对突发公共卫生事件提供决策支持。

authors_text: Joao Rulff,Fabio Miranda,Maryam Hosseini,Marcos Lage,Mark Cartwright,Graham Dove,Juan Bello,Claudio T. Silva
title: Urban Rhapsody: Large-scale exploration of urban soundscapes
title_zh: 城市狂想曲：城市音景的大规模探索
comment: Accepted at EuroVis 2022. Source code available at: https://github.com/VIDA-NYU/Urban-Rhapsody
comments: Accepted at EuroVis 2022. Source code available at: https://github.com/VIDA-NYU/Urban-Rhapsody
abstract: Noise is one of the primary quality-of-life issues in urban environments. In addition to annoyance, noise negatively impacts public health and educational performance. While low-cost sensors can be deployed to monitor ambient noise levels at high temporal resolutions, the amount of data they produce and the complexity of these data pose significant analytical challenges. One way to address these challenges is through machine listening techniques, which are used to extract features in attempts to classify the source of noise and understand temporal patterns of a city's noise situation. However, the overwhelming number of noise sources in the urban environment and the scarcity of labeled data makes it nearly impossible to create classification models with large enough vocabularies that capture the true dynamism of urban soundscapes In this paper, we first identify a set of requirements in the yet unexplored domain of urban soundscape exploration. To satisfy the requirements and tackle the identified challenges, we propose Urban Rhapsody, a framework that combines state-of-the-art audio representation, machine learning, and visual analytics to allow users to interactively create classification models, understand noise patterns of a city, and quickly retrieve and label audio excerpts in order to create a large high-precision annotated database of urban sound recordings. We demonstrate the tool's utility through case studies performed by domain experts using data generated over the five-year deployment of a one-of-a-kind sensor network in New York City.
summary: Noise is one of the primary quality-of-life issues in urban environments. In addition to annoyance, noise negatively impacts public health and educational performance. While low-cost sensors can be deployed to monitor ambient noise levels at high temporal resolutions, the amount of data they produce and the complexity of these data pose significant analytical challenges. One way to address these challenges is through machine listening techniques, which are used to extract features in attempts to classify the source of noise and understand temporal patterns of a city's noise situation. However, the overwhelming number of noise sources in the urban environment and the scarcity of labeled data makes it nearly impossible to create classification models with large enough vocabularies that capture the true dynamism of urban soundscapes In this paper, we first identify a set of requirements in the yet unexplored domain of urban soundscape exploration. To satisfy the requirements and tackle the identified challenges, we propose Urban Rhapsody, a framework that combines state-of-the-art audio representation, machine learning, and visual analytics to allow users to interactively create classification models, understand noise patterns of a city, and quickly retrieve and label audio excerpts in order to create a large high-precision annotated database of urban sound recordings. We demonstrate the tool's utility through case studies performed by domain experts using data generated over the five-year deployment of a one-of-a-kind sensor network in New York City.
abstract_zh: 噪音是城市环境中主要的生活质量问题之一。除了烦恼之外，噪音还会对公共健康和教育成绩产生负面影响。虽然可以部署低成本传感器来监测高时间分辨率的环境噪声水平，但它们产生的数据量和这些数据的复杂性带来了巨大的分析挑战。解决这些挑战的一种方法是通过机器聆听技术，该技术用于提取特征，以尝试对噪声源进行分类并了解城市噪声状况的时间模式。然而，城市环境中的噪声源数量巨大，而且标记数据的稀缺使得几乎不可能创建具有足够大词汇量的分类模型来捕捉城市声景的真实动态。在本文中，我们首先确定了城市声景探索尚未探索的领域的一组要求。为了满足这些要求并应对已确定的挑战，我们提出了 Urban Rhapsody，这是一个结合了最先进的音频表示、机器学习和视觉分析的框架，允许用户交互式地创建分类模型，了解城市的噪音模式，并快速检索和标记音频摘录，以创建大型高精度城市录音注释数据库。我们通过领域专家使用纽约市独一无二的传感器网络五年部署过程中生成的数据进行案例研究，展示了该工具的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Urban Rhapsody框架，结合音频分析与可视化技术，解决城市声景大规模探索中的数据复杂性与标注不足问题。
AI.motivation: 城市噪音影响健康与教育，但现有传感器数据量大且复杂，传统分类模型因噪声源多样和标注数据稀缺难以准确捕捉城市声景动态变化。
AI.method: 开发Urban Rhapsody框架，整合先进音频表示、机器学习与交互式可视化分析，支持用户构建分类模型、分析噪音模式并高效标注音频数据。
AI.result: 通过纽约市五年传感器数据的案例研究，验证了工具在噪声分类、模式理解和数据库构建中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Urban Rhapsody为城市声景研究提供了可交互的分析工具，推动了大规模城市噪音数据的精准处理与应用。

We demonstrate the tool's utility through case studies performed by domain experts using data generated over the five-year deployment of a one-of-a-kind sensor network in New York City. 噪音是城市环境中主要的生活质量问题之一。除了烦恼之外，噪音还会对公共健康和教育成绩产生负面影响。虽然可以部署低成本传感器来监测高时间分辨率的环境噪声水平，但它们产生的数据量和这些数据的复杂性带来了巨大的分析挑战。解决这些挑战的一种方法是通过机器聆听技术，该技术用于提取特征，以尝试对噪声源进行分类并了解城市噪声状况的时间模式。然而，城市环境中的噪声源数量巨大，而且标记数据的稀缺使得几乎不可能创建具有足够大词汇量的分类模型来捕捉城市声景的真实动态。在本文中，我们首先确定了城市声景探索尚未探索的领域的一组要求。为了满足这些要求并应对已确定的挑战，我们提出了 Urban Rhapsody，这是一个结合了最先进的音频表示、机器学习和视觉分析的框架，允许用户交互式地创建分类模型，了解城市的噪音模式，并快速检索和标记音频摘录，以创建大型高精度城市录音注释数据库。我们通过领域专家使用纽约市独一无二的传感器网络五年部署过程中生成的数据进行案例研究，展示了该工具的实用性。 本文提出Urban Rhapsody框架，结合音频分析与可视化技术，解决城市声景大规模探索中的数据复杂性与标注不足问题。 Joao Rulff,Fabio Miranda,Maryam Hosseini,Marcos Lage,Mark Cartwright,Graham Dove,Juan Bello,Claudio T. Silva cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Dipendra Jha,Ata Mahjoubfar,Anupama Joshi
title: Designing an Efficient End-to-end Machine Learning Pipeline for Real-time Empty-shelf Detection
title_zh: 设计高效的端到端机器学习管道以进行实时空架检测
abstract: On-Shelf Availability (OSA) of products in retail stores is a critical business criterion in the fast moving consumer goods and retails sector. When a product is out-of-stock (OOS) and a customer cannot find it on its designed shelf, this motivates the customer to store-switching or buying nothing, which causes fall in future sales and demands. Retailers are employing several approaches to detect empty shelves and ensure high OSA of products; however, such methods are generally ineffective and infeasible since they are either manual, expensive or less accurate. Recently machine learning based solutions have been proposed, but they suffer from high computational cost and low accuracy problem due to lack of large annotated datasets of on-shelf products. Here, we present an elegant approach for designing an end-to-end machine learning (ML) pipeline for real-time empty shelf detection. Considering the strong dependency between the quality of ML models and the quality of data, we focus on the importance of proper data collection, cleaning and correct data annotation before delving into modeling. Since an empty-shelf detection solution should be computationally-efficient for real-time predictions, we explore different run-time optimizations to improve the model performance. Our dataset contains 1000 images, collected and annotated by following well-defined guidelines. Our low-latency model achieves a mean average F1-score of 68.5%, and can process up to 67 images/s on Intel Xeon Gold and up to 860 images/s on an A100 GPU.
summary: On-Shelf Availability (OSA) of products in retail stores is a critical business criterion in the fast moving consumer goods and retails sector. When a product is out-of-stock (OOS) and a customer cannot find it on its designed shelf, this motivates the customer to store-switching or buying nothing, which causes fall in future sales and demands. Retailers are employing several approaches to detect empty shelves and ensure high OSA of products; however, such methods are generally ineffective and infeasible since they are either manual, expensive or less accurate. Recently machine learning based solutions have been proposed, but they suffer from high computational cost and low accuracy problem due to lack of large annotated datasets of on-shelf products. Here, we present an elegant approach for designing an end-to-end machine learning (ML) pipeline for real-time empty shelf detection. Considering the strong dependency between the quality of ML models and the quality of data, we focus on the importance of proper data collection, cleaning and correct data annotation before delving into modeling. Since an empty-shelf detection solution should be computationally-efficient for real-time predictions, we explore different run-time optimizations to improve the model performance. Our dataset contains 1000 images, collected and annotated by following well-defined guidelines. Our low-latency model achieves a mean average F1-score of 68.5%, and can process up to 67 images/s on Intel Xeon Gold and up to 860 images/s on an A100 GPU.
abstract_zh: 零售店产品的货架可用性 (OSA) 是快速消费品和零售行业的一项关键业务标准。当产品缺货 (OOS) 并且顾客在设计的货架上找不到该产品时，就会促使顾客转店或什么也不买，从而导致未来销售和需求下降。零售商正在采用多种方法来检测空货架并确保产品的高 OSA；然而，这些方法通常无效且不可行，因为它们要么是手动的，要么昂贵，要么不太准确。最近提出了基于机器学习的解决方案，但由于缺乏货架产品的大型注释数据集，它们面临计算成本高和准确性低的问题。在这里，我们提出了一种优雅的方法来设计用于实时空货架检测的端到端机器学习（ML）管道。考虑到机器学习模型的质量和数据质量之间的强烈依赖性，我们在深入建模之前重点关注正确的数据收集、清理和正确的数据注释的重要性。由于空架检测解决方案对于实时预测来说应该具有计算效率，因此我们探索不同的运行时优化来提高模型性能。我们的数据集包含 1000 张图像，这些图像是按照明确定义的指南收集和注释的。我们的低延迟模型的平均 F1 分数为 68.5%，在 Intel Xeon Gold 上每秒处理高达 67 个图像，在 A100 GPU 上每秒处理高达 860 个图像。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个高效的端到端机器学习流水线，用于实时检测零售货架上的空置情况，以提高商品上架率（OSA）。
AI.motivation: 传统空货架检测方法存在人工成本高、效率低或准确性差的问题，而现有机器学习方案因缺乏大规模标注数据导致计算成本高且精度不足，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过规范化的数据采集、清洗与标注流程构建包含1000张图像的数据集，并采用运行时优化技术提升模型性能，最终实现低延迟的实时检测模型。
AI.result: 模型在Intel Xeon Gold上实现67张/秒、在A100 GPU上实现860张/秒的处理速度，平均F1分数达到68.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据质量优化与模型运行时改进，在准确率与实时性之间取得平衡，为零售行业提供了可行的空货架检测解决方案。

authors_text: Jiaming Liu,Xiaojian Xu,Weijie Gan,Shirin Shoushtari,Ulugbek S. Kamilov
title: Online Deep Equilibrium Learning for Regularization by Denoising
title_zh: 通过去噪进行正则化的在线深度平衡学习
abstract: Plug-and-Play Priors (PnP) and Regularization by Denoising (RED) are widely-used frameworks for solving imaging inverse problems by computing fixed-points of operators combining physical measurement models and learned image priors. While traditional PnP/RED formulations have focused on priors specified using image denoisers, there is a growing interest in learning PnP/RED priors that are end-to-end optimal. The recent Deep Equilibrium Models (DEQ) framework has enabled memory-efficient end-to-end learning of PnP/RED priors by implicitly differentiating through the fixed-point equations without storing intermediate activation values. However, the dependence of the computational/memory complexity of the measurement models in PnP/RED on the total number of measurements leaves DEQ impractical for many imaging applications. We propose ODER as a new strategy for improving the efficiency of DEQ through stochastic approximations of the measurement models. We theoretically analyze ODER giving insights into its convergence and ability to approximate the traditional DEQ approach. Our numerical results suggest the potential improvements in training/testing complexity due to ODER on three distinct imaging applications.
summary: Plug-and-Play Priors (PnP) and Regularization by Denoising (RED) are widely-used frameworks for solving imaging inverse problems by computing fixed-points of operators combining physical measurement models and learned image priors. While traditional PnP/RED formulations have focused on priors specified using image denoisers, there is a growing interest in learning PnP/RED priors that are end-to-end optimal. The recent Deep Equilibrium Models (DEQ) framework has enabled memory-efficient end-to-end learning of PnP/RED priors by implicitly differentiating through the fixed-point equations without storing intermediate activation values. However, the dependence of the computational/memory complexity of the measurement models in PnP/RED on the total number of measurements leaves DEQ impractical for many imaging applications. We propose ODER as a new strategy for improving the efficiency of DEQ through stochastic approximations of the measurement models. We theoretically analyze ODER giving insights into its convergence and ability to approximate the traditional DEQ approach. Our numerical results suggest the potential improvements in training/testing complexity due to ODER on three distinct imaging applications.
abstract_zh: 即插即用先验 (PnP) 和去噪正则化 (RED) 是广泛使用的框架，用于通过结合物理测量模型和学习的图像先验计算算子的不动点来解决成像逆问题。虽然传统的 PnP/RED 公式侧重于使用图像降噪器指定的先验，但人们对学习端到端最优的 PnP/RED 先验越来越感兴趣。最近的深度平衡模型 (DEQ) 框架通过定点方程隐式微分而不存储中间激活值，实现了 PnP/RED 先验的内存高效端到端学习。然而，PnP/RED 中测量模型的计算/内存复杂性对测量总数的依赖性使得 DEQ 对于许多成像应用来说不切实际。我们提出 ODER 作为一种通过测量模型的随机近似来提高 DEQ 效率的新策略。我们从理论上分析了 ODER，深入了解其收敛性以及逼近传统 DEQ 方法的能力。我们的数值结果表明，由于三种不同成像应用程序上的 ODER，训练/测试复杂性可能会得到改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ODER的新策略，通过测量模型的随机近似改进深度平衡模型（DEQ）的效率，以解决正则化去噪中的计算和内存复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 传统DEQ框架在处理测量模型时，其计算和内存复杂度依赖于测量总数，导致在许多成像应用中不切实际，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过随机近似测量模型，提出ODER方法，理论分析其收敛性和对传统DEQ的逼近能力，并在三个成像应用中验证效果。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，ODER在训练和测试复杂度上均优于传统方法，有效提升了DEQ的实用性。
AI.conclusion: ODER通过随机近似降低了DEQ的计算负担，为大规模成像逆问题提供了高效的端到端学习框架。

We propose ODER as a new strategy for improving the efficiency of DEQ through stochastic approximations of the measurement models. We theoretically analyze ODER giving insights into its convergence and ability to approximate the traditional DEQ approach. Our numerical results suggest the potential improvements in training/testing complexity due to ODER on three distinct imaging applications. 即插即用先验 (PnP) 和去噪正则化 (RED) 是广泛使用的框架，用于通过结合物理测量模型和学习的图像先验计算算子的不动点来解决成像逆问题。虽然传统的 PnP/RED 公式侧重于使用图像降噪器指定的先验，但人们对学习端到端最优的 PnP/RED 先验越来越感兴趣。最近的深度平衡模型 (DEQ) 框架通过定点方程隐式微分而不存储中间激活值，实现了 PnP/RED 先验的内存高效端到端学习。然而，PnP/RED 中测量模型的计算/内存复杂性对测量总数的依赖性使得 DEQ 对于许多成像应用来说不切实际。我们提出 ODER 作为一种通过测量模型的随机近似来提高 DEQ 效率的新策略。我们从理论上分析了 ODER，深入了解其收敛性以及逼近传统 DEQ 方法的能力。我们的数值结果表明，由于三种不同成像应用程序上的 ODER，训练/测试复杂性可能会得到改善。 本文提出了一种名为ODER的新策略，通过测量模型的随机近似改进深度平衡模型（DEQ）的效率，以解决正则化去噪中的计算和内存复杂度问题。 Jiaming Liu,Xiaojian Xu,Weijie Gan,Shirin Shoushtari,Ulugbek S. Kamilov eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mehdi Nourelahi,Lars Kotthoff,Peijie Chen,Anh Nguyen
title: How explainable are adversarially-robust CNNs?
title_zh: 对抗性强的 CNN 的可解释性如何？
abstract: Three important criteria of existing convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are (1) test-set accuracy; (2) out-of-distribution accuracy; and (3) explainability. While these criteria have been studied independently, their relationship is unknown. For example, do CNNs that have a stronger out-of-distribution performance have also stronger explainability? Furthermore, most prior feature-importance studies only evaluate methods on 2-3 common vanilla ImageNet-trained CNNs, leaving it unknown how these methods generalize to CNNs of other architectures and training algorithms. Here, we perform the first, large-scale evaluation of the relations of the three criteria using 9 feature-importance methods and 12 ImageNet-trained CNNs that are of 3 training algorithms and 5 CNN architectures. We find several important insights and recommendations for ML practitioners. First, adversarially robust CNNs have a higher explainability score on gradient-based attribution methods (but not CAM-based or perturbation-based methods). Second, AdvProp models, despite being highly accurate more than both vanilla and robust models alone, are not superior in explainability. Third, among 9 feature attribution methods tested, GradCAM and RISE are consistently the best methods. Fourth, Insertion and Deletion are biased towards vanilla and robust models respectively, due to their strong correlation with the confidence score distributions of a CNN. Fifth, we did not find a single CNN to be the best in all three criteria, which interestingly suggests that CNNs are harder to interpret as they become more accurate.
summary: Three important criteria of existing convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are (1) test-set accuracy; (2) out-of-distribution accuracy; and (3) explainability. While these criteria have been studied independently, their relationship is unknown. For example, do CNNs that have a stronger out-of-distribution performance have also stronger explainability? Furthermore, most prior feature-importance studies only evaluate methods on 2-3 common vanilla ImageNet-trained CNNs, leaving it unknown how these methods generalize to CNNs of other architectures and training algorithms. Here, we perform the first, large-scale evaluation of the relations of the three criteria using 9 feature-importance methods and 12 ImageNet-trained CNNs that are of 3 training algorithms and 5 CNN architectures. We find several important insights and recommendations for ML practitioners. First, adversarially robust CNNs have a higher explainability score on gradient-based attribution methods (but not CAM-based or perturbation-based methods). Second, AdvProp models, despite being highly accurate more than both vanilla and robust models alone, are not superior in explainability. Third, among 9 feature attribution methods tested, GradCAM and RISE are consistently the best methods. Fourth, Insertion and Deletion are biased towards vanilla and robust models respectively, due to their strong correlation with the confidence score distributions of a CNN. Fifth, we did not find a single CNN to be the best in all three criteria, which interestingly suggests that CNNs are harder to interpret as they become more accurate.
abstract_zh: 现有卷积神经网络（CNN）的三个重要标准是（1）测试集准确性； (2) 分布外精度； (3)可解释性。虽然这些标准已被独立研究，但它们之间的关系尚不清楚。例如，具有更强的分布外性能的 CNN 是否也具有更强的可解释性？此外，大多数先前的特征重要性研究仅评估 2-3 个常见的普通 ImageNet 训练的 CNN 上的方法，因此不知道这些方法如何推广到其他架构和训练算法的 CNN。在这里，我们使用 9 种特征重要性方法和 12 个 ImageNet 训练的 CNN（包含 3 种训练算法和 5 种 CNN 架构）对这三个标准的关系进行了首次大规模评估。我们为机器学习从业者找到了一些重要的见解和建议。首先，对抗性稳健的 CNN 在基于梯度的归因方法（但不是基于 CAM 或基于扰动的方法）上具有更高的可解释性得分。其次，AdvProp 模型尽管比普通模型和鲁棒模型更准确，但在可解释性方面并不优越。第三，在测试的 9 种特征归因方法中，GradCAM 和 RISE 始终是最好的方法。第四，插入和删除分别偏向于普通模型和鲁棒模型，因为它们与 CNN 的置信度分布有很强的相关性。第五，我们没有发现任何一个 CNN 在所有三个标准中都是最好的，这有趣的是，随着 CNN 变得更加准确，它们变得更难解释。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了对抗鲁棒CNN的可解释性，并探讨其与测试集准确率、分布外准确率之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究独立考察CNN的准确性和可解释性，但三者关系未知，且特征重要性方法未在多样化模型中验证。
AI.method: 采用9种特征归因方法和12种ImageNet训练的CNN（涵盖3种训练算法和5种架构），进行大规模对比实验。
AI.result: 对抗鲁棒CNN在梯度归因方法中可解释性更高；AdvProp模型精度高但可解释性不优；GradCAM和RISE方法表现最佳；Insertion/Deletion方法存在模型偏差；无模型在三项指标均最优。
AI.conclusion: 准确性和可解释性存在权衡，对抗鲁棒模型更难解释，需根据具体任务选择模型和解释方法。

authors_text: Yili Shen,Xiao Liu,Cheng-Wei Ju,Jiaxu Yan,Jun Yi,Zhou Lin,Hui Guan
title: Improving Subgraph Representation Learning via Multi-View Augmentation
title_zh: 通过多视图增强改进子图表示学习
abstract: Subgraph representation learning based on Graph Neural Network (GNN) has exhibited broad applications in scientific advancements, such as predictions of molecular structure-property relationships and collective cellular function. In particular, graph augmentation techniques have shown promising results in improving graph-based and node-based classification tasks. Still, they have rarely been explored in the existing GNN-based subgraph representation learning studies. In this study, we develop a novel multi-view augmentation mechanism to improve subgraph representation learning models and thus the accuracy of downstream prediction tasks. Our augmentation technique creates multiple variants of subgraphs and embeds these variants into the original graph to achieve highly improved training efficiency, scalability, and accuracy. Benchmark experiments on several real-world biological and physiological datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed multi-view augmentation techniques in subgraph representation learning.
summary: Subgraph representation learning based on Graph Neural Network (GNN) has exhibited broad applications in scientific advancements, such as predictions of molecular structure-property relationships and collective cellular function. In particular, graph augmentation techniques have shown promising results in improving graph-based and node-based classification tasks. Still, they have rarely been explored in the existing GNN-based subgraph representation learning studies. In this study, we develop a novel multi-view augmentation mechanism to improve subgraph representation learning models and thus the accuracy of downstream prediction tasks. Our augmentation technique creates multiple variants of subgraphs and embeds these variants into the original graph to achieve highly improved training efficiency, scalability, and accuracy. Benchmark experiments on several real-world biological and physiological datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed multi-view augmentation techniques in subgraph representation learning.
abstract_zh: 基于图神经网络（GNN）的子图表示学习在科学进步中展示了广泛的应用，例如分子结构-性质关系和集体细胞功能的预测。特别是，图增强技术在改进基于图和基于节点的分类任务方面显示出了有希望的结果。尽管如此，在现有的基于 GNN 的子图表示学习研究中很少对它们进行探索。在本研究中，我们开发了一种新颖的多视图增强机制来改进子图表示学习模型，从而提高下游预测任务的准确性。我们的增强技术创建子图的多个变体，并将这些变体嵌入到原始图中，以实现训练效率、可扩展性和准确性的大幅提高。对几个现实世界的生物和生理数据集的基准实验证明了我们提出的多视图增强技术在子图表示学习中的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视图增强机制，通过生成子图变体并嵌入原图，提升子图表示学习效果及下游任务准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有图增强技术在GNN子图表示学习中应用不足，限制了模型性能和下游预测任务的准确性。
AI.method: 开发多视图增强机制，生成多个子图变体并嵌入原始图结构，提升训练效率、可扩展性及表示质量。
AI.result: 在多个真实生物与生理数据集上验证，证明该方法在子图表示学习任务中优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 多视图增强有效提升子图表示学习效果，为分子预测、细胞功能分析等应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Dmitry Ivanov,Aleksandr Chezhegov,Andrey Grunin,Mikhail Kiselev,Denis Larionov
title: Neuromorphic Artificial Intelligence Systems
title_zh: 神经形态人工智能系统
abstract: Modern AI systems, based on von Neumann architecture and classical neural networks, have a number of fundamental limitations in comparison with the brain. This article discusses such limitations and the ways they can be mitigated. Next, it presents an overview of currently available neuromorphic AI projects in which these limitations are overcame by bringing some brain features into the functioning and organization of computing systems (TrueNorth, Loihi, Tianjic, SpiNNaker, BrainScaleS, NeuronFlow, DYNAP, Akida). Also, the article presents the principle of classifying neuromorphic AI systems by the brain features they use (neural networks, parallelism and asynchrony, impulse nature of information transfer, local learning, sparsity, analog and in-memory computing). In addition to new architectural approaches used in neuromorphic devices based on existing silicon microelectronics technologies, the article also discusses the prospects of using new memristor element base. Examples of recent advances in the use of memristors in euromorphic applications are also given.
summary: Modern AI systems, based on von Neumann architecture and classical neural networks, have a number of fundamental limitations in comparison with the brain. This article discusses such limitations and the ways they can be mitigated. Next, it presents an overview of currently available neuromorphic AI projects in which these limitations are overcame by bringing some brain features into the functioning and organization of computing systems (TrueNorth, Loihi, Tianjic, SpiNNaker, BrainScaleS, NeuronFlow, DYNAP, Akida). Also, the article presents the principle of classifying neuromorphic AI systems by the brain features they use (neural networks, parallelism and asynchrony, impulse nature of information transfer, local learning, sparsity, analog and in-memory computing). In addition to new architectural approaches used in neuromorphic devices based on existing silicon microelectronics technologies, the article also discusses the prospects of using new memristor element base. Examples of recent advances in the use of memristors in euromorphic applications are also given.
abstract_zh: 与大脑相比，基于冯·诺依曼架构和经典神经网络的现代人工智能系统具有许多基本局限性。本文讨论了此类限制以及缓解这些限制的方法。接下来，它概述了当前可用的神经拟态人工智能项目，其中通过将一些大脑功能引入计算系统的功能和组织中克服了这些限制（TrueNorth、Loihi、Tianjic、SpiNNaker、BrainScaleS、NeuronFlow、DYNAP、Akida）。此外，本文还介绍了根据神经形态人工智能系统使用的大脑特征（神经网络、并行性和异步性、信息传输的脉冲性质、本地学习、稀疏性、模拟和内存计算）对神经形态人工智能系统进行分类的原则。除了基于现有硅微电子技术的神经形态设备中使用的新架构方法之外，本文还讨论了使用新忆阻器元件基础的前景。还给出了在欧洲形态应用中使用忆阻器的最新进展的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨传统AI系统的局限性，综述现有神经形态AI项目及其分类，并分析忆阻器等新技术的应用前景。
AI.motivation: 传统基于冯·诺依曼架构的AI系统存在效率与生物脑功能的差距，需通过神经形态计算模拟大脑特性以突破瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析神经形态系统的核心特征，分类比较典型项目（如TrueNorth、Loihi等），并评估新兴技术（如忆阻器）的潜力。
AI.result: 明确了神经形态系统分类标准，总结了当前技术进展，并指出忆阻器在提升计算效率方面的可能价值。
AI.conclusion: 神经形态计算为AI发展提供新路径，但需在硬件架构与算法层面进一步突破以实现类脑智能。

search_text: Neuromorphic Artificial Intelligence Systems 神经形态人工智能系统 Modern AI systems, based on von Neumann architecture and classical neural networks, have a number of fundamental limitations in comparison with the brain. This article discusses such limitations and the ways they can be mitigated. Next, it presents an overview of currently available neuromorphic AI projects in which these limitations are overcame by bringing some brain features into the functioning and organization of computing systems (TrueNorth, Loihi, Tianjic, SpiNNaker, BrainScaleS, NeuronFlow, DYNAP, Akida). Also, the article presents the principle of classifying neuromorphic AI systems by the brain features they use (neural networks, parallelism and asynchrony, impulse nature of information transfer, local learning, sparsity, analog and in-memory computing). In addition to new architectural approaches used in neuromorphic devices based on existing silicon microelectronics technologies, the article also discusses the prospects of using new memristor element base. Examples of recent advances in the use of memristors in euromorphic applications are also given. 与大脑相比，基于冯·诺依曼架构和经典神经网络的现代人工智能系统具有许多基本局限性。本文讨论了此类限制以及缓解这些限制的方法。接下来，它概述了当前可用的神经拟态人工智能项目，其中通过将一些大脑功能引入计算系统的功能和组织中克服了这些限制（TrueNorth、Loihi、Tianjic、SpiNNaker、BrainScaleS、NeuronFlow、DYNAP、Akida）。此外，本文还介绍了根据神经形态人工智能系统使用的大脑特征（神经网络、并行性和异步性、信息传输的脉冲性质、本地学习、稀疏性、模拟和内存计算）对神经形态人工智能系统进行分类的原则。除了基于现有硅微电子技术的神经形态设备中使用的新架构方法之外，本文还讨论了使用新忆阻器元件基础的前景。还给出了在欧洲形态应用中使用忆阻器的最新进展的示例。 本文探讨传统AI系统的局限性，综述现有神经形态AI项目及其分类，并分析忆阻器等新技术的应用前景。 Dmitry Ivanov,Aleksandr Chezhegov,Andrey Grunin,Mikhail Kiselev,Denis Larionov cs.NE

authors_text: Anish Thite,Mohan Dodda,Pulak Agarwal,Jason Zutty
title: Concurrent Neural Tree and Data Preprocessing AutoML for Image Classification
title_zh: 用于图像分类的并行神经树和数据预处理 AutoML
comment: 4 pages Proceedings of the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion July 2021 Pages 1990 to 1993
comments: 4 pages Proceedings of the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion July 2021 Pages 1990 to 1993
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNN's) are a widely-used solution for a variety of machine learning problems. However, it is often necessary to invest a significant amount of a data scientist's time to pre-process input data, test different neural network architectures, and tune hyper-parameters for optimal performance. Automated machine learning (autoML) methods automatically search the architecture and hyper-parameter space for optimal neural networks. However, current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods do not include traditional methods for manipulating input data as part of the algorithmic search space. We adapt the Evolutionary Multi-objective Algorithm Design Engine (EMADE), a multi-objective evolutionary search framework for traditional machine learning methods, to perform neural architecture search. We also integrate EMADE's signal processing and image processing primitives. These primitives allow EMADE to manipulate input data before ingestion into the simultaneously evolved DNN. We show that including these methods as part of the search space shows potential to provide benefits to performance on the CIFAR-10 image classification benchmark dataset.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNN's) are a widely-used solution for a variety of machine learning problems. However, it is often necessary to invest a significant amount of a data scientist's time to pre-process input data, test different neural network architectures, and tune hyper-parameters for optimal performance. Automated machine learning (autoML) methods automatically search the architecture and hyper-parameter space for optimal neural networks. However, current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods do not include traditional methods for manipulating input data as part of the algorithmic search space. We adapt the Evolutionary Multi-objective Algorithm Design Engine (EMADE), a multi-objective evolutionary search framework for traditional machine learning methods, to perform neural architecture search. We also integrate EMADE's signal processing and image processing primitives. These primitives allow EMADE to manipulate input data before ingestion into the simultaneously evolved DNN. We show that including these methods as part of the search space shows potential to provide benefits to performance on the CIFAR-10 image classification benchmark dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 是解决各种机器学习问题的广泛使用的解决方案。然而，数据科学家通常需要投入大量时间来预处理输入数据、测试不同的神经网络架构并调整超参数以获得最佳性能。自动机器学习 (autoML) 方法自动搜索架构和超参数空间以获得最佳神经网络。然而，当前最先进的（SOTA）方法不包括将输入数据作为算法搜索空间的一部分进行操作的传统方法。我们采用进化多目标算法设计引擎（EMADE）（一种用于传统机器学习方法的多目标进化搜索框架）来执行神经架构搜索。我们还集成了 EMADE 的信号处理和图像处理原语。这些原语允许 EMADE 在将输入数据引入同时演化的 DNN 之前对其进行操作。我们表明，将这些方法作为搜索空间的一部分可以为 CIFAR-10 图像分类基准数据集的性能带来好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络架构搜索与数据预处理的AutoML方法，用于提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AutoML方法未将传统数据预处理技术纳入搜索空间，导致数据预处理仍需人工干预，影响效率。
AI.method: 基于EMADE多目标进化算法框架，同时进行神经网络架构搜索与数据预处理操作优化，并集成信号/图像处理原语。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，表明纳入数据预处理的搜索空间可提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化神经架构与数据预处理流程，可有效提升图像分类任务的自动化水平与性能表现。

However, it is often necessary to invest a significant amount of a data scientist's time to pre-process input data, test different neural network architectures, and tune hyper-parameters for optimal performance. However, current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods do not include traditional methods for manipulating input data as part of the algorithmic search space. authors_text: Marcelo P. L. Benedito,Lucas P. Melo,Lehilton L. C. Pedrosa
title: A parameterized approximation algorithm for the Multiple Allocation $k$-Hub Center
title_zh: 多重分配$k$-Hub中心的参数化近似算法
abstract: In the Multiple Allocation $k$-Hub Center (MA$k$HC), we are given a connected edge-weighted graph $G$, sets of clients $\mathcal{C}$ and hub locations $\mathcal{H}$, where ${V(G) = \mathcal{C} \cup \mathcal{H}}$, a set of demands $\mathcal{D} \subseteq \mathcal{C}^2$ and a positive integer $k$. A solution is a set of hubs $H \subseteq \mathcal{H}$ of size $k$ such that every demand $(a,b)$ is satisfied by a path starting in $a$, going through some vertex of $H$, and ending in $b$. The objective is to minimize the largest length of a path. We show that finding a $(3-ε)$-approximation is NP-hard already for planar graphs. For arbitrary graphs, the approximation lower bound holds even if we parameterize by $k$ and the value $r$ of an optimal solution. An exact FPT algorithm is also unlikely when the parameter combines $k$ and various graph widths, including pathwidth. To confront these hardness barriers, we give a $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm parameterized by treewidth, and, as a byproduct, for unweighted planar graphs, we give a $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm parameterized by $k$ and $r$. Compared to classical location problems, computing the length of a path depends on non-local decisions. This turns standard dynamic programming algorithms impractical, thus our algorithm approximates this length using only local information. We hope these ideas find application in other problems with similar cost structure.
summary: In the Multiple Allocation $k$-Hub Center (MA$k$HC), we are given a connected edge-weighted graph $G$, sets of clients $\mathcal{C}$ and hub locations $\mathcal{H}$, where ${V(G) = \mathcal{C} \cup \mathcal{H}}$, a set of demands $\mathcal{D} \subseteq \mathcal{C}^2$ and a positive integer $k$. A solution is a set of hubs $H \subseteq \mathcal{H}$ of size $k$ such that every demand $(a,b)$ is satisfied by a path starting in $a$, going through some vertex of $H$, and ending in $b$. The objective is to minimize the largest length of a path. We show that finding a $(3-ε)$-approximation is NP-hard already for planar graphs. For arbitrary graphs, the approximation lower bound holds even if we parameterize by $k$ and the value $r$ of an optimal solution. An exact FPT algorithm is also unlikely when the parameter combines $k$ and various graph widths, including pathwidth. To confront these hardness barriers, we give a $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm parameterized by treewidth, and, as a byproduct, for unweighted planar graphs, we give a $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm parameterized by $k$ and $r$. Compared to classical location problems, computing the length of a path depends on non-local decisions. This turns standard dynamic programming algorithms impractical, thus our algorithm approximates this length using only local information. We hope these ideas find application in other problems with similar cost structure.
abstract_zh: 在多重分配 $k$-Hub 中心 (MA$k$HC) 中，我们得到一个连通的边加权图 $G$、一组客户端 $\mathcal{C}$ 和中心位置 $\mathcal{H}$，其中 ${V(G) = \mathcal{C} \cup \mathcal{H}}$、一组需求 $\mathcal{D} \subseteq \mathcal{C}^2$ 和一个正整数$k$。一个解决方案是一组大小为 $k$ 的集线器 $H \subseteq \mathcal{H}$，这样每个需求 $(a,b)$ 都可以通过从 $a$ 开始、经过 $H$ 的某个顶点并以 $b$ 结束的路径来满足。目标是最小化路径的最大长度。我们证明，对于平面图来说，找到 $(3-ε)$ 近似值已经是 NP 困难的了。对于任意图，即使我们通过 $k$ 和最优解的值 $r$ 进行参数化，近似下界仍然成立。当参数组合 $k$ 和各种图宽度（包括路径宽度）时，精确的 FPT 算法也不太可能。为了应对这些困难障碍，我们给出了一个由树宽参数化的 $(2+ε)$ 近似算法，并且作为副产品，对于未加权平面图，我们给出了一个由 $k$ 和 $r$ 参数化的 $(2+ε)$ 近似算法。与经典位置问题相比，计算路径长度取决于非局部决策。这使得标准动态编程算法变得不切实际，因此我们的算法仅使用本地信息来近似这个长度。我们希望这些想法能够应用于具有类似成本结构的其他问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于树宽参数化的(2+ε)-近似算法，用于解决多重分配k-枢纽中心问题（MAkHC），并在无权平面图中实现了基于k和r的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示，MAkHC问题在平面图中难以获得(3-ε)近似解，且传统动态规划因路径长度的非局部性难以应用，亟需新的参数化方法突破计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过树宽参数化设计近似算法，利用局部信息替代全局路径长度计算，并结合平面图特性优化参数选择。
AI.result: 提出(2+ε)-近似算法，适用于任意图的树宽参数化场景，以及无权平面图的(k, r)参数化场景，突破了传统NP难问题的近似下界限制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过参数化与局部近似有效应对MAkHC的计算挑战，为类似非局部成本结构的问题提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于树宽参数化的(2+ε)-近似算法，用于解决多重分配k-枢纽中心问题（MAkHC），并在无权平面图中实现了基于k和r的近似算法。
motivation: 现有研究显示，MAkHC问题在平面图中难以获得(3-ε)近似解，且传统动态规划因路径长度的非局部性难以应用，亟需新的参数化方法突破计算瓶颈。
method: 通过树宽参数化设计近似算法，利用局部信息替代全局路径长度计算，并结合平面图特性优化参数选择。
result: 提出(2+ε)-近似算法，适用于任意图的树宽参数化场景，以及无权平面图的(k, r)参数化场景，突破了传统NP难问题的近似下界限制。
conclusion: 该方法通过参数化与局部近似有效应对MAkHC的计算挑战，为类似非局部成本结构的问题提供了新思路。
search_text: A parameterized approximation algorithm for the Multiple Allocation $k$-Hub Center 多重分配$k$-Hub中心的参数化近似算法 In the Multiple Allocation $k$-Hub Center (MA$k$HC), we are given a connected edge-weighted graph $G$, sets of clients $\mathcal{C}$ and hub locations $\mathcal{H}$, where ${V(G) = \mathcal{C} \cup \mathcal{H}}$, a set of demands $\mathcal{D} \subseteq \mathcal{C}^2$ and a positive integer $k$. A solution is a set of hubs $H \subseteq \mathcal{H}$ of size $k$ such that every demand $(a,b)$ is satisfied by a path starting in $a$, going through some vertex of $H$, and ending in $b$. The objective is to minimize the largest length of a path. We show that finding a $(3-ε)$-approximation is NP-hard already for planar graphs. For arbitrary graphs, the approximation lower bound holds even if we parameterize by $k$ and the value $r$ of an optimal solution. An exact FPT algorithm is also unlikely when the parameter combines $k$ and various graph widths, including pathwidth. To confront these hardness barriers, we give a $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm parameterized by treewidth, and, as a byproduct, for unweighted planar graphs, we give a $(2+ε)$-approximation algorithm parameterized by $k$ and $r$. Compared to classical location problems, computing the length of a path depends on non-local decisions. This turns standard dynamic programming algorithms impractical, thus our algorithm approximates this length using only local information. We hope these ideas find application in other problems with similar cost structure. 在多重分配 $k$-Hub 中心 (MA$k$HC) 中，我们得到一个连通的边加权图 $G$、一组客户端 $\mathcal{C}$ 和中心位置 $\mathcal{H}$，其中 ${V(G) = \mathcal{C} \cup \mathcal{H}}$、一组需求 $\mathcal{D} \subseteq \mathcal{C}^2$ 和一个正整数$k$。一个解决方案是一组大小为 $k$ 的集线器 $H \subseteq \mathcal{H}$，这样每个需求 $(a,b)$ 都可以通过从 $a$ 开始、经过 $H$ 的某个顶点并以 $b$ 结束的路径来满足。目标是最小化路径的最大长度。我们证明，对于平面图来说，找到 $(3-ε)$ 近似值已经是 NP 困难的了。对于任意图，即使我们通过 $k$ 和最优解的值 $r$ 进行参数化，近似下界仍然成立。当参数组合 $k$ 和各种图宽度（包括路径宽度）时，精确的 FPT 算法也不太可能。为了应对这些困难障碍，我们给出了一个由树宽参数化的 $(2+ε)$ 近似算法，并且作为副产品，对于未加权平面图，我们给出了一个由 $k$ 和 $r$ 参数化的 $(2+ε)$ 近似算法。与经典位置问题相比，计算路径长度取决于非局部决策。这使得标准动态编程算法变得不切实际，因此我们的算法仅使用本地信息来近似这个长度。我们希望这些想法能够应用于具有类似成本结构的其他问题。 本文提出了一种基于树宽参数化的(2+ε)-近似算法，用于解决多重分配k-枢纽中心问题（MAkHC），并在无权平面图中实现了基于k和r的近似算法。 Marcelo P. L. Benedito,Lucas P. Melo,Lehilton L. C. Pedrosa cs.DS

authors_text: Devon R. Graham,Kevin Leyton-Brown,Tim Roughgarden
title: Formalizing Preferences Over Runtime Distributions
title_zh: 形式化对运行时分布的偏好
abstract: When trying to solve a computational problem, we are often faced with a choice between algorithms that are guaranteed to return the right answer but differ in their runtime distributions (e.g., SAT solvers, sorting algorithms). This paper aims to lay theoretical foundations for such choices by formalizing preferences over runtime distributions. It might seem that we should simply prefer the algorithm that minimizes expected runtime. However, such preferences would be driven by exactly how slow our algorithm is on bad inputs, whereas in practice we are typically willing to cut off occasional, sufficiently long runs before they finish. We propose a principled alternative, taking a utility-theoretic approach to characterize the scoring functions that describe preferences over algorithms. These functions depend on the way our value for solving our problem decreases with time and on the distribution from which captimes are drawn. We describe examples of realistic utility functions and show how to leverage a maximum-entropy approach for modeling underspecified captime distributions. Finally, we show how to efficiently estimate an algorithm's expected utility from runtime samples.
summary: When trying to solve a computational problem, we are often faced with a choice between algorithms that are guaranteed to return the right answer but differ in their runtime distributions (e.g., SAT solvers, sorting algorithms). This paper aims to lay theoretical foundations for such choices by formalizing preferences over runtime distributions. It might seem that we should simply prefer the algorithm that minimizes expected runtime. However, such preferences would be driven by exactly how slow our algorithm is on bad inputs, whereas in practice we are typically willing to cut off occasional, sufficiently long runs before they finish. We propose a principled alternative, taking a utility-theoretic approach to characterize the scoring functions that describe preferences over algorithms. These functions depend on the way our value for solving our problem decreases with time and on the distribution from which captimes are drawn. We describe examples of realistic utility functions and show how to leverage a maximum-entropy approach for modeling underspecified captime distributions. Finally, we show how to efficiently estimate an algorithm's expected utility from runtime samples.
abstract_zh: 当尝试解决计算问题时，我们经常面临在保证返回正确答案但运行时间分布不同的算法之间进行选择的情况（例如 SAT 求解器、排序算法）。本文旨在通过形式化对运行时分布的偏好来为此类选择奠定理论基础。看起来我们应该更喜欢能够最小化预期运行时间的算法。然而，这种偏好将取决于我们的算法在错误输入上的速度有多慢，而在实践中，我们通常愿意在完成之前切断偶尔的、足够长的运行。我们提出了一种有原则的替代方案，采用效用理论方法来描述描述算法偏好的评分函数。这些函数取决于我们解决问题的价值随着时间的推移而减少的方式以及捕获时间的分布。我们描述了现实效用函数的示例，并展示了如何利用最大熵方法对未指定的 captime 分布进行建模。最后，我们展示了如何根据运行时样本有效地估计算法的预期效用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为不同运行时间分布的算法选择提供理论基础，通过形式化偏好来指导实际应用中的算法决策。
AI.motivation: 在实际计算问题中，算法的运行时间分布差异可能导致选择困难，传统期望运行时间最小化的方法未能考虑实际中对长运行时间的容忍度差异。
AI.method: 采用效用理论构建评分函数，结合时间衰减价值函数与截断时间分布建模，利用最大熵方法处理未指定的截断分布。
AI.result: 提出了符合现实场景的效用函数示例，并展示了如何通过运行时间样本高效估计算法的预期效用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为算法选择提供了理论框架，能够更准确地反映实际应用中对运行时间分布的偏好与约束。

authors_text: Anh T. V. Dau,Thang Nguyen-Duc,Hoang Thanh-Tung,Nghi D. Q. Bui
title: Towards Using Data-Influence Methods to Detect Noisy Samples in Source Code Corpora
title_zh: 致力于使用数据影响方法检测源代码语料库中的噪声样本
comment: The 37th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering
comments: The 37th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering
abstract: Despite the recent trend of developing and applying neural source code models to software engineering tasks, the quality of such models is insufficient for real-world use. This is because there could be noise in the source code corpora used to train such models. We adapt data-influence methods to detect such noises in this paper. Data-influence methods are used in machine learning to evaluate the similarity of a target sample to the correct samples in order to determine whether or not the target sample is noisy. Our evaluation results show that data-influence methods can identify noisy samples from neural code models in classification-based tasks. This approach will contribute to the larger vision of developing better neural source code models from a data-centric perspective, which is a key driver for developing useful source code models in practice.
summary: Despite the recent trend of developing and applying neural source code models to software engineering tasks, the quality of such models is insufficient for real-world use. This is because there could be noise in the source code corpora used to train such models. We adapt data-influence methods to detect such noises in this paper. Data-influence methods are used in machine learning to evaluate the similarity of a target sample to the correct samples in order to determine whether or not the target sample is noisy. Our evaluation results show that data-influence methods can identify noisy samples from neural code models in classification-based tasks. This approach will contribute to the larger vision of developing better neural source code models from a data-centric perspective, which is a key driver for developing useful source code models in practice.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近有开发神经源代码模型并将其应用于软件工程任务的趋势，但此类模型的质量不足以满足现实世界的使用。这是因为用于训练此类模型的源代码语料库中可能存在噪音。在本文中，我们采用数据影响方法来检测此类噪声。机器学习中使用数据影响方法来评估目标样本与正确样本的相似度，以确定目标样本是否有噪声。我们的评估结果表明，数据影响方法可以在基于分类的任务中从神经代码模型中识别噪声样本。这种方法将有助于从以数据为中心的角度开发更好的神经源代码模型的更大愿景，这是在实践中开发有用的源代码模型的关键驱动力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用数据影响方法检测源代码语料库中的噪声样本，以提升神经源代码模型的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有神经源代码模型因训练数据中的噪声导致质量不足，需有效检测并去除噪声以提升模型实用性。
AI.method: 采用数据影响方法，通过评估目标样本与正确样本的相似性来识别噪声样本。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，数据影响方法能有效识别分类任务中神经代码模型的噪声样本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为从数据角度优化神经源代码模型提供了可行方案，有助于实际应用中开发更有效的模型。

authors_text: Karthik Reddy Kanjula,Vishnu Vardhan Reddy,Jnanesh K P,Jeffy S Abraham,Tanuja K
title: People counting system for retail analytics using edge AI
title_zh: 使用边缘人工智能进行零售分析的人数统计系统
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures. We proposed a novel framework design (highlighted in abstract) instead of enhancing a DL model or openVINO. To demonstrate the importance of our framework, we have chosen a retail computer vision problem, people counting system and attempted to construct an end-to-end solution with our suggested framework
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures. We proposed a novel framework design (highlighted in abstract) instead of enhancing a DL model or openVINO. To demonstrate the importance of our framework, we have chosen a retail computer vision problem, people counting system and attempted to construct an end-to-end solution with our suggested framework
abstract: Developments in IoT applications are playing an important role in our day-to-day life, starting from business predictions to self driving cars. One of the area, most influenced by the field of AI and IoT is retail analytics. In Retail Analytics, Conversion Rates - a metric which is most often used by retail stores to measure how many people have visited the store and how many purchases has happened. This retail conversion rate assess the marketing operations, increasing stock, store outlet and running promotions ..etc. Our project intends to build a cost-effective people counting system with AI at Edge, where it calculates Conversion rates using total number of people counted by the system and number of transactions for the day, which helps in providing analytical insights for retail store optimization with a very minimum hardware requirements.
summary: Developments in IoT applications are playing an important role in our day-to-day life, starting from business predictions to self driving cars. One of the area, most influenced by the field of AI and IoT is retail analytics. In Retail Analytics, Conversion Rates - a metric which is most often used by retail stores to measure how many people have visited the store and how many purchases has happened. This retail conversion rate assess the marketing operations, increasing stock, store outlet and running promotions ..etc. Our project intends to build a cost-effective people counting system with AI at Edge, where it calculates Conversion rates using total number of people counted by the system and number of transactions for the day, which helps in providing analytical insights for retail store optimization with a very minimum hardware requirements.
abstract_zh: 从业务预测到自动驾驶汽车，物联网应用的发展在我们的日常生活中发挥着重要作用。受人工智能和物联网领域影响最大的领域之一是零售分析。在零售分析中，转化率是零售商店最常使用的一个指标，用于衡量有多少人访问了商店以及发生了多少次购买。该零售转化率评估营销运营、增加库存、商店销售和促销活动等。我们的项目旨在利用 Edge 人工智能构建一个经济高效的人数统计系统，利用系统统计的总人数和当天的交易数量来计算转化率，这有助于以极低的硬件要求为零售店优化提供分析见解。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于边缘AI的人群计数系统，用于零售分析中的转化率计算。
AI.motivation: 零售行业需要通过转化率评估营销效果和运营效率，但传统方法成本高且依赖复杂硬件。
AI.method: 利用边缘AI技术结合摄像头和交易数据，在本地设备上实时计算进店人数与交易量的转化率。
AI.result: 实现低成本硬件部署的零售分析系统，可提供转化率等关键指标以优化店铺运营。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为零售业提供了经济高效的智能分析方案，有助于提升门店管理效率。

authors_text: Anh-Duy Pham,Anastassia Kuestenmacher,Paul G. Ploeger
title: TSEM: Temporally Weighted Spatiotemporal Explainable Neural Network for Multivariate Time Series
title_zh: TSEM：多元时间序列的时间加权时空可解释神经网络
abstract: Deep learning has become a one-size-fits-all solution for technical and business domains thanks to its flexibility and adaptability. It is implemented using opaque models, which unfortunately undermines the outcome trustworthiness. In order to have a better understanding of the behavior of a system, particularly one driven by time series, a look inside a deep learning model so-called posthoc eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) approaches, is important. There are two major types of XAI for time series data, namely model-agnostic and model-specific. Model-specific approach is considered in this work. While other approaches employ either Class Activation Mapping (CAM) or Attention Mechanism, we merge the two strategies into a single system, simply called the Temporally Weighted Spatiotemporal Explainable Neural Network for Multivariate Time Series (TSEM). TSEM combines the capabilities of RNN and CNN models in such a way that RNN hidden units are employed as attention weights for the CNN feature maps temporal axis. The result shows that TSEM outperforms XCM. It is similar to STAM in terms of accuracy, while also satisfying a number of interpretability criteria, including causality, fidelity, and spatiotemporality.
summary: Deep learning has become a one-size-fits-all solution for technical and business domains thanks to its flexibility and adaptability. It is implemented using opaque models, which unfortunately undermines the outcome trustworthiness. In order to have a better understanding of the behavior of a system, particularly one driven by time series, a look inside a deep learning model so-called posthoc eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) approaches, is important. There are two major types of XAI for time series data, namely model-agnostic and model-specific. Model-specific approach is considered in this work. While other approaches employ either Class Activation Mapping (CAM) or Attention Mechanism, we merge the two strategies into a single system, simply called the Temporally Weighted Spatiotemporal Explainable Neural Network for Multivariate Time Series (TSEM). TSEM combines the capabilities of RNN and CNN models in such a way that RNN hidden units are employed as attention weights for the CNN feature maps temporal axis. The result shows that TSEM outperforms XCM. It is similar to STAM in terms of accuracy, while also satisfying a number of interpretability criteria, including causality, fidelity, and spatiotemporality.
abstract_zh: 深度学习凭借其灵活性和适应性，已成为技术和业务领域的万能解决方案。它是使用不透明的模型来实现的，不幸的是，这破坏了结果的可信度。为了更好地理解系统的行为，特别是由时间序列驱动的系统的行为，深入了解所谓的事后可解释人工智能（XAI）方法的深度学习模型非常重要。时间序列数据的 XAI 有两种主要类型，即模型不可知的和模型特定的。这项工作考虑了特定于模型的方法。虽然其他方法采用类激活映射（CAM）或注意力机制，但我们将这两种策略合并到一个系统中，简称为多元时间序列的时间加权时空可解释神经网络（TSEM）。 TSEM 结合了 RNN 和 CNN 模型的功能，采用 RNN 隐藏单元作为 CNN 特征图时间轴的注意力权重。结果表明，TSEM 优于 XCM。它在准确性方面与 STAM 类似，同时也满足许多可解释性标准，包括因果关系、保真度和时空性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合RNN与CNN的可解释神经网络TSEM，用于多变量时间序列分析，提升模型准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽灵活但缺乏透明度，影响可信度。现有XAI方法在时间序列解释性上存在不足，需融合注意力机制与特征映射策略。
AI.method: 设计TSEM模型，利用RNN隐藏单元作为CNN特征图的时间轴注意力权重，整合循环神经网络与卷积神经网络优势。
AI.result: TSEM在准确率上与STAM相当，显著优于XCM，且满足因果性、保真度及时空性等可解释性指标。
AI.conclusion: TSEM通过融合注意力机制与特征映射，有效提升多变量时间序列分析的模型可解释性与预测性能。

authors_text: Dario Tscholl,Stephan-Daniel Gravert,Aurel X. Appius,Robert K. Katzschmann
title: Flying Hydraulically Amplified Electrostatic Gripper System for Aerial Object Manipulation
title_zh: 用于空中物体操纵的飞行液压放大静电夹具系统
comment: 16 pages, 12 figures, accepted and presented at the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR) 2022. Video: youtube.com/watch?v=7PmZ8C0Ji08
comments: 16 pages, 12 figures, accepted and presented at the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR) 2022. Video: youtube.com/watch?v=7PmZ8C0Ji08
abstract: Rapid and versatile object manipulation in air is an open challenge. An energy-efficient and adaptive soft gripper combined with an agile aerial vehicle could revolutionize aerial robotic manipulation in areas such as warehousing. This paper presents a bio-inspired gripper powered by hydraulically amplified electrostatic actuators mounted to a quadcopter that can interact safely and naturally with its environment. Our gripping concept is motivated by an eagle's foot. Our custom multi-actuator concept is inspired by a scorpion tail design (consisting of a base electrode with pouches stacked adjacently) and spider-inspired joints (classic pouch motors with a flexible hinge layer). A hybrid of these two designs realizes a higher force output under moderate deflections of up to 25° compared to single-hinge concepts. In addition, sandwiching the hinge layer improves the robustness of the gripper. For the first time, we show that soft manipulation in air is possible using electrostatic actuation. This study demonstrates the potential of untethered hydraulically amplified actuators in aerial robotic manipulation. Our proof of concept opens up the use of hydraulic electrostatic actuators in mobile aerial systems.
summary: Rapid and versatile object manipulation in air is an open challenge. An energy-efficient and adaptive soft gripper combined with an agile aerial vehicle could revolutionize aerial robotic manipulation in areas such as warehousing. This paper presents a bio-inspired gripper powered by hydraulically amplified electrostatic actuators mounted to a quadcopter that can interact safely and naturally with its environment. Our gripping concept is motivated by an eagle's foot. Our custom multi-actuator concept is inspired by a scorpion tail design (consisting of a base electrode with pouches stacked adjacently) and spider-inspired joints (classic pouch motors with a flexible hinge layer). A hybrid of these two designs realizes a higher force output under moderate deflections of up to 25° compared to single-hinge concepts. In addition, sandwiching the hinge layer improves the robustness of the gripper. For the first time, we show that soft manipulation in air is possible using electrostatic actuation. This study demonstrates the potential of untethered hydraulically amplified actuators in aerial robotic manipulation. Our proof of concept opens up the use of hydraulic electrostatic actuators in mobile aerial systems.
abstract_zh: 空中快速且多功能的物体操纵是一项公开的挑战。节能且自适应的软抓手与灵活的飞行器相结合，可以彻底改变仓储等领域的空中机器人操作。本文提出了一种仿生夹具，由安装在四轴飞行器上的液压放大静电执行器提供动力，可以安全、自然地与其环境交互。我们的抓地力概念源自鹰足。我们的定制多执行器概念的灵感来自蝎子尾设计（由带有相邻堆叠的袋子的基部电极组成）和蜘蛛启发的关节（带有灵活铰链层的经典袋电机）。与单铰链概念相比，这两种设计的混合在高达 25° 的适度偏转下实现了更高的力输出。此外，将铰链层夹在中间还可以提高夹具的坚固性。我们首次证明使用静电驱动可以在空气中进行软操纵。这项研究展示了无系留液压放大执行器在空中机器人操纵中的潜力。我们的概念验证开启了液压静电执行器在移动航空系统中的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于液压放大静电执行器的软抓手系统，结合四旋翼飞行器实现空中物体的安全抓取与操作。
AI.motivation: 空中快速灵活的物体操作存在技术挑战，传统方法能耗高且适应性差，需开发新型节能自适应抓取装置以应用于仓储等领域。
AI.method: 受鹰爪、蝎尾及蜘蛛关节启发，设计多执行器混合结构：基电极叠加 pouch 叠层与柔性铰链层，通过液压放大提升输出力并增强结构鲁棒性。
AI.result: 首次实现空中静电驱动软体操作，抓手在25°偏转下输出力较单铰链结构提升，验证了无缆液压静电执行器在空中机器人操作中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该生物启发式混合设计为移动空中系统应用液压静电执行器开辟新路径，展示了软体机器人空中操作的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于液压放大静电执行器的软抓手系统，结合四旋翼飞行器实现空中物体的安全抓取与操作。

motivation: 空中快速灵活的物体操作存在技术挑战，传统方法能耗高且适应性差，需开发新型节能自适应抓取装置以应用于仓储等领域。
method: 受鹰爪、蝎尾及蜘蛛关节启发，设计多执行器混合结构：基电极叠加 pouch 叠层与柔性铰链层，通过液压放大提升输出力并增强结构鲁棒性。
result: 首次实现空中静电驱动软体操作，抓手在25°偏转下输出力较单铰链结构提升，验证了无缆液压静电执行器在空中机器人操作中的可行性。
conclusion: 该生物启发式混合设计为移动空中系统应用液压静电执行器开辟新路径，展示了软体机器人空中操作的潜力。
search_text: Flying Hydraulically Amplified Electrostatic Gripper System for Aerial Object Manipulation 用于空中物体操纵的飞行液压放大静电夹具系统 Rapid and versatile object manipulation in air is an open challenge. An energy-efficient and adaptive soft gripper combined with an agile aerial vehicle could revolutionize aerial robotic manipulation in areas such as warehousing. This paper presents a bio-inspired gripper powered by hydraulically amplified electrostatic actuators mounted to a quadcopter that can interact safely and naturally with its environment. Our gripping concept is motivated by an eagle's foot. Our custom multi-actuator concept is inspired by a scorpion tail design (consisting of a base electrode with pouches stacked adjacently) and spider-inspired joints (classic pouch motors with a flexible hinge layer). A hybrid of these two designs realizes a higher force output under moderate deflections of up to 25° compared to single-hinge concepts. In addition, sandwiching the hinge layer improves the robustness of the gripper. For the first time, we show that soft manipulation in air is possible using electrostatic actuation. This study demonstrates the potential of untethered hydraulically amplified actuators in aerial robotic manipulation. Our proof of concept opens up the use of hydraulic electrostatic actuators in mobile aerial systems. 空中快速且多功能的物体操纵是一项公开的挑战。节能且自适应的软抓手与灵活的飞行器相结合，可以彻底改变仓储等领域的空中机器人操作。本文提出了一种仿生夹具，由安装在四轴飞行器上的液压放大静电执行器提供动力，可以安全、自然地与其环境交互。我们的抓地力概念源自鹰足。我们的定制多执行器概念的灵感来自蝎子尾设计（由带有相邻堆叠的袋子的基部电极组成）和蜘蛛启发的关节（带有灵活铰链层的经典袋电机）。与单铰链概念相比，这两种设计的混合在高达 25° 的适度偏转下实现了更高的力输出。此外，将铰链层夹在中间还可以提高夹具的坚固性。我们首次证明使用静电驱动可以在空气中进行软操纵。这项研究展示了无系留液压放大执行器在空中机器人操纵中的潜力。我们的概念验证开启了液压静电执行器在移动航空系统中的使用。 本文提出一种基于液压放大静电执行器的软抓手系统，结合四旋翼飞行器实现空中物体的安全抓取与操作。 Dario Tscholl,Stephan-Daniel Gravert,Aurel X. Appius,Robert K. Katzschmann cs.RO

authors_text: Jingbo Wang,Yu Rong,Jingyuan Liu,Sijie Yan,Dahua Lin,Bo Dai
title: Towards Diverse and Natural Scene-aware 3D Human Motion Synthesis
title_zh: 迈向多样化、自然场景感知的 3D 人体运动合成
abstract: The ability to synthesize long-term human motion sequences in real-world scenes can facilitate numerous applications. Previous approaches for scene-aware motion synthesis are constrained by pre-defined target objects or positions and thus limit the diversity of human-scene interactions for synthesized motions. In this paper, we focus on the problem of synthesizing diverse scene-aware human motions under the guidance of target action sequences. To achieve this, we first decompose the diversity of scene-aware human motions into three aspects, namely interaction diversity (e.g. sitting on different objects with different poses in the given scenes), path diversity (e.g. moving to the target locations following different paths), and the motion diversity (e.g. having various body movements during moving). Based on this factorized scheme, a hierarchical framework is proposed, with each sub-module responsible for modeling one aspect. We assess the effectiveness of our framework on two challenging datasets for scene-aware human motion synthesis. The experiment results show that the proposed framework remarkably outperforms previous methods in terms of diversity and naturalness.
summary: The ability to synthesize long-term human motion sequences in real-world scenes can facilitate numerous applications. Previous approaches for scene-aware motion synthesis are constrained by pre-defined target objects or positions and thus limit the diversity of human-scene interactions for synthesized motions. In this paper, we focus on the problem of synthesizing diverse scene-aware human motions under the guidance of target action sequences. To achieve this, we first decompose the diversity of scene-aware human motions into three aspects, namely interaction diversity (e.g. sitting on different objects with different poses in the given scenes), path diversity (e.g. moving to the target locations following different paths), and the motion diversity (e.g. having various body movements during moving). Based on this factorized scheme, a hierarchical framework is proposed, with each sub-module responsible for modeling one aspect. We assess the effectiveness of our framework on two challenging datasets for scene-aware human motion synthesis. The experiment results show that the proposed framework remarkably outperforms previous methods in terms of diversity and naturalness.
abstract_zh: 在现实场景中合成长期人体运动序列的能力可以促进许多应用。先前的场景感知运动合成方法受到预定义目标对象或位置的限制，从而限制了合成运动的人类场景交互的多样性。在本文中，我们重点研究在目标动作序列的指导下合成不同场景感知的人体运动的问题。为了实现这一目标，我们首先将场景感知人体运动的多样性分解为三个方面，即交互多样性（例如，在给定场景中以不同的姿势坐在不同的物体上）、路径多样性（例如，按照不同的路径移动到目标位置）和运动多样性（例如，在移动过程中具有各种身体动作）。基于这种因式分解方案，提出了一种分层框架，每个子模块负责对一个方面进行建模。我们评估了我们的框架在两个具有挑战性的场景感知人体运动合成数据集上的有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在多样性和自然性方面明显优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层框架，用于在真实场景中生成多样且自然的3D人体运动。
AI.motivation: 现有场景感知运动合成方法受限于预定义目标物体或位置，导致人与场景的交互多样性不足。
AI.method: 将场景感知运动多样性分解为交互、路径和运动三个层面，设计分层框架分别建模各维度。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，该框架在运动多样性与自然度指标上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层建模方法有效提升了场景感知运动合成的多样性与自然度，为相关应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Charles Alexandre Bédard,Geoffroy Bergeron
title: An Algorithmic Approach to Emergence
title_zh: 涌现的算法方法
abstract: We suggest a quantitative and objective notion of emergence. Our proposal uses algorithmic information theory as a basis for an objective framework in which a bit string encodes observational data. A plurality of drops in the Kolmogorov structure function of such a string is seen as the hallmark of emergence. Our definition offers some theoretical results, in addition to extending the notions of coarse-graining and boundary conditions. Finally, we confront our proposal with applications to dynamical systems and thermodynamics.
summary: We suggest a quantitative and objective notion of emergence. Our proposal uses algorithmic information theory as a basis for an objective framework in which a bit string encodes observational data. A plurality of drops in the Kolmogorov structure function of such a string is seen as the hallmark of emergence. Our definition offers some theoretical results, in addition to extending the notions of coarse-graining and boundary conditions. Finally, we confront our proposal with applications to dynamical systems and thermodynamics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个定量且客观的涌现概念。我们的建议使用算法信息论作为客观框架的基础，其中比特串对观测数据进行编码。这种弦的柯尔莫哥洛夫结构函数中的多个下降被视为涌现的标志。除了扩展粗粒度和边界条件的概念之外，我们的定义还提供了一些理论结果。最后，我们将我们的建议应用于动力系统和热力学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于算法信息论的量化和客观的涌现概念，通过分析比特串的Kolmogorov结构函数下降来定义涌现。
AI.motivation: 传统涌现定义缺乏统一的量化框架，需建立客观标准以区分系统层级结构与随机性。
AI.method: 利用算法信息论构建框架，通过观测数据比特串的Kolmogorov结构函数多次下降识别涌现，并扩展粗粒化与边界条件概念。
AI.result: 理论证明了结构函数下降与涌现的关联性，并验证了该方法在动力系统与热力学中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法方法为研究复杂系统中的涌现现象提供了新的理论工具和跨学科应用路径。

authors_text: David Hanson,Alishba Imran,Gerardo Morales,Vytas Krisciunas,Aditya Sagi,Aman Malali,Rushali Mohbe,Raviteja Upadrashta
title: Open Arms: Open-Source Arms, Hands & Control
title_zh: 张开双臂：开源手臂、手和控制
comment: Submitted to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Submitted to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Open Arms is a novel open-source platform of realistic human-like robotic hands and arms hardware with 28 Degree-of-Freedom (DoF), designed to extend the capabilities and accessibility of humanoid robotic grasping and manipulation. The Open Arms framework includes an open SDK and development environment, simulation tools, and application development tools to build and operate Open Arms. This paper describes these hands controls, sensing, mechanisms, aesthetic design, and manufacturing and their real-world applications with a teleoperated nursing robot. From 2015 to 2022, the authors have designed and established the manufacturing of Open Arms as a low-cost, high functionality robotic arms hardware and software framework to serve both humanoid robot applications and the urgent demand for low-cost prosthetics, as part of the Hanson Robotics Sophia Robot platform. Using the techniques of consumer product manufacturing, we set out to define modular, low-cost techniques for approximating the dexterity and sensitivity of human hands. To demonstrate the dexterity and control of our hands, we present a Generative Grasping Residual CNN (GGR-CNN) model that can generate robust antipodal grasps from input images of various objects in real-time speeds (22ms). We achieved state-of-the-art accuracy of 92.4% using our model architecture on a standard Cornell Grasping Dataset, which contains a diverse set of household objects.
summary: Open Arms is a novel open-source platform of realistic human-like robotic hands and arms hardware with 28 Degree-of-Freedom (DoF), designed to extend the capabilities and accessibility of humanoid robotic grasping and manipulation. The Open Arms framework includes an open SDK and development environment, simulation tools, and application development tools to build and operate Open Arms. This paper describes these hands controls, sensing, mechanisms, aesthetic design, and manufacturing and their real-world applications with a teleoperated nursing robot. From 2015 to 2022, the authors have designed and established the manufacturing of Open Arms as a low-cost, high functionality robotic arms hardware and software framework to serve both humanoid robot applications and the urgent demand for low-cost prosthetics, as part of the Hanson Robotics Sophia Robot platform. Using the techniques of consumer product manufacturing, we set out to define modular, low-cost techniques for approximating the dexterity and sensitivity of human hands. To demonstrate the dexterity and control of our hands, we present a Generative Grasping Residual CNN (GGR-CNN) model that can generate robust antipodal grasps from input images of various objects in real-time speeds (22ms). We achieved state-of-the-art accuracy of 92.4% using our model architecture on a standard Cornell Grasping Dataset, which contains a diverse set of household objects.
abstract_zh: Open Arms 是一个新颖的开源平台，由具有 28 个自由度 (DoF) 的逼真类人机器人手和手臂硬件组成，旨在扩展人形机器人抓取和操作的功能和可访问性。 Open Arms 框架包括开放 SDK 和开发环境、模拟工具以及用于构建和操作 Open Arms 的应用程序开发工具。本文描述了这些手部控制、传感、机制、美学设计和制造及其在远程操作护理机器人中的实际应用。从 2015 年到 2022 年，作者设计并建立了 Open Arms 的制造，作为低成本、高功能的机械臂硬件和软件框架，作为 Hanson Robotics Sophia 机器人平台的一部分，满足人形机器人应用和低成本假肢的迫切需求。利用消费品制造技术，我们着手定义模块化、低成本技术，以接近人手的灵巧性和灵敏度。为了展示我们双手的灵活性和控制力，我们提出了一种生成抓取残差 CNN (GGR-CNN) 模型，该模型可以以实时速度（22 毫秒）从各种物体的输入图像中生成强大的对映抓取。我们在标准康奈尔抓取数据集上使用我们的模型架构，实现了 92.4% 的最先进准确率，该数据集包含一组不同的家居物品。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Open Arms开源平台，开发具有28自由度的类人机械手和机械臂硬件，并结合生成抓取残差CNN模型实现高效物体抓取。
AI.motivation: 为提升人形机器人操作能力与普及低成本假肢需求，开发模块化、低成本且功能强大的开源机器人平台。
AI.method: 采用消费级产品制造技术实现机械手模块化设计，开发Generative Grasping Residual CNN（GGR-CNN）模型进行实时抗抓取生成。
AI.result: 实现28自由度机械臂与手部硬件，GGR-CNN在Cornell数据集上达到92.4%准确率，抓取响应时间22ms。
AI.conclusion: Open Arms通过开源框架与先进算法，为机器人操作和假肢领域提供了高性价比的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Open Arms开源平台，开发具有28自由度的类人机械手和机械臂硬件，并结合生成抓取残差CNN模型实现高效物体抓取。
ai_content.motivation: 为提升人形机器人操作能力与普及低成本假肢需求，开发模块化、低成本且功能强大的开源机器人平台。
ai_content.method: 采用消费级产品制造技术实现机械手模块化设计，开发Generative Grasping Residual CNN（GGR-CNN）模型进行实时抗抓取生成。
ai_content.result: 实现28自由度机械臂与手部硬件，GGR-CNN在Cornell数据集上达到92.4%准确率，抓取响应时间22ms。
ai_content.conclusion: Open Arms通过开源框架与先进算法，为机器人操作和假肢领域提供了高性价比的解决方案。

search_text: Open Arms: Open-Source Arms, Hands & Control 张开双臂：开源手臂、手和控制 Open Arms is a novel open-source platform of realistic human-like robotic hands and arms hardware with 28 Degree-of-Freedom (DoF), designed to extend the capabilities and accessibility of humanoid robotic grasping and manipulation. The Open Arms framework includes an open SDK and development environment, simulation tools, and application development tools to build and operate Open Arms. This paper describes these hands controls, sensing, mechanisms, aesthetic design, and manufacturing and their real-world applications with a teleoperated nursing robot. From 2015 to 2022, the authors have designed and established the manufacturing of Open Arms as a low-cost, high functionality robotic arms hardware and software framework to serve both humanoid robot applications and the urgent demand for low-cost prosthetics, as part of the Hanson Robotics Sophia Robot platform. Using the techniques of consumer product manufacturing, we set out to define modular, low-cost techniques for approximating the dexterity and sensitivity of human hands. To demonstrate the dexterity and control of our hands, we present a Generative Grasping Residual CNN (GGR-CNN) model that can generate robust antipodal grasps from input images of various objects in real-time speeds (22ms). We achieved state-of-the-art accuracy of 92.4% using our model architecture on a standard Cornell Grasping Dataset, which contains a diverse set of household objects. Open Arms 是一个新颖的开源平台，由具有 28 个自由度 (DoF) 的逼真类人机器人手和手臂硬件组成，旨在扩展人形机器人抓取和操作的功能和可访问性。 Open Arms 框架包括开放 SDK 和开发环境、模拟工具以及用于构建和操作 Open Arms 的应用程序开发工具。本文描述了这些手部控制、传感、机制、美学设计和制造及其在远程操作护理机器人中的实际应用。从 2015 年到 2022 年，作者设计并建立了 Open Arms 的制造，作为低成本、高功能的机械臂硬件和软件框架，作为 Hanson Robotics Sophia 机器人平台的一部分，满足人形机器人应用和低成本假肢的迫切需求。利用消费品制造技术，我们着手定义模块化、低成本技术，以接近人手的灵巧性和灵敏度。为了展示我们双手的灵活性和控制力，我们提出了一种生成抓取残差 CNN (GGR-CNN) 模型，该模型可以以实时速度（22 毫秒）从各种物体的输入图像中生成强大的对映抓取。我们在标准康奈尔抓取数据集上使用我们的模型架构，实现了 92.4% 的最先进准确率，该数据集包含一组不同的家居物品。 本文提出Open Arms开源平台，开发具有28自由度的类人机械手和机械臂硬件，并结合生成抓取残差CNN模型实现高效物体抓取。 David Hanson,Alishba Imran,Gerardo Morales,Vytas Krisciunas,Aditya Sagi,Aman Malali,Rushali Mohbe,Raviteja Upadrashta cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Eva Memmel,Clara Menzen,Jetze Schuurmans,Frederiek Wesel,Kim Batselier
title: Position: Tensor Networks are a Valuable Asset for Green AI
title_zh: 立场：张量网络是绿色人工智能的宝贵资产
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2024 and will appear in the conference proceedings
comments: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2024 and will appear in the conference proceedings
abstract: For the first time, this position paper introduces a fundamental link between tensor networks (TNs) and Green AI, highlighting their synergistic potential to enhance both the inclusivity and sustainability of AI research. We argue that TNs are valuable for Green AI due to their strong mathematical backbone and inherent logarithmic compression potential. We undertake a comprehensive review of the ongoing discussions on Green AI, emphasizing the importance of sustainability and inclusivity in AI research to demonstrate the significance of establishing the link between Green AI and TNs. To support our position, we first provide a comprehensive overview of efficiency metrics proposed in Green AI literature and then evaluate examples of TNs in the fields of kernel machines and deep learning using the proposed efficiency metrics. This position paper aims to incentivize meaningful, constructive discussions by bridging fundamental principles of Green AI and TNs. We advocate for researchers to seriously evaluate the integration of TNs into their research projects, and in alignment with the link established in this paper, we support prior calls encouraging researchers to treat Green AI principles as a research priority.
summary: For the first time, this position paper introduces a fundamental link between tensor networks (TNs) and Green AI, highlighting their synergistic potential to enhance both the inclusivity and sustainability of AI research. We argue that TNs are valuable for Green AI due to their strong mathematical backbone and inherent logarithmic compression potential. We undertake a comprehensive review of the ongoing discussions on Green AI, emphasizing the importance of sustainability and inclusivity in AI research to demonstrate the significance of establishing the link between Green AI and TNs. To support our position, we first provide a comprehensive overview of efficiency metrics proposed in Green AI literature and then evaluate examples of TNs in the fields of kernel machines and deep learning using the proposed efficiency metrics. This position paper aims to incentivize meaningful, constructive discussions by bridging fundamental principles of Green AI and TNs. We advocate for researchers to seriously evaluate the integration of TNs into their research projects, and in alignment with the link established in this paper, we support prior calls encouraging researchers to treat Green AI principles as a research priority.
abstract_zh: 这篇立场文件首次介绍了张量网络（TN）和绿色人工智能之间的基本联系，强调了它们在增强人工智能研究的包容性和可持续性方面的协同潜力。我们认为，TN 对绿色人工智能很有价值，因为它们具有强大的数学基础和固有的对数压缩潜力。我们对正在进行的关于绿色人工智能的讨论进行了全面回顾，强调人工智能研究的可持续性和包容性的重要性，以证明在绿色人工智能和TN之间建立联系的重要性。为了支持我们的立场，我们首先对绿色人工智能文献中提出的效率指标进行全面概述，然后使用提出的效率指标评估内核机器和深度学习领域的TN示例。本立场文件旨在通过连接绿色人工智能和TN的基本原则来激励有意义的、建设性的讨论。我们主张研究人员认真评估将 TN 纳入其研究项目，并且根据本文中建立的链接，我们支持之前鼓励研究人员将绿色人工智能原则视为研究重点的呼吁。

AI.tldr: 本文首次建立张量网络（TNs）与绿色AI之间的联系，强调其协同潜力以提升AI研究的包容性与可持续性，并通过效率指标评估TNs在核机器和深度学习中的应用。
AI.motivation: 绿色AI需兼顾可持续性与包容性，而TNs凭借数学基础与对数压缩潜力可满足需求，因此需推动二者结合以促进AI研究的绿色转型。
AI.method: 回顾绿色AI讨论，总结效率指标；基于这些指标，评估TNs在核机器与深度学习中的实例，验证其效率优势。
AI.result: TNs在提升计算效率与资源利用率方面展现潜力，证明其作为绿色AI工具的价值，并呼吁研究者优先考虑其整合。
AI.conclusion: 建立TNs与绿色AI的联系具有重要意义，应将其纳入研究重点，以推动AI领域可持续发展与技术革新。
