authors_text: Matej Kloska,Viera Rozinajova
title: Towards Symbolic Time Series Representation Improved by Kernel Density Estimators
title_zh: 通过核密度估计器改进符号时间序列表示
comment: ef:Hameurlain, A., Tjoa, A.M. (eds) Transactions on Large-Scale Data- and Knowledge-Centered Systems L. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 12930. 2021. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
comments: ef:Hameurlain, A., Tjoa, A.M. (eds) Transactions on Large-Scale Data- and Knowledge-Centered Systems L. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 12930. 2021. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
abstract: This paper deals with symbolic time series representation. It builds up on the popular mapping technique Symbolic Aggregate approXimation algorithm (SAX), which is extensively utilized in sequence classification, pattern mining, anomaly detection, time series indexing and other data mining tasks. However, the disadvantage of this method is, that it works reliably only for time series with Gaussian-like distribution. In our previous work we have proposed an improvement of SAX, called dwSAX, which can deal with Gaussian as well as non-Gaussian data distribution. Recently we have made further progress in our solution - edwSAX. Our goal was to optimally cover the information space by means of sufficient alphabet utilization; and to satisfy lower bounding criterion as tight as possible. We describe here our approach, including evaluation on commonly employed tasks such as time series reconstruction error and Euclidean distance lower bounding with promising improvements over SAX.
summary: This paper deals with symbolic time series representation. It builds up on the popular mapping technique Symbolic Aggregate approXimation algorithm (SAX), which is extensively utilized in sequence classification, pattern mining, anomaly detection, time series indexing and other data mining tasks. However, the disadvantage of this method is, that it works reliably only for time series with Gaussian-like distribution. In our previous work we have proposed an improvement of SAX, called dwSAX, which can deal with Gaussian as well as non-Gaussian data distribution. Recently we have made further progress in our solution - edwSAX. Our goal was to optimally cover the information space by means of sufficient alphabet utilization; and to satisfy lower bounding criterion as tight as possible. We describe here our approach, including evaluation on commonly employed tasks such as time series reconstruction error and Euclidean distance lower bounding with promising improvements over SAX.
abstract_zh: 本文涉及符号时间序列表示。它建立在流行的映射技术符号聚合近似算法 (SAX) 的基础上，该算法广泛应用于序列分类、模式挖掘、异常检测、时间序列索引和其他数据挖掘任务。然而，该方法的缺点是，它仅适用于具有类高斯分布的时间序列。在我们之前的工作中，我们提出了 SAX 的改进，称为 dwSAX，它可以处理高斯以及非高斯数据分布。最近，我们的解决方案 edwSAX 取得了进一步的进展。我们的目标是通过充分利用字母表来最佳地覆盖信息空间；并尽可能严格地满足下界标准。我们在这里描述我们的方法，包括对常用任务的评估，例如时间序列重建误差和欧几里德距离下界，以及对 SAX 的有希望的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的符号时间序列表示方法edwSAX，通过核密度估计器优化信息空间覆盖和下界准则，以提升非高斯分布数据的处理能力。
AI.motivation: 传统SAX方法仅适用于高斯分布时间序列，难以处理非高斯数据且信息覆盖不充分，需改进以满足更广泛的数据分布和更紧的下界约束。
AI.method: 基于dwSAX改进提出edwSAX，结合核密度估计器优化字母表利用，通过调整符号划分策略实现信息空间的最优覆盖并满足紧致下界准则。
AI.result: 在时间序列重建误差和欧几里得距离下界任务中，edwSAX相比SAX展现出更优的性能改进。
AI.conclusion: edwSAX通过核密度估计优化符号表示，有效提升了非高斯分布时间序列的处理能力，为数据挖掘任务提供了更可靠的方法支持。

search_text: Towards Symbolic Time Series Representation Improved by Kernel Density Estimators 通过核密度估计器改进符号时间序列表示 This paper deals with symbolic time series representation. It builds up on the popular mapping technique Symbolic Aggregate approXimation algorithm (SAX), which is extensively utilized in sequence classification, pattern mining, anomaly detection, time series indexing and other data mining tasks. However, the disadvantage of this method is, that it works reliably only for time series with Gaussian-like distribution. In our previous work we have proposed an improvement of SAX, called dwSAX, which can deal with Gaussian as well as non-Gaussian data distribution. Recently we have made further progress in our solution - edwSAX. Our goal was to optimally cover the information space by means of sufficient alphabet utilization; and to satisfy lower bounding criterion as tight as possible. We describe here our approach, including evaluation on commonly employed tasks such as time series reconstruction error and Euclidean distance lower bounding with promising improvements over SAX. 本文涉及符号时间序列表示。它建立在流行的映射技术符号聚合近似算法 (SAX) 的基础上，该算法广泛应用于序列分类、模式挖掘、异常检测、时间序列索引和其他数据挖掘任务。然而，该方法的缺点是，它仅适用于具有类高斯分布的时间序列。在我们之前的工作中，我们提出了 SAX 的改进，称为 dwSAX，它可以处理高斯以及非高斯数据分布。最近，我们的解决方案 edwSAX 取得了进一步的进展。我们的目标是通过充分利用字母表来最佳地覆盖信息空间；并尽可能严格地满足下界标准。我们在这里描述我们的方法，包括对常用任务的评估，例如时间序列重建误差和欧几里德距离下界，以及对 SAX 的有希望的改进。 本文提出了一种改进的符号时间序列表示方法edwSAX，通过核密度估计器优化信息空间覆盖和下界准则，以提升非高斯分布数据的处理能力。 Matej Kloska,Viera Rozinajova cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chenyang Si,Weihao Yu,Pan Zhou,Yichen Zhou,Xinchao Wang,Shuicheng Yan
title: Inception Transformer
title_zh: 盗梦空间变压器
comment: Code and models will be released at https://github.com/sail-sg/iFormer
comments: Code and models will be released at https://github.com/sail-sg/iFormer
abstract: Recent studies show that Transformer has strong capability of building long-range dependencies, yet is incompetent in capturing high frequencies that predominantly convey local information. To tackle this issue, we present a novel and general-purpose Inception Transformer, or iFormer for short, that effectively learns comprehensive features with both high- and low-frequency information in visual data. Specifically, we design an Inception mixer to explicitly graft the advantages of convolution and max-pooling for capturing the high-frequency information to Transformers. Different from recent hybrid frameworks, the Inception mixer brings greater efficiency through a channel splitting mechanism to adopt parallel convolution/max-pooling path and self-attention path as high- and low-frequency mixers, while having the flexibility to model discriminative information scattered within a wide frequency range. Considering that bottom layers play more roles in capturing high-frequency details while top layers more in modeling low-frequency global information, we further introduce a frequency ramp structure, i.e. gradually decreasing the dimensions fed to the high-frequency mixer and increasing those to the low-frequency mixer, which can effectively trade-off high- and low-frequency components across different layers. We benchmark the iFormer on a series of vision tasks, and showcase that it achieves impressive performance on image classification, COCO detection and ADE20K segmentation. For example, our iFormer-S hits the top-1 accuracy of 83.4% on ImageNet-1K, much higher than DeiT-S by 3.6%, and even slightly better than much bigger model Swin-B (83.3%) with only 1/4 parameters and 1/3 FLOPs. Code and models will be released at https://github.com/sail-sg/iFormer.
summary: Recent studies show that Transformer has strong capability of building long-range dependencies, yet is incompetent in capturing high frequencies that predominantly convey local information. To tackle this issue, we present a novel and general-purpose Inception Transformer, or iFormer for short, that effectively learns comprehensive features with both high- and low-frequency information in visual data. Specifically, we design an Inception mixer to explicitly graft the advantages of convolution and max-pooling for capturing the high-frequency information to Transformers. Different from recent hybrid frameworks, the Inception mixer brings greater efficiency through a channel splitting mechanism to adopt parallel convolution/max-pooling path and self-attention path as high- and low-frequency mixers, while having the flexibility to model discriminative information scattered within a wide frequency range. Considering that bottom layers play more roles in capturing high-frequency details while top layers more in modeling low-frequency global information, we further introduce a frequency ramp structure, i.e. gradually decreasing the dimensions fed to the high-frequency mixer and increasing those to the low-frequency mixer, which can effectively trade-off high- and low-frequency components across different layers. We benchmark the iFormer on a series of vision tasks, and showcase that it achieves impressive performance on image classification, COCO detection and ADE20K segmentation. For example, our iFormer-S hits the top-1 accuracy of 83.4% on ImageNet-1K, much higher than DeiT-S by 3.6%, and even slightly better than much bigger model Swin-B (83.3%) with only 1/4 parameters and 1/3 FLOPs. Code and models will be released at https://github.com/sail-sg/iFormer.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，Transformer 具有很强的建立远程依赖关系的能力，但在捕获主要传达局部信息的高频方面却无能为力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的 Inception Transformer，简称 iFormer，它可以有效地学习视觉数据中高频和低频信息的综合特征。具体来说，我们设计了一个 Inception 混合器，将卷积和最大池化的优势显式移植到 Transformer 中，以捕获高频信息。与最近的混合框架不同，Inception混频器通过通道分割机制采用并行卷积/最大池路径和自注意力路径作为高频和低频混频器带来更高的效率，同时能够灵活地对分散在较宽频率范围内的判别信息进行建模。考虑到底层在捕获高频细节方面发挥更多作用，而顶层在建模低频全局信息方面发挥更多作用，我们进一步引入了频率斜坡结构，即逐渐减少馈送到高频混频器的维度并增加馈送到低频混频器的维度，这可以有效地权衡不同层的高频和低频分量。我们在一系列视觉任务上对 iFormer 进行了基准测试，并展示了它在图像分类、COCO 检测和 ADE20K 分割方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。例如，我们的 iFormer-S 在 ImageNet-1K 上达到了 83.4% 的 top-1 准确率，比 DeiT-S 高出 3.6%，甚至比只有 1/4 参数和 1/3 FLOPs 的更大模型 Swin-B (83.3%) 还要好一些。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/sail-sg/iFormer 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为iFormer的新型Transformer架构，旨在同时捕捉视觉数据中的高低频信息，提升模型在图像分类、检测和分割任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在建模长距离依赖关系方面表现优异，但难以有效捕捉高频局部信息，而高频信息对视觉任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了Inception mixer模块，通过通道分割机制并行融合卷积/最大池化（高频路径）与自注意力（低频路径），并引入频率渐变结构，使低层侧重高频细节、高层侧重低频全局信息。
AI.result: iFormer-S在ImageNet-1K上达到83.4%的top-1准确率，优于DeiT-S（+3.6%）且参数量仅为Swin-B的1/4，同时在COCO检测和ADE20K分割任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: iFormer通过高效融合高低频信息处理机制，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了视觉任务性能，为Transformer与卷积方法的结合提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiaming Sun,Xi Chen,Qianqian Wang,Zhengqi Li,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Xiaowei Zhou,Noah Snavely
title: Neural 3D Reconstruction in the Wild
title_zh: 野外神经 3D 重建
comment: Accepted to SIGGRAPH 2022 (Conference Proceedings). Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/neuralrecon-w/
comments: Accepted to SIGGRAPH 2022 (Conference Proceedings). Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/neuralrecon-w/
abstract: We are witnessing an explosion of neural implicit representations in computer vision and graphics. Their applicability has recently expanded beyond tasks such as shape generation and image-based rendering to the fundamental problem of image-based 3D reconstruction. However, existing methods typically assume constrained 3D environments with constant illumination captured by a small set of roughly uniformly distributed cameras. We introduce a new method that enables efficient and accurate surface reconstruction from Internet photo collections in the presence of varying illumination. To achieve this, we propose a hybrid voxel- and surface-guided sampling technique that allows for more efficient ray sampling around surfaces and leads to significant improvements in reconstruction quality. Further, we present a new benchmark and protocol for evaluating reconstruction performance on such in-the-wild scenes. We perform extensive experiments, demonstrating that our approach surpasses both classical and neural reconstruction methods on a wide variety of metrics.
summary: We are witnessing an explosion of neural implicit representations in computer vision and graphics. Their applicability has recently expanded beyond tasks such as shape generation and image-based rendering to the fundamental problem of image-based 3D reconstruction. However, existing methods typically assume constrained 3D environments with constant illumination captured by a small set of roughly uniformly distributed cameras. We introduce a new method that enables efficient and accurate surface reconstruction from Internet photo collections in the presence of varying illumination. To achieve this, we propose a hybrid voxel- and surface-guided sampling technique that allows for more efficient ray sampling around surfaces and leads to significant improvements in reconstruction quality. Further, we present a new benchmark and protocol for evaluating reconstruction performance on such in-the-wild scenes. We perform extensive experiments, demonstrating that our approach surpasses both classical and neural reconstruction methods on a wide variety of metrics.
abstract_zh: 我们正在见证计算机视觉和图形中神经隐式表征的爆炸式增长。它们的适用性最近已超出形状生成和基于图像的渲染等任务，扩展到基于图像的 3D 重建的基本问题。然而，现有方法通常假设受限 3D 环境，其中由一小组大致均匀分布的相机捕获恒定照明。我们引入了一种新方法，可以在不同照明的情况下根据互联网照片集进行高效、准确的表面重建。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种混合体素和表面引导采样技术，该技术允许在表面周围进行更有效的射线采样，并显着提高重建质量。此外，我们提出了一个新的基准和协议来评估此类野外场景的重建性能。我们进行了广泛的实验，证明我们的方法在多种指标上都超越了经典和神经重建方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的3D重建方法，能够处理互联网照片集合中的复杂光照变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法依赖受控环境和均匀分布的相机视角，难以应对真实场景中的光照变化和复杂拍摄条件。
AI.method: 设计混合体素-表面引导采样技术，优化光线采样效率，并构建新的野外场景重建评估基准。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种指标上优于传统方法和神经网络方法，重建质量显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合采样技术有效解决了真实场景下的3D重建难题，为后续研究提供了新基准和评估协议。

authors_text: Tengfei Wang,Ting Zhang,Bo Zhang,Hao Ouyang,Dong Chen,Qifeng Chen,Fang Wen
title: Pretraining is All You Need for Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 预训练就是图像到图像翻译所需的全部
abstract: We propose to use pretraining to boost general image-to-image translation. Prior image-to-image translation methods usually need dedicated architectural design and train individual translation models from scratch, struggling for high-quality generation of complex scenes, especially when paired training data are not abundant. In this paper, we regard each image-to-image translation problem as a downstream task and introduce a simple and generic framework that adapts a pretrained diffusion model to accommodate various kinds of image-to-image translation. We also propose adversarial training to enhance the texture synthesis in the diffusion model training, in conjunction with normalized guidance sampling to improve the generation quality. We present extensive empirical comparison across various tasks on challenging benchmarks such as ADE20K, COCO-Stuff, and DIODE, showing the proposed pretraining-based image-to-image translation (PITI) is capable of synthesizing images of unprecedented realism and faithfulness.
summary: We propose to use pretraining to boost general image-to-image translation. Prior image-to-image translation methods usually need dedicated architectural design and train individual translation models from scratch, struggling for high-quality generation of complex scenes, especially when paired training data are not abundant. In this paper, we regard each image-to-image translation problem as a downstream task and introduce a simple and generic framework that adapts a pretrained diffusion model to accommodate various kinds of image-to-image translation. We also propose adversarial training to enhance the texture synthesis in the diffusion model training, in conjunction with normalized guidance sampling to improve the generation quality. We present extensive empirical comparison across various tasks on challenging benchmarks such as ADE20K, COCO-Stuff, and DIODE, showing the proposed pretraining-based image-to-image translation (PITI) is capable of synthesizing images of unprecedented realism and faithfulness.
abstract_zh: 我们建议使用预训练来促进一般图像到图像的转换。现有的图像到图像翻译方法通常需要专门的架构设计并从头开始训练单独的翻译模型，难以高质量生成复杂场景，尤其是在配对训练数据不丰富的情况下。在本文中，我们将每个图像到图像的翻译问题视为下游任务，并介绍了一个简单而通用的框架，该框架采用预训练的扩散模型来适应各种类型的图像到图像的翻译。我们还提出对抗性训练来增强扩散模型训练中的纹理合成，并结合归一化引导采样来提高生成质量。我们在 ADE20K、COCO-Stuff 和 DIODE 等具有挑战性的基准上对各种任务进行了广泛的实证比较，表明所提出的基于预训练的图像到图像转换（PITI）能够合成前所未有的真实性和忠实度的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练的图像到图像翻译方法（PITI），通过适配预训练扩散模型实现复杂场景的高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 传统图像翻译方法依赖专用架构设计和从头训练，难以处理数据不足或复杂场景，而预训练模型可能提供更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 将图像翻译任务视为下游任务，采用预训练扩散模型并引入对抗训练与归一化引导采样技术优化生成质量。
AI.result: 在ADE20K、COCO-Stuff和DIODE等基准测试中，PITI生成的图像在真实感和忠实度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型适配框架为图像翻译提供了简单通用的解决方案，能有效提升复杂场景的生成效果。

authors_text: Mathieu Laurière,Sarah Perrin,Julien Pérolat,Sertan Girgin,Paul Muller,Romuald Élie,Matthieu Geist,Olivier Pietquin
title: Learning in Mean Field Games: A Survey
title_zh: 在平均场游戏中学习：一项调查
abstract: Non-cooperative and cooperative games with a very large number of players have many applications but remain generally intractable when the number of players increases. Introduced by Lasry and Lions, and Huang, Caines and Malhamé, Mean Field Games (MFGs) rely on a mean-field approximation to allow the number of players to grow to infinity. Traditional methods for solving these games generally rely on solving partial or stochastic differential equations with a full knowledge of the model. Recently, Reinforcement Learning (RL) has appeared promising to solve complex problems at scale. The combination of RL and MFGs is promising to solve games at a very large scale both in terms of population size and environment complexity. In this survey, we review the quickly growing recent literature on RL methods to learn equilibria and social optima in MFGs. We first identify the most common settings (static, stationary, and evolutive) of MFGs. We then present a general framework for classical iterative methods (based on best-response computation or policy evaluation) to solve MFGs in an exact way. Building on these algorithms and the connection with Markov Decision Processes, we explain how RL can be used to learn MFG solutions in a model-free way. Last, we present numerical illustrations on a benchmark problem, and conclude with some perspectives.
summary: Non-cooperative and cooperative games with a very large number of players have many applications but remain generally intractable when the number of players increases. Introduced by Lasry and Lions, and Huang, Caines and Malhamé, Mean Field Games (MFGs) rely on a mean-field approximation to allow the number of players to grow to infinity. Traditional methods for solving these games generally rely on solving partial or stochastic differential equations with a full knowledge of the model. Recently, Reinforcement Learning (RL) has appeared promising to solve complex problems at scale. The combination of RL and MFGs is promising to solve games at a very large scale both in terms of population size and environment complexity. In this survey, we review the quickly growing recent literature on RL methods to learn equilibria and social optima in MFGs. We first identify the most common settings (static, stationary, and evolutive) of MFGs. We then present a general framework for classical iterative methods (based on best-response computation or policy evaluation) to solve MFGs in an exact way. Building on these algorithms and the connection with Markov Decision Processes, we explain how RL can be used to learn MFG solutions in a model-free way. Last, we present numerical illustrations on a benchmark problem, and conclude with some perspectives.
abstract_zh: 具有大量玩家的非合作和合作博弈具有许多应用，但当玩家数量增加时通常仍然难以处理。平均场游戏 (MFG) 由 Lasry 和 Lions 以及 Huang、Caines 和 Malhamé 提出，依靠平均场近似来让玩家数量增长到无穷大。解决这些博弈的传统方法通常依赖于在充分了解模型的情况下求解偏微分方程或随机微分方程。最近，强化学习（RL）似乎有望大规模解决复杂问题。强化学习和 MFG 的结合有望在人口规模和环境复杂性方面解决大规模游戏。在本次调查中，我们回顾了最近快速增长的有关 RL 方法的文献，以学习 MFG 中的均衡和社会最优值。我们首先确定 MFG 最常见的设置（静态、固定和演化）。然后，我们提出了经典迭代方法（基于最佳响应计算或策略评估）的通用框架，以精确地解决 MFG。基于这些算法以及与马尔可夫决策过程的联系，我们解释了如何使用 RL 以无模型的方式学习 MFG 解决方案。最后，我们对基准问题进行数值说明，并得出一些观点。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了强化学习在求解大规模平均场博弈中的应用，提出模型无关的学习框架并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理大规模非合作/合作博弈时计算复杂度高，而强化学习提供了解决复杂大规模博弈的新途径。
AI.method: 分类讨论MFG的静态/平稳/演化场景，构建基于最佳响应和策略评估的经典迭代方法框架，结合马尔可夫决策过程实现强化学习的模型无关求解。
AI.result: 通过基准问题的数值实验验证了所提方法在求解MFG均衡和社会最优解中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为大规模博弈求解提供新思路，未来需进一步探索算法效率与实际应用场景的适配性。

authors_text: Sihao Xue,Qianyao Shen,Guoqing Li
title: Boosting Tail Neural Network for Realtime Custom Keyword Spotting
title_zh: 增强尾部神经网络以实现实时自定义关键字识别
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Boosting Tail Neural Network (BTNN) for improving the performance of Realtime Custom Keyword Spotting (RCKS) that is still an industrial challenge for demanding powerful classification ability with limited computation resources. Inspired by Brain Science that a brain is only partly activated for a nerve simulation and numerous machine learning algorithms are developed to use a batch of weak classifiers to resolve arduous problems, which are often proved to be effective. We show that this method is helpful to the RCKS problem. The proposed approach achieve better performances in terms of wakeup rate and false alarm. In our experiments compared with those traditional algorithms that use only one strong classifier, it gets 18\% relative improvement. We also point out that this approach may be promising in future ASR exploration.
summary: In this paper, we propose a Boosting Tail Neural Network (BTNN) for improving the performance of Realtime Custom Keyword Spotting (RCKS) that is still an industrial challenge for demanding powerful classification ability with limited computation resources. Inspired by Brain Science that a brain is only partly activated for a nerve simulation and numerous machine learning algorithms are developed to use a batch of weak classifiers to resolve arduous problems, which are often proved to be effective. We show that this method is helpful to the RCKS problem. The proposed approach achieve better performances in terms of wakeup rate and false alarm. In our experiments compared with those traditional algorithms that use only one strong classifier, it gets 18\% relative improvement. We also point out that this approach may be promising in future ASR exploration.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种Boosting Tail Neural Network（BTNN）来提高实时自定义关键字识别（RCKS）的性能，这对于在有限的计算资源下要求强大的分类能力来说仍然是一个工业挑战。受脑科学的启发，大脑仅被部分激活以进行神经模拟，并且开发了许多机器学习算法来使用一批弱分类器来解决艰巨的问题，并且通常被证明是有效的。我们证明这种方法对解决 RCKS 问题有帮助。所提出的方法在唤醒率和误报方面取得了更好的性能。在我们的实验中，与那些仅使用一个强分类器的传统算法相比，它获得了 18% 的相对改进。我们还指出，这种方法在未来的 ASR 探索中可能很有前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强尾部神经网络（BTNN），用于提升实时自定义关键词识别（RCKS）的性能。
AI.motivation: 实时自定义关键词识别在工业应用中仍面临挑战，需要在有限计算资源下实现强大的分类能力。受脑科学启发，部分激活机制和弱分类器集成方法已被证明是有效的。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种增强尾部神经网络（BTNN），利用多个弱分类器的集成方法来解决RCKS问题。
AI.result: 在实验中，与仅使用单一强分类器的传统算法相比，BTNN在唤醒率和误报率方面取得了18%的相对改进。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在RCKS问题上表现良好，未来可能在自动语音识别（ASR）领域具有应用前景。

search_text: Boosting Tail Neural Network for Realtime Custom Keyword Spotting 增强尾部神经网络以实现实时自定义关键字识别 In this paper, we propose a Boosting Tail Neural Network (BTNN) for improving the performance of Realtime Custom Keyword Spotting (RCKS) that is still an industrial challenge for demanding powerful classification ability with limited computation resources. Inspired by Brain Science that a brain is only partly activated for a nerve simulation and numerous machine learning algorithms are developed to use a batch of weak classifiers to resolve arduous problems, which are often proved to be effective. We show that this method is helpful to the RCKS problem. The proposed approach achieve better performances in terms of wakeup rate and false alarm. In our experiments compared with those traditional algorithms that use only one strong classifier, it gets 18\% relative improvement. We also point out that this approach may be promising in future ASR exploration. 在本文中，我们提出了一种Boosting Tail Neural Network（BTNN）来提高实时自定义关键字识别（RCKS）的性能，这对于在有限的计算资源下要求强大的分类能力来说仍然是一个工业挑战。受脑科学的启发，大脑仅被部分激活以进行神经模拟，并且开发了许多机器学习算法来使用一批弱分类器来解决艰巨的问题，并且通常被证明是有效的。我们证明这种方法对解决 RCKS 问题有帮助。所提出的方法在唤醒率和误报方面取得了更好的性能。在我们的实验中，与那些仅使用一个强分类器的传统算法相比，它获得了 18% 的相对改进。我们还指出，这种方法在未来的 ASR 探索中可能很有前景。 本文提出了一种增强尾部神经网络（BTNN），用于提升实时自定义关键词识别（RCKS）的性能。 Sihao Xue,Qianyao Shen,Guoqing Li eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Parker Ewen,Adam Li,Yuxin Chen,Steven Hong,Ram Vasudevan
title: These Maps Are Made For Walking: Real-Time Terrain Property Estimation for Mobile Robots
title_zh: 这些地图是为步行而制作的：移动机器人的实时地形属性估计
abstract: The equations of motion governing mobile robots are dependent on terrain properties such as the coefficient of friction, and contact model parameters. Estimating these properties is thus essential for robotic navigation. Ideally any map estimating terrain properties should run in real time, mitigate sensor noise, and provide probability distributions of the aforementioned properties, thus enabling risk-mitigating navigation and planning. This paper addresses these needs and proposes a Bayesian inference framework for semantic mapping which recursively estimates both the terrain surface profile and a probability distribution for terrain properties using data from a single RGB-D camera. The proposed framework is evaluated in simulation against other semantic mapping methods and is shown to outperform these state-of-the-art methods in terms of correctly estimating simulated ground-truth terrain properties when evaluated using a precision-recall curve and the Kullback-Leibler divergence test. Additionally, the proposed method is deployed on a physical legged robotic platform in both indoor and outdoor environments, and we show our method correctly predicts terrain properties in both cases. The proposed framework runs in real-time and includes a ROS interface for easy integration.
summary: The equations of motion governing mobile robots are dependent on terrain properties such as the coefficient of friction, and contact model parameters. Estimating these properties is thus essential for robotic navigation. Ideally any map estimating terrain properties should run in real time, mitigate sensor noise, and provide probability distributions of the aforementioned properties, thus enabling risk-mitigating navigation and planning. This paper addresses these needs and proposes a Bayesian inference framework for semantic mapping which recursively estimates both the terrain surface profile and a probability distribution for terrain properties using data from a single RGB-D camera. The proposed framework is evaluated in simulation against other semantic mapping methods and is shown to outperform these state-of-the-art methods in terms of correctly estimating simulated ground-truth terrain properties when evaluated using a precision-recall curve and the Kullback-Leibler divergence test. Additionally, the proposed method is deployed on a physical legged robotic platform in both indoor and outdoor environments, and we show our method correctly predicts terrain properties in both cases. The proposed framework runs in real-time and includes a ROS interface for easy integration.
abstract_zh: 控制移动机器人的运动方程取决于地形特性，例如摩擦系数和接触模型参数。因此，估计这些属性对于机器人导航至关重要。理想情况下，任何估计地形属性的地图都应该实时运行，减轻传感器噪声，并提供上述属性的概率分布，从而实现降低风险的导航和规划。本文解决了这些需求，并提出了一种用于语义映射的贝叶斯推理框架，该框架使用来自单个 RGB-D 相机的数据递归地估计地形表面轮廓和地形属性的概率分布。所提出的框架在模拟中针对其他语义映射方法进行了评估，并且在使用精确回忆曲线和 Kullback-Leibler 散度测试进行评估时，在正确估计模拟地面实况地形属性方面表现出优于这些最先进的方法。此外，所提出的方法被部署在室内和室外环境中的物理腿机器人平台上，并且我们证明我们的方法在这两种情况下都能正确预测地形属性。所提出的框架实时运行，并包含一个易于集成的 ROS 接口。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯推理的实时地形属性估计框架，用于增强移动机器人的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人导航依赖地形属性（如摩擦系数），但现有方法难以实时处理传感器噪声并提供概率分布，影响风险规避决策。
AI.method: 设计贝叶斯推断框架，结合RGB-D相机数据递归估计地形表面轮廓及属性概率分布，并集成ROS接口。
AI.result: 仿真和物理实验显示，该方法在精度召回曲线和KL散度测试中优于现有方法，且支持室内外实时地形预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了实时地形估计问题，为安全导航提供理论支持与实用工具。

authors_text: Sushruth Nagesh,Shreyas Rajesh,Asfiya Baig,Savitha Srinivasan
title: Domain Adaptation for Object Detection using SE Adaptors and Center Loss
title_zh: 使用 SE 适配器和中心损失进行对象检测的域适应
abstract: Despite growing interest in object detection, very few works address the extremely practical problem of cross-domain robustness especially for automative applications. In order to prevent drops in performance due to domain shift, we introduce an unsupervised domain adaptation method built on the foundation of faster-RCNN with two domain adaptation components addressing the shift at the instance and image levels respectively and apply a consistency regularization between them. We also introduce a family of adaptation layers that leverage the squeeze excitation mechanism called SE Adaptors to improve domain attention and thus improves performance without any prior requirement of knowledge of the new target domain. Finally, we incorporate a center loss in the instance and image level representations to improve the intra-class variance. We report all results with Cityscapes as our source domain and Foggy Cityscapes as the target domain outperforming previous baselines.
summary: Despite growing interest in object detection, very few works address the extremely practical problem of cross-domain robustness especially for automative applications. In order to prevent drops in performance due to domain shift, we introduce an unsupervised domain adaptation method built on the foundation of faster-RCNN with two domain adaptation components addressing the shift at the instance and image levels respectively and apply a consistency regularization between them. We also introduce a family of adaptation layers that leverage the squeeze excitation mechanism called SE Adaptors to improve domain attention and thus improves performance without any prior requirement of knowledge of the new target domain. Finally, we incorporate a center loss in the instance and image level representations to improve the intra-class variance. We report all results with Cityscapes as our source domain and Foggy Cityscapes as the target domain outperforming previous baselines.
abstract_zh: 尽管人们对目标检测的兴趣日益浓厚，但很少有工作能够解决跨域鲁棒性这一极其实际的问题，尤其是对于自动化应用而言。为了防止由于域偏移导致的性能下降，我们引入了一种基于 Faster-RCNN 的无监督域自适应方法，其中两个域自适应组件分别解决实例和图像级别的偏移，并在它们之间应用一致性正则化。我们还引入了一系列适应层，它们利用称为 SE 适配器的挤压激励机制来提高领域注意力，从而提高性能，而无需事先了解新目标领域的知识。最后，我们在实例和图像级表示中加入中心损失，以改善类内方差。我们报告以 Cityscapes 作为源域、以 Foggy Cityscapes 作为目标域的所有结果，其性能优于之前的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决目标检测中的跨领域鲁棒性问题，特别是在自动驾驶场景中，通过无监督领域自适应方法提升模型在目标域的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法在面对领域转移时性能下降，尤其是在自动驾驶等实际应用中缺乏跨领域鲁棒性，亟需有效的领域自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出基于Faster-RCNN的无监督领域自适应方法，包含实例级和图像级领域适应组件，结合一致性正则化、SE适配器（利用挤压激励机制优化领域注意力）及中心损失以降低类内方差。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes到Foggy Cityscapes的跨领域实验中，该方法优于现有基线，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入SE适配器和中心损失，本文有效提升了目标检测模型在跨领域场景下的鲁棒性，为自动驾驶等实际应用提供了可行的领域自适应解决方案。

We report all results with Cityscapes as our source domain and Foggy Cityscapes as the target domain outperforming previous baselines. 尽管人们对目标检测的兴趣日益浓厚，但很少有工作能够解决跨域鲁棒性这一极其实际的问题，尤其是对于自动化应用而言。为了防止由于域偏移导致的性能下降，我们引入了一种基于 Faster-RCNN 的无监督域自适应方法，其中两个域自适应组件分别解决实例和图像级别的偏移，并在它们之间应用一致性正则化。我们还引入了一系列适应层，它们利用称为 SE 适配器的挤压激励机制来提高领域注意力，从而提高性能，而无需事先了解新目标领域的知识。最后，我们在实例和图像级表示中加入中心损失，以改善类内方差。我们报告以 Cityscapes 作为源域、以 Foggy Cityscapes 作为目标域的所有结果，其性能优于之前的基线。 本文旨在解决目标检测中的跨领域鲁棒性问题，特别是在自动驾驶场景中，通过无监督领域自适应方法提升模型在目标域的表现。 Sushruth Nagesh,Shreyas Rajesh,Asfiya Baig,Savitha Srinivasan cs.CV

authors_text: Xiwen Chen,Hao Wang,Abolfazl Razi,Michael Kozicki,Christopher Mann
title: DH-GAN: A Physics-driven Untrained Generative Adversarial Network for 3D Microscopic Imaging using Digital Holography
title_zh: DH-GAN：使用数字全息术进行 3D 显微成像的物理驱动的未经训练的生成对抗网络
abstract: Digital holography is a 3D imaging technique by emitting a laser beam with a plane wavefront to an object and measuring the intensity of the diffracted waveform, called holograms. The object's 3D shape can be obtained by numerical analysis of the captured holograms and recovering the incurred phase. Recently, deep learning (DL) methods have been used for more accurate holographic processing. However, most supervised methods require large datasets to train the model, which is rarely available in most DH applications due to the scarcity of samples or privacy concerns. A few one-shot DL-based recovery methods exist with no reliance on large datasets of paired images. Still, most of these methods often neglect the underlying physics law that governs wave propagation. These methods offer a black-box operation, which is not explainable, generalizable, and transferrable to other samples and applications. In this work, we propose a new DL architecture based on generative adversarial networks that uses a discriminative network for realizing a semantic measure for reconstruction quality while using a generative network as a function approximator to model the inverse of hologram formation. We impose smoothness on the background part of the recovered image using a progressive masking module powered by simulated annealing to enhance the reconstruction quality. The proposed method is one of its kind that exhibits high transferability to similar samples, which facilitates its fast deployment in time-sensitive applications without the need for retraining the network. The results show a considerable improvement to competitor methods in reconstruction quality (about 5 dB PSNR gain) and robustness to noise (about 50% reduction in PSNR vs noise increase rate).
summary: Digital holography is a 3D imaging technique by emitting a laser beam with a plane wavefront to an object and measuring the intensity of the diffracted waveform, called holograms. The object's 3D shape can be obtained by numerical analysis of the captured holograms and recovering the incurred phase. Recently, deep learning (DL) methods have been used for more accurate holographic processing. However, most supervised methods require large datasets to train the model, which is rarely available in most DH applications due to the scarcity of samples or privacy concerns. A few one-shot DL-based recovery methods exist with no reliance on large datasets of paired images. Still, most of these methods often neglect the underlying physics law that governs wave propagation. These methods offer a black-box operation, which is not explainable, generalizable, and transferrable to other samples and applications. In this work, we propose a new DL architecture based on generative adversarial networks that uses a discriminative network for realizing a semantic measure for reconstruction quality while using a generative network as a function approximator to model the inverse of hologram formation. We impose smoothness on the background part of the recovered image using a progressive masking module powered by simulated annealing to enhance the reconstruction quality. The proposed method is one of its kind that exhibits high transferability to similar samples, which facilitates its fast deployment in time-sensitive applications without the need for retraining the network. The results show a considerable improvement to competitor methods in reconstruction quality (about 5 dB PSNR gain) and robustness to noise (about 50% reduction in PSNR vs noise increase rate).
abstract_zh: 数字全息术是一种 3D 成像技术，通过向物体发射具有平面波前的激光束并测量衍射波形（称为全息图）的强度。通过对捕获的全息图进行数值分析并恢复产生的相位，可以获得物体的 3D 形状。最近，深度学习（DL）方法已被用于更精确的全息处理。然而，大多数监督方法需要大量数据集来训练模型，但由于样本稀缺或隐私问题，这在大多数 DH 应用中很少可用。存在一些基于深度学习的一次性恢复方法，不依赖于大型配对图像数据集。尽管如此，大多数这些方法常常忽略了控制波传播的基本物理定律。这些方法提供了黑盒操作，该操作不可解释、不可推广且不可转移到其他示例和应用程序。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的新深度学习架构，该架构使用判别网络来实现重建质量的语义测量，同时使用生成网络作为函数逼近器来建模全息图形成的逆过程。我们使用由模拟退火驱动的渐进掩模模块对恢复图像的背景部分施加平滑度，以提高重建质量。所提出的方法是一种对相似样本表现出高可迁移性的方法，这有助于其在时间敏感的应用程序中快速部署，而无需重新训练网络。结果表明，在重建质量（约 5 dB PSNR 增益）和噪声鲁棒性（PSNR 与噪声增加率相比，PSNR 降低约 50%）方面，竞争对手的方法有了相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理驱动的无需训练生成对抗网络（DH-GAN），用于数字全息三维显微成像，解决传统方法依赖大量数据和忽略物理规律的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法依赖大量配对数据集，而单次学习方法虽减少数据需求，但忽视波动传播物理规律，导致模型可解释性差且难以迁移。
AI.method: 构建结合判别网络（评估重建质量）与生成网络（模拟全息逆过程）的GAN架构，并引入模拟退火渐进掩膜模块优化背景平滑度。
AI.result: 相较竞品方法，PSNR提升约5dB，噪声鲁棒性提升50%，且模型在相似样本间具有高迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合物理规律与深度学习，在保证重建质量的同时实现无需训练的快速部署，适用于时间敏感型应用。

authors_text: Xiaowen Jiang,Valerio Cambareri,Gianluca Agresti,Cynthia Ifeyinwa Ugwu,Adriano Simonetto,Fabien Cardinaux,Pietro Zanuttigh
title: A Low Memory Footprint Quantized Neural Network for Depth Completion of Very Sparse Time-of-Flight Depth Maps
title_zh: 用于深度完成非常稀疏的飞行时间深度图的低内存占用量化神经网络
comment: In Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops 2022. Presented at the 5th Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision Workshop
comments: In Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops 2022. Presented at the 5th Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision Workshop
abstract: Sparse active illumination enables precise time-of-flight depth sensing as it maximizes signal-to-noise ratio for low power budgets. However, depth completion is required to produce dense depth maps for 3D perception. We address this task with realistic illumination and sensor resolution constraints by simulating ToF datasets for indoor 3D perception with challenging sparsity levels. We propose a quantized convolutional encoder-decoder network for this task. Our model achieves optimal depth map quality by means of input pre-processing and carefully tuned training with a geometry-preserving loss function. We also achieve low memory footprint for weights and activations by means of mixed precision quantization-at-training techniques. The resulting quantized models are comparable to the state of the art in terms of quality, but they require very low GPU times and achieve up to 14-fold memory size reduction for the weights w.r.t. their floating point counterpart with minimal impact on quality metrics.
summary: Sparse active illumination enables precise time-of-flight depth sensing as it maximizes signal-to-noise ratio for low power budgets. However, depth completion is required to produce dense depth maps for 3D perception. We address this task with realistic illumination and sensor resolution constraints by simulating ToF datasets for indoor 3D perception with challenging sparsity levels. We propose a quantized convolutional encoder-decoder network for this task. Our model achieves optimal depth map quality by means of input pre-processing and carefully tuned training with a geometry-preserving loss function. We also achieve low memory footprint for weights and activations by means of mixed precision quantization-at-training techniques. The resulting quantized models are comparable to the state of the art in terms of quality, but they require very low GPU times and achieve up to 14-fold memory size reduction for the weights w.r.t. their floating point counterpart with minimal impact on quality metrics.
abstract_zh: 稀疏主动照明可实现精确的飞行时间深度感测，因为它最大限度地提高了低功耗预算的信噪比。然而，需要深度补全来生成用于 3D 感知的密集深度图。我们通过模拟具有挑战性稀疏度的室内 3D 感知 ToF 数据集，以真实的照明和传感器分辨率约束来解决此任务。我们为此任务提出了一个量化卷积编码器-解码器网络。我们的模型通过输入预处理和使用几何保留损失函数仔细调整的训练来实现最佳深度图质量。我们还通过混合精度训练量化技术实现了权重和激活的低内存占用。由此产生的量化模型在质量方面可与最先进的技术相媲美，但它们需要非常低的 GPU 时间，并可将权重的内存大小减少多达 14 倍。他们的浮点对应物对质量指标的影响最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低内存占用的量化神经网络，用于完成非常稀疏的飞行时间（ToF）深度图的深度补全任务。
AI.motivation: 稀疏主动照明虽能实现低功耗高精度的深度感知，但需通过深度补全生成密集深度图以支持3D感知，而现有方法存在内存消耗大的问题。
AI.method: 设计量化卷积编码器-解码器网络，结合输入预处理、几何保持损失函数及混合精度量化训练技术，降低权重与激活的内存占用。
AI.result: 量化模型在保持深度图质量的同时，相比浮点模型实现14倍内存缩减，且GPU推理时间显著减少，性能与现有最佳方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证深度补全质量的前提下，通过量化技术有效降低内存需求，适用于资源受限的室内3D感知场景。

The resulting quantized models are comparable to the state of the art in terms of quality, but they require very low GPU times and achieve up to 14-fold memory size reduction for the weights w.r.t. their floating point counterpart with minimal impact on quality metrics. 稀疏主动照明可实现精确的飞行时间深度感测，因为它最大限度地提高了低功耗预算的信噪比。然而，需要深度补全来生成用于 3D 感知的密集深度图。我们通过模拟具有挑战性稀疏度的室内 3D 感知 ToF 数据集，以真实的照明和传感器分辨率约束来解决此任务。我们为此任务提出了一个量化卷积编码器-解码器网络。我们的模型通过输入预处理和使用几何保留损失函数仔细调整的训练来实现最佳深度图质量。我们还通过混合精度训练量化技术实现了权重和激活的低内存占用。由此产生的量化模型在质量方面可与最先进的技术相媲美，但它们需要非常低的 GPU 时间，并可将权重的内存大小减少多达 14 倍。他们的浮点对应物对质量指标的影响最小。 本文提出一种低内存占用的量化神经网络，用于完成非常稀疏的飞行时间（ToF）深度图的深度补全任务。 Xiaowen Jiang,Valerio Cambareri,Gianluca Agresti,Cynthia Ifeyinwa Ugwu,Adriano Simonetto,Fabien Cardinaux,Pietro Zanuttigh cs.CV

authors_text: Bin Fan,Yuchao Dai,Zhiyuan Zhang,Qi Liu,Mingyi He
title: Context-Aware Video Reconstruction for Rolling Shutter Cameras
title_zh: 卷帘快门相机的上下文感知视频重建
comment: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
comments: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
abstract: With the ubiquity of rolling shutter (RS) cameras, it is becoming increasingly attractive to recover the latent global shutter (GS) video from two consecutive RS frames, which also places a higher demand on realism. Existing solutions, using deep neural networks or optimization, achieve promising performance. However, these methods generate intermediate GS frames through image warping based on the RS model, which inevitably result in black holes and noticeable motion artifacts. In this paper, we alleviate these issues by proposing a context-aware GS video reconstruction architecture. It facilitates the advantages such as occlusion reasoning, motion compensation, and temporal abstraction. Specifically, we first estimate the bilateral motion field so that the pixels of the two RS frames are warped to a common GS frame accordingly. Then, a refinement scheme is proposed to guide the GS frame synthesis along with bilateral occlusion masks to produce high-fidelity GS video frames at arbitrary times. Furthermore, we derive an approximated bilateral motion field model, which can serve as an alternative to provide a simple but effective GS frame initialization for related tasks. Experiments on synthetic and real data show that our approach achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods in terms of objective metrics and subjective visual quality. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/GitCVfb/CVR}.
summary: With the ubiquity of rolling shutter (RS) cameras, it is becoming increasingly attractive to recover the latent global shutter (GS) video from two consecutive RS frames, which also places a higher demand on realism. Existing solutions, using deep neural networks or optimization, achieve promising performance. However, these methods generate intermediate GS frames through image warping based on the RS model, which inevitably result in black holes and noticeable motion artifacts. In this paper, we alleviate these issues by proposing a context-aware GS video reconstruction architecture. It facilitates the advantages such as occlusion reasoning, motion compensation, and temporal abstraction. Specifically, we first estimate the bilateral motion field so that the pixels of the two RS frames are warped to a common GS frame accordingly. Then, a refinement scheme is proposed to guide the GS frame synthesis along with bilateral occlusion masks to produce high-fidelity GS video frames at arbitrary times. Furthermore, we derive an approximated bilateral motion field model, which can serve as an alternative to provide a simple but effective GS frame initialization for related tasks. Experiments on synthetic and real data show that our approach achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods in terms of objective metrics and subjective visual quality. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/GitCVfb/CVR}.
abstract_zh: 随着卷帘快门（RS）相机的普遍存在，从两个连续的RS帧中恢复潜在的全局快门（GS）视频变得越来越有吸引力，这也对真实性提出了更高的要求。现有的解决方案使用深度神经网络或优化，实现了有希望的性能。然而，这些方法通过基于RS模型的图像变形生成中间GS帧，这不可避免地导致黑洞和明显的运动伪影。在本文中，我们通过提出上下文感知的 GS 视频重建架构来缓解这些问题。它具有遮挡推理、运动补偿和时间抽象等优点。具体来说，我们首先估计双边运动场，以便两个RS帧的像素相应地扭曲到公共GS帧。然后，提出了一种细化方案来指导 GS 帧合成以及双边遮挡掩模，以在任意时间生成高保真 GS 视频帧。此外，我们推导了一个近似的双边运动场模型，它可以作为为相关任务提供简单但有效的 GS 帧初始化的替代方案。对合成数据和真实数据的实验表明，我们的方法在客观指标和主观视觉质量方面比最先进的方法实现了卓越的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/GitCVfb/CVR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种上下文感知的全局快门视频重建架构，用于从滚动快门相机的两帧连续图像中恢复更真实的全局快门视频。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习或优化的方法在生成全局快门帧时会产生黑洞和运动伪影，需通过上下文感知方法解决遮挡推理、运动补偿和时间抽象等问题。
AI.method: 通过估计双侧运动场将两帧滚动快门图像 warp 到共同全局快门帧，并结合双侧遮挡掩码进行帧合成；同时推导近似双侧运动场模型作为初始化方案。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上，该方法在客观指标和主观视觉质量上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了滚动快门到全局快门视频重建中的运动伪影问题，为相关任务提供了简单有效的初始化方案。

authors_text: Fran Casino,Claudia Pina,Pablo López-Aguilar,Edgar Batista,Agusti Solanas,Constantinos Patsakis
title: SoK: Cross-border Criminal Investigations and Digital Evidence
title_zh: SoK：跨境犯罪调查和数字证据
abstract: Digital evidence underpin the majority of crimes as their analysis is an integral part of almost every criminal investigation. Even if we temporarily disregard the numerous challenges in the collection and analysis of digital evidence, the exchange of the evidence among the different stakeholders has many thorny issues. Of specific interest are cross-border criminal investigations as the complexity is significantly high due to the heterogeneity of legal frameworks which beyond time bottlenecks can also become prohibiting. The aim of this article is to analyse the current state of practice of cross-border investigations considering the efficacy of current collaboration protocols along with the challenges and drawbacks to be overcome. Further to performing a legally-oriented research treatise, we recall all the challenges raised in the literature and discuss them from a more practical yet global perspective. Thus, this article paves the way to enabling practitioners and stakeholders to leverage horizontal strategies to fill in the identified gaps timely and accurately.
summary: Digital evidence underpin the majority of crimes as their analysis is an integral part of almost every criminal investigation. Even if we temporarily disregard the numerous challenges in the collection and analysis of digital evidence, the exchange of the evidence among the different stakeholders has many thorny issues. Of specific interest are cross-border criminal investigations as the complexity is significantly high due to the heterogeneity of legal frameworks which beyond time bottlenecks can also become prohibiting. The aim of this article is to analyse the current state of practice of cross-border investigations considering the efficacy of current collaboration protocols along with the challenges and drawbacks to be overcome. Further to performing a legally-oriented research treatise, we recall all the challenges raised in the literature and discuss them from a more practical yet global perspective. Thus, this article paves the way to enabling practitioners and stakeholders to leverage horizontal strategies to fill in the identified gaps timely and accurately.
abstract_zh: 数字证据是大多数犯罪的基础，因为它们的分析是几乎所有刑事调查的组成部分。即使我们暂时忽略数字证据收集和分析中的众多挑战，不同利益相关者之间的证据交换也存在许多棘手的问题。特别值得关注的是跨境刑事调查，因为由于法律框架的异质性，其复杂性非常高，超出时间瓶颈也可能变得令人禁止。本文的目的是分析跨境调查的现状，考虑当前协作协议的有效性以及需要克服的挑战和缺点。除了开展以法律为导向的研究论文之外，我们还回顾了文献中提出的所有挑战，并从更实际且全球的角度对其进行了讨论。因此，本文为从业者和利益相关者利用横向策略及时、准确地填补已发现的差距铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 分析跨境刑事调查中数字证据交换的现状、挑战及改进方向
AI.motivation: 解决跨境调查中因法律框架差异导致的数字证据交换效率低下问题
AI.method: 法律分析框架结合文献综述与实践案例讨论
AI.result: 识别现有合作协议的缺陷，总结跨境调查核心挑战及改进需求
AI.conclusion: 需通过水平协作策略及时填补跨境数字证据协作的制度缺口

authors_text: Sean Welleck,Jiacheng Liu,Ximing Lu,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Yejin Choi
title: NaturalProver: Grounded Mathematical Proof Generation with Language Models
title_zh: NaturalProver：使用语言模型生成基础数学证明
abstract: Theorem proving in natural mathematical language - the mixture of symbolic and natural language used by humans - plays a central role in mathematical advances and education, and tests aspects of reasoning that are core to intelligence. Yet it has remained underexplored with modern generative models. We study large-scale language models on two new generation tasks: suggesting the next step in a mathematical proof, and full proof generation. We develop NaturalProver, a language model that generates proofs by conditioning on background references (e.g. theorems and definitions that are either retrieved or human-provided), and optionally enforces their presence with constrained decoding. On theorems from the NaturalProofs benchmark, NaturalProver improves the quality of next-step suggestions and generated proofs over fine-tuned GPT-3, according to human evaluations from university-level mathematics students. NaturalProver is capable of proving some theorems that require short (2-6 step) proofs, and providing next-step suggestions that are rated as correct and useful over 40% of the time, which is to our knowledge the first demonstration of these capabilities using neural language models.
summary: Theorem proving in natural mathematical language - the mixture of symbolic and natural language used by humans - plays a central role in mathematical advances and education, and tests aspects of reasoning that are core to intelligence. Yet it has remained underexplored with modern generative models. We study large-scale language models on two new generation tasks: suggesting the next step in a mathematical proof, and full proof generation. We develop NaturalProver, a language model that generates proofs by conditioning on background references (e.g. theorems and definitions that are either retrieved or human-provided), and optionally enforces their presence with constrained decoding. On theorems from the NaturalProofs benchmark, NaturalProver improves the quality of next-step suggestions and generated proofs over fine-tuned GPT-3, according to human evaluations from university-level mathematics students. NaturalProver is capable of proving some theorems that require short (2-6 step) proofs, and providing next-step suggestions that are rated as correct and useful over 40% of the time, which is to our knowledge the first demonstration of these capabilities using neural language models.
abstract_zh: 用自然数学语言（人类使用的符号语言和自然语言的混合）进行定理证明在数学进步和教育中发挥着核心作用，并测试了智能核心推理的各个方面。然而，现代生成模型仍未对其进行充分探索。我们研究了两个新一代任务的大规模语言模型：提出数学证明的下一步以及完整的证明生成。我们开发了 NaturalProver，一种语言模型，它通过背景参考（例如，检索到的或人类提供的定理和定义）来生成证明，并可选择通过受限解码来强制它们的存在。根据大学数学学生的人工评估，基于 NaturalProofs 基准的定理，NaturalProver 提高了下一步建议的质量，并比微调的 GPT-3 生成了证明。 NaturalProver 能够证明一些需要简短（2-6 步骤）证明的定理，并提供超过 40% 的时间被评为正确且有用的下一步建议，据我们所知，这是使用神经语言模型首次演示这些功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NaturalProver，一种基于语言模型的数学证明生成系统，能够通过条件生成和约束解码技术完成定理证明的下一步建议及完整证明生成。
AI.motivation: 数学定理证明是检验智能核心推理能力的关键任务，但现有生成模型对此领域探索不足，需开发能处理自然数学语言的模型以提升数学推理能力。
AI.method: 构建NaturalProver模型，通过条件生成机制结合背景知识（如检索或人工提供的定理/定义），并采用约束解码确保关键信息的使用，完成证明步骤生成。
AI.result: 在NaturalProofs基准测试中，NaturalProver的证明质量优于微调GPT-3，可完成2-6步短证明，其生成的下一步建议有40%以上被学生评价为正确且有用。
AI.conclusion: NaturalProver首次展示了神经语言模型在数学证明生成中的可行性，为数学研究和教育提供了新的工具，验证了语言模型在复杂推理任务中的潜力。

search_text: NaturalProver: Grounded Mathematical Proof Generation with Language Models NaturalProver：使用语言模型生成基础数学证明 Theorem proving in natural mathematical language - the mixture of symbolic and natural language used by humans - plays a central role in mathematical advances and education, and tests aspects of reasoning that are core to intelligence. Yet it has remained underexplored with modern generative models. We study large-scale language models on two new generation tasks: suggesting the next step in a mathematical proof, and full proof generation. We develop NaturalProver, a language model that generates proofs by conditioning on background references (e.g. theorems and definitions that are either retrieved or human-provided), and optionally enforces their presence with constrained decoding. On theorems from the NaturalProofs benchmark, NaturalProver improves the quality of next-step suggestions and generated proofs over fine-tuned GPT-3, according to human evaluations from university-level mathematics students. NaturalProver is capable of proving some theorems that require short (2-6 step) proofs, and providing next-step suggestions that are rated as correct and useful over 40% of the time, which is to our knowledge the first demonstration of these capabilities using neural language models. 用自然数学语言（人类使用的符号语言和自然语言的混合）进行定理证明在数学进步和教育中发挥着核心作用，并测试了智能核心推理的各个方面。然而，现代生成模型仍未对其进行充分探索。我们研究了两个新一代任务的大规模语言模型：提出数学证明的下一步以及完整的证明生成。我们开发了 NaturalProver，一种语言模型，它通过背景参考（例如，检索到的或人类提供的定理和定义）来生成证明，并可选择通过受限解码来强制它们的存在。根据大学数学学生的人工评估，基于 NaturalProofs 基准的定理，NaturalProver 提高了下一步建议的质量，并比微调的 GPT-3 生成了证明。 NaturalProver 能够证明一些需要简短（2-6 步骤）证明的定理，并提供超过 40% 的时间被评为正确且有用的下一步建议，据我们所知，这是使用神经语言模型首次演示这些功能。 本文提出NaturalProver，一种基于语言模型的数学证明生成系统，能够通过条件生成和约束解码技术完成定理证明的下一步建议及完整证明生成。 Sean Welleck,Jiacheng Liu,Ximing Lu,Hannaneh Hajishirzi,Yejin Choi cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ahmed Al Mahrooqi,Dmitrii Medvedev,Rand Muhtaseb,Mohammad Yaqub
title: GARDNet: Robust Multi-View Network for Glaucoma Classification in Color Fundus Images
title_zh: GARDNet：用于彩色眼底图像中青光眼分类的鲁棒多视图网络
comment: Keywords: Glaucoma Classification, Color Fundus Images. Computer Aided Diagnosis. Deep Learning
comments: Keywords: Glaucoma Classification, Color Fundus Images. Computer Aided Diagnosis. Deep Learning
abstract: Glaucoma is one of the most severe eye diseases, characterized by rapid progression and leading to irreversible blindness. It is often the case that diagnostics is carried out when one's sight has already significantly degraded due to the lack of noticeable symptoms at early stage of the disease. Regular glaucoma screenings of the population shall improve early-stage detection, however the desirable frequency of etymological checkups is often not feasible due to the excessive load imposed by manual diagnostics on limited number of specialists. Considering the basic methodology to detect glaucoma is to analyze fundus images for the optic-disc-to-optic-cup ratio, Machine Learning algorithms can offer sophisticated methods for image processing and classification. In our work, we propose an advanced image pre-processing technique combined with a multi-view network of deep classification models to categorize glaucoma. Our Glaucoma Automated Retinal Detection Network (GARDNet) has been successfully tested on Rotterdam EyePACS AIROGS dataset with an AUC of 0.92, and then additionally fine-tuned and tested on RIM-ONE DL dataset with an AUC of 0.9308 outperforming the state-of-the-art of 0.9272. Our code is available on https://github.com/ahmed1996said/gardnet

In our work, we propose an advanced image pre-processing technique combined with a multi-view network of deep classification models to categorize glaucoma. Our Glaucoma Automated Retinal Detection Network (GARDNet) has been successfully tested on Rotterdam EyePACS AIROGS dataset with an AUC of 0.92, and then additionally fine-tuned and tested on RIM-ONE DL dataset with an AUC of 0.9308 outperforming the state-of-the-art of 0.9272. Our code is available on https://github.com/ahmed1996said/gardnet
abstract_zh: 青光眼是最严重的眼病之一，其特点是进展迅速并导致不可逆转的失明。通常情况下，由于疾病早期缺乏明显症状，患者的视力已经显着下降，因此进行诊断。对人群进行定期青光眼筛查应改善早期检测，但由于手动诊断对有限数量的专家造成过大负担，因此理想的词源检查频率往往不可行。考虑到检测青光眼的基本方法是分析眼底图像的视神经盘与视杯的比率，机器学习算法可以提供复杂的图像处理和分类方法。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种先进的图像预处理技术，结合深度分类模型的多视图网络来对青光眼进行分类。我们的青光眼自动视网膜检测网络 (GARDNet) 已在鹿特丹 EyePACS AIROGS 数据集上成功进行了测试，AUC 为 0.92，然后在 RIM-ONE DL 数据集上进行了微调和测试，AUC 为 0.9308，优于最先进的 0.9272。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ahmed1996said/gardnet 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GARDNet的多视角深度网络，用于彩色眼底图像中的青光眼分类。
AI.motivation: 青光眼是一种可能导致不可逆失明的严重眼病，早期症状不明显，人工诊断负担重且难以实现高频筛查，需借助机器学习提升早期检测效率。
AI.method: 结合先进的图像预处理技术与多视角深度分类模型，构建青光眼自动检测网络（GARDNet），通过多视角特征融合提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在Rotterdam EyePACS AIROGS数据集上达到AUC 0.92，在RIM-ONE DL数据集上微调后达到AUC 0.9308，优于现有最佳方法（0.9272）。
AI.conclusion: GARDNet通过多视角网络和预处理技术显著提升了青光眼分类性能，为自动化早期筛查提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Haitian Sun,William W. Cohen,Ruslan Salakhutdinov
title: Reasoning over Logically Interacted Conditions for Question Answering
title_zh: 针对问答的逻辑交互条件进行推理
abstract: Some questions have multiple answers that are not equally correct, i.e. answers are different under different conditions. Conditions are used to distinguish answers as well as to provide additional information to support them. In this paper, we study a more challenging task where answers are constrained by a list of conditions that logically interact, which requires performing logical reasoning over the conditions to determine the correctness of the answers. Even more challenging, we only provide evidences for a subset of the conditions, so some questions may not have deterministic answers. In such cases, models are asked to find probable answers and identify conditions that need to be satisfied to make the answers correct. We propose a new model, TReasoner, for this challenging reasoning task. TReasoner consists of an entailment module, a reasoning module, and a generation module (if the answers are free-form text spans). TReasoner achieves state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark conditional QA datasets, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art by 3-10 points.
summary: Some questions have multiple answers that are not equally correct, i.e. answers are different under different conditions. Conditions are used to distinguish answers as well as to provide additional information to support them. In this paper, we study a more challenging task where answers are constrained by a list of conditions that logically interact, which requires performing logical reasoning over the conditions to determine the correctness of the answers. Even more challenging, we only provide evidences for a subset of the conditions, so some questions may not have deterministic answers. In such cases, models are asked to find probable answers and identify conditions that need to be satisfied to make the answers correct. We propose a new model, TReasoner, for this challenging reasoning task. TReasoner consists of an entailment module, a reasoning module, and a generation module (if the answers are free-form text spans). TReasoner achieves state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark conditional QA datasets, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art by 3-10 points.
abstract_zh: 有些问题有多个答案，但答案并不相同，即在不同条件下答案不同。条件用于区分答案并提供支持答案的附加信息。在本文中，我们研究了一项更具挑战性的任务，其中答案受到逻辑上相互作用的条件列表的限制，这需要对条件进行逻辑推理以确定答案的正确性。更具挑战性的是，我们只提供一部分条件的证据，因此某些问题可能没有确定性的答案。在这种情况下，要求模型找到可能的答案并确定需要满足的条件才能使答案正确。我们针对这项具有挑战性的推理任务提出了一个新模型 TRasoner。 TRasoner 由蕴涵模块、推理模块和生成模块（如果答案是自由格式的文本范围）组成。 TRasoner 在两个基准条件 QA 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，比之前的最先进的性能高出 3-10 个点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多个逻辑交互条件下进行问答的任务，要求模型通过逻辑推理确定答案正确性，并在部分条件证据不足时找出可能答案及所需条件。
AI.motivation: 传统问答系统难以处理答案因条件不同而变化的场景，尤其当条件间存在逻辑交互且部分条件缺乏证据时，需更复杂的推理能力。
AI.method: 提出TReasoner模型，包含三模块：entailment模块处理条件与答案的关系，reasoning模块进行逻辑推理，generation模块生成自由文本答案。
AI.result: TReasoner在两个基准数据集上达到SOTA，较之前最佳模型提升3-10个百分点。
AI.conclusion: TReasoner有效解决了逻辑交互条件下的问答问题，尤其在部分证据情况下表现优异，为复杂条件推理任务提供了新方法。

conclusion: TReasoner有效解决了逻辑交互条件下的问答问题，尤其在部分证据情况下表现优异，为复杂条件推理任务提供了新方法。
search_text: Reasoning over Logically Interacted Conditions for Question Answering 针对问答的逻辑交互条件进行推理 Some questions have multiple answers that are not equally correct, i.e. answers are different under different conditions. Conditions are used to distinguish answers as well as to provide additional information to support them. In this paper, we study a more challenging task where answers are constrained by a list of conditions that logically interact, which requires performing logical reasoning over the conditions to determine the correctness of the answers. Even more challenging, we only provide evidences for a subset of the conditions, so some questions may not have deterministic answers. In such cases, models are asked to find probable answers and identify conditions that need to be satisfied to make the answers correct. We propose a new model, TReasoner, for this challenging reasoning task. TReasoner consists of an entailment module, a reasoning module, and a generation module (if the answers are free-form text spans). TReasoner achieves state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark conditional QA datasets, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art by 3-10 points. 有些问题有多个答案，但答案并不相同，即在不同条件下答案不同。条件用于区分答案并提供支持答案的附加信息。在本文中，我们研究了一项更具挑战性的任务，其中答案受到逻辑上相互作用的条件列表的限制，这需要对条件进行逻辑推理以确定答案的正确性。更具挑战性的是，我们只提供一部分条件的证据，因此某些问题可能没有确定性的答案。在这种情况下，要求模型找到可能的答案并确定需要满足的条件才能使答案正确。我们针对这项具有挑战性的推理任务提出了一个新模型 TRasoner。 TRasoner 由蕴涵模块、推理模块和生成模块（如果答案是自由格式的文本范围）组成。 TRasoner 在两个基准条件 QA 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，比之前的最先进的性能高出 3-10 个点。 本文研究了在多个逻辑交互条件下进行问答的任务，要求模型通过逻辑推理确定答案正确性，并在部分条件证据不足时找出可能答案及所需条件。 Haitian Sun,William W. Cohen,Ruslan Salakhutdinov cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zangir Iklassov,Dmitrii Medvedev
title: Robust Reinforcement Learning on Graphs for Logistics optimization
title_zh: 用于物流优化的图稳健强化学习
comment: Keywords: Graph Neural Network (GNN), Logistics optimization, Reinforcement Learning
comments: Keywords: Graph Neural Network (GNN), Logistics optimization, Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Logistics optimization nowadays is becoming one of the hottest areas in the AI community. In the past year, significant advancements in the domain were achieved by representing the problem in a form of graph. Another promising area of research was to apply reinforcement learning algorithms to the above task. In our work, we made advantage of using both approaches and apply reinforcement learning on a graph. To do that, we have analyzed the most recent results in both fields and selected SOTA algorithms both from graph neural networks and reinforcement learning. Then, we combined selected models on the problem of AMOD systems optimization for the transportation network of New York city. Our team compared three algorithms - GAT, Pro-CNN and PTDNet - to bring to the fore the important nodes on a graph representation. Finally, we achieved SOTA results on AMOD systems optimization problem employing PTDNet with GNN and training them in reinforcement fashion. Keywords: Graph Neural Network (GNN), Logistics optimization, Reinforcement Learning
summary: Logistics optimization nowadays is becoming one of the hottest areas in the AI community. In the past year, significant advancements in the domain were achieved by representing the problem in a form of graph. To do that, we have analyzed the most recent results in both fields and selected SOTA algorithms both from graph neural networks and reinforcement learning. Then, we combined selected models on the problem of AMOD systems optimization for the transportation network of New York city. Our team compared three algorithms - GAT, Pro-CNN and PTDNet - to bring to the fore the important nodes on a graph representation. Finally, we achieved SOTA results on AMOD systems optimization problem employing PTDNet with GNN and training them in reinforcement fashion. Keywords: Graph Neural Network (GNN), Logistics optimization, Reinforcement Learning
abstract_zh: 如今，物流优化正在成为人工智能界最热门的领域之一。在过去的一年里，通过以图表的形式表示问题，该领域取得了重大进展。另一个有前景的研究领域是将强化学习算法应用于上述任务。在我们的工作中，我们利用了这两种方法并在图上应用强化学习。为此，我们分析了这两个领域的最新结果，并从图神经网络和强化学习中选择了 SOTA 算法。然后，我们结合选定的模型来解决纽约市交通网络的 AMOD 系统优化问题。我们的团队比较了三种算法 - GAT、Pro-CNN 和 PTDNet - 以突出图表示中的重要节点。最后，我们使用 PTDNet 和 GNN 并以强化方式对其进行训练，在 AMOD 系统优化问题上取得了 SOTA 结果。关键词：图神经网络（GNN）、物流优化、强化学习

AI.tldr: 本文将强化学习与图神经网络结合，用于优化纽约市交通网络的AMOD系统物流问题。
AI.motivation: 物流优化是AI热点领域，图结构表示与强化学习各自取得进展，但结合两者的方法尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 选取图神经网络（GAT、Pro-CNN、PTDNet）与强化学习算法，对比分析其在AMOD系统优化中的表现，最终采用PTDNet结合GNN进行强化学习训练。
AI.result: 在AMOD系统优化任务中，PTDNet结合GNN的强化学习方法达到当前最优（SOTA）结果。
AI.conclusion: 融合图神经网络与强化学习能有效提升物流优化性能，为复杂交通网络问题提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Xin Sun,Xuan Wang,Jialin Gao,Qiong Liu,Xi Zhou
title: You Need to Read Again: Multi-granularity Perception Network for Moment Retrieval in Videos
title_zh: 你需要再读一遍：用于视频中时刻检索的多粒度感知网络
abstract: Moment retrieval in videos is a challenging task that aims to retrieve the most relevant video moment in an untrimmed video given a sentence description. Previous methods tend to perform self-modal learning and cross-modal interaction in a coarse manner, which neglect fine-grained clues contained in video content, query context, and their alignment. To this end, we propose a novel Multi-Granularity Perception Network (MGPN) that perceives intra-modality and inter-modality information at a multi-granularity level. Specifically, we formulate moment retrieval as a multi-choice reading comprehension task and integrate human reading strategies into our framework. A coarse-grained feature encoder and a co-attention mechanism are utilized to obtain a preliminary perception of intra-modality and inter-modality information. Then a fine-grained feature encoder and a conditioned interaction module are introduced to enhance the initial perception inspired by how humans address reading comprehension problems. Moreover, to alleviate the huge computation burden of some existing methods, we further design an efficient choice comparison module and reduce the hidden size with imperceptible quality loss. Extensive experiments on Charades-STA, TACoS, and ActivityNet Captions datasets demonstrate that our solution outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at github.com/Huntersxsx/MGPN.
summary: Moment retrieval in videos is a challenging task that aims to retrieve the most relevant video moment in an untrimmed video given a sentence description. Previous methods tend to perform self-modal learning and cross-modal interaction in a coarse manner, which neglect fine-grained clues contained in video content, query context, and their alignment. To this end, we propose a novel Multi-Granularity Perception Network (MGPN) that perceives intra-modality and inter-modality information at a multi-granularity level. Specifically, we formulate moment retrieval as a multi-choice reading comprehension task and integrate human reading strategies into our framework. A coarse-grained feature encoder and a co-attention mechanism are utilized to obtain a preliminary perception of intra-modality and inter-modality information. Then a fine-grained feature encoder and a conditioned interaction module are introduced to enhance the initial perception inspired by how humans address reading comprehension problems. Moreover, to alleviate the huge computation burden of some existing methods, we further design an efficient choice comparison module and reduce the hidden size with imperceptible quality loss. Extensive experiments on Charades-STA, TACoS, and ActivityNet Captions datasets demonstrate that our solution outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at github.com/Huntersxsx/MGPN.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时刻检索是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在在给定句子描述的情况下检索未修剪视频中最相关的视频时刻。以前的方法倾向于以粗略的方式执行自模态学习和跨模态交互，而忽略了视频内容、查询上下文及其对齐中包含的细粒度线索。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的多粒度感知网络（MGPN），它可以在多粒度级别感知模态内和模态间信息。具体来说，我们将时刻检索制定为多项选择阅读理解任务，并将人类阅读策略整合到我们的框架中。利用粗粒度特征编码器和共同注意机制来获得模态内和模态间信息的初步感知。然后引入细粒度特征编码器和条件交互模块，以增强受人类如何解决阅读理解问题启发的初始感知。此外，为了减轻一些现有方法的巨大计算负担，我们进一步设计了一种有效的选择比较模块，并以难以察觉的质量损失减少了隐藏尺寸。对 Charades-STA、TACoS 和 ActivityNet Captions 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的解决方案优于现有的最先进方法。代码可在 github.com/Huntersxsx/MGPN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多粒度感知网络（MGPN），用于根据句子描述在未剪辑视频中检索最相关的视频片段。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨模态交互中仅采用粗粒度学习，忽略了视频内容、查询上下文及其对齐中的细粒度线索，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 将视频片段检索建模为多选阅读理解任务，引入粗粒度特征编码器与共注意力机制获取初步感知，并通过细粒度特征编码器与条件交互模块增强感知能力；设计高效选择比较模块以降低计算负担。
AI.result: 在Charades-STA、TACoS和ActivityNet Captions数据集上实验表明，MGPN优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MGPN通过融合多粒度感知与人类阅读策略，有效捕捉视频与文本的细粒度对齐信息，实现了更精准的视频片段检索。

authors_text: Ho Long Fung,Victor-Alexandru Darvariu,Stephen Hailes,Mirco Musolesi
title: Trust-based Consensus in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Systems
title_zh: 多代理强化学习系统中基于信任的共识
comment: Accepted for publication in proceedings of the first Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC 2024)
comments: Accepted for publication in proceedings of the first Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC 2024)
abstract: An often neglected issue in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is the potential presence of unreliable agents in the environment whose deviations from expected behavior can prevent a system from accomplishing its intended tasks. In particular, consensus is a fundamental underpinning problem of cooperative distributed multi-agent systems. Consensus requires different agents, situated in a decentralized communication network, to reach an agreement out of a set of initial proposals that they put forward. Learning-based agents should adopt a protocol that allows them to reach consensus despite having one or more unreliable agents in the system. This paper investigates the problem of unreliable agents in MARL, considering consensus as a case study. Echoing established results in the distributed systems literature, our experiments show that even a moderate fraction of such agents can greatly impact the ability of reaching consensus in a networked environment. We propose Reinforcement Learning-based Trusted Consensus (RLTC), a decentralized trust mechanism, in which agents can independently decide which neighbors to communicate with. We empirically demonstrate that our trust mechanism is able to handle unreliable agents effectively, as evidenced by higher consensus success rates.
summary: An often neglected issue in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is the potential presence of unreliable agents in the environment whose deviations from expected behavior can prevent a system from accomplishing its intended tasks. In particular, consensus is a fundamental underpinning problem of cooperative distributed multi-agent systems. Consensus requires different agents, situated in a decentralized communication network, to reach an agreement out of a set of initial proposals that they put forward. Learning-based agents should adopt a protocol that allows them to reach consensus despite having one or more unreliable agents in the system. This paper investigates the problem of unreliable agents in MARL, considering consensus as a case study. Echoing established results in the distributed systems literature, our experiments show that even a moderate fraction of such agents can greatly impact the ability of reaching consensus in a networked environment. We propose Reinforcement Learning-based Trusted Consensus (RLTC), a decentralized trust mechanism, in which agents can independently decide which neighbors to communicate with. We empirically demonstrate that our trust mechanism is able to handle unreliable agents effectively, as evidenced by higher consensus success rates.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）中一个经常被忽视的问题是环境中可能存在不可靠的智能体，它们偏离预期行为可能会阻止系统完成其预期任务。特别是，共识是协作分布式多智能体系统的基本基础问题。共识要求位于去中心化通信网络中的不同代理根据他们提出的一系列初始提案达成一致。基于学习的代理应该采用一种协议，即使系统中有一个或多个不可靠的代理，也能让它们达成共识。本文以共识为案例研究，研究了 MARL 中不可靠代理的问题。与分布式系统文献中的既定结果相呼应，我们的实验表明，即使是中等比例的此类代理也会极大地影响网络环境中达成共识的能力。我们提出基于强化学习的可信共识（RLTC），这是一种去中心化的信任机制，其中代理可以独立决定与哪些邻居进行通信。我们凭经验证明，我们的信任机制能够有效地处理不可靠的代理，更高的共识成功率就证明了这一点。

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体强化学习系统中不可靠智能体对共识的影响，并提出基于信任的共识机制RLTC以提高共识成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL研究忽视了不可靠智能体对系统共识能力的影响，而共识是分布式协作系统的核心问题，需有效应对不可靠智能体带来的挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于强化学习的信任共识机制RLTC，智能体通过独立判断通信邻居，构建去中心化信任机制以应对不可靠智能体。
AI.result: 实验表明，RLTC机制能有效应对不可靠智能体，显著提升网络环境中的共识成功率。
AI.conclusion: 少量不可靠智能体即显著影响共识，而RLTC信任机制能有效提升系统鲁棒性，确保共识达成。

search_text: Trust-based Consensus in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Systems 多代理强化学习系统中基于信任的共识 An often neglected issue in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is the potential presence of unreliable agents in the environment whose deviations from expected behavior can prevent a system from accomplishing its intended tasks. In particular, consensus is a fundamental underpinning problem of cooperative distributed multi-agent systems. Consensus requires different agents, situated in a decentralized communication network, to reach an agreement out of a set of initial proposals that they put forward. Learning-based agents should adopt a protocol that allows them to reach consensus despite having one or more unreliable agents in the system. This paper investigates the problem of unreliable agents in MARL, considering consensus as a case study. Echoing established results in the distributed systems literature, our experiments show that even a moderate fraction of such agents can greatly impact the ability of reaching consensus in a networked environment. We propose Reinforcement Learning-based Trusted Consensus (RLTC), a decentralized trust mechanism, in which agents can independently decide which neighbors to communicate with. We empirically demonstrate that our trust mechanism is able to handle unreliable agents effectively, as evidenced by higher consensus success rates. 多智能体强化学习（MARL）中一个经常被忽视的问题是环境中可能存在不可靠的智能体，它们偏离预期行为可能会阻止系统完成其预期任务。特别是，共识是协作分布式多智能体系统的基本基础问题。共识要求位于去中心化通信网络中的不同代理根据他们提出的一系列初始提案达成一致。基于学习的代理应该采用一种协议，即使系统中有一个或多个不可靠的代理，也能让它们达成共识。本文以共识为案例研究，研究了 MARL 中不可靠代理的问题。与分布式系统文献中的既定结果相呼应，我们的实验表明，即使是中等比例的此类代理也会极大地影响网络环境中达成共识的能力。我们提出基于强化学习的可信共识（RLTC），这是一种去中心化的信任机制，其中代理可以独立决定与哪些邻居进行通信。我们凭经验证明，我们的信任机制能够有效地处理不可靠的代理，更高的共识成功率就证明了这一点。 研究多智能体强化学习系统中不可靠智能体对共识的影响，并提出基于信任的共识机制RLTC以提高共识成功率。 Ho Long Fung,Victor-Alexandru Darvariu,Stephen Hailes,Mirco Musolesi cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Bowen Shi,Diane Brentari,Greg Shakhnarovich,Karen Livescu
title: Open-Domain Sign Language Translation Learned from Online Video
title_zh: 从在线视频中学习的开放域手语翻译
abstract: Existing work on sign language translation - that is, translation from sign language videos into sentences in a written language - has focused mainly on (1) data collected in a controlled environment or (2) data in a specific domain, which limits the applicability to real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce OpenASL, a large-scale American Sign Language (ASL) - English dataset collected from online video sites (e.g., YouTube). OpenASL contains 288 hours of ASL videos in multiple domains from over 200 signers and is the largest publicly available ASL translation dataset to date. To tackle the challenges of sign language translation in realistic settings and without glosses, we propose a set of techniques including sign search as a pretext task for pre-training and fusion of mouthing and handshape features. The proposed techniques produce consistent and large improvements in translation quality, over baseline models based on prior work. Our data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/chevalierNoir/OpenASL
summary: Existing work on sign language translation - that is, translation from sign language videos into sentences in a written language - has focused mainly on (1) data collected in a controlled environment or (2) data in a specific domain, which limits the applicability to real-world settings. In this paper, we introduce OpenASL, a large-scale American Sign Language (ASL) - English dataset collected from online video sites (e.g., YouTube). OpenASL contains 288 hours of ASL videos in multiple domains from over 200 signers and is the largest publicly available ASL translation dataset to date. To tackle the challenges of sign language translation in realistic settings and without glosses, we propose a set of techniques including sign search as a pretext task for pre-training and fusion of mouthing and handshape features. The proposed techniques produce consistent and large improvements in translation quality, over baseline models based on prior work. Our data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/chevalierNoir/OpenASL
abstract_zh: 现有的手语翻译工作（即将手语视频翻译成书面语言的句子）主要集中在（1）受控环境中收集的数据或（2）特定领域的数据，这限制了其对现实世界环境的适用性。在本文中，我们介绍了 OpenASL，这是一个从在线视频网站（例如 YouTube）收集的大规模美国手语（ASL）-英语数据集。 OpenASL 包含来自 200 多个签名者的多个领域的 288 小时的 ASL 视频，是迄今为止最大的公开可用的 ASL 翻译数据集。为了解决现实环境中无注释的手语翻译的挑战，我们提出了一套技术，包括将手语搜索作为口型和手形特征的预训练和融合的借口任务。与基于先前工作的基线模型相比，所提出的技术在翻译质量方面产生了一致且巨大的改进。我们的数据和代码可在 https://github.com/chevalierNoir/OpenASL 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenASL数据集及预训练方法，解决现实场景下手语翻译的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有手语翻译研究受限于受控环境或特定领域数据，难以适应真实场景需求。
AI.method: 构建包含288小时多领域ASL视频的OpenASL数据集，并采用预训练任务（如手语搜索）及口型与手型特征融合技术。
AI.result: 翻译质量显著优于基线模型，数据与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为真实场景手语翻译提供了大规模数据支持与有效技术方案。

authors_text: Muhammad Hisyam Zayd,Novanto Yudistira,Randy Cahya Wihandika
title: Image Colorization using U-Net with Skip Connections and Fusion Layer on Landscape Images
title_zh: 使用带有跳过连接和融合层的 U-Net 对风景图像进行图像着色
abstract: We present a novel technique to automatically colorize grayscale images that combine the U-Net model and Fusion Layer features. This approach allows the model to learn the colorization of images from pre-trained U-Net. Moreover, the Fusion layer is applied to merge local information results dependent on small image patches with global priors of an entire image on each class, forming visually more compelling colorization results. Finally, we validate our approach with a user study evaluation and compare it against state-of-the-art, resulting in improvements.
summary: We present a novel technique to automatically colorize grayscale images that combine the U-Net model and Fusion Layer features. This approach allows the model to learn the colorization of images from pre-trained U-Net. Moreover, the Fusion layer is applied to merge local information results dependent on small image patches with global priors of an entire image on each class, forming visually more compelling colorization results. Finally, we validate our approach with a user study evaluation and compare it against state-of-the-art, resulting in improvements.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种结合 U-Net 模型和融合层特征的自动对灰度图像进行着色的新技术。这种方法允许模型从预先训练的 U-Net 中学习图像的着色。此外，融合层用于将依赖于小图像块的局部信息结果与每个类上整个图像的全局先验进行合并，形成视觉上更引人注目的着色结果。最后，我们通过用户研究评估来验证我们的方法，并将其与最先进的方法进行比较，从而取得改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合U-Net模型与融合层的自动图像着色方法，专门针对景观图像进行优化。
AI.motivation: 传统图像着色方法难以有效平衡局部细节与全局色彩一致性，导致生成结果不够自然。
AI.method: 基于预训练U-Net架构，引入融合层整合局部图像块信息与全局图像先验知识，通过跳跃连接增强特征传递。
AI.result: 用户研究显示该方法在色彩准确性与视觉吸引力上优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 融合层有效结合局部-全局信息，显著提升景观图像着色质量，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Tianyang Zhang,Shaoming Zheng,Jun Cheng,Xi Jia,Joseph Bartlett,Xinxing Cheng,Huazhu Fu,Zhaowen Qiu,Jiang Liu,Jinming Duan
title: Structure Unbiased Adversarial Model for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 构建医学图像分割的无偏对抗模型
comment: Will revise the paper and resubmit
comments: Will revise the paper and resubmit
abstract: Generative models have been widely proposed in image recognition to generate more images where the distribution is similar to that of the real ones. It often introduces a discriminator network to differentiate the real data from the generated ones. Such models utilise a discriminator network tasked with differentiating style transferred data from data contained in the target dataset. However in doing so the network focuses on discrepancies in the intensity distribution and may overlook structural differences between the datasets. In this paper we formulate a new image-to-image translation problem to ensure that the structure of the generated images is similar to that in the target dataset. We propose a simple, yet powerful Structure-Unbiased Adversarial (SUA) network which accounts for both intensity and structural differences between the training and test sets when performing image segmentation. It consists of a spatial transformation block followed by an intensity distribution rendering module. The spatial transformation block is proposed to reduce the structure gap between the two images, and also produce an inverse deformation field to warp the final segmented image back. The intensity distribution rendering module then renders the deformed structure to an image with the target intensity distribution. Experimental results show that the proposed SUA method has the capability to transfer both intensity distribution and structural content between multiple datasets.
