It often introduces a discriminator network to differentiate the real data from the generated ones. Such models utilise a discriminator network tasked with differentiating style transferred data from data contained in the target dataset. However in doing so the network focuses on discrepancies in the intensity distribution and may overlook structural differences between the datasets. In this paper we formulate a new image-to-image translation problem to ensure that the structure of the generated images is similar to that in the target dataset. We propose a simple, yet powerful Structure-Unbiased Adversarial (SUA) network which accounts for both intensity and structural differences between the training and test sets when performing image segmentation. It consists of a spatial transformation block followed by an intensity distribution rendering module. The spatial transformation block is proposed to reduce the structure gap between the two images, and also produce an inverse deformation field to warp the final segmented image back. The intensity distribution rendering module then renders the deformed structure to an image with the target intensity distribution. Experimental results show that the proposed SUA method has the capability to transfer both intensity distribution and structural content between multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 生成模型在图像识别中被广泛提出，以生成更多分布与真实图像相似的图像。它通常引入鉴别器网络来区分真实数据和生成数据。此类模型利用鉴别器网络，其任务是将风格传输的数据与目标数据集中包含的数据区分开来。然而，在这样做时，网络关注强度分布的差异，并可能忽略数据集之间的结构差异。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的图像到图像转换问题，以确保生成的图像的结构与目标数据集中的结构相似。我们提出了一个简单但功能强大的结构无偏对抗（SUA）网络，该网络在执行图像分割时可以解释训练集和测试集之间的强度和结构差异。它由一个空间变换块和一个强度分布渲染模块组成。提出空间变换块来减少两个图像之间的结构间隙，并且还产生逆变形场以将最终分割的图像向后扭曲。然后强度分布渲染模块将变形结构渲染为具有目标强度分布的图像。实验结果表明，所提出的 SUA 方法能够在多个数据集之间传输强度分布和结构内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构无偏对抗网络（SUA），用于解决医学图像分割中因结构差异导致的分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在医学图像分割中过度关注强度分布差异，而忽视了不同数据集间的结构差异，导致分割结果不准确。
AI.method: 设计包含空间变换块和强度分布渲染模块的SUA网络，前者通过逆变形场对齐结构差异，后者将对齐后的结构映射到目标强度分布。
AI.result: 实验表明SUA方法能有效在多个医学数据集间迁移结构信息和强度分布，显著提升跨数据集分割性能。
AI.conclusion: SUA网络通过联合优化结构对齐与强度迁移，为医学图像分割提供了更鲁棒的跨数据集适应方案。

It often introduces a discriminator network to differentiate the real data from the generated ones. Such models utilise a discriminator network tasked with differentiating style transferred data from data contained in the target dataset. However in doing so the network focuses on discrepancies in the intensity distribution and may overlook structural differences between the datasets. In this paper we formulate a new image-to-image translation problem to ensure that the structure of the generated images is similar to that in the target dataset. We propose a simple, yet powerful Structure-Unbiased Adversarial (SUA) network which accounts for both intensity and structural differences between the training and test sets when performing image segmentation. It consists of a spatial transformation block followed by an intensity distribution rendering module. The spatial transformation block is proposed to reduce the structure gap between the two images, and also produce an inverse deformation field to warp the final segmented image back. The intensity distribution rendering module then renders the deformed structure to an image with the target intensity distribution. Experimental results show that the proposed SUA method has the capability to transfer both intensity distribution and structural content between multiple datasets. 生成模型在图像识别中被广泛提出，以生成更多分布与真实图像相似的图像。它通常引入鉴别器网络来区分真实数据和生成数据。此类模型利用鉴别器网络，其任务是将风格传输的数据与目标数据集中包含的数据区分开来。然而，在这样做时，网络关注强度分布的差异，并可能忽略数据集之间的结构差异。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的图像到图像转换问题，以确保生成的图像的结构与目标数据集中的结构相似。我们提出了一个简单但功能强大的结构无偏对抗（SUA）网络，该网络在执行图像分割时可以解释训练集和测试集之间的强度和结构差异。它由一个空间变换块和一个强度分布渲染模块组成。提出空间变换块来减少两个图像之间的结构间隙，并且还产生逆变形场以将最终分割的图像向后扭曲。然后强度分布渲染模块将变形结构渲染为具有目标强度分布的图像。实验结果表明，所提出的 SUA 方法能够在多个数据集之间传输强度分布和结构内容。 本文提出一种结构无偏对抗网络（SUA），用于解决医学图像分割中因结构差异导致的分布偏移问题。 Tianyang Zhang,Shaoming Zheng,Jun Cheng,Xi Jia,Joseph Bartlett,Xinxing Cheng,Huazhu Fu,Zhaowen Qiu,Jiang Liu,Jinming Duan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Liyan Tang,Tanya Goyal,Alexander R. Fabbri,Philippe Laban,Jiacheng Xu,Semih Yavuz,Wojciech Kryściński,Justin F. Rousseau,Greg Durrett
title: Understanding Factual Errors in Summarization: Errors, Summarizers, Datasets, Error Detectors
title_zh: 了解摘要中的事实错误：错误、摘要器、数据集、错误检测器
abstract: The propensity of abstractive summarization models to make factual errors has been studied extensively, including design of metrics to detect factual errors and annotation of errors in current systems' outputs. However, the ever-evolving nature of summarization systems, metrics, and annotated benchmarks makes factuality evaluation a moving target, and drawing clear comparisons among metrics has become increasingly difficult. In this work, we aggregate factuality error annotations from nine existing datasets and stratify them according to the underlying summarization model. We compare performance of state-of-the-art factuality metrics, including recent ChatGPT-based metrics, on this stratified benchmark and show that their performance varies significantly across different types of summarization models. Critically, our analysis shows that much of the recent improvement in the factuality detection space has been on summaries from older (pre-Transformer) models instead of more relevant recent summarization models. We further perform a finer-grained analysis per error-type and find similar performance variance across error types for different factuality metrics. Our results show that no one metric is superior in all settings or for all error types, and we provide recommendations for best practices given these insights.
summary: The propensity of abstractive summarization models to make factual errors has been studied extensively, including design of metrics to detect factual errors and annotation of errors in current systems' outputs. However, the ever-evolving nature of summarization systems, metrics, and annotated benchmarks makes factuality evaluation a moving target, and drawing clear comparisons among metrics has become increasingly difficult. In this work, we aggregate factuality error annotations from nine existing datasets and stratify them according to the underlying summarization model. We compare performance of state-of-the-art factuality metrics, including recent ChatGPT-based metrics, on this stratified benchmark and show that their performance varies significantly across different types of summarization models. Critically, our analysis shows that much of the recent improvement in the factuality detection space has been on summaries from older (pre-Transformer) models instead of more relevant recent summarization models. We further perform a finer-grained analysis per error-type and find similar performance variance across error types for different factuality metrics. Our results show that no one metric is superior in all settings or for all error types, and we provide recommendations for best practices given these insights.
abstract_zh: 抽象摘要模型产生事实错误的倾向已被广泛研究，包括检测事实错误的指标设计以及当前系统输出中错误的注释。然而，摘要系统、指标和带注释的基准不断发展的性质使得事实性评估成为一个不断变化的目标，并且在指标之间进行清晰的比较变得越来越困难。在这项工作中，我们聚合了来自九个现有数据集的事实性错误注释，并根据底层摘要模型对它们进行分层。我们在此分层基准上比较了最先进的事实性指标（包括最近基于 ChatGPT 的指标）的性能，并表明它们的性能在不同类型的摘要模型中存在显着差异。重要的是，我们的分析表明，事实检测领域的近期改进大部分是基于较旧的（Transformer 之前）模型的摘要，而不是更相关的最新摘要模型。我们进一步对每个错误类型进行更细粒度的分析，并发现不同事实指标的错误类型之间有类似的性能差异。我们的结果表明，没有任何一个指标在所有设置或所有错误类型上都是优越的，并且我们根据这些见解提供了最佳实践建议。

AI.tldr: 本文分析摘要生成中的事实性错误，比较不同事实性检测指标在不同摘要模型和错误类型上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有事实性评估指标因模型和数据集的快速迭代而难以比较，且改进主要针对旧模型而非最新摘要系统。
AI.method: 汇总九个数据集的错误标注并按模型分层，对比最新事实性指标（包括ChatGPT-based）在分层基准上的性能。
AI.result: 指标性能在不同模型和错误类型间差异显著，近期改进主要针对旧模型，无单一指标在所有场景下最优。
AI.conclusion: 需根据具体模型和错误类型选择检测指标，并建议针对最新摘要系统优化评估方法。

authors_text: Ge-Peng Ji,Deng-Ping Fan,Yu-Cheng Chou,Dengxin Dai,Alexander Liniger,Luc Van Gool
title: Deep Gradient Learning for Efficient Camouflaged Object Detection
title_zh: 用于高效伪装物体检测的深度梯度学习
abstract: This paper introduces DGNet, a novel deep framework that exploits object gradient supervision for camouflaged object detection (COD). It decouples the task into two connected branches, i.e., a context and a texture encoder. The essential connection is the gradient-induced transition, representing a soft grouping between context and texture features. Benefiting from the simple but efficient framework, DGNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art COD models by a large margin. Notably, our efficient version, DGNet-S, runs in real-time (80 fps) and achieves comparable results to the cutting-edge model JCSOD-CVPR$_{21}$ with only 6.82% parameters. Application results also show that the proposed DGNet performs well in polyp segmentation, defect detection, and transparent object segmentation tasks. Codes will be made available at https://github.com/GewelsJI/DGNet.
summary: This paper introduces DGNet, a novel deep framework that exploits object gradient supervision for camouflaged object detection (COD). It decouples the task into two connected branches, i.e., a context and a texture encoder. The essential connection is the gradient-induced transition, representing a soft grouping between context and texture features. Benefiting from the simple but efficient framework, DGNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art COD models by a large margin. Notably, our efficient version, DGNet-S, runs in real-time (80 fps) and achieves comparable results to the cutting-edge model JCSOD-CVPR$_{21}$ with only 6.82% parameters. Application results also show that the proposed DGNet performs well in polyp segmentation, defect detection, and transparent object segmentation tasks. Codes will be made available at https://github.com/GewelsJI/DGNet.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 DGNet，这是一种利用对象梯度监督进行伪装对象检测 (COD) 的新型深度框架。它将任务解耦为两个连接的分支，即上下文和纹理编码器。基本的联系是梯度引起的过渡，代表上下文和纹理特征之间的软分组。受益于简单而高效的框架，DGNet 的性能大幅优于现有最先进的 COD 模型。值得注意的是，我们的高效版本 DGNet-S 可以实时运行（80 fps），并且仅用 6.82% 的参数即可达到与尖端模型 JCSOD-CVPR$_{21}$ 相当的结果。应用结果还表明，所提出的 DGNet 在息肉分割、缺陷检测和透明对象分割任务中表现良好。代码将在 https://github.com/GewelsJI/DGNet 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DGNet框架，通过梯度监督机制提升伪装目标检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有伪装目标检测方法在效率和精度上存在不足，需探索更高效的特征融合策略。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络（上下文编码器与纹理编码器），通过梯度诱导过渡实现特征软分组。
AI.result: DGNet在多个数据集上超越现有SOTA模型，轻量版DGNet-S达80fps实时检测且参数量仅6.82%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的梯度学习框架在伪装目标检测及多项分割任务中均表现出色，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: Deep Gradient Learning for Efficient Camouflaged Object Detection 用于高效伪装物体检测的深度梯度学习 This paper introduces DGNet, a novel deep framework that exploits object gradient supervision for camouflaged object detection (COD). It decouples the task into two connected branches, i.e., a context and a texture encoder. The essential connection is the gradient-induced transition, representing a soft grouping between context and texture features. Benefiting from the simple but efficient framework, DGNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art COD models by a large margin. Notably, our efficient version, DGNet-S, runs in real-time (80 fps) and achieves comparable results to the cutting-edge model JCSOD-CVPR$_{21}$ with only 6.82% parameters. Application results also show that the proposed DGNet performs well in polyp segmentation, defect detection, and transparent object segmentation tasks. Codes will be made available at https://github.com/GewelsJI/DGNet. 本文介绍了 DGNet，这是一种利用对象梯度监督进行伪装对象检测 (COD) 的新型深度框架。它将任务解耦为两个连接的分支，即上下文和纹理编码器。基本的联系是梯度引起的过渡，代表上下文和纹理特征之间的软分组。受益于简单而高效的框架，DGNet 的性能大幅优于现有最先进的 COD 模型。值得注意的是，我们的高效版本 DGNet-S 可以实时运行（80 fps），并且仅用 6.82% 的参数即可达到与尖端模型 JCSOD-CVPR$_{21}$ 相当的结果。应用结果还表明，所提出的 DGNet 在息肉分割、缺陷检测和透明对象分割任务中表现良好。代码将在 https://github.com/GewelsJI/DGNet 上提供。 本文提出DGNet框架，通过梯度监督机制提升伪装目标检测效率。 Ge-Peng Ji,Deng-Ping Fan,Yu-Cheng Chou,Dengxin Dai,Alexander Liniger,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Giulia Bernardini,Alexander Lindermayr,Alberto Marchetti-Spaccamela,Nicole Megow,Leen Stougie,Michelle Sweering
title: A Universal Error Measure for Input Predictions Applied to Online Graph Problems
title_zh: 应用于在线图问题的输入预测的通用误差测量
abstract: We introduce a novel measure for quantifying the error in input predictions. The error is based on a minimum-cost hyperedge cover in a suitably defined hypergraph and provides a general template which we apply to online graph problems. The measure captures errors due to absent predicted requests as well as unpredicted actual requests; hence, predicted and actual inputs can be of arbitrary size. We achieve refined performance guarantees for previously studied network design problems in the online-list model, such as Steiner tree and facility location. Further, we initiate the study of learning-augmented algorithms for online routing problems, such as the online traveling salesperson problem and the online dial-a-ride problem, where (transportation) requests arrive over time (online-time model). We provide a general algorithmic framework and we give error-dependent performance bounds that improve upon known worst-case barriers, when given accurate predictions, at the cost of slightly increased worst-case bounds when given predictions of arbitrary quality.
summary: We introduce a novel measure for quantifying the error in input predictions. The error is based on a minimum-cost hyperedge cover in a suitably defined hypergraph and provides a general template which we apply to online graph problems. The measure captures errors due to absent predicted requests as well as unpredicted actual requests; hence, predicted and actual inputs can be of arbitrary size. We achieve refined performance guarantees for previously studied network design problems in the online-list model, such as Steiner tree and facility location. Further, we initiate the study of learning-augmented algorithms for online routing problems, such as the online traveling salesperson problem and the online dial-a-ride problem, where (transportation) requests arrive over time (online-time model). We provide a general algorithmic framework and we give error-dependent performance bounds that improve upon known worst-case barriers, when given accurate predictions, at the cost of slightly increased worst-case bounds when given predictions of arbitrary quality.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的方法来量化输入预测中的误差。该错误基于适当定义的超图中的最小成本超边覆盖，并提供了我们应用于在线图问题的通用模板。该措施捕获由于缺少预测请求以及未预测的实际请求而导致的错误；因此，预测和实际输入可以是任意大小。我们为先前研究的在线列表模型中的网络设计问题（例如斯坦纳树和设施位置）实现了精细的性能保证。此外，我们还开始研究在线路由问题的学习增强算法，例如在线旅行推销员问题和在线叫车问题，其中（交通）请求随着时间的推移到达（在线时间模型）。我们提供了一个通用的算法框架，并给出了与错误相关的性能界限，当给出准确的预测时，该性能界限改进了已知的最坏情况障碍，但代价是当给出任意质量的预测时，最坏情况的界限略有增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的输入预测误差度量方法，并将其应用于在线图问题，以改进网络设计和路由问题的性能保证。
AI.motivation: 现有在线算法难以处理预测输入与实际输入之间的误差，尤其当预测缺失或出现意外请求时，传统方法无法提供灵活的性能保障。
AI.method: 基于超图的最小成本超边覆盖定义误差度量，构建通用框架并应用于Steiner树、设施定位等网络设计问题，以及在线旅行商问题等路由问题。
AI.result: 为网络设计问题提供了更精细的性能保证，并针对路由问题提出了依赖预测误差的性能边界，在预测准确时优于传统最坏情况界限。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在预测质量较高时能显著提升算法性能，同时为处理在线图问题提供了统一的误差分析范式。

authors_text: Weiming Hu,Haoyuan Chen,Wanli Liu,Xiaoyan Li,Hongzan Sun,Xinyu Huang,Marcin Grzegorzek,Chen Li
title: A Comparative Study of Gastric Histopathology Sub-size Image Classification: from Linear Regression to Visual Transformer
title_zh: 胃组织病理学小尺寸图像分类的比较研究：从线性回归到 Visual Transformer
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.02473
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.02473
abstract: Gastric cancer is the fifth most common cancer in the world. At the same time, it is also the fourth most deadly cancer. Early detection of cancer exists as a guide for the treatment of gastric cancer. Nowadays, computer technology has advanced rapidly to assist physicians in the diagnosis of pathological pictures of gastric cancer. Ensemble learning is a way to improve the accuracy of algorithms, and finding multiple learning models with complementarity types is the basis of ensemble learning. The complementarity of sub-size pathology image classifiers when machine performance is insufficient is explored in this experimental platform. We choose seven classical machine learning classifiers and four deep learning classifiers for classification experiments on the GasHisSDB database. Among them, classical machine learning algorithms extract five different image virtual features to match multiple classifier algorithms. For deep learning, we choose three convolutional neural network classifiers. In addition, we also choose a novel Transformer-based classifier. The experimental platform, in which a large number of classical machine learning and deep learning methods are performed, demonstrates that there are differences in the performance of different classifiers on GasHisSDB. Classical machine learning models exist for classifiers that classify Abnormal categories very well, while classifiers that excel in classifying Normal categories also exist. Deep learning models also exist with multiple models that can be complementarity. Suitable classifiers are selected for ensemble learning, when machine performance is insufficient. This experimental platform demonstrates that multiple classifiers are indeed complementarity and can improve the efficiency of ensemble learning. This can better assist doctors in diagnosis, improve the detection of gastric cancer, and increase the cure rate.

abstract_zh: 胃癌是世界上第五大常见癌症。同时，它也是第四大致命癌症。癌症的早期检测可以作为胃癌治疗的指南。如今，计算机技术突飞猛进，可以辅助医生对胃癌的病理图片进行诊断。集成学习是提高算法精度的一种方式，寻找具有互补类型的多种学习模型是集成学习的基础。该实验平台探讨了机器性能不足时小尺寸病理图像分类器的互补性。我们选择七个经典机器学习分类器和四个深度学习分类器在GasHisSDB数据库上进行分类实验。其中，经典机器学习算法提取五种不同的图像虚拟特征来匹配多种分类器算法。对于深度学习，我们选择三个卷积神经网络分类器。此外，我们还选择了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的分类器。实验平台进行了大量经典机器学习和深度学习方法，结果表明不同分类器在GasHisSDB上的性能存在差异。经典的机器学习模型适用于很好地分类异常类别的分类器，同时也存在擅长分类正常类别的分类器。深度学习模型也存在多种可以互补的模型。当机器性能不足时，选择合适的分类器进行集成学习。这个实验平台证明了多个分类器确实是互补的，可以提高集成学习的效率。这可以更好地辅助医生诊断，提高胃癌的检出率，提高治愈率。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较不同分类器在胃癌病理图像子尺寸分类中的性能，探索集成学习在提升诊断效率中的应用。
AI.motivation: 胃癌是全球致死率第四高的癌症，早期检测对提高治愈率至关重要，需借助计算机技术辅助病理图像诊断。
AI.method: 在GasHisSDB数据库上测试七种经典机器学习分类器、三种卷积神经网络及一种基于Transformer的新型分类器，分析其互补性。
AI.result: 经典机器学习模型在异常分类表现优异，深度学习模型存在多模型互补性，集成学习可提升诊断效率。
AI.conclusion: 多分类器互补性显著，集成学习能有效辅助医生诊断，提高胃癌检测准确率与治愈率。

ai_content.result: 经典机器学习模型在异常分类表现优异，深度学习模型存在多模型互补性，集成学习可提升诊断效率。

This can better assist doctors in diagnosis, improve the detection of gastric cancer, and increase the cure rate. 胃癌是世界上第五大常见癌症。同时，它也是第四大致命癌症。癌症的早期检测可以作为胃癌治疗的指南。如今，计算机技术突飞猛进，可以辅助医生对胃癌的病理图片进行诊断。集成学习是提高算法精度的一种方式，寻找具有互补类型的多种学习模型是集成学习的基础。该实验平台探讨了机器性能不足时小尺寸病理图像分类器的互补性。我们选择七个经典机器学习分类器和四个深度学习分类器在GasHisSDB数据库上进行分类实验。其中，经典机器学习算法提取五种不同的图像虚拟特征来匹配多种分类器算法。对于深度学习，我们选择三个卷积神经网络分类器。此外，我们还选择了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的分类器。实验平台进行了大量经典机器学习和深度学习方法，结果表明不同分类器在GasHisSDB上的性能存在差异。经典的机器学习模型适用于很好地分类异常类别的分类器，同时也存在擅长分类正常类别的分类器。深度学习模型也存在多种可以互补的模型。当机器性能不足时，选择合适的分类器进行集成学习。这个实验平台证明了多个分类器确实是互补的，可以提高集成学习的效率。这可以更好地辅助医生诊断，提高胃癌的检出率，提高治愈率。 本文通过比较不同分类器在胃癌病理图像子尺寸分类中的性能，探索集成学习在提升诊断效率中的应用。 Weiming Hu,Haoyuan Chen,Wanli Liu,Xiaoyan Li,Hongzan Sun,Xinyu Huang,Marcin Grzegorzek,Chen Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Divya Kothandaraman,Sumit Shekhar,Abhilasha Sancheti,Manoj Ghuhan,Tripti Shukla,Dinesh Manocha
title: SALAD: Source-free Active Label-Agnostic Domain Adaptation for Classification, Segmentation and Detection
title_zh: SALAD：用于分类、分割和检测的无源主动标签不可知域适应
abstract: We present a novel method, SALAD, for the challenging vision task of adapting a pre-trained "source" domain network to a "target" domain, with a small budget for annotation in the "target" domain and a shift in the label space. Further, the task assumes that the source data is not available for adaptation, due to privacy concerns or otherwise. We postulate that such systems need to jointly optimize the dual task of (i) selecting fixed number of samples from the target domain for annotation and (ii) transfer of knowledge from the pre-trained network to the target domain. To do this, SALAD consists of a novel Guided Attention Transfer Network (GATN) and an active learning function, HAL. The GATN enables feature distillation from pre-trained network to the target network, complemented with the target samples mined by HAL using transfer-ability and uncertainty criteria. SALAD has three key benefits: (i) it is task-agnostic, and can be applied across various visual tasks such as classification, segmentation and detection; (ii) it can handle shifts in output label space from the pre-trained source network to the target domain; (iii) it does not require access to source data for adaptation. We conduct extensive experiments across 3 visual tasks, viz. digits classification (MNIST, SVHN, VISDA), synthetic (GTA5) to real (CityScapes) image segmentation, and document layout detection (PubLayNet to DSSE). We show that our source-free approach, SALAD, results in an improvement of 0.5%-31.3%(across datasets and tasks) over prior adaptation methods that assume access to large amounts of annotated source data for adaptation.
summary: We present a novel method, SALAD, for the challenging vision task of adapting a pre-trained "source" domain network to a "target" domain, with a small budget for annotation in the "target" domain and a shift in the label space. Further, the task assumes that the source data is not available for adaptation, due to privacy concerns or otherwise. We postulate that such systems need to jointly optimize the dual task of (i) selecting fixed number of samples from the target domain for annotation and (ii) transfer of knowledge from the pre-trained network to the target domain. To do this, SALAD consists of a novel Guided Attention Transfer Network (GATN) and an active learning function, HAL. The GATN enables feature distillation from pre-trained network to the target network, complemented with the target samples mined by HAL using transfer-ability and uncertainty criteria. SALAD has three key benefits: (i) it is task-agnostic, and can be applied across various visual tasks such as classification, segmentation and detection; (ii) it can handle shifts in output label space from the pre-trained source network to the target domain; (iii) it does not require access to source data for adaptation. We conduct extensive experiments across 3 visual tasks, viz. digits classification (MNIST, SVHN, VISDA), synthetic (GTA5) to real (CityScapes) image segmentation, and document layout detection (PubLayNet to DSSE). We show that our source-free approach, SALAD, results in an improvement of 0.5%-31.3%(across datasets and tasks) over prior adaptation methods that assume access to large amounts of annotated source data for adaptation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，SALAD，用于将预先训练的“源”域网络适应“目标”域的具有挑战性的视觉任务，在“目标”域中进行注释的预算很少，并且在标签空间中进行移动。此外，该任务假设由于隐私问题或其他原因，源数据不可用于适应。我们假设此类系统需要联合优化双重任务：（i）从目标域中选择固定数量的样本进行注释，以及（ii）将知识从预训练网络转移到目标域。为此，SALAD 由新颖的引导注意力转移网络 (GATN) 和主动学习功能 HAL 组成。 GATN 能够从预训练网络到目标网络进行特征蒸馏，并辅以 HAL 使用可转移性和不确定性标准挖掘的目标样本。 SALAD 具有三个主要优点：（i）它与任务无关，可以应用于各种视觉任务，例如分类、分割和检测； (ii) 它可以处理输出标签空间从预训练源网络到目标域的转移； (iii) 不需要获取源数据来进行调整。我们对 3 个视觉任务进行了广泛的实验，即数字分类（MNIST、SVHN、VISDA）、合成（GTA5）到真实（CityScapes）图像分割以及文档布局检测（PubLayNet 到 DSSE）。我们表明，我们的无源方法 SALAD 比之前假设访问大量带注释的源数据进行适应的适应方法提高了 0.5%-31.3%（跨数据集和任务）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SALAD方法，在无需源域数据的情况下，通过少量目标域标注实现分类、分割和检测任务的领域自适应。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法依赖源域数据且需大量标注，但实际场景中源数据可能因隐私无法获取，且目标域标签空间可能存在偏移。
AI.method: SALAD包含指导注意力迁移网络(GATN)和主动学习函数HAL，通过特征蒸馏和基于可迁移性/不确定性的样本选择实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在Digits分类、图像分割和文档布局检测任务中，SALAD相较需源数据的方法平均提升0.5%-31.3%。
AI.conclusion: SALAD实现了无源数据、跨任务的领域自适应，有效应对标签空间偏移，适用于隐私敏感场景。

authors_text: Ariel Kulik,Matthias Mnich,Hadas Shachnai
title: Improved Approximations for Vector Bin Packing via Iterative Randomized Rounding
title_zh: 通过迭代随机舍入改进向量装箱的近似值
abstract: We study the $d$-dimensional Vector Bin Packing ($d$VBP) problem, a generalization of Bin Packing with central applications in resource allocation and scheduling. In $d$VBP, we are given a set of items, each of which is characterized by a $d$-dimensional volume vector; the objective is to partition the items into a minimum number of subsets (bins), such that the total volume of items in each subset is at most $1$ in each dimension. Our main result is an asymptotic approximation algorithm for $d$VBP that yields a ratio of $(1+\ln d-χ(d) +\varepsilon)$ for all $d \in \mathbb{N}$ and any $\varepsilon > 0$; here, $χ(d)$ is some strictly positive function. This improves upon the best known asymptotic ratio of $ \left(1+ \ln d +\varepsilon\right)$ due to Bansal, Caprara and Sviridenko (SICOMP 2010) for any $d >3$. By slightly modifying our algorithm to include an initial matching phase and applying a tighter analysis we obtain an asymptotic approximation ratio of $\left(\frac{4}{3}+\varepsilon\right)$ for the special case of $d=2$, thus substantially improving the previous best ratio of $\left(\frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon\right)$ due to Bansal, Elias and Khan (SODA 2016). Our algorithm iteratively solves a configuration LP relaxation for the residual instance (from previous iterations) and samples a small number of configurations based on the solution for the configuration LP. While iterative rounding was already used by Karmarkar and Karp (FOCS 1982) to establish their celebrated result for classic (one-dimensional) Bin Packing, iterative randomized rounding is used here for the first time in the context of (Vector) Bin Packing. Our results show that iterative randomized rounding is a powerful tool for approximating $d$VBP, leading to simple algorithms with improved approximation guarantees.
summary: We study the $d$-dimensional Vector Bin Packing ($d$VBP) problem, a generalization of Bin Packing with central applications in resource allocation and scheduling. In $d$VBP, we are given a set of items, each of which is characterized by a $d$-dimensional volume vector; the objective is to partition the items into a minimum number of subsets (bins), such that the total volume of items in each subset is at most $1$ in each dimension. Our main result is an asymptotic approximation algorithm for $d$VBP that yields a ratio of $(1+\ln d-χ(d) +\varepsilon)$ for all $d \in \mathbb{N}$ and any $\varepsilon > 0$; here, $χ(d)$ is some strictly positive function. This improves upon the best known asymptotic ratio of $ \left(1+ \ln d +\varepsilon\right)$ due to Bansal, Caprara and Sviridenko (SICOMP 2010) for any $d >3$. By slightly modifying our algorithm to include an initial matching phase and applying a tighter analysis we obtain an asymptotic approximation ratio of $\left(\frac{4}{3}+\varepsilon\right)$ for the special case of $d=2$, thus substantially improving the previous best ratio of $\left(\frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon\right)$ due to Bansal, Elias and Khan (SODA 2016). Our algorithm iteratively solves a configuration LP relaxation for the residual instance (from previous iterations) and samples a small number of configurations based on the solution for the configuration LP. While iterative rounding was already used by Karmarkar and Karp (FOCS 1982) to establish their celebrated result for classic (one-dimensional) Bin Packing, iterative randomized rounding is used here for the first time in the context of (Vector) Bin Packing. Our results show that iterative randomized rounding is a powerful tool for approximating $d$VBP, leading to simple algorithms with improved approximation guarantees.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 $d$ 维向量装箱 ($d$VBP) 问题，这是装箱在资源分配和调度中的核心应用的推广。在$d$VBP中，我们给出一组项目，每个项目都由一个$d$维体积向量来表征；目标是将项目划分为最少数量的子集（箱），使得每个子集中的项目总体积在每个维度上最多为 1$。我们的主要结果是 $d$VBP 的渐近逼近算法，对于所有 $d \in \mathbb{N}$ 和任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，产生 $(1+\ln d-χ(d) +\varepsilon)$ 的比率；这里，$χ(d)$是一些严格的正函数。对于任何 $d >3$，这改进了由 Bansal、Caprara 和 Sviridenko (SICOMP 2010) 提出的最著名的 $ \left(1+ \ln d +\varepsilon\right)$ 渐近比率。通过稍微修改我们的算法以包括初始匹配阶段并应用更严格的分析，我们针对 $d=2$ 的特殊情况获得了 $\left(\frac{4}{3}+\varepsilon\right)$ 的渐近近似比率，从而大大改善了 Bansal、Elias 和 Khan 之前的最佳比率 $\left(\frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon\right)$ (SODA 2016)。我们的算法迭代地求解残差实例的配置 LP 松弛（来自之前的迭代），并根据配置 LP 的解对少量配置进行采样。虽然 Karmarkar 和 Karp (FOCS 1982) 已经使用迭代舍入来建立经典（一维）Bin Packing 的著名结果，但迭代随机舍入在这里首次在（向量）Bin Packing 的背景下使用。我们的结果表明，迭代随机舍入是近似 $d$VBP 的强大工具，可产生具有改进的近似保证的简单算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了d维向量装箱问题（dVBP），提出了一种改进的近似算法以优化资源分配和调度中的应用。
AI.motivation: 向量装箱问题在资源分配和调度中具有重要应用，但现有算法的近似比存在改进空间，尤其在高维情况下。
AI.method: 通过迭代随机舍入方法，结合配置线性规划松弛技术，对残余实例进行多次求解并采样配置，同时针对二维情况引入匹配阶段优化。
AI.result: 对于任意维度d，算法近似比达到(1+ln d -χ(d)+ε)，优于之前的(1+ln d +ε)；当d=2时，近似比进一步优化至(4/3+ε)。
AI.conclusion: 迭代随机舍入是解决向量装箱问题的有效工具，能够提供更优且简洁的近似算法。

Our main result is an asymptotic approximation algorithm for $d$VBP that yields a ratio of $(1+\ln d-χ(d) +\varepsilon)$ for all $d \in \mathbb{N}$ and any $\varepsilon > 0$; here, $χ(d)$ is some strictly positive function. This improves upon the best known asymptotic ratio of $ \left(1+ \ln d +\varepsilon\right)$ due to Bansal, Caprara and Sviridenko (SICOMP 2010) for any $d >3$. By slightly modifying our algorithm to include an initial matching phase and applying a tighter analysis we obtain an asymptotic approximation ratio of $\left(\frac{4}{3}+\varepsilon\right)$ for the special case of $d=2$, thus substantially improving the previous best ratio of $\left(\frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon\right)$ due to Bansal, Elias and Khan (SODA 2016). Our algorithm iteratively solves a configuration LP relaxation for the residual instance (from previous iterations) and samples a small number of configurations based on the solution for the configuration LP. While iterative rounding was already used by Karmarkar and Karp (FOCS 1982) to establish their celebrated result for classic (one-dimensional) Bin Packing, iterative randomized rounding is used here for the first time in the context of (Vector) Bin Packing. Our results show that iterative randomized rounding is a powerful tool for approximating $d$VBP, leading to simple algorithms with improved approximation guarantees. 我们研究 $d$ 维向量装箱 ($d$VBP) 问题，这是装箱在资源分配和调度中的核心应用的推广。在$d$VBP中，我们给出一组项目，每个项目都由一个$d$维体积向量来表征；目标是将项目划分为最少数量的子集（箱），使得每个子集中的项目总体积在每个维度上最多为 1$。我们的主要结果是 $d$VBP 的渐近逼近算法，对于所有 $d \in \mathbb{N}$ 和任何 $\varepsilon > 0$，产生 $(1+\ln d-χ(d) +\varepsilon)$ 的比率；这里，$χ(d)$是一些严格的正函数。对于任何 $d >3$，这改进了由 Bansal、Caprara 和 Sviridenko (SICOMP 2010) 提出的最著名的 $ \left(1+ \ln d +\varepsilon\right)$ 渐近比率。通过稍微修改我们的算法以包括初始匹配阶段并应用更严格的分析，我们针对 $d=2$ 的特殊情况获得了 $\left(\frac{4}{3}+\varepsilon\right)$ 的渐近近似比率，从而大大改善了 Bansal、Elias 和 Khan 之前的最佳比率 $\left(\frac{3}{2}+\varepsilon\right)$ (SODA 2016)。我们的算法迭代地求解残差实例的配置 LP 松弛（来自之前的迭代），并根据配置 LP 的解对少量配置进行采样。虽然 Karmarkar 和 Karp (FOCS 1982) 已经使用迭代舍入来建立经典（一维）Bin Packing 的著名结果，但迭代随机舍入在这里首次在（向量）Bin Packing 的背景下使用。我们的结果表明，迭代随机舍入是近似 $d$VBP 的强大工具，可产生具有改进的近似保证的简单算法。 本文研究了d维向量装箱问题（dVBP），提出了一种改进的近似算法以优化资源分配和调度中的应用。 Ariel Kulik,Matthias Mnich,Hadas Shachnai cs.DS

authors_text: Esther Galby
title: The complexity of blocking (semi)total dominating sets with edge contractions
title_zh: 具有边缘收缩的阻塞（半）完全支配集的复杂性
abstract: We consider the problem of reducing the (semi)total domination number of graph by one by contracting edges. It is known that this can always be done with at most three edge contractions and that deciding whether one edge contraction suffices is an $\mathsf{NP}$-hard problem. We show that for every fixed $k \in \{2,3\}$, deciding whether exactly $k$ edge contractions are necessary is $\mathsf{NP}$-hard and further provide for $k=2$ complete complexity dichotomies on monogenic graph classes.
summary: We consider the problem of reducing the (semi)total domination number of graph by one by contracting edges. It is known that this can always be done with at most three edge contractions and that deciding whether one edge contraction suffices is an $\mathsf{NP}$-hard problem. We show that for every fixed $k \in \{2,3\}$, deciding whether exactly $k$ edge contractions are necessary is $\mathsf{NP}$-hard and further provide for $k=2$ complete complexity dichotomies on monogenic graph classes.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑通过收缩边将图的（半）总支配数减少一的问题。众所周知，这总是可以通过最多三个边缘收缩来完成，并且确定一个边缘收缩是否足够是一个 $\mathsf{NP}$ 难题。我们证明，对于每个固定的 $k \in \{2,3\}$，确定 $k$ 边缘收缩是否是必要的是 $\mathsf{NP}$ 困难的，并进一步提供单基因图类上的 $k=2$ 完整复杂性二分法。

AI.tldr: 研究通过边收缩减少图的（半）总支配数的复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 理解图的支配数性质及边收缩操作对支配数的影响，为相关算法设计提供理论依据。
AI.method: 采用计算复杂性分析方法，证明问题的NP难性，并在特定图类中进行复杂性分类。
AI.result: 证明对任意固定k∈{2,3}，判断是否需要恰好k次边收缩是NP难的，并为k=2的情况提供单基因图类的复杂性二分法。
AI.conclusion: 确定了减少支配数所需边收缩次数的判定问题的复杂性边界，并在特定图类中实现分类。

authors_text: Akshat Gupta
title: On Building Spoken Language Understanding Systems for Low Resourced Languages
title_zh: 为资源匮乏的语言构建口语理解系统
abstract: Spoken dialog systems are slowly becoming and integral part of the human experience due to their various advantages over textual interfaces. Spoken language understanding (SLU) systems are fundamental building blocks of spoken dialog systems. But creating SLU systems for low resourced languages is still a challenge. In a large number of low resourced language, we don't have access to enough data to build automatic speech recognition (ASR) technologies, which are fundamental to any SLU system. Also, ASR based SLU systems do not generalize to unwritten languages. In this paper, we present a series of experiments to explore extremely low-resourced settings where we perform intent classification with systems trained on as low as one data-point per intent and with only one speaker in the dataset. We also work in a low-resourced setting where we do not use language specific ASR systems to transcribe input speech, which compounds the challenge of building SLU systems to simulate a true low-resourced setting. We test our system on Belgian Dutch (Flemish) and English and find that using phonetic transcriptions to make intent classification systems in such low-resourced setting performs significantly better than using speech features. Specifically, when using a phonetic transcription based system over a feature based system, we see average improvements of 12.37% and 13.08% for binary and four-class classification problems respectively, when averaged over 49 different experimental settings.
summary: Spoken dialog systems are slowly becoming and integral part of the human experience due to their various advantages over textual interfaces. Spoken language understanding (SLU) systems are fundamental building blocks of spoken dialog systems. But creating SLU systems for low resourced languages is still a challenge. In a large number of low resourced language, we don't have access to enough data to build automatic speech recognition (ASR) technologies, which are fundamental to any SLU system. Also, ASR based SLU systems do not generalize to unwritten languages. In this paper, we present a series of experiments to explore extremely low-resourced settings where we perform intent classification with systems trained on as low as one data-point per intent and with only one speaker in the dataset. We also work in a low-resourced setting where we do not use language specific ASR systems to transcribe input speech, which compounds the challenge of building SLU systems to simulate a true low-resourced setting. We test our system on Belgian Dutch (Flemish) and English and find that using phonetic transcriptions to make intent classification systems in such low-resourced setting performs significantly better than using speech features. Specifically, when using a phonetic transcription based system over a feature based system, we see average improvements of 12.37% and 13.08% for binary and four-class classification problems respectively, when averaged over 49 different experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 由于语音对话系统相对于文本界面具有多种优势，因此正在慢慢成为人类体验不可或缺的一部分。口语理解 (SLU) 系统是口语对话系统的基本构建块。但为资源匮乏的语言创建 SLU 系统仍然是一个挑战。在大量资源匮乏的语言中，我们无法获得足够的数据来构建自动语音识别 (ASR) 技术，而这是任何 SLU 系统的基础。此外，基于 ASR 的 SLU 系统不能推广到不成文的语言。在本文中，我们提出了一系列实验来探索资源极其匮乏的环境，在这些环境中，我们使用每个意图低至一个数据点且数据集中只有一个说话者的系统进行意图分类。我们还在资源匮乏的环境中工作，我们不使用特定于语言的 ASR 系统来转录输入语音，这加剧了构建 SLU 系统来模拟真正的资源匮乏环境的挑战。我们在比利时荷兰语（佛兰芒语）和英语上测试了我们的系统，发现在资源匮乏的环境中使用语音转录来制作意图分类系统的性能明显优于使用语音特征。具体来说，当使用基于语音转录的系统而不是基于特征的系统时，我们发现在 49 种不同的实验设置上进行平均时，二元分类和四类分类问题的平均改进分别为 12.37% 和 13.08%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低资源语言环境下构建语音语言理解（SLU）系统的有效方法，特别是在数据极度稀缺的情况下。
AI.motivation: 现有SLU系统依赖大量数据训练的语音识别（ASR）技术，但低资源语言缺乏足够数据，且ASR难以处理无文字语言，亟需探索数据极低情况下的解决方案。
AI.method: 在仅使用每意图一个数据点、单说话人数据集且不依赖语言特定ASR的极端低资源场景下，对比基于语音特征与音素转录的意图分类系统性能。
AI.result: 在比利时荷兰语和英语测试中，基于音素转录的系统在二分类和四分类任务上分别平均提升12.37%和13.08%。
AI.conclusion: 音素转录在极端低资源场景下显著优于传统语音特征，为无文字或数据稀缺语言的SLU系统提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Miroslav Blšták,Viera Rozinajová
title: Automatic question generation based on sentence structure analysis using machine learning approach
title_zh: 使用机器学习方法基于句子结构分析自动问题生成
abstract: Automatic question generation is one of the most challenging tasks of Natural Language Processing. It requires "bidirectional" language processing: firstly, the system has to understand the input text (Natural Language Understanding) and it then has to generate questions also in the form of text (Natural Language Generation). In this article, we introduce our framework for generating the factual questions from unstructured text in the English language. It uses a combination of traditional linguistic approaches based on sentence patterns with several machine learning methods. We firstly obtain lexical, syntactic and semantic information from an input text and we then construct a hierarchical set of patterns for each sentence. The set of features is extracted from the patterns and it is then used for automated learning of new transformation rules. Our learning process is totally data-driven because the transformation rules are obtained from a set of initial sentence-question pairs. The advantages of this approach lie in a simple expansion of new transformation rules which allows us to generate various types of questions and also in the continuous improvement of the system by reinforcement learning. The framework also includes a question evaluation module which estimates the quality of generated questions. It serves as a filter for selecting the best questions and eliminating incorrect ones or duplicates. We have performed several experiments to evaluate the correctness of generated questions and we have also compared our system with several state-of-the-art systems. Our results indicate that the quality of generated questions outperforms the state-of-the-art systems and our questions are also comparable to questions created by humans. We have also created and published an interface with all created datasets and evaluated questions, so it is possible to follow up on our work.
summary: Automatic question generation is one of the most challenging tasks of Natural Language Processing. It requires "bidirectional" language processing: firstly, the system has to understand the input text (Natural Language Understanding) and it then has to generate questions also in the form of text (Natural Language Generation). The set of features is extracted from the patterns and it is then used for automated learning of new transformation rules. Our learning process is totally data-driven because the transformation rules are obtained from a set of initial sentence-question pairs. The advantages of this approach lie in a simple expansion of new transformation rules which allows us to generate various types of questions and also in the continuous improvement of the system by reinforcement learning. The framework also includes a question evaluation module which estimates the quality of generated questions. It serves as a filter for selecting the best questions and eliminating incorrect ones or duplicates. We have performed several experiments to evaluate the correctness of generated questions and we have also compared our system with several state-of-the-art systems. Our results indicate that the quality of generated questions outperforms the state-of-the-art systems and our questions are also comparable to questions created by humans. We have also created and published an interface with all created datasets and evaluated questions, so it is possible to follow up on our work.
abstract_zh: 自动问题生成是自然语言处理中最具挑战性的任务之一。它需要“双向”语言处理：首先，系统必须理解输入文本（自然语言理解），然后必须以文本形式生成问题（自然语言生成）。在本文中，我们介绍了从英语非结构化文本生成事实问题的框架。它结合了基于句子模式的传统语言方法和多种机器学习方法。我们首先从输入文本中获取词汇、句法和语义信息，然后为每个句子构建一组分层模式。从模式中提取特征集，然后将其用于新转换规则的自动学习。我们的学习过程完全是数据驱动的，因为转换规则是从一组初始句子-问题对中获得的。这种方法的优点在于新转换规则的简单扩展，使我们能够生成各种类型的问题，并且还在于通过强化学习不断改进系统。该框架还包括一个问题评估模块，用于评估生成问题的质量。它充当过滤器，用于选择最佳问题并消除不正确或重复的问题。我们进行了多次实验来评估生成问题的正确性，并将我们的系统与几个最先进的系统进行了比较。我们的结果表明，生成的问题的质量优于最先进的系统，并且我们的问题也与人类创建的问题相当。我们还创建并发布了一个包含所有创建的数据集和评估问题的界面，因此可以跟进我们的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于句法分析和机器学习的自动问答生成框架，旨在从无结构文本中生成事实性问题。
AI.motivation: 自动问题生成是自然语言处理中的挑战性任务，需同时完成自然语言理解和生成。传统方法难以灵活适应多种问题类型，且缺乏持续优化机制。
AI.method: 结合传统句法模式与机器学习方法，通过提取词法、句法和语义特征构建分层模式集，利用初始问句对数据驱动学习转换规则，并引入强化学习和问题评估模块优化生成质量。
AI.result: 实验表明生成问题质量优于现有系统且接近人类水平，同时公开了数据集和评估接口以支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过融合规则与数据驱动方法，在问题生成多样性与准确性上取得突破，为自动问答系统提供了可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Automatic question generation based on sentence structure analysis using machine learning approach 使用机器学习方法基于句子结构分析自动问题生成 Automatic question generation is one of the most challenging tasks of Natural Language Processing. It requires "bidirectional" language processing: firstly, the system has to understand the input text (Natural Language Understanding) and it then has to generate questions also in the form of text (Natural Language Generation). In this article, we introduce our framework for generating the factual questions from unstructured text in the English language. It uses a combination of traditional linguistic approaches based on sentence patterns with several machine learning methods. We firstly obtain lexical, syntactic and semantic information from an input text and we then construct a hierarchical set of patterns for each sentence. The set of features is extracted from the patterns and it is then used for automated learning of new transformation rules. Our learning process is totally data-driven because the transformation rules are obtained from a set of initial sentence-question pairs. The advantages of this approach lie in a simple expansion of new transformation rules which allows us to generate various types of questions and also in the continuous improvement of the system by reinforcement learning. The framework also includes a question evaluation module which estimates the quality of generated questions. It serves as a filter for selecting the best questions and eliminating incorrect ones or duplicates. We have performed several experiments to evaluate the correctness of generated questions and we have also compared our system with several state-of-the-art systems. Our results indicate that the quality of generated questions outperforms the state-of-the-art systems and our questions are also comparable to questions created by humans. We have also created and published an interface with all created datasets and evaluated questions, so it is possible to follow up on our work. 自动问题生成是自然语言处理中最具挑战性的任务之一。它需要“双向”语言处理：首先，系统必须理解输入文本（自然语言理解），然后必须以文本形式生成问题（自然语言生成）。在本文中，我们介绍了从英语非结构化文本生成事实问题的框架。它结合了基于句子模式的传统语言方法和多种机器学习方法。我们首先从输入文本中获取词汇、句法和语义信息，然后为每个句子构建一组分层模式。从模式中提取特征集，然后将其用于新转换规则的自动学习。我们的学习过程完全是数据驱动的，因为转换规则是从一组初始句子-问题对中获得的。这种方法的优点在于新转换规则的简单扩展，使我们能够生成各种类型的问题，并且还在于通过强化学习不断改进系统。该框架还包括一个问题评估模块，用于评估生成问题的质量。它充当过滤器，用于选择最佳问题并消除不正确或重复的问题。我们进行了多次实验来评估生成问题的正确性，并将我们的系统与几个最先进的系统进行了比较。我们的结果表明，生成的问题的质量优于最先进的系统，并且我们的问题也与人类创建的问题相当。我们还创建并发布了一个包含所有创建的数据集和评估问题的界面，因此可以跟进我们的工作。 本文提出了一种基于句法分析和机器学习的自动问答生成框架，旨在从无结构文本中生成事实性问题。 Miroslav Blšták,Viera Rozinajová cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Markus Anders
title: SAT Preprocessors and Symmetry
title_zh: SAT 预处理器和对称性
abstract: Exploitation of symmetries is an indispensable approach to solve certain classes of difficult SAT instances. Numerous techniques for the use of symmetry in SAT have evolved over the past few decades. But no matter how symmetries are used precisely, they have to be detected first. We investigate how to detect more symmetry, faster. The initial idea is to reap the benefits of SAT preprocessing for symmetry detection. As it turns out, applying an off-the-shelf preprocessor before handling symmetry runs into problems: the preprocessor can haphazardly remove symmetry from formulas, severely impeding symmetry exploitation. Our main contribution is a theoretical framework that captures the relationship of SAT preprocessing techniques and symmetry. Based on this, we create a symmetry-aware preprocessor that can be applied safely before handling symmetry. We then demonstrate that applying the preprocessor does not only substantially decrease symmetry detection and breaking times, but also uncovers hidden symmetry not detectable in the original instances. Overall, we depart the conventional view of treating symmetry detection as a black-box, presenting a new application-specific approach to symmetry detection in SAT.
summary: Exploitation of symmetries is an indispensable approach to solve certain classes of difficult SAT instances. Numerous techniques for the use of symmetry in SAT have evolved over the past few decades. But no matter how symmetries are used precisely, they have to be detected first. We investigate how to detect more symmetry, faster. The initial idea is to reap the benefits of SAT preprocessing for symmetry detection. As it turns out, applying an off-the-shelf preprocessor before handling symmetry runs into problems: the preprocessor can haphazardly remove symmetry from formulas, severely impeding symmetry exploitation. Our main contribution is a theoretical framework that captures the relationship of SAT preprocessing techniques and symmetry. Based on this, we create a symmetry-aware preprocessor that can be applied safely before handling symmetry. We then demonstrate that applying the preprocessor does not only substantially decrease symmetry detection and breaking times, but also uncovers hidden symmetry not detectable in the original instances. Overall, we depart the conventional view of treating symmetry detection as a black-box, presenting a new application-specific approach to symmetry detection in SAT.
abstract_zh: 利用对称性是解决某些类别的困难 SAT 实例的不可或缺的方法。在过去的几十年里，在 SAT 中使用对称性的许多技术已经发展起来。但无论如何精确地使用对称性，都必须首先检测它们。我们研究如何更快地检测更多的对称性。最初的想法是利用 SAT 预处理对对称性检测的好处。事实证明，在处理对称性之前应用现成的预处理器会遇到问题：预处理器可能会随意从公式中删除对称性，严重阻碍对称性的利用。我们的主要贡献是一个理论框架，它捕捉了 SAT 预处理技术和对称性之间的关系。基于此，我们创建了一个对称感知预处理器，可以在处理对称性之前安全地应用它。然后，我们证明应用预处理器不仅大大减少了对称性检测和破坏时间，而且还揭示了原始实例中无法检测到的隐藏对称性。总的来说，我们打破了将对称检测视为黑匣子的传统观点，提出了一种新的针对 SAT 对称检测的特定应用方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过改进SAT预处理技术以更高效地检测和利用对称性，提出了一种对称感知预处理器。
AI.motivation: 现有SAT预处理器可能破坏公式中的对称性，导致对称性利用失效，需开发能安全保留甚至发现隐藏对称性的预处理方法。
AI.method: 构建理论框架分析预处理与对称性的关系，设计对称感知预处理器，在预处理阶段避免对称性丢失并挖掘隐藏对称性。
AI.result: 预处理器显著降低对称性检测与打破时间，成功发现原始实例中未被检测到的隐藏对称性。
AI.conclusion: 突破传统将对称性检测视为黑盒的局限，提出针对SAT问题的对称性检测新方法，提升求解效率。

authors_text: Yang Li,Tatsuya Harada
title: Non-rigid Point Cloud Registration with Neural Deformation Pyramid
title_zh: 使用神经变形金字塔的非刚性点云配准
abstract: Non-rigid point cloud registration is a key component in many computer vision and computer graphics applications. The high complexity of the unknown non-rigid motion make this task a challenging problem. In this paper, we break down this problem via hierarchical motion decomposition. Our method called Neural Deformation Pyramid (NDP) represents non-rigid motion using a pyramid architecture. Each pyramid level, denoted by a Multi-Layer Perception (MLP), takes as input a sinusoidally encoded 3D point and outputs its motion increments from the previous level. The sinusoidal function starts with a low input frequency and gradually increases when the pyramid level goes down. This allows a multi-level rigid to nonrigid motion decomposition and also speeds up the solving by 50 times compared to the existing MLP-based approach. Our method achieves advanced partialto-partial non-rigid point cloud registration results on the 4DMatch/4DLoMatch benchmark under both no-learned and supervised settings.
summary: Non-rigid point cloud registration is a key component in many computer vision and computer graphics applications. The high complexity of the unknown non-rigid motion make this task a challenging problem. In this paper, we break down this problem via hierarchical motion decomposition. Our method called Neural Deformation Pyramid (NDP) represents non-rigid motion using a pyramid architecture. Each pyramid level, denoted by a Multi-Layer Perception (MLP), takes as input a sinusoidally encoded 3D point and outputs its motion increments from the previous level. The sinusoidal function starts with a low input frequency and gradually increases when the pyramid level goes down. This allows a multi-level rigid to nonrigid motion decomposition and also speeds up the solving by 50 times compared to the existing MLP-based approach. Our method achieves advanced partialto-partial non-rigid point cloud registration results on the 4DMatch/4DLoMatch benchmark under both no-learned and supervised settings.
abstract_zh: 非刚性点云配准是许多计算机视觉和计算机图形应用中的关键组成部分。未知非刚性运动的高度复杂性使该任务成为一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们通过分层运动分解来解决这个问题。我们的方法称为神经变形金字塔（NDP），使用金字塔架构表示非刚性运动。每个金字塔级别由多层感知 (MLP) 表示，将正弦编码的 3D 点作为输入，并输出其相对于前一级别的运动增量。正弦函数从较低的输入频率开始，并随着金字塔级别下降而逐渐增加。这允许多级刚性到非刚性运动分解，并且与现有的基于 MLP 的方法相比，求解速度提高了 50 倍。我们的方法在无学习和监督设置下在 4DMatch/4DLoMatch 基准上实现了先进的部分到部分非刚性点云配准结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经变形金字塔（NDP）的层次化方法，用于解决非刚性点云配准问题。
AI.motivation: 非刚性点云配准因未知的复杂运动而具有挑战性，现有方法在效率和效果上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过金字塔架构分层分解运动，每层使用多层感知机（MLP）处理正弦编码的3D点，输出相对于上一层的运动增量，频率随金字塔层级降低逐渐增加。
AI.result: 在4DMatch/4DLoMatch基准测试中，无论有无监督设置，该方法均达到先进的部分到部分非刚性点云配准效果，并比现有MLP方法加速50倍。
AI.conclusion: NDP通过层次化运动分解和正弦编码有效提升了非刚性配准的效率与精度，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经变形金字塔（NDP）的层次化方法，用于解决非刚性点云配准问题。
ai_content.motivation: 非刚性点云配准因未知的复杂运动而具有挑战性，现有方法在效率和效果上存在不足。
ai_content.method: 通过金字塔架构分层分解运动，每层使用多层感知机（MLP）处理正弦编码的3D点，输出相对于上一层的运动增量，频率随金字塔层级降低逐渐增加。
ai_content.result: 在4DMatch/4DLoMatch基准测试中，无论有无监督设置，该方法均达到先进的部分到部分非刚性点云配准效果，并比现有MLP方法加速50倍。
ai_content.conclusion: NDP通过层次化运动分解和正弦编码有效提升了非刚性配准的效率与精度，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Non-rigid Point Cloud Registration with Neural Deformation Pyramid 使用神经变形金字塔的非刚性点云配准 Non-rigid point cloud registration is a key component in many computer vision and computer graphics applications. The high complexity of the unknown non-rigid motion make this task a challenging problem. In this paper, we break down this problem via hierarchical motion decomposition. Our method called Neural Deformation Pyramid (NDP) represents non-rigid motion using a pyramid architecture. Each pyramid level, denoted by a Multi-Layer Perception (MLP), takes as input a sinusoidally encoded 3D point and outputs its motion increments from the previous level. The sinusoidal function starts with a low input frequency and gradually increases when the pyramid level goes down. This allows a multi-level rigid to nonrigid motion decomposition and also speeds up the solving by 50 times compared to the existing MLP-based approach. Our method achieves advanced partialto-partial non-rigid point cloud registration results on the 4DMatch/4DLoMatch benchmark under both no-learned and supervised settings. 非刚性点云配准是许多计算机视觉和计算机图形应用中的关键组成部分。未知非刚性运动的高度复杂性使该任务成为一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们通过分层运动分解来解决这个问题。我们的方法称为神经变形金字塔（NDP），使用金字塔架构表示非刚性运动。每个金字塔级别由多层感知 (MLP) 表示，将正弦编码的 3D 点作为输入，并输出其相对于前一级别的运动增量。正弦函数从较低的输入频率开始，并随着金字塔级别下降而逐渐增加。这允许多级刚性到非刚性运动分解，并且与现有的基于 MLP 的方法相比，求解速度提高了 50 倍。我们的方法在无学习和监督设置下在 4DMatch/4DLoMatch 基准上实现了先进的部分到部分非刚性点云配准结果。 本文提出了一种名为神经变形金字塔（NDP）的层次化方法，用于解决非刚性点云配准问题。 Yang Li,Tatsuya Harada cs.CV

authors_text: Bei Zhou,Søren Riis
title: Impartial Games: A Challenge for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 公正博弈：强化学习的挑战
abstract: AlphaZero-style reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have achieved superhuman performance in many complex board games such as Chess, Shogi, and Go. However, we showcase that these algorithms encounter significant and fundamental challenges when applied to impartial games, a class where players share game pieces and optimal strategy often relies on abstract mathematical principles. Specifically, we utilise the game of Nim as a concrete and illustrative case study to reveal critical limitations of AlphaZero-style and similar self-play RL algorithms. We introduce a novel conceptual framework distinguishing between champion and expert mastery to evaluate RL agent performance. Our findings reveal that while AlphaZero-style agents can achieve champion-level play on very small Nim boards, their learning progression severely degrades as the board size increases. This difficulty stems not merely from complex data distributions or noisy labels, but from a deeper representational bottleneck: the inherent struggle of generic neural networks to implicitly learn abstract, non-associative functions like parity, which are crucial for optimal play in impartial games. This limitation causes a critical breakdown in the positive feedback loop essential for self-play RL, preventing effective learning beyond rote memorisation of frequently observed states. These results align with broader concerns regarding AlphaZero-style algorithms' vulnerability to adversarial attacks, highlighting their inability to truly master all legal game states. Our work underscores that simple hyperparameter adjustments are insufficient to overcome these challenges, establishing a crucial foundation for the development of fundamentally novel algorithmic approaches, potentially involving neuro-symbolic or meta-learning paradigms, to bridge the gap towards true expert-level AI in combinatorial games.
summary: AlphaZero-style reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have achieved superhuman performance in many complex board games such as Chess, Shogi, and Go. However, we showcase that these algorithms encounter significant and fundamental challenges when applied to impartial games, a class where players share game pieces and optimal strategy often relies on abstract mathematical principles. Specifically, we utilise the game of Nim as a concrete and illustrative case study to reveal critical limitations of AlphaZero-style and similar self-play RL algorithms. We introduce a novel conceptual framework distinguishing between champion and expert mastery to evaluate RL agent performance. Our findings reveal that while AlphaZero-style agents can achieve champion-level play on very small Nim boards, their learning progression severely degrades as the board size increases. This difficulty stems not merely from complex data distributions or noisy labels, but from a deeper representational bottleneck: the inherent struggle of generic neural networks to implicitly learn abstract, non-associative functions like parity, which are crucial for optimal play in impartial games. This limitation causes a critical breakdown in the positive feedback loop essential for self-play RL, preventing effective learning beyond rote memorisation of frequently observed states. These results align with broader concerns regarding AlphaZero-style algorithms' vulnerability to adversarial attacks, highlighting their inability to truly master all legal game states. Our work underscores that simple hyperparameter adjustments are insufficient to overcome these challenges, establishing a crucial foundation for the development of fundamentally novel algorithmic approaches, potentially involving neuro-symbolic or meta-learning paradigms, to bridge the gap towards true expert-level AI in combinatorial games.
abstract_zh: AlphaZero 风格的强化学习 (RL) 算法在许多复杂的棋盘游戏（例如国际象棋、将棋和围棋）中取得了超人的表现。然而，我们展示了这些算法在应用于公平游戏时遇到了重大和根本的挑战，在公平游戏中，玩家共享游戏片段，而最佳策略通常依赖于抽象的数学原理。具体来说，我们利用 Nim 游戏作为具体和说明性的案例研究来揭示 AlphaZero 风格和类似的自我对弈 RL 算法的关键局限性。我们引入了一种新颖的概念框架，区分冠军和专家掌握程度，以评估 RL 代理的性能。我们的研究结果表明，虽然 AlphaZero 风格的智能体可以在非常小的 Nim 棋盘上实现冠军级别的游戏，但随着棋盘尺寸的增加，它们的学习进度会严重下降。这种困难不仅源于复杂的数据分布或嘈杂的标签，还源于更深层次的表征瓶颈：通用神经网络隐式学习奇偶性等抽象非关联函数的固有斗争，这对于公平游戏中的最佳游戏至关重要。这种限制会导致自我对弈强化学习所必需的正反馈循环严重崩溃，从而阻碍了除了死记硬背频繁观察到的状态之外的有效学习。这些结果与人们对 AlphaZero 式算法易受对抗性攻击的脆弱性的更广泛担忧相一致，突显出它们无法真正掌握所有合法的游戏状态。我们的工作强调，简单的超参数调整不足以克服这些挑战，为开发根本性新颖的算法方法奠定了重要的基础，可能涉及神经符号或元学习范式，以缩小组合游戏中真正专家级人工智能的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文研究AlphaZero类强化学习算法在公平游戏中的挑战，通过尼姆游戏案例揭示其局限性，并提出新的算法方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管AlphaZero在围棋等复杂游戏中成功，但公平游戏依赖抽象数学原理，现有算法难以应对，需探索其根本限制及解决方案。
AI.method: 以尼姆游戏为案例，构建冠军与专家掌握的评估框架，分析算法在不同规模棋盘上的表现，探讨神经网络表示瓶颈。
AI.result: AlphaZero类算法在小规模尼姆棋盘表现优异，但随规模增大性能骤降，因无法学习奇偶性等抽象函数，导致自玩正反馈失效。
AI.conclusion: 超参数调整无效，需神经符号或元学习等新范式突破现有算法限制，实现公平游戏的专家级AI。

authors_text: Linhui Dai,Hong Liu,Hao Tang,Zhiwei Wu,Pinhao Song
title: AO2-DETR: Arbitrary-Oriented Object Detection Transformer
title_zh: AO2-DETR：任意方向的物体检测变压器
abstract: Arbitrary-oriented object detection (AOOD) is a challenging task to detect objects in the wild with arbitrary orientations and cluttered arrangements. Existing approaches are mainly based on anchor-based boxes or dense points, which rely on complicated hand-designed processing steps and inductive bias, such as anchor generation, transformation, and non-maximum suppression reasoning. Recently, the emerging transformer-based approaches view object detection as a direct set prediction problem that effectively removes the need for hand-designed components and inductive biases. In this paper, we propose an Arbitrary-Oriented Object DEtection TRansformer framework, termed AO2-DETR, which comprises three dedicated components. More precisely, an oriented proposal generation mechanism is proposed to explicitly generate oriented proposals, which provides better positional priors for pooling features to modulate the cross-attention in the transformer decoder. An adaptive oriented proposal refinement module is introduced to extract rotation-invariant region features and eliminate the misalignment between region features and objects. And a rotation-aware set matching loss is used to ensure the one-to-one matching process for direct set prediction without duplicate predictions. Our method considerably simplifies the overall pipeline and presents a new AOOD paradigm. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging datasets show that our method achieves superior performance on the AOOD task.
summary: Arbitrary-oriented object detection (AOOD) is a challenging task to detect objects in the wild with arbitrary orientations and cluttered arrangements. Existing approaches are mainly based on anchor-based boxes or dense points, which rely on complicated hand-designed processing steps and inductive bias, such as anchor generation, transformation, and non-maximum suppression reasoning. Recently, the emerging transformer-based approaches view object detection as a direct set prediction problem that effectively removes the need for hand-designed components and inductive biases. In this paper, we propose an Arbitrary-Oriented Object DEtection TRansformer framework, termed AO2-DETR, which comprises three dedicated components. More precisely, an oriented proposal generation mechanism is proposed to explicitly generate oriented proposals, which provides better positional priors for pooling features to modulate the cross-attention in the transformer decoder. An adaptive oriented proposal refinement module is introduced to extract rotation-invariant region features and eliminate the misalignment between region features and objects. And a rotation-aware set matching loss is used to ensure the one-to-one matching process for direct set prediction without duplicate predictions. Our method considerably simplifies the overall pipeline and presents a new AOOD paradigm. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging datasets show that our method achieves superior performance on the AOOD task.
abstract_zh: 任意方向的物体检测（AOOD）是一项具有挑战性的任务，用于检测野外任意方向和杂乱排列的物体。现有的方法主要基于基于锚点的框或密集点，它们依赖于复杂的手工设计的处理步骤和归纳偏差，例如锚点生成、变换和非极大值抑制推理。最近，新兴的基于变压器的方法将对象检测视为直接集合预测问题，有效地消除了对手工设计组件和感应偏差的需要。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向任意的对象检测 TRansformer 框架，称为 AO2-DETR，它包含三个专用组件。更准确地说，提出了一种定向提案生成机制来显式地生成定向提案，这为池化特征提供了更好的位置先验，以调节变压器解码器中的交叉注意力。引入自适应导向的提议细化模块来提取旋转不变的区域特征并消除区域特征和对象之间的不对齐。并且使用旋转感知的集合匹配损失来确保直接集合预测的一对一匹配过程，而不会出现重复预测。我们的方法大大简化了整个流程并提出了新的 AOOD 范例。对几个具有挑战性的数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法在 AOOD 任务上取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的任意方向目标检测框架AO2-DETR，用于解决复杂场景下任意方向目标检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖锚框或密集点，需复杂的手工设计步骤（如锚生成、非极大值抑制），而Transformer方法可直接预测集合，减少人工设计组件。
AI.method: 提出三个核心模块：定向建议生成机制、自适应定向精修模块及旋转感知集合匹配损失，以生成定向建议、提取旋转不变特征并确保精准匹配。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的数据集上实验表明，该方法在任意方向目标检测任务中取得优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: AO2-DETR通过简化流程并引入旋转感知机制，为任意方向目标检测提供了新的范式，验证了其有效性。

search_text: AO2-DETR: Arbitrary-Oriented Object Detection Transformer AO2-DETR：任意方向的物体检测变压器 Arbitrary-oriented object detection (AOOD) is a challenging task to detect objects in the wild with arbitrary orientations and cluttered arrangements. Existing approaches are mainly based on anchor-based boxes or dense points, which rely on complicated hand-designed processing steps and inductive bias, such as anchor generation, transformation, and non-maximum suppression reasoning. Recently, the emerging transformer-based approaches view object detection as a direct set prediction problem that effectively removes the need for hand-designed components and inductive biases. In this paper, we propose an Arbitrary-Oriented Object DEtection TRansformer framework, termed AO2-DETR, which comprises three dedicated components. More precisely, an oriented proposal generation mechanism is proposed to explicitly generate oriented proposals, which provides better positional priors for pooling features to modulate the cross-attention in the transformer decoder. An adaptive oriented proposal refinement module is introduced to extract rotation-invariant region features and eliminate the misalignment between region features and objects. And a rotation-aware set matching loss is used to ensure the one-to-one matching process for direct set prediction without duplicate predictions. Our method considerably simplifies the overall pipeline and presents a new AOOD paradigm. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging datasets show that our method achieves superior performance on the AOOD task. 任意方向的物体检测（AOOD）是一项具有挑战性的任务，用于检测野外任意方向和杂乱排列的物体。现有的方法主要基于基于锚点的框或密集点，它们依赖于复杂的手工设计的处理步骤和归纳偏差，例如锚点生成、变换和非极大值抑制推理。最近，新兴的基于变压器的方法将对象检测视为直接集合预测问题，有效地消除了对手工设计组件和感应偏差的需要。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向任意的对象检测 TRansformer 框架，称为 AO2-DETR，它包含三个专用组件。更准确地说，提出了一种定向提案生成机制来显式地生成定向提案，这为池化特征提供了更好的位置先验，以调节变压器解码器中的交叉注意力。引入自适应导向的提议细化模块来提取旋转不变的区域特征并消除区域特征和对象之间的不对齐。并且使用旋转感知的集合匹配损失来确保直接集合预测的一对一匹配过程，而不会出现重复预测。我们的方法大大简化了整个流程并提出了新的 AOOD 范例。对几个具有挑战性的数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法在 AOOD 任务上取得了优异的性能。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的任意方向目标检测框架AO2-DETR，用于解决复杂场景下任意方向目标检测的挑战。 Linhui Dai,Hong Liu,Hao Tang,Zhiwei Wu,Pinhao Song cs.CV

authors_text: Shuyu Yin,Tao Luo,Peilin Liu,Zhi-Qin John Xu
title: An Experimental Comparison Between Temporal Difference and Residual Gradient with Neural Network Approximation
title_zh: 神经网络逼近时间差分与残差梯度的实验比较
abstract: Gradient descent or its variants are popular in training neural networks. However, in deep Q-learning with neural network approximation, a type of reinforcement learning, gradient descent (also known as Residual Gradient (RG)) is barely used to solve Bellman residual minimization problem. On the contrary, Temporal Difference (TD), an incomplete gradient descent method prevails. In this work, we perform extensive experiments to show that TD outperforms RG, that is, when the training leads to a small Bellman residual error, the solution found by TD has a better policy and is more robust against the perturbation of neural network parameters. We further use experiments to reveal a key difference between reinforcement learning and supervised learning, that is, a small Bellman residual error can correspond to a bad policy in reinforcement learning while the test loss function in supervised learning is a standard index to indicate the performance. We also empirically examine that the missing term in TD is a key reason why RG performs badly. Our work shows that the performance of a deep Q-learning solution is closely related to the training dynamics and how an incomplete gradient descent method can find a good policy is interesting for future study.
summary: Gradient descent or its variants are popular in training neural networks. However, in deep Q-learning with neural network approximation, a type of reinforcement learning, gradient descent (also known as Residual Gradient (RG)) is barely used to solve Bellman residual minimization problem. On the contrary, Temporal Difference (TD), an incomplete gradient descent method prevails. In this work, we perform extensive experiments to show that TD outperforms RG, that is, when the training leads to a small Bellman residual error, the solution found by TD has a better policy and is more robust against the perturbation of neural network parameters. We further use experiments to reveal a key difference between reinforcement learning and supervised learning, that is, a small Bellman residual error can correspond to a bad policy in reinforcement learning while the test loss function in supervised learning is a standard index to indicate the performance. We also empirically examine that the missing term in TD is a key reason why RG performs badly. Our work shows that the performance of a deep Q-learning solution is closely related to the training dynamics and how an incomplete gradient descent method can find a good policy is interesting for future study.
abstract_zh: 梯度下降或其变体在训练神经网络中很流行。然而，在采用神经网络逼近的深度 Q 学习（一种强化学习）中，梯度下降（也称为残差梯度（RG））很少用于解决贝尔曼残差最小化问题。相反，时间差异（TD），一种不完全梯度下降方法盛行。在这项工作中，我们进行了大量的实验来证明 TD 优于 RG，即当训练导致贝尔曼残差较小时，TD 找到的解决方案具有更好的策略，并且对神经网络参数的扰动具有更强的鲁棒性。我们进一步通过实验揭示了强化学习和监督学习之间的一个关键区别，即强化学习中小的贝尔曼残差可以对应于不良策略，而监督学习中的测试损失函数是指示性能的标准指标。我们还凭经验检验了 TD 中缺失的项是 RG 表现不佳的关键原因。我们的工作表明，深度 Q 学习解决方案的性能与训练动态密切相关，并且不完全梯度下降方法如何找到好的策略对于未来的研究很有趣。

AI.tldr: 比较时间差分（TD）与残差梯度（RG）在神经网络逼近下的深度Q学习性能
AI.motivation: 探讨为何在深度Q学习中TD优于RG，并揭示强化学习与监督学习的关键差异
AI.method: 通过大量实验对比TD和RG在Bellman残差误差下的性能，分析政策优劣及鲁棒性，并检验TD缺失项的影响
AI.result: TD在减小Bellman残差时表现优于RG，政策更优且鲁棒，揭示RL中残差误差与政策性能的非直接关系
AI.conclusion: 深度Q学习的性能与训练动态密切相关，不完整梯度方法的有效性需进一步研究

authors_text: Tim Lackorzynski,Max Ostermann,Stefan Köpsell,Hermann Härtig
title: A Case for Practical Configuration Management Using Hardware-based Security Tokens
title_zh: 使用基于硬件的安全令牌进行实际配置管理的案例
abstract: Future industrial networks will consist of a complex mixture of new and legacy components, while new use cases and applications envisioned by Industry 4.0 will demand increased flexibility and dynamics from these networks. Industrial security gateways will become an important building block to tackle new security requirements demanded by these changes. Their introduction will further increase the already high complexity of these networks, demanding more efforts in properly and securely configuring them. Yet, past research showed, that most operators of industrial networks are already today unable to configure industrial networks in a secure fashion. Therefore, we propose a scheme that allows factory operators to configure security gateways in an easy and practical way that is also understandable for staff not trained in the security domain. We employ hardware security tokens that allow to reduce every day configuration to one physical interaction. Our results show the practical feasibility of our proposed scheme and that it does not reduce the security level of industrial security gateways in any way.
summary: Future industrial networks will consist of a complex mixture of new and legacy components, while new use cases and applications envisioned by Industry 4.0 will demand increased flexibility and dynamics from these networks. Industrial security gateways will become an important building block to tackle new security requirements demanded by these changes. Their introduction will further increase the already high complexity of these networks, demanding more efforts in properly and securely configuring them. Yet, past research showed, that most operators of industrial networks are already today unable to configure industrial networks in a secure fashion. Therefore, we propose a scheme that allows factory operators to configure security gateways in an easy and practical way that is also understandable for staff not trained in the security domain. We employ hardware security tokens that allow to reduce every day configuration to one physical interaction. Our results show the practical feasibility of our proposed scheme and that it does not reduce the security level of industrial security gateways in any way.
abstract_zh: 未来的工业网络将由新旧组件的复杂组合组成，而工业 4.0 设想的新用例和应用将要求这些网络提高灵活性和动态性。工业安全网关将成为满足这些变化所需的新安全要求的重要组成部分。它们的引入将进一步增加这些网络本已很高的复杂性，需要付出更多努力来正确、安全地配置它们。然而，过去的研究表明，大多数工业网络运营商目前已经无法以安全的方式配置工业网络。因此，我们提出了一种方案，允许工厂操作员以简单实用的方式配置安全网关，并且对于未接受过安全领域培训的员工来说也可以理解。我们采用硬件安全令牌，可以将日常配置减少为一次物理交互。我们的结果表明了我们提出的方案的实际可行性，并且它不会以任何方式降低工业安全网关的安全级别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于硬件安全令牌的实用配置管理方案，旨在简化工业安全网关的配置过程，同时保持其安全级别。
AI.motivation: 工业网络日益复杂且需应对Industry 4.0的新需求，但现有操作员难以安全配置网络，亟需一种简单且易懂的配置方法。
AI.method: 通过引入硬件安全令牌，将日常配置操作简化为一次物理交互，降低配置复杂性并确保安全性。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了该方案的实用性，证明其不会降低工业安全网关的安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为工业网络提供了可行的配置管理方法，在保证安全的同时提升了操作便捷性。

authors_text: Tianyi Ko,Koichi Nishiwaki,Koji Terada,Yusuke Tanaka,Shun Mitsumata,Ryuichi Katagiri,Taketo Junko,Naoshi Horiba,Hideyoshi Igata,Kazue Mizuno
title: Development of a Stereo-Vision Based High-Throughput Robotic System for Mouse Tail Vein Injection
title_zh: 基于立体视觉的小鼠尾静脉注射高通量机器人系统的开发
comment: accepted to ICRA2022 (7 pages, 11 figures, 2 tables)
comments: accepted to ICRA2022 (7 pages, 11 figures, 2 tables)
abstract: In this paper, we present a robotic device for mouse tail vein injection. We propose a mouse holding mechanism to realize vein injection without anesthetizing the mouse, which consists of a tourniquet, vacuum port, and adaptive tail-end fixture. The position of the target vein in 3D space is reconstructed from a high-resolution stereo vision. The vein is detected by a simple but robust vein line detector. Thanks to the proposed two-staged calibration process, the total time for the injection process is limited to 1.5 minutes, despite that the position of needle and tail vein varies for each trial. We performed an injection experiment targeting 40 mice and succeeded to inject saline to 37 of them, resulting 92.5% success ratio.
summary: In this paper, we present a robotic device for mouse tail vein injection. We propose a mouse holding mechanism to realize vein injection without anesthetizing the mouse, which consists of a tourniquet, vacuum port, and adaptive tail-end fixture. The position of the target vein in 3D space is reconstructed from a high-resolution stereo vision. The vein is detected by a simple but robust vein line detector. Thanks to the proposed two-staged calibration process, the total time for the injection process is limited to 1.5 minutes, despite that the position of needle and tail vein varies for each trial. We performed an injection experiment targeting 40 mice and succeeded to inject saline to 37 of them, resulting 92.5% success ratio.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于小鼠尾静脉注射的机器人装置。我们提出了一种无需麻醉小鼠即可实现静脉注射的鼠标固定机构，该机构由止血带、真空端口和自适应尾端夹具组成。目标静脉在 3D 空间中的位置是根据高分辨率立体视觉重建的。静脉由简单但坚固的静脉线检测器检测。由于所提出的两阶段校准过程，尽管每次试验中针头和尾静脉的位置各不相同，但注射过程的总时间被限制在 1.5 分钟。我们对40只小鼠进行了注射实验，成功给其中37只注射生理盐水，成功率为92.5%。

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于立体视觉的机器人系统，用于小鼠尾静脉注射，无需麻醉且成功率高达92.5%。
AI.motivation: 传统小鼠尾静脉注射需麻醉且操作复杂，影响实验效率与动物福利，需开发高效无创替代方案。
AI.method: 结合立体视觉重建静脉3D位置、自适应夹具固定尾部及两阶段校准技术，实现快速精准注射。
AI.result: 40只小鼠中37只成功注射（92.5%），单次注射时间缩短至1.5分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可高效完成无麻醉尾静脉注射，适用于高通量实验，具有临床与科研应用潜力。

search_text: Development of a Stereo-Vision Based High-Throughput Robotic System for Mouse Tail Vein Injection 基于立体视觉的小鼠尾静脉注射高通量机器人系统的开发 In this paper, we present a robotic device for mouse tail vein injection. We propose a mouse holding mechanism to realize vein injection without anesthetizing the mouse, which consists of a tourniquet, vacuum port, and adaptive tail-end fixture. The position of the target vein in 3D space is reconstructed from a high-resolution stereo vision. The vein is detected by a simple but robust vein line detector. Thanks to the proposed two-staged calibration process, the total time for the injection process is limited to 1.5 minutes, despite that the position of needle and tail vein varies for each trial. We performed an injection experiment targeting 40 mice and succeeded to inject saline to 37 of them, resulting 92.5% success ratio. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于小鼠尾静脉注射的机器人装置。我们提出了一种无需麻醉小鼠即可实现静脉注射的鼠标固定机构，该机构由止血带、真空端口和自适应尾端夹具组成。目标静脉在 3D 空间中的位置是根据高分辨率立体视觉重建的。静脉由简单但坚固的静脉线检测器检测。由于所提出的两阶段校准过程，尽管每次试验中针头和尾静脉的位置各不相同，但注射过程的总时间被限制在 1.5 分钟。我们对40只小鼠进行了注射实验，成功给其中37只注射生理盐水，成功率为92.5%。 开发了一种基于立体视觉的机器人系统，用于小鼠尾静脉注射，无需麻醉且成功率高达92.5%。 Tianyi Ko,Koichi Nishiwaki,Koji Terada,Yusuke Tanaka,Shun Mitsumata,Ryuichi Katagiri,Taketo Junko,Naoshi Horiba,Hideyoshi Igata,Kazue Mizuno cs.RO

authors_text: Andrea Gesmundo,Jeff Dean
title: An Evolutionary Approach to Dynamic Introduction of Tasks in Large-scale Multitask Learning Systems
title_zh: 大规模多任务学习系统中动态引入任务的进化方法
abstract: Multitask learning assumes that models capable of learning from multiple tasks can achieve better quality and efficiency via knowledge transfer, a key feature of human learning. Though, state of the art ML models rely on high customization for each task and leverage size and data scale rather than scaling the number of tasks. Also, continual learning, that adds the temporal aspect to multitask, is often focused to the study of common pitfalls such as catastrophic forgetting instead of being studied at a large scale as a critical component to build the next generation artificial intelligence.We propose an evolutionary method capable of generating large scale multitask models that support the dynamic addition of new tasks. The generated multitask models are sparsely activated and integrates a task-based routing that guarantees bounded compute cost and fewer added parameters per task as the model expands.The proposed method relies on a knowledge compartmentalization technique to achieve immunity against catastrophic forgetting and other common pitfalls such as gradient interference and negative transfer. We demonstrate empirically that the proposed method can jointly solve and achieve competitive results on 69public image classification tasks, for example improving the state of the art on a competitive benchmark such as cifar10 by achieving a 15% relative error reduction compared to the best model trained on public data.
summary: Multitask learning assumes that models capable of learning from multiple tasks can achieve better quality and efficiency via knowledge transfer, a key feature of human learning. Though, state of the art ML models rely on high customization for each task and leverage size and data scale rather than scaling the number of tasks. Also, continual learning, that adds the temporal aspect to multitask, is often focused to the study of common pitfalls such as catastrophic forgetting instead of being studied at a large scale as a critical component to build the next generation artificial intelligence.We propose an evolutionary method capable of generating large scale multitask models that support the dynamic addition of new tasks. The generated multitask models are sparsely activated and integrates a task-based routing that guarantees bounded compute cost and fewer added parameters per task as the model expands.The proposed method relies on a knowledge compartmentalization technique to achieve immunity against catastrophic forgetting and other common pitfalls such as gradient interference and negative transfer. We demonstrate empirically that the proposed method can jointly solve and achieve competitive results on 69public image classification tasks, for example improving the state of the art on a competitive benchmark such as cifar10 by achieving a 15% relative error reduction compared to the best model trained on public data.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习假设能够从多个任务中学习的模型可以通过知识迁移（人类学习的一个关键特征）实现更好的质量和效率。不过，最先进的 ML 模型依赖于每个任务的高度定制，并利用大小和数据规模，而不是扩展任务数量。此外，为多任务添加时间方面的持续学习通常侧重于研究灾难性遗忘等常见陷阱，而不是作为构建下一代人工智能的关键组成部分进行大规模研究。我们提出了一种能够生成支持动态添加新任务的大规模多任务模型的进化方法。生成的多任务模型是稀疏激活的，并集成了基于任务的路由，随着模型的扩展，保证了有限的计算成本和每个任务添加的参数较少。所提出的方法依赖于知识划分技术来实现对灾难性遗忘和其他常见陷阱（例如梯度干扰和负迁移）的免疫力。我们凭经验证明，所提出的方法可以在 69 个公共图像分类任务上联合解决并取得有竞争力的结果，例如，与在公共数据上训练的最佳模型相比，通过实现 15% 的相对误差减少，提高了 cifar10 等竞争基准的最新技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种进化方法，用于在大规模多任务学习系统中动态引入任务，通过知识分隔技术解决灾难性遗忘等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型依赖任务定制和数据规模而非任务数量扩展，持续学习研究多聚焦于局部问题而非大规模系统构建。
AI.method: 采用进化算法生成稀疏激活的多任务模型，结合基于任务的路由机制与知识分隔技术，实现计算成本控制和参数高效扩展。
AI.result: 在69个图像分类任务中取得竞争力结果，如CIFAR-10基准测试中相对误差降低15%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模动态多任务学习中的关键挑战，为下一代人工智能系统提供了可扩展的解决方案。
