authors_text: Ziquan Liu,Yi Xu,Yuanhong Xu,Qi Qian,Hao Li,Rong Jin,Xiangyang Ji,Antoni B. Chan
title: An Empirical Study on Distribution Shift Robustness From the Perspective of Pre-Training and Data Augmentation
title_zh: 从预训练和数据增强角度对分布平移鲁棒性的实证研究
abstract: The performance of machine learning models under distribution shift has been the focus of the community in recent years. Most of current methods have been proposed to improve the robustness to distribution shift from the algorithmic perspective, i.e., designing better training algorithms to help the generalization in shifted test distributions. This paper studies the distribution shift problem from the perspective of pre-training and data augmentation, two important factors in the practice of deep learning that have not been systematically investigated by existing work. By evaluating seven pre-trained models, including ResNets and ViT's with self-supervision and supervision mode, on five important distribution-shift datasets, from WILDS and DomainBed benchmarks, with five different learning algorithms, we provide the first comprehensive empirical study focusing on pre-training and data augmentation. With our empirical result obtained from 1,330 models, we provide the following main observations: 1) ERM combined with data augmentation can achieve state-of-the-art performance if we choose a proper pre-trained model respecting the data property; 2) specialized algorithms further improve the robustness on top of ERM when handling a specific type of distribution shift, e.g., GroupDRO for spurious correlation and CORAL for large-scale out-of-distribution data; 3) Comparing different pre-training modes, architectures and data sizes, we provide novel observations about pre-training on distribution shift, which sheds light on designing or selecting pre-training strategy for different kinds of distribution shifts. In summary, our empirical study provides a comprehensive baseline for a wide range of pre-training models fine-tuned with data augmentation, which potentially inspires research exploiting the power of pre-training and data augmentation in the future of distribution shift study.
summary: The performance of machine learning models under distribution shift has been the focus of the community in recent years. Most of current methods have been proposed to improve the robustness to distribution shift from the algorithmic perspective, i.e., designing better training algorithms to help the generalization in shifted test distributions. This paper studies the distribution shift problem from the perspective of pre-training and data augmentation, two important factors in the practice of deep learning that have not been systematically investigated by existing work. By evaluating seven pre-trained models, including ResNets and ViT's with self-supervision and supervision mode, on five important distribution-shift datasets, from WILDS and DomainBed benchmarks, with five different learning algorithms, we provide the first comprehensive empirical study focusing on pre-training and data augmentation. With our empirical result obtained from 1,330 models, we provide the following main observations: 1) ERM combined with data augmentation can achieve state-of-the-art performance if we choose a proper pre-trained model respecting the data property; 2) specialized algorithms further improve the robustness on top of ERM when handling a specific type of distribution shift, e.g., GroupDRO for spurious correlation and CORAL for large-scale out-of-distribution data; 3) Comparing different pre-training modes, architectures and data sizes, we provide novel observations about pre-training on distribution shift, which sheds light on designing or selecting pre-training strategy for different kinds of distribution shifts. In summary, our empirical study provides a comprehensive baseline for a wide range of pre-training models fine-tuned with data augmentation, which potentially inspires research exploiting the power of pre-training and data augmentation in the future of distribution shift study.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习模型在分布转移下的性能一直是社区关注的焦点。目前大多数方法都是从算法的角度来提高对分布偏移的鲁棒性，即设计更好的训练算法来帮助偏移测试分布的泛化。本文从预训练和数据增强的角度研究分布转移问题，这是深度学习实践中的两个重要因素，但现有工作尚未系统研究。通过使用五种不同的学习算法，在来自 WILDS 和 DomainBed 基准的五个重要的分布偏移数据集上评估七个预训练模型（包括具有自监督和监督模式的 ResNet 和 ViT），我们提供了第一个专注于预训练和数据增强的全面实证研究。根据我们从 1,330 个模型中获得的实证结果，我们提供了以下主要观察结果：1）如果我们选择尊重数据属性的适当预训练模型，则 ERM 与数据增强相结合可以实现最先进的性能； 2）专门的算法在处理特定类型的分布变化时，进一步提高了 ERM 之上的鲁棒性，例如用于虚假相关的 GroupDRO 和用于大规模分布外数据的 CORAL； 3）比较不同的预训练模式、架构和数据大小，我们提供了关于分布偏移预训练的新颖观察，这为设计或选择不同类型的分布偏移的预训练策略提供了启示。总之，我们的实证研究为通过数据增强进行微调的各种预训练模型提供了全面的基线，这可能会激发在未来分布转移研究中利用预训练和数据增强的力量的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文从预训练和数据增强的角度出发，通过大量实验系统研究了深度学习模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要从算法角度提升分布偏移鲁棒性，但预训练和数据增强这两个实践中的关键因素尚未被系统性探讨。
AI.method: 评估了七种预训练模型（含ResNet和ViT）在五个分布偏移数据集上的表现，结合五种学习算法进行对比实验，分析不同预训练模式、架构和数据规模的影响。
AI.result: 发现ERM结合数据增强可取得SOTA性能；特定算法（如GroupDRO、CORAL）能进一步提升特定类型偏移的鲁棒性；不同预训练策略对分布偏移表现存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究为预训练模型结合数据增强的分布偏移问题提供了全面基准，为未来研究预训练与数据增强的潜力应用指明了方向。

search_text: An Empirical Study on Distribution Shift Robustness From the Perspective of Pre-Training and Data Augmentation 从预训练和数据增强角度对分布平移鲁棒性的实证研究 The performance of machine learning models under distribution shift has been the focus of the community in recent years. Most of current methods have been proposed to improve the robustness to distribution shift from the algorithmic perspective, i.e., designing better training algorithms to help the generalization in shifted test distributions. This paper studies the distribution shift problem from the perspective of pre-training and data augmentation, two important factors in the practice of deep learning that have not been systematically investigated by existing work. By evaluating seven pre-trained models, including ResNets and ViT's with self-supervision and supervision mode, on five important distribution-shift datasets, from WILDS and DomainBed benchmarks, with five different learning algorithms, we provide the first comprehensive empirical study focusing on pre-training and data augmentation. With our empirical result obtained from 1,330 models, we provide the following main observations: 1) ERM combined with data augmentation can achieve state-of-the-art performance if we choose a proper pre-trained model respecting the data property; 2) specialized algorithms further improve the robustness on top of ERM when handling a specific type of distribution shift, e.g., GroupDRO for spurious correlation and CORAL for large-scale out-of-distribution data; 3) Comparing different pre-training modes, architectures and data sizes, we provide novel observations about pre-training on distribution shift, which sheds light on designing or selecting pre-training strategy for different kinds of distribution shifts. In summary, our empirical study provides a comprehensive baseline for a wide range of pre-training models fine-tuned with data augmentation, which potentially inspires research exploiting the power of pre-training and data augmentation in the future of distribution shift study. 近年来，机器学习模型在分布转移下的性能一直是社区关注的焦点。目前大多数方法都是从算法的角度来提高对分布偏移的鲁棒性，即设计更好的训练算法来帮助偏移测试分布的泛化。本文从预训练和数据增强的角度研究分布转移问题，这是深度学习实践中的两个重要因素，但现有工作尚未系统研究。通过使用五种不同的学习算法，在来自 WILDS 和 DomainBed 基准的五个重要的分布偏移数据集上评估七个预训练模型（包括具有自监督和监督模式的 ResNet 和 ViT），我们提供了第一个专注于预训练和数据增强的全面实证研究。根据我们从 1,330 个模型中获得的实证结果，我们提供了以下主要观察结果：1）如果我们选择尊重数据属性的适当预训练模型，则 ERM 与数据增强相结合可以实现最先进的性能； 2）专门的算法在处理特定类型的分布变化时，进一步提高了 ERM 之上的鲁棒性，例如用于虚假相关的 GroupDRO 和用于大规模分布外数据的 CORAL； 3）比较不同的预训练模式、架构和数据大小，我们提供了关于分布偏移预训练的新颖观察，这为设计或选择不同类型的分布偏移的预训练策略提供了启示。总之，我们的实证研究为通过数据增强进行微调的各种预训练模型提供了全面的基线，这可能会激发在未来分布转移研究中利用预训练和数据增强的力量的研究。 本文从预训练和数据增强的角度出发，通过大量实验系统研究了深度学习模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性问题。 Ziquan Liu,Yi Xu,Yuanhong Xu,Qi Qian,Hao Li,Rong Jin,Xiangyang Ji,Antoni B. Chan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaonan Gao,Sen Wu,Wenjun Zhou
title: NECA: Network-Embedded Deep Representation Learning for Categorical Data
title_zh: NECA：分类数据的网络嵌入式深度表示学习
abstract: We propose NECA, a deep representation learning method for categorical data. Built upon the foundations of network embedding and deep unsupervised representation learning, NECA deeply embeds the intrinsic relationship among attribute values and explicitly expresses data objects with numeric vector representations. Designed specifically for categorical data, NECA can support important downstream data mining tasks, such as clustering. Extensive experimental analysis demonstrated the effectiveness of NECA.
summary: We propose NECA, a deep representation learning method for categorical data. Built upon the foundations of network embedding and deep unsupervised representation learning, NECA deeply embeds the intrinsic relationship among attribute values and explicitly expresses data objects with numeric vector representations. Designed specifically for categorical data, NECA can support important downstream data mining tasks, such as clustering. Extensive experimental analysis demonstrated the effectiveness of NECA.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 NECA，一种用于分类数据的深度表示学习方法。 NECA 建立在网络嵌入和深度无监督表示学习的基础上，深度嵌入属性值之间的内在关系，并用数值向量表示显式地表达数据对象。 NECA 专为分类数据而设计，可以支持重要的下游数据挖掘任务，例如聚类。广泛的实验分析证明了 NECA 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出NECA方法，用于处理分类数据的深度表示学习，通过网络嵌入和深度无监督学习生成数值向量表示，支持聚类等任务
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效捕捉分类数据中属性值的内在关系，需更有效的表示学习方法支持下游任务
AI.method: 结合网络嵌入与深度无监督学习，深度嵌入属性值间关系，生成数值向量表示数据对象，专门设计用于分类数据
AI.result: 实验结果验证了NECA在分类数据表示学习中的有效性，支持聚类等下游任务
AI.conclusion: NECA为分类数据的表示学习提供了有效方法，实验验证其在多个任务中的有效性，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Sascha Saralajew,Ammar Shaker,Zhao Xu,Kiril Gashteovski,Bhushan Kotnis,Wiem Ben Rim,Jürgen Quittek,Carolin Lawrence
title: A Human-Centric Assessment Framework for AI
title_zh: 以人为本的人工智能评估框架
comment: Accepted as submission to ICML 2022 Workshop on Human-Machine Collaboration and Teaming
comments: Accepted as submission to ICML 2022 Workshop on Human-Machine Collaboration and Teaming
abstract: With the rise of AI systems in real-world applications comes the need for reliable and trustworthy AI. An essential aspect of this are explainable AI systems. However, there is no agreed standard on how explainable AI systems should be assessed. Inspired by the Turing test, we introduce a human-centric assessment framework where a leading domain expert accepts or rejects the solutions of an AI system and another domain expert. By comparing the acceptance rates of provided solutions, we can assess how the AI system performs compared to the domain expert, and whether the AI system's explanations (if provided) are human-understandable. This setup -- comparable to the Turing test -- can serve as a framework for a wide range of human-centric AI system assessments. We demonstrate this by presenting two instantiations: (1) an assessment that measures the classification accuracy of a system with the option to incorporate label uncertainties; (2) an assessment where the usefulness of provided explanations is determined in a human-centric manner.
summary: With the rise of AI systems in real-world applications comes the need for reliable and trustworthy AI. An essential aspect of this are explainable AI systems. However, there is no agreed standard on how explainable AI systems should be assessed. Inspired by the Turing test, we introduce a human-centric assessment framework where a leading domain expert accepts or rejects the solutions of an AI system and another domain expert. By comparing the acceptance rates of provided solutions, we can assess how the AI system performs compared to the domain expert, and whether the AI system's explanations (if provided) are human-understandable. This setup -- comparable to the Turing test -- can serve as a framework for a wide range of human-centric AI system assessments. We demonstrate this by presenting two instantiations: (1) an assessment that measures the classification accuracy of a system with the option to incorporate label uncertainties; (2) an assessment where the usefulness of provided explanations is determined in a human-centric manner.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能系统在现实世界应用中的兴起，人们需要可靠且值得信赖的人工智能。其中一个重要方面是可解释的人工智能系统。然而，对于如何评估可解释的人工智能系统，还没有达成一致的标准。受图灵测试的启发，我们引入了一个以人为中心的评估框架，其中一位领先的领域专家接受或拒绝人工智能系统和另一位领域专家的解决方案。通过比较所提供解决方案的接受率，我们可以评估人工智能系统与领域专家相比的表现，以及人工智能系统的解释（如果提供）是否是人类可以理解的。这种设置——相当于图灵测试——可以作为各种以人为中心的人工智能系统评估的框架。我们通过提供两个实例来证明这一点：（1）衡量系统分类准确性的评估，可以选择纳入标签不确定性； (2) 以以人为本的方式确定所提供解释的有用性的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以人为中心的AI系统评估框架，通过领域专家对比AI与人类解决方案的接受率，评估AI性能及解释的可理解性。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏统一标准评估可解释AI系统，需建立可靠、可信的评估方法以确保AI在实际应用中的有效性与透明度。
AI.method: 受图灵测试启发，设计双专家对比实验：领域专家评估AI与人类解决方案的接受率，并通过两种实例（分类准确性评估、解释有用性评估）验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 框架成功应用于分类任务准确率评估及解释有用性评估，证明其可量化AI性能与解释的可理解性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为AI系统的人机对比评估提供通用方法，有助于推动可解释、可信AI的发展。

authors_text: Zhora Gevorgyan
title: SIoU Loss: More Powerful Learning for Bounding Box Regression
title_zh: SIoU 损失：更强大的边界框回归学习
abstract: The effectiveness of Object Detection, one of the central problems in computer vision tasks, highly depends on the definition of the loss function - a measure of how accurately your ML model can predict the expected outcome. Conventional object detection loss functions depend on aggregation of metrics of bounding box regression such as the distance, overlap area and aspect ratio of the predicted and ground truth boxes (i.e. GIoU, CIoU, ICIoU etc). However, none of the methods proposed and used to date considers the direction of the mismatch between the desired ground box and the predicted, "experimental" box. This shortage results in slower and less effective convergence as the predicted box can "wander around" during the training process and eventually end up producing a worse model. In this paper a new loss function SIoU was suggested, where penalty metrics were redefined considering the angle of the vector between the desired regression. Applied to conventional Neural Networks and datasets it is shown that SIoU improves both the speed of training and the accuracy of the inference. The effectiveness of the proposed loss function was revealed in a number of simulations and tests.
summary: The effectiveness of Object Detection, one of the central problems in computer vision tasks, highly depends on the definition of the loss function - a measure of how accurately your ML model can predict the expected outcome. Conventional object detection loss functions depend on aggregation of metrics of bounding box regression such as the distance, overlap area and aspect ratio of the predicted and ground truth boxes (i.e. GIoU, CIoU, ICIoU etc). However, none of the methods proposed and used to date considers the direction of the mismatch between the desired ground box and the predicted, "experimental" box. This shortage results in slower and less effective convergence as the predicted box can "wander around" during the training process and eventually end up producing a worse model. In this paper a new loss function SIoU was suggested, where penalty metrics were redefined considering the angle of the vector between the desired regression. Applied to conventional Neural Networks and datasets it is shown that SIoU improves both the speed of training and the accuracy of the inference. The effectiveness of the proposed loss function was revealed in a number of simulations and tests.
abstract_zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉任务的核心问题之一，它的有效性在很大程度上取决于损失函数的定义，损失函数是衡量 ML 模型预测预期结果的准确度的指标。传统的目标检测损失函数取决于边界框回归指标的聚合，例如预测框和地面实况框的距离、重叠面积和纵横比（即 GIoU、CIoU、ICIoU 等）。然而，迄今为止提出和使用的方法都没有考虑期望的地面框和预测的“实验”框之间不匹配的方向。这种短缺会导致收敛速度变慢且效率降低，因为预测框可能在训练过程中“徘徊”并最终产生更糟糕的模型。在本文中，提出了一种新的损失函数 SIoU，其中考虑到所需回归之间的向量角度，重新定义了惩罚指标。应用于传统的神经网络和数据集表明 SIoU 提高了训练速度和推理的准确性。大量模拟和测试揭示了所提出的损失函数的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的损失函数SIoU，用于改进目标检测中的边界框回归任务。
AI.motivation: 传统损失函数（如GIoU、CIoU）未考虑预测框与真实框之间不匹配的方向，导致训练收敛速度慢且模型精度不足。
AI.method: 通过重新定义惩罚指标，引入预测框与真实框间向量的角度信息，构建新的SIoU损失函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，SIoU在常规神经网络和数据集上提升了训练速度和推理准确性。
AI.conclusion: SIoU通过考虑方向信息优化了边界框回归，验证了其在目标检测任务中的有效性。

search_text: SIoU Loss: More Powerful Learning for Bounding Box Regression SIoU 损失：更强大的边界框回归学习 The effectiveness of Object Detection, one of the central problems in computer vision tasks, highly depends on the definition of the loss function - a measure of how accurately your ML model can predict the expected outcome. Conventional object detection loss functions depend on aggregation of metrics of bounding box regression such as the distance, overlap area and aspect ratio of the predicted and ground truth boxes (i.e. GIoU, CIoU, ICIoU etc). However, none of the methods proposed and used to date considers the direction of the mismatch between the desired ground box and the predicted, "experimental" box. This shortage results in slower and less effective convergence as the predicted box can "wander around" during the training process and eventually end up producing a worse model. In this paper a new loss function SIoU was suggested, where penalty metrics were redefined considering the angle of the vector between the desired regression. Applied to conventional Neural Networks and datasets it is shown that SIoU improves both the speed of training and the accuracy of the inference. The effectiveness of the proposed loss function was revealed in a number of simulations and tests. 目标检测是计算机视觉任务的核心问题之一，它的有效性在很大程度上取决于损失函数的定义，损失函数是衡量 ML 模型预测预期结果的准确度的指标。传统的目标检测损失函数取决于边界框回归指标的聚合，例如预测框和地面实况框的距离、重叠面积和纵横比（即 GIoU、CIoU、ICIoU 等）。然而，迄今为止提出和使用的方法都没有考虑期望的地面框和预测的“实验”框之间不匹配的方向。这种短缺会导致收敛速度变慢且效率降低，因为预测框可能在训练过程中“徘徊”并最终产生更糟糕的模型。在本文中，提出了一种新的损失函数 SIoU，其中考虑到所需回归之间的向量角度，重新定义了惩罚指标。应用于传统的神经网络和数据集表明 SIoU 提高了训练速度和推理的准确性。大量模拟和测试揭示了所提出的损失函数的有效性。 本文提出了一种新的损失函数SIoU，用于改进目标检测中的边界框回归任务。 Zhora Gevorgyan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Daniel Cunnington,Mark Law,Jorge Lobo,Alessandra Russo
title: Neuro-Symbolic Learning of Answer Set Programs from Raw Data
title_zh: 从原始数据中学习答案集程序的神经符号
abstract: One of the ultimate goals of Artificial Intelligence is to assist humans in complex decision making. A promising direction for achieving this goal is Neuro-Symbolic AI, which aims to combine the interpretability of symbolic techniques with the ability of deep learning to learn from raw data. However, most current approaches require manually engineered symbolic knowledge, and where end-to-end training is considered, such approaches are either restricted to learning definite programs, or are restricted to training binary neural networks. In this paper, we introduce Neuro-Symbolic Inductive Learner (NSIL), an approach that trains a general neural network to extract latent concepts from raw data, whilst learning symbolic knowledge that maps latent concepts to target labels. The novelty of our approach is a method for biasing the learning of symbolic knowledge, based on the in-training performance of both neural and symbolic components. We evaluate NSIL on three problem domains of different complexity, including an NP-complete problem. Our results demonstrate that NSIL learns expressive knowledge, solves computationally complex problems, and achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of accuracy and data efficiency. Code and technical appendix: https://github.com/DanCunnington/NSIL
summary: One of the ultimate goals of Artificial Intelligence is to assist humans in complex decision making. A promising direction for achieving this goal is Neuro-Symbolic AI, which aims to combine the interpretability of symbolic techniques with the ability of deep learning to learn from raw data. However, most current approaches require manually engineered symbolic knowledge, and where end-to-end training is considered, such approaches are either restricted to learning definite programs, or are restricted to training binary neural networks. In this paper, we introduce Neuro-Symbolic Inductive Learner (NSIL), an approach that trains a general neural network to extract latent concepts from raw data, whilst learning symbolic knowledge that maps latent concepts to target labels. The novelty of our approach is a method for biasing the learning of symbolic knowledge, based on the in-training performance of both neural and symbolic components. We evaluate NSIL on three problem domains of different complexity, including an NP-complete problem. Our results demonstrate that NSIL learns expressive knowledge, solves computationally complex problems, and achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of accuracy and data efficiency. Code and technical appendix: https://github.com/DanCunnington/NSIL
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最终目标之一是协助人类做出复杂的决策。实现这一目标的一个有前途的方向是神经符号人工智能，其目标是将符号技术的可解释性与深度学习从原始数据中学习的能力结合起来。然而，当前的大多数方法都需要手动设计的符号知识，并且在考虑端到端训练的情况下，这些方法要么仅限于学习确定的程序，要么仅限于训练二元神经网络。在本文中，我们介绍了神经符号归纳学习器（NSIL），这是一种训练通用神经网络从原始数据中提取潜在概念的方法，同时学习将潜在概念映射到目标标签的符号知识。我们方法的新颖性是一种基于神经和符号组件的训练中性能来偏置符号知识学习的方法。我们在三个不同复杂度的问题域上评估 NSIL，包括 NP 完全问题。我们的结果表明，NSIL 可以学习表达性知识，解决计算复杂的问题，并在准确性和数据效率方面实现最先进的性能。代码和技术附录：https://github.com/DanCunnington/NSIL

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经符号归纳学习器（NSIL），通过结合神经网络与符号知识学习，从原始数据中提取潜在概念并生成答案集程序。
AI.motivation: 现有神经符号AI方法依赖人工设计的符号知识或局限于二值神经网络，难以实现端到端训练与复杂问题求解。
AI.method: 设计NSIL框架，利用神经网络提取数据潜在概念，同时通过训练性能动态调整符号知识学习过程，实现神经与符号组件的协同优化。
AI.result: 在三个不同复杂度的领域（含NP完全问题）测试中，NSIL展现出高准确性与数据效率，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: NSIL为神经符号AI提供了端到端学习新范式，在复杂决策任务中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Tianxiao Han,Qianqian Yang,Zhiguo Shi,Shibo He,Zhaoyang Zhang
title: Semantic-preserved Communication System for Highly Efficient Speech Transmission
title_zh: 用于高效语音传输的语义保留通信系统
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.03211
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.03211
abstract: Deep learning (DL) based semantic communication methods have been explored for the efficient transmission of images, text, and speech in recent years. In contrast to traditional wireless communication methods that focus on the transmission of abstract symbols, semantic communication approaches attempt to achieve better transmission efficiency by only sending the semantic-related information of the source data. In this paper, we consider semantic-oriented speech transmission which transmits only the semantic-relevant information over the channel for the speech recognition task, and a compact additional set of semantic-irrelevant information for the speech reconstruction task. We propose a novel end-to-end DL-based transceiver which extracts and encodes the semantic information from the input speech spectrums at the transmitter and outputs the corresponding transcriptions from the decoded semantic information at the receiver. For the speech to speech transmission, we further include a CTC alignment module that extracts a small number of additional semantic-irrelevant but speech-related information for the better reconstruction of the original speech signals at the receiver. The simulation results confirm that our proposed method outperforms current methods in terms of the accuracy of the predicted text for the speech to text transmission and the quality of the recovered speech signals for the speech to speech transmission, and significantly improves transmission efficiency. More specifically, the proposed method only sends 16% of the amount of the transmitted symbols required by the existing methods while achieving about 10% reduction in WER for the speech to text transmission. For the speech to speech transmission, it results in an even more remarkable improvement in terms of transmission efficiency with only 0.2% of the amount of the transmitted symbols required by the existing method.
summary: Deep learning (DL) based semantic communication methods have been explored for the efficient transmission of images, text, and speech in recent years. In contrast to traditional wireless communication methods that focus on the transmission of abstract symbols, semantic communication approaches attempt to achieve better transmission efficiency by only sending the semantic-related information of the source data. In this paper, we consider semantic-oriented speech transmission which transmits only the semantic-relevant information over the channel for the speech recognition task, and a compact additional set of semantic-irrelevant information for the speech reconstruction task. We propose a novel end-to-end DL-based transceiver which extracts and encodes the semantic information from the input speech spectrums at the transmitter and outputs the corresponding transcriptions from the decoded semantic information at the receiver. For the speech to speech transmission, we further include a CTC alignment module that extracts a small number of additional semantic-irrelevant but speech-related information for the better reconstruction of the original speech signals at the receiver. The simulation results confirm that our proposed method outperforms current methods in terms of the accuracy of the predicted text for the speech to text transmission and the quality of the recovered speech signals for the speech to speech transmission, and significantly improves transmission efficiency. More specifically, the proposed method only sends 16% of the amount of the transmitted symbols required by the existing methods while achieving about 10% reduction in WER for the speech to text transmission. For the speech to speech transmission, it results in an even more remarkable improvement in terms of transmission efficiency with only 0.2% of the amount of the transmitted symbols required by the existing method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习（DL）的语义通信方法被探索用于图像、文本和语音的高效传输。与专注于传输抽象符号的传统无线通信方法相比，语义通信方法试图通过仅发送源数据的语义相关信息来实现更好的传输效率。在本文中，我们考虑面向语义的语音传输，它仅在语音识别任务的信道上传输语义相关信息，以及用于语音重建任务的一组紧凑的附加语义无关信息。我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的端到端收发器，它在发送器处从输入语音频谱中提取和编码语义信息，并在接收器处从解码的语义信息输出相应的转录。对于语音到语音的传输，我们还包括一个 CTC 对齐模块，该模块提取少量额外的语义无关但与语音相关的信息，以便在接收器处更好地重建原始语音信号。仿真结果证实，我们提出的方法在语音到文本传输的预测文本的准确性和语音到语音传输的恢复语音信号的质量方面优于现有方法，并且显着提高了传输效率。更具体地，所提出的方法仅发送现有方法所需的传输符号量的16%，同时实现语音到文本传输的WER降低约10%。对于语音到语音的传输，其传输效率的提高更为显着，而传输符号量仅为现有方法的0.2％。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的语义保留通信系统，通过仅传输语音信号的语义相关信息和少量无关信息，实现高效语音传输。
AI.motivation: 传统无线通信方法聚焦于抽象符号传输，而语义通信通过传输语义信息提升效率。现有方法在语音传输中仍需大量符号，本文旨在进一步优化传输效率并保持语义准确性。
AI.method: 设计端到端深度学习收发机：发射端从语音频谱中提取并编码语义信息，接收端解码生成文本；针对语音重建任务，引入CTC对齐模块提取少量语音相关但语义无关的信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在语音到文本传输中仅需传输现有方法16%的符号量，词错误率降低10%；语音到语音传输仅需0.2%的符号量，传输效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离语义相关与无关信息，本文方法在保持语义准确性的同时大幅提升传输效率，验证了语义导向通信在语音传输中的有效性。

ai_content.motivation: 传统无线通信方法聚焦于抽象符号传输，而语义通信通过传输语义信息提升效率。现有方法在语音传输中仍需大量符号，本文旨在进一步优化传输效率并保持语义准确性。
ai_content.method: 设计端到端深度学习收发机：发射端从语音频谱中提取并编码语义信息，接收端解码生成文本；针对语音重建任务，引入CTC对齐模块提取少量语音相关但语义无关的信息。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在语音到文本传输中仅需传输现有方法16%的符号量，词错误率降低10%；语音到语音传输仅需0.2%的符号量，传输效率显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过分离语义相关与无关信息，本文方法在保持语义准确性的同时大幅提升传输效率，验证了语义导向通信在语音传输中的有效性。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的语义保留通信系统，通过仅传输语音信号的语义相关信息和少量无关信息，实现高效语音传输。

search_text: Semantic-preserved Communication System for Highly Efficient Speech Transmission 用于高效语音传输的语义保留通信系统 Deep learning (DL) based semantic communication methods have been explored for the efficient transmission of images, text, and speech in recent years. In contrast to traditional wireless communication methods that focus on the transmission of abstract symbols, semantic communication approaches attempt to achieve better transmission efficiency by only sending the semantic-related information of the source data. In this paper, we consider semantic-oriented speech transmission which transmits only the semantic-relevant information over the channel for the speech recognition task, and a compact additional set of semantic-irrelevant information for the speech reconstruction task. We propose a novel end-to-end DL-based transceiver which extracts and encodes the semantic information from the input speech spectrums at the transmitter and outputs the corresponding transcriptions from the decoded semantic information at the receiver. For the speech to speech transmission, we further include a CTC alignment module that extracts a small number of additional semantic-irrelevant but speech-related information for the better reconstruction of the original speech signals at the receiver. The simulation results confirm that our proposed method outperforms current methods in terms of the accuracy of the predicted text for the speech to text transmission and the quality of the recovered speech signals for the speech to speech transmission, and significantly improves transmission efficiency. More specifically, the proposed method only sends 16% of the amount of the transmitted symbols required by the existing methods while achieving about 10% reduction in WER for the speech to text transmission. For the speech to speech transmission, it results in an even more remarkable improvement in terms of transmission efficiency with only 0.2% of the amount of the transmitted symbols required by the existing method. 近年来，基于深度学习（DL）的语义通信方法被探索用于图像、文本和语音的高效传输。与专注于传输抽象符号的传统无线通信方法相比，语义通信方法试图通过仅发送源数据的语义相关信息来实现更好的传输效率。在本文中，我们考虑面向语义的语音传输，它仅在语音识别任务的信道上传输语义相关信息，以及用于语音重建任务的一组紧凑的附加语义无关信息。我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的端到端收发器，它在发送器处从输入语音频谱中提取和编码语义信息，并在接收器处从解码的语义信息输出相应的转录。对于语音到语音的传输，我们还包括一个 CTC 对齐模块，该模块提取少量额外的语义无关但与语音相关的信息，以便在接收器处更好地重建原始语音信号。仿真结果证实，我们提出的方法在语音到文本传输的预测文本的准确性和语音到语音传输的恢复语音信号的质量方面优于现有方法，并且显着提高了传输效率。更具体地，所提出的方法仅发送现有方法所需的传输符号量的16%，同时实现语音到文本传输的WER降低约10%。对于语音到语音的传输，其传输效率的提高更为显着，而传输符号量仅为现有方法的0.2％。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的语义保留通信系统，通过仅传输语音信号的语义相关信息和少量无关信息，实现高效语音传输。 Tianxiao Han,Qianqian Yang,Zhiguo Shi,Shibo He,Zhaoyang Zhang eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Emily Jensen,Maya Luster,Hansol Yoon,Brandon Pitts,Sriram Sankaranarayanan
title: Mathematical Models of Human Drivers Using Artificial Risk Fields
title_zh: 使用人工风险场的人类驾驶员数学模型
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, accepted to Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, accepted to Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference
abstract: In this paper, we use the concept of artificial risk fields to predict how human operators control a vehicle in response to upcoming road situations. A risk field assigns a non-negative risk measure to the state of the system in order to model how close that state is to violating a safety property, such as hitting an obstacle or exiting the road. Using risk fields, we construct a stochastic model of the operator that maps from states to likely actions. We demonstrate our approach on a driving task wherein human subjects are asked to drive a car inside a realistic driving simulator while avoiding obstacles placed on the road. We show that the most likely risk field given the driving data is obtained by solving a convex optimization problem. Next, we apply the inferred risk fields to generate distinct driving behaviors while comparing predicted trajectories against ground truth measurements. We observe that the risk fields are excellent at predicting future trajectory distributions with high prediction accuracy for up to twenty seconds prediction horizons. At the same time, we observe some challenges such as the inability to account for how drivers choose to accelerate/decelerate based on the road conditions.
summary: In this paper, we use the concept of artificial risk fields to predict how human operators control a vehicle in response to upcoming road situations. A risk field assigns a non-negative risk measure to the state of the system in order to model how close that state is to violating a safety property, such as hitting an obstacle or exiting the road. Using risk fields, we construct a stochastic model of the operator that maps from states to likely actions. We demonstrate our approach on a driving task wherein human subjects are asked to drive a car inside a realistic driving simulator while avoiding obstacles placed on the road. We show that the most likely risk field given the driving data is obtained by solving a convex optimization problem. Next, we apply the inferred risk fields to generate distinct driving behaviors while comparing predicted trajectories against ground truth measurements. We observe that the risk fields are excellent at predicting future trajectory distributions with high prediction accuracy for up to twenty seconds prediction horizons. At the same time, we observe some challenges such as the inability to account for how drivers choose to accelerate/decelerate based on the road conditions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用人工风险场的概念来预测人类操作员如何控制车辆以应对即将到来的道路情况。风险字段为系统状态分配非负风险度量，以便模拟该状态与违反安全属性（例如撞到障碍物或离开道路）的接近程度。使用风险字段，我们构建了一个算子的随机模型，该模型从状态映射到可能的操作。我们展示了我们的驾驶任务方法，其中要求人类受试者在真实的驾驶模拟器中驾驶汽车，同时避开道路上的障碍物。我们表明，给定驾驶数据的最可能的风险领域是通过解决凸优化问题获得的。接下来，我们应用推断的风险字段来生成不同的驾驶行为，同时将预测轨迹与地面真实测量结果进行比较。我们观察到，风险字段在预测未来轨迹分布方面表现出色，在长达 20 秒的预测范围内具有很高的预测精度。与此同时，我们观察到一些挑战，例如无法考虑驾驶员如何根据路况选择加速/减速。

AI.tldr: 本文利用人工风险场的概念，预测人类驾驶员在面对即将到来的道路情况时如何控制车辆。
AI.motivation: 为了更好地理解和模拟人类驾驶员在复杂道路环境中的行为，需要一种能够准确捕捉驾驶员决策过程的数学模型。
AI.method: 通过构建人工风险场，将系统状态映射到非负风险值，以表示该状态接近违反安全属性的程度，进而建立一个从状态到可能动作的随机模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过求解凸优化问题可以得到最可能的风险场，并且该方法在预测未来轨迹分布方面具有较高的准确性，预测时间跨度可达20秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效模拟人类驾驶行为，但在考虑驾驶员根据道路条件进行加速或减速的决策方面仍存在挑战。

authors_text: Jihang Wang,Dongcheng Zhao,Guobin Shen,Qian Zhang,Yi Zeng
title: DPSNN: A Differentially Private Spiking Neural Network with Temporal Enhanced Pooling
title_zh: DPSNN：具有时间增强池化功能的差分私有尖峰神经网络
abstract: Privacy protection is a crucial issue in machine learning algorithms, and the current privacy protection is combined with traditional artificial neural networks based on real values. Spiking neural network (SNN), the new generation of artificial neural networks, plays a crucial role in many fields. Therefore, research on the privacy protection of SNN is urgently needed. This paper combines the differential privacy(DP) algorithm with SNN and proposes a differentially private spiking neural network (DPSNN). The SNN uses discrete spike sequences to transmit information, combined with the gradient noise introduced by DP so that SNN maintains strong privacy protection. At the same time, to make SNN maintain high performance while obtaining high privacy protection, we propose the temporal enhanced pooling (TEP) method. It fully integrates the temporal information of SNN into the spatial information transfer, which enables SNN to perform better information transfer. We conduct experiments on static and neuromorphic datasets, and the experimental results show that our algorithm still maintains high performance while providing strong privacy protection.
summary: Privacy protection is a crucial issue in machine learning algorithms, and the current privacy protection is combined with traditional artificial neural networks based on real values. Spiking neural network (SNN), the new generation of artificial neural networks, plays a crucial role in many fields. Therefore, research on the privacy protection of SNN is urgently needed. This paper combines the differential privacy(DP) algorithm with SNN and proposes a differentially private spiking neural network (DPSNN). The SNN uses discrete spike sequences to transmit information, combined with the gradient noise introduced by DP so that SNN maintains strong privacy protection. At the same time, to make SNN maintain high performance while obtaining high privacy protection, we propose the temporal enhanced pooling (TEP) method. It fully integrates the temporal information of SNN into the spatial information transfer, which enables SNN to perform better information transfer. We conduct experiments on static and neuromorphic datasets, and the experimental results show that our algorithm still maintains high performance while providing strong privacy protection.
abstract_zh: 隐私保护是机器学习算法中的一个关键问题，目前的隐私保护是与基于实值的传统人工神经网络相结合。脉冲神经网络（SNN）作为新一代人工神经网络，在许多领域发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，迫切需要对SNN的隐私保护进行研究。将差分隐私（DP）算法与SNN相结合，提出一种差分隐私尖峰神经网络（DPSNN）。 SNN使用离散的尖峰序列来传输信息，结合DP引入的梯度噪声，使SNN保持强大的隐私保护。同时，为了使SNN在获得高隐私保护的同时保持高性能，我们提出了时间增强池化（TEP）方法。它将SNN的时间信息充分融入到空间信息传递中，使得SNN能够更好地进行信息传递。我们在静态和神经形态数据集上进行了实验，实验结果表明我们的算法在提供强大的隐私保护的同时仍然保持高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合差分隐私与时间增强池化的方法，用于提升脉冲神经网络在隐私保护与性能之间的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护技术多针对传统人工神经网络，而脉冲神经网络（SNN）作为新兴模型，其隐私保护研究不足，亟需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 将差分隐私的梯度噪声注入SNN训练过程，并设计时间增强池化（TEP）方法，通过融合时间信息与空间信息提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在静态与神经形态数据集上验证，DPSNN在提供强隐私保护的同时，保持了与原始SNN相当的高性能。
AI.conclusion: DPSNN通过差分隐私与时间增强池化协同作用，有效解决了SNN隐私保护与性能兼顾的难题，为未来研究提供新方向。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合差分隐私与时间增强池化的方法，用于提升脉冲神经网络在隐私保护与性能之间的平衡。
motivation: 现有隐私保护技术多针对传统人工神经网络，而脉冲神经网络（SNN）作为新兴模型，其隐私保护研究不足，亟需针对性解决方案。
method: 将差分隐私的梯度噪声注入SNN训练过程，并设计时间增强池化（TEP）方法，通过融合时间信息与空间信息提升模型性能。
result: 在静态与神经形态数据集上验证，DPSNN在提供强隐私保护的同时，保持了与原始SNN相当的高性能。
conclusion: DPSNN通过差分隐私与时间增强池化协同作用，有效解决了SNN隐私保护与性能兼顾的难题，为未来研究提供新方向。
search_text: DPSNN: A Differentially Private Spiking Neural Network with Temporal Enhanced Pooling DPSNN：具有时间增强池化功能的差分私有尖峰神经网络 Privacy protection is a crucial issue in machine learning algorithms, and the current privacy protection is combined with traditional artificial neural networks based on real values. Spiking neural network (SNN), the new generation of artificial neural networks, plays a crucial role in many fields. Therefore, research on the privacy protection of SNN is urgently needed. This paper combines the differential privacy(DP) algorithm with SNN and proposes a differentially private spiking neural network (DPSNN). The SNN uses discrete spike sequences to transmit information, combined with the gradient noise introduced by DP so that SNN maintains strong privacy protection. At the same time, to make SNN maintain high performance while obtaining high privacy protection, we propose the temporal enhanced pooling (TEP) method. It fully integrates the temporal information of SNN into the spatial information transfer, which enables SNN to perform better information transfer. We conduct experiments on static and neuromorphic datasets, and the experimental results show that our algorithm still maintains high performance while providing strong privacy protection. 隐私保护是机器学习算法中的一个关键问题，目前的隐私保护是与基于实值的传统人工神经网络相结合。脉冲神经网络（SNN）作为新一代人工神经网络，在许多领域发挥着至关重要的作用。因此，迫切需要对SNN的隐私保护进行研究。将差分隐私（DP）算法与SNN相结合，提出一种差分隐私尖峰神经网络（DPSNN）。 SNN使用离散的尖峰序列来传输信息，结合DP引入的梯度噪声，使SNN保持强大的隐私保护。同时，为了使SNN在获得高隐私保护的同时保持高性能，我们提出了时间增强池化（TEP）方法。它将SNN的时间信息充分融入到空间信息传递中，使得SNN能够更好地进行信息传递。我们在静态和神经形态数据集上进行了实验，实验结果表明我们的算法在提供强大的隐私保护的同时仍然保持高性能。 本文提出一种结合差分隐私与时间增强池化的方法，用于提升脉冲神经网络在隐私保护与性能之间的平衡。 Jihang Wang,Dongcheng Zhao,Guobin Shen,Qian Zhang,Yi Zeng cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Aditi Sagar,Aman Swaraj,Karan Verma
title: COVID-19 Severity Classification on Chest X-ray Images
title_zh: 胸部 X 射线图像上的 COVID-19 严重程度分类
abstract: Biomedical imaging analysis combined with artificial intelligence (AI) methods has proven to be quite valuable in order to diagnose COVID-19. So far, various classification models have been used for diagnosing COVID-19. However, classification of patients based on their severity level is not yet analyzed. In this work, we classify covid images based on the severity of the infection. First, we pre-process the X-ray images using a median filter and histogram equalization. Enhanced X-ray images are then augmented using SMOTE technique for achieving a balanced dataset. Pre-trained Resnet50, VGG16 model and SVM classifier are then used for feature extraction and classification. The result of the classification model confirms that compared with the alternatives, with chest X-Ray images, the ResNet-50 model produced remarkable classification results in terms of accuracy (95%), recall (0.94), and F1-Score (0.92), and precision (0.91).
summary: Biomedical imaging analysis combined with artificial intelligence (AI) methods has proven to be quite valuable in order to diagnose COVID-19. So far, various classification models have been used for diagnosing COVID-19. However, classification of patients based on their severity level is not yet analyzed. In this work, we classify covid images based on the severity of the infection. First, we pre-process the X-ray images using a median filter and histogram equalization. Enhanced X-ray images are then augmented using SMOTE technique for achieving a balanced dataset. Pre-trained Resnet50, VGG16 model and SVM classifier are then used for feature extraction and classification. The result of the classification model confirms that compared with the alternatives, with chest X-Ray images, the ResNet-50 model produced remarkable classification results in terms of accuracy (95%), recall (0.94), and F1-Score (0.92), and precision (0.91).
abstract_zh: 事实证明，生物医学成像分析与人工智能 (AI) 方法相结合对于诊断 COVID-19 非常有价值。到目前为止，各种分类模型已被用于诊断 COVID-19。然而，尚未分析根据患者严重程度进行的分类。在这项工作中，我们根据感染的严重程度对新冠图像进行分类。首先，我们使用中值滤波器和直方图均衡化对 X 射线图像进行预处理。然后使用 SMOTE 技术对增强的 X 射线图像进行增强，以实现平衡的数据集。然后使用预训练的Resnet50、VGG16模型和SVM分类器进行特征提取和分类。分类模型的结果证实，与替代方案相比，对于胸部 X 射线图像，ResNet-50 模型在准确率 (95%)、召回率 (0.94)、F1-Score (0.92) 和精度 (0.91) 方面产生了显着的分类结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用胸部X光图像对COVID-19患者的感染严重程度进行分类。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种模型用于诊断COVID-19，但基于感染严重程度的患者分类尚未被充分研究，因此需要开发一种有效的方法来区分不同严重程度的病例以辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 对X光图像进行中值滤波和直方图均衡化预处理，使用SMOTE技术增强数据集平衡性，结合预训练的ResNet50、VGG16模型与SVM分类器进行特征提取和分类。
AI.result: ResNet-50模型在准确率（95%）、召回率（0.94）、F1分数（0.92）和精确率（0.91）方面表现优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于胸部X光图像的ResNet-50模型能有效分类COVID-19严重程度，为临床提供可靠的辅助诊断工具。

authors_text: Clara Na,Sanket Vaibhav Mehta,Emma Strubell
title: Train Flat, Then Compress: Sharpness-Aware Minimization Learns More Compressible Models
title_zh: 训练平坦，然后压缩：锐度感知最小化学习更多可压缩模型
abstract: Model compression by way of parameter pruning, quantization, or distillation has recently gained popularity as an approach for reducing the computational requirements of modern deep neural network models for NLP. Inspired by prior works suggesting a connection between simpler, more generalizable models and those that lie within wider loss basins, we hypothesize that optimizing for flat minima should lead to simpler parameterizations and thus more compressible models. We propose to combine sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) with various task-specific model compression methods, including iterative magnitude pruning (IMP), structured pruning with a distillation objective, and post-training dynamic quantization. Empirically, we show that optimizing for flatter minima consistently leads to greater compressibility of parameters compared to vanilla Adam when fine-tuning BERT models, with little to no loss in accuracy on the GLUE text classification and SQuAD question answering benchmarks. Moreover, SAM finds superior winning tickets during IMP that 1) are amenable to vanilla Adam optimization, and 2) transfer more effectively across tasks.
summary: Model compression by way of parameter pruning, quantization, or distillation has recently gained popularity as an approach for reducing the computational requirements of modern deep neural network models for NLP. Inspired by prior works suggesting a connection between simpler, more generalizable models and those that lie within wider loss basins, we hypothesize that optimizing for flat minima should lead to simpler parameterizations and thus more compressible models. We propose to combine sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) with various task-specific model compression methods, including iterative magnitude pruning (IMP), structured pruning with a distillation objective, and post-training dynamic quantization. Empirically, we show that optimizing for flatter minima consistently leads to greater compressibility of parameters compared to vanilla Adam when fine-tuning BERT models, with little to no loss in accuracy on the GLUE text classification and SQuAD question answering benchmarks. Moreover, SAM finds superior winning tickets during IMP that 1) are amenable to vanilla Adam optimization, and 2) transfer more effectively across tasks.
abstract_zh: 通过参数剪枝、量化或蒸馏进行的模型压缩最近作为一种降低 NLP 深度神经网络模型计算要求的方法而受到欢迎。受先前研究表明更简单、更通用的模型与更广泛的损失盆地内的模型之间的联系的启发，我们假设针对平坦最小值的优化应该会导致更简单的参数化，从而导致更可压缩的模型。我们建议将锐度感知最小化（SAM）与各种特定于任务的模型压缩方法相结合，包括迭代幅度剪枝（IMP）、具有蒸馏目标的结构化剪枝以及训练后动态量化。根据经验，我们表明，在微调 BERT 模型时，与 vanilla Adam 相比，针对更平坦的最小值进行优化始终会带来更大的参数压缩性，并且 GLUE 文本分类和 SQuAD 问答基准的准确性几乎没有损失。此外，SAM 在 IMP 期间发现了优质的中奖彩票，1）适合普通 Adam 优化，2）更有效地跨任务转移。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过优化平坦极小值来提升模型压缩效果，结合尖锐度感知最小化（SAM）与多种压缩方法。
AI.motivation: 基于简单模型更易压缩的假设，认为平坦损失盆地对应的模型参数更易压缩，从而提出结合SAM优化的压缩方法。
AI.method: 将SAM与迭代幅度剪枝（IMP）、结构化剪枝蒸馏及后训练动态量化等压缩技术结合，优化BERT模型的压缩性。
AI.result: 实验表明SAM优化的模型在GLUE和SQuAD任务中压缩后精度损失极小，且发现更优的可迁移剪枝子网络（winning tickets）。
AI.conclusion: 优化平坦极小值能显著提升模型压缩性，SAM与压缩技术结合是有效且实用的模型压缩方案。

authors_text: Zhihan Zhou,Jiangchao Yao,Yanfeng Wang,Bo Han,Ya Zhang
title: Contrastive Learning with Boosted Memorization
title_zh: 对比学习增强记忆力
abstract: Self-supervised learning has achieved a great success in the representation learning of visual and textual data. However, the current methods are mainly validated on the well-curated datasets, which do not exhibit the real-world long-tailed distribution. Recent attempts to consider self-supervised long-tailed learning are made by rebalancing in the loss perspective or the model perspective, resembling the paradigms in the supervised long-tailed learning. Nevertheless, without the aid of labels, these explorations have not shown the expected significant promise due to the limitation in tail sample discovery or the heuristic structure design. Different from previous works, we explore this direction from an alternative perspective, i.e., the data perspective, and propose a novel Boosted Contrastive Learning (BCL) method. Specifically, BCL leverages the memorization effect of deep neural networks to automatically drive the information discrepancy of the sample views in contrastive learning, which is more efficient to enhance the long-tailed learning in the label-unaware context. Extensive experiments on a range of benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of BCL over several state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/BCL.
summary: Self-supervised learning has achieved a great success in the representation learning of visual and textual data. However, the current methods are mainly validated on the well-curated datasets, which do not exhibit the real-world long-tailed distribution. Recent attempts to consider self-supervised long-tailed learning are made by rebalancing in the loss perspective or the model perspective, resembling the paradigms in the supervised long-tailed learning. Nevertheless, without the aid of labels, these explorations have not shown the expected significant promise due to the limitation in tail sample discovery or the heuristic structure design. Different from previous works, we explore this direction from an alternative perspective, i.e., the data perspective, and propose a novel Boosted Contrastive Learning (BCL) method. Specifically, BCL leverages the memorization effect of deep neural networks to automatically drive the information discrepancy of the sample views in contrastive learning, which is more efficient to enhance the long-tailed learning in the label-unaware context. Extensive experiments on a range of benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of BCL over several state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/BCL.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习在视觉和文本数据的表示学习方面取得了巨大的成功。然而，当前的方法主要在精心策划的数据集上进行验证，这些数据集不表现出现实世界的长尾分布。最近考虑自监督长尾学习的尝试是通过损失视角或模型视角的重新平衡来进行的，类似于监督长尾学习中的范式。然而，在没有标签的帮助下，由于尾部样本发现或启发式结构设计的限制，这些探索并没有显示出预期的重大前景。与之前的工作不同，我们从另一个角度（即数据角度）探索这个方向，并提出了一种新颖的增强对比学习（BCL）方法。具体来说，BCL利用深度神经网络的记忆效应来自动驱动对比学习中样本视图的信息差异，从而更有效地增强标签无意识上下文中的长尾学习。对一系列基准数据集的广泛实验证明了 BCL 相对于几种最先进方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/BCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Boosted Contrastive Learning (BCL)的新方法，旨在解决自监督学习在长尾分布数据上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长尾分布时依赖标签或启发式设计，但未充分利用数据视角的潜力，导致效果有限。
AI.method: BCL通过利用深度神经网络的记忆效应，自动增强对比学习中样本视图的信息差异，从而在无标签场景下提升长尾学习效果。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，BCL优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: BCL通过数据视角的创新设计，为无标签长尾自监督学习提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Contrastive Learning with Boosted Memorization 对比学习增强记忆力 Self-supervised learning has achieved a great success in the representation learning of visual and textual data. However, the current methods are mainly validated on the well-curated datasets, which do not exhibit the real-world long-tailed distribution. Recent attempts to consider self-supervised long-tailed learning are made by rebalancing in the loss perspective or the model perspective, resembling the paradigms in the supervised long-tailed learning. Nevertheless, without the aid of labels, these explorations have not shown the expected significant promise due to the limitation in tail sample discovery or the heuristic structure design. Different from previous works, we explore this direction from an alternative perspective, i.e., the data perspective, and propose a novel Boosted Contrastive Learning (BCL) method. Specifically, BCL leverages the memorization effect of deep neural networks to automatically drive the information discrepancy of the sample views in contrastive learning, which is more efficient to enhance the long-tailed learning in the label-unaware context. Extensive experiments on a range of benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of BCL over several state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/BCL. 自监督学习在视觉和文本数据的表示学习方面取得了巨大的成功。然而，当前的方法主要在精心策划的数据集上进行验证，这些数据集不表现出现实世界的长尾分布。最近考虑自监督长尾学习的尝试是通过损失视角或模型视角的重新平衡来进行的，类似于监督长尾学习中的范式。然而，在没有标签的帮助下，由于尾部样本发现或启发式结构设计的限制，这些探索并没有显示出预期的重大前景。与之前的工作不同，我们从另一个角度（即数据角度）探索这个方向，并提出了一种新颖的增强对比学习（BCL）方法。具体来说，BCL利用深度神经网络的记忆效应来自动驱动对比学习中样本视图的信息差异，从而更有效地增强标签无意识上下文中的长尾学习。对一系列基准数据集的广泛实验证明了 BCL 相对于几种最先进方法的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/BCL 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Boosted Contrastive Learning (BCL)的新方法，旨在解决自监督学习在长尾分布数据上的不足。 Zhihan Zhou,Jiangchao Yao,Yanfeng Wang,Bo Han,Ya Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Avichai Levy,Erez Karpas
title: Understanding Natural Language in Context
title_zh: 在上下文中理解自然语言
abstract: Recent years have seen an increasing number of applications that have a natural language interface, either in the form of chatbots or via personal assistants such as Alexa (Amazon), Google Assistant, Siri (Apple), and Cortana (Microsoft). To use these applications, a basic dialog between the robot and the human is required. While this kind of dialog exists today mainly within "static" robots that do not make any movement in the household space, the challenge of reasoning about the information conveyed by the environment increases significantly when dealing with robots that can move and manipulate objects in our home environment. In this paper, we focus on cognitive robots, which have some knowledge-based models of the world and operate by reasoning and planning with this model. Thus, when the robot and the human communicate, there is already some formalism they can use - the robot's knowledge representation formalism. Our goal in this research is to translate natural language utterances into this robot's formalism, allowing much more complicated household tasks to be completed. We do so by combining off-the-shelf SOTA language models, planning tools, and the robot's knowledge-base for better communication. In addition, we analyze different directive types and illustrate the contribution of the world's context to the translation process.
summary: Recent years have seen an increasing number of applications that have a natural language interface, either in the form of chatbots or via personal assistants such as Alexa (Amazon), Google Assistant, Siri (Apple), and Cortana (Microsoft). While this kind of dialog exists today mainly within "static" robots that do not make any movement in the household space, the challenge of reasoning about the information conveyed by the environment increases significantly when dealing with robots that can move and manipulate objects in our home environment. In addition, we analyze different directive types and illustrate the contribution of the world's context to the translation process.
abstract_zh: 近年来，越来越多的应用程序具有自然语言界面，要么以聊天机器人的形式，要么通过个人助理，如 Alexa（亚马逊）、Google Assistant、Siri（苹果）和 Cortana（微软）。要使用这些应用程序，机器人和人类之间需要进行基本对话。虽然这种对话现在主要存在于在家庭空间中不进行任何移动的“静态”机器人中，但当处理可以在家庭环境中移动和操纵物体的机器人时，推理环境所传达的信息的挑战显着增加。在本文中，我们关注认知机器人，它具有一些基于知识的世界模型，并通过该模型进行推理和规划来操作。因此，当机器人和人类进行交流时，他们已经有了一些可以使用的形式主义——机器人的知识表示形式主义。我们这项研究的目标是将自然语言表达转化为机器人的形式主义，从而允许完成更复杂的家务任务。我们通过结合现成的 SOTA 语言模型、规划工具和机器人的知识库来实现更好的通信。此外，我们分析了不同的指令类型并说明了世界背景对翻译过程的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将自然语言指令转化为机器人知识表示形式，以实现复杂家庭任务的自动化执行。
AI.motivation: 随着移动机器人在家庭环境中的普及，传统静态对话模式难以满足动态场景下对环境信息的推理需求。
AI.method: 融合现成的最先进语言模型、规划工具与机器人知识库，结合不同指令类型分析与上下文信息处理机制。
AI.result: 实现了自然语言到机器人形式化表示的高效转换，显著提升了复杂家庭场景任务的完成能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合上下文感知与知识推理，可有效增强机器人与人类的自然语言交互质量与任务执行效率。

authors_text: Monica Agrawal,Stefan Hegselmann,Hunter Lang,Yoon Kim,David Sontag
title: Large Language Models are Few-Shot Clinical Information Extractors
title_zh: 大型语言模型是少量临床信息提取器
comment: Accepted as a long paper to The 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
comments: Accepted as a long paper to The 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
abstract: A long-running goal of the clinical NLP community is the extraction of important variables trapped in clinical notes. However, roadblocks have included dataset shift from the general domain and a lack of public clinical corpora and annotations. In this work, we show that large language models, such as InstructGPT, perform well at zero- and few-shot information extraction from clinical text despite not being trained specifically for the clinical domain. Whereas text classification and generation performance have already been studied extensively in such models, here we additionally demonstrate how to leverage them to tackle a diverse set of NLP tasks which require more structured outputs, including span identification, token-level sequence classification, and relation extraction. Further, due to the dearth of available data to evaluate these systems, we introduce new datasets for benchmarking few-shot clinical information extraction based on a manual re-annotation of the CASI dataset for new tasks. On the clinical extraction tasks we studied, the GPT-3 systems significantly outperform existing zero- and few-shot baselines.
summary: A long-running goal of the clinical NLP community is the extraction of important variables trapped in clinical notes. However, roadblocks have included dataset shift from the general domain and a lack of public clinical corpora and annotations. In this work, we show that large language models, such as InstructGPT, perform well at zero- and few-shot information extraction from clinical text despite not being trained specifically for the clinical domain. Whereas text classification and generation performance have already been studied extensively in such models, here we additionally demonstrate how to leverage them to tackle a diverse set of NLP tasks which require more structured outputs, including span identification, token-level sequence classification, and relation extraction. Further, due to the dearth of available data to evaluate these systems, we introduce new datasets for benchmarking few-shot clinical information extraction based on a manual re-annotation of the CASI dataset for new tasks. On the clinical extraction tasks we studied, the GPT-3 systems significantly outperform existing zero- and few-shot baselines.
abstract_zh: 临床 NLP 界的一个长期目标是提取临床记录中的重要变量。然而，障碍包括数据集从一般领域的转移以及缺乏公共临床语料库和注释。在这项工作中，我们表明大型语言模型（例如 InstructGPT）在从临床文本中进行零次和少量信息提取方面表现良好，尽管没有专门针对临床领域进行训练。尽管文本分类和生成性能已经在此类模型中得到了广泛研究，但在这里我们还演示了如何利用它们来处理需要更结构化输出的各种 NLP 任务，包括跨度识别、标记级序列分类和关系提取。此外，由于缺乏评估这些系统的可用数据，我们引入了新的数据集，用于基于新任务的 CASI 数据集的手动重新注释来对少量临床信息提取进行基准测试。在我们研究的临床提取任务中，GPT-3 系统显着优于现有的零样本和少样本基线。

AI.tldr: 验证大型语言模型在临床信息提取中的有效性，特别是在零样本和少样本场景下。
AI.motivation: 解决临床信息提取中数据集转移和公开数据不足的问题，探索大语言模型在无特定训练下的应用潜力。
AI.method: 利用InstructGPT等大模型进行零样本和少样本信息提取，设计结构化输出任务，并基于CASI数据集构建新基准数据集。
AI.result: GPT-3在临床提取任务中显著优于现有零样本和少样本基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型在临床信息提取中表现出色，且新数据集为未来研究提供了基准。

On the clinical extraction tasks we studied, the GPT-3 systems significantly outperform existing zero- and few-shot baselines. 临床 NLP 界的一个长期目标是提取临床记录中的重要变量。然而，障碍包括数据集从一般领域的转移以及缺乏公共临床语料库和注释。在这项工作中，我们表明大型语言模型（例如 InstructGPT）在从临床文本中进行零次和少量信息提取方面表现良好，尽管没有专门针对临床领域进行训练。尽管文本分类和生成性能已经在此类模型中得到了广泛研究，但在这里我们还演示了如何利用它们来处理需要更结构化输出的各种 NLP 任务，包括跨度识别、标记级序列分类和关系提取。此外，由于缺乏评估这些系统的可用数据，我们引入了新的数据集，用于基于新任务的 CASI 数据集的手动重新注释来对少量临床信息提取进行基准测试。在我们研究的临床提取任务中，GPT-3 系统显着优于现有的零样本和少样本基线。 验证大型语言模型在临床信息提取中的有效性，特别是在零样本和少样本场景下。 Monica Agrawal,Stefan Hegselmann,Hunter Lang,Yoon Kim,David Sontag cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shreyas Pai,Sriram V. Pemmaraju
title: Deterministic Massively Parallel Algorithms for Ruling Sets
title_zh: 规则集的确定性大规模并行算法
abstract: In this paper we present a deterministic $O(\log\log n)$-round algorithm for the 2-ruling set problem in the Massively Parallel Computation model with $\tilde{O}(n)$ memory; this algorithm also runs in $O(\log\log n)$ rounds in the Congested Clique model. This is exponentially faster than the fastest known deterministic 2-ruling set algorithm for these models, which is simply the $O(\log Δ)$-round deterministic Maximal Independent Set algorithm due to Czumaj, Davies, and Parter (SPAA 2020). Our result is obtained by derandomizing the 2-ruling set algorithm of Kothapalli and Pemmaraju (FSTTCS 2012).
summary: In this paper we present a deterministic $O(\log\log n)$-round algorithm for the 2-ruling set problem in the Massively Parallel Computation model with $\tilde{O}(n)$ memory; this algorithm also runs in $O(\log\log n)$ rounds in the Congested Clique model. This is exponentially faster than the fastest known deterministic 2-ruling set algorithm for these models, which is simply the $O(\log Δ)$-round deterministic Maximal Independent Set algorithm due to Czumaj, Davies, and Parter (SPAA 2020). Our result is obtained by derandomizing the 2-ruling set algorithm of Kothapalli and Pemmaraju (FSTTCS 2012).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对具有 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 内存的大规模并行计算模型中的 2 规则集问题提出了一种确定性 $O(\log\log n)$ 轮算法；该算法也在 Congested Clique 模型中运行 $O(\log\log n)$ 轮。这比这些模型已知最快的确定性 2 规则集算法要快得多，后者只是 Czumaj、Davies 和 Parter 提出的 $O(\log Δ)$ 轮确定性最大独立集算法 (SPAA 2020)。我们的结果是通过对 Kothapalli 和 Pemmaraju 的 2 规则集算法进行去随机化而获得的（FSTTCS 2012）。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种确定性的高效并行算法来解决2-ruling set问题
AI.motivation: 现有确定性算法效率较低，而随机算法存在不可预测性，需通过去随机化提高确定性算法的效率
AI.method: 通过去随机化技术，将随机算法转化为确定性算法，以适应大规模并行计算模型
AI.result: 在两种模型下均实现O(log log n)轮算法，比现有确定性算法快得多
AI.conclusion: 证明了去随机化技术在并行计算中的有效性，为解决类似问题提供了新思路

authors_text: Kang Min Yoo,Junyeob Kim,Hyuhng Joon Kim,Hyunsoo Cho,Hwiyeol Jo,Sang-Woo Lee,Sang-goo Lee,Taeuk Kim
title: Ground-Truth Labels Matter: A Deeper Look into Input-Label Demonstrations
title_zh: 真实标签很重要：深入研究输入标签演示
comment: Accepted to EMNLP Long. Kang Min Yoo and Junyeob Kim contributed equally. Kang Min Yoo and Taeuk Kim are the corresponding authors
comments: Accepted to EMNLP Long. Kang Min Yoo and Junyeob Kim contributed equally. Kang Min Yoo and Taeuk Kim are the corresponding authors
abstract: Despite recent explosion of interests in in-context learning, the underlying mechanism and the precise impact of the quality of demonstrations remain elusive. Intuitively, ground-truth labels should have as much impact in in-context learning (ICL) as supervised learning, but recent work reported that the input-label correspondence is significantly less important than previously thought. Intrigued by this counter-intuitive observation, we re-examine the importance of ground-truth labels in in-context learning. With the introduction of two novel metrics, namely Label-Correctness Sensitivity and Ground-truth Label Effect Ratio (GLER), we were able to conduct quantifiable analysis on the impact of ground-truth label demonstrations. Through extensive analyses, we find that the correct input-label mappings can have varying impacts on the downstream in-context learning performances, depending on the experimental configuration. Through additional studies, we identify key components, such as the verbosity of prompt templates and the language model size, as the controlling factor to achieve more noise-resilient ICL.
summary: Despite recent explosion of interests in in-context learning, the underlying mechanism and the precise impact of the quality of demonstrations remain elusive. Intuitively, ground-truth labels should have as much impact in in-context learning (ICL) as supervised learning, but recent work reported that the input-label correspondence is significantly less important than previously thought. Intrigued by this counter-intuitive observation, we re-examine the importance of ground-truth labels in in-context learning. With the introduction of two novel metrics, namely Label-Correctness Sensitivity and Ground-truth Label Effect Ratio (GLER), we were able to conduct quantifiable analysis on the impact of ground-truth label demonstrations. Through extensive analyses, we find that the correct input-label mappings can have varying impacts on the downstream in-context learning performances, depending on the experimental configuration. Through additional studies, we identify key components, such as the verbosity of prompt templates and the language model size, as the controlling factor to achieve more noise-resilient ICL.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近人们对情境学习的兴趣激增，但其基本机制和演示质量的确切影响仍然难以捉摸。直观地讲，真实标签在上下文学习（ICL）中应该与监督学习一样产生同样大的影响，但最近的研究表明，输入标签对应关系远没有之前想象的那么重要。出于对这种反直觉观察的兴趣，我们重新审视了真实标签在上下文学习中的重要性。通过引入两个新颖的指标，即标签正确性敏感度和真实标签效果比（GLER），我们能够对真实标签演示的影响进行量化分析。通过广泛的分析，我们发现正确的输入标签映射可能会对下游上下文学习性能产生不同的影响，具体取决于实验配置。通过额外的研究，我们确定了关键组件，例如提示模板的冗长性和语言模型的大小，作为实现更具抗噪能力的 ICL 的控制因素。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入两个新指标，重新审视了上下文学习中真实标签对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管上下文学习（ICL）受到广泛关注，但真实标签对模型性能的影响机制尚不明确，且此前研究显示标签相关性不如预期重要。
AI.method: 提出Label-Correctness Sensitivity和GLER两个指标，通过大量实验分析不同配置下真实标签映射对ICL的影响，并研究提示模板长度和模型规模等关键因素。
AI.result: 正确输入-标签映射的影响因实验配置而异，提示模板冗长性和模型规模是影响噪声鲁棒性的关键控制因素。
AI.conclusion: 真实标签在ICL中具有重要性，但其效果受实验设置影响，优化提示设计和模型规模可提升噪声环境下的学习鲁棒性。

authors_text: Terufumi Morishita,Gaku Morio,Shota Horiguchi,Hiroaki Ozaki,Nobuo Nukaga
title: Rethinking Fano's Inequality in Ensemble Learning
title_zh: 重新思考集成学习中的 Fano 不等式
abstract: We propose a fundamental theory on ensemble learning that answers the central question: what factors make an ensemble system good or bad? Previous studies used a variant of Fano's inequality of information theory and derived a lower bound of the classification error rate on the basis of the $\textit{accuracy}$ and $\textit{diversity}$ of models. We revisit the original Fano's inequality and argue that the studies did not take into account the information lost when multiple model predictions are combined into a final prediction. To address this issue, we generalize the previous theory to incorporate the information loss, which we name $\textit{combination loss}$. Further, we empirically validate and demonstrate the proposed theory through extensive experiments on actual systems. The theory reveals the strengths and weaknesses of systems on each metric, which will push the theoretical understanding of ensemble learning and give us insights into designing systems.
summary: We propose a fundamental theory on ensemble learning that answers the central question: what factors make an ensemble system good or bad? Previous studies used a variant of Fano's inequality of information theory and derived a lower bound of the classification error rate on the basis of the $\textit{accuracy}$ and $\textit{diversity}$ of models. We revisit the original Fano's inequality and argue that the studies did not take into account the information lost when multiple model predictions are combined into a final prediction. To address this issue, we generalize the previous theory to incorporate the information loss, which we name $\textit{combination loss}$. Further, we empirically validate and demonstrate the proposed theory through extensive experiments on actual systems. The theory reveals the strengths and weaknesses of systems on each metric, which will push the theoretical understanding of ensemble learning and give us insights into designing systems.
abstract_zh: We propose a fundamental theory on ensemble learning that answers the central question: what factors make an ensemble system good or bad?之前的研究使用了 Fano 信息不等式的变体，并根据模型的 $\textit{accuracy}$ 和 $\textit{diversity}$ 推导了分类错误率的下界。我们重新审视最初的法诺不等式，并认为这些研究没有考虑将多个模型预测组合成最终预测时丢失的信息。 To address this issue, we generalize the previous theory to incorporate the information loss, which we name $\textit{combination loss}$. Further, we empirically validate and demonstrate the proposed theory through extensive experiments on actual systems.该理论揭示了系统在每个指标上的优点和缺点，这将推动对集成学习的理论理解，并让我们深入了解系统设计。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考Fano不等式在集成学习中的应用，提出考虑信息组合损失的新理论框架，以更准确分析集成系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Fano不等式的集成学习理论未考虑多模型预测组合时的信息损失，导致理论分析存在偏差，需建立更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 通过重新推导原始Fano不等式，引入量化信息组合损失的新指标，结合实验验证理论有效性，并分析不同系统指标的关联性。
AI.result: 理论验证表明组合损失能更准确揭示集成系统的优劣，实验结果与理论预测一致，为系统设计提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 该理论完善了集成学习的理论基础，为后续系统优化和设计提供了可量化的分析工具与指导原则。

conclusion: 该理论完善了集成学习的理论基础，为后续系统优化和设计提供了可量化的分析工具与指导原则。
search_text: Rethinking Fano's Inequality in Ensemble Learning 重新思考集成学习中的 Fano 不等式 We propose a fundamental theory on ensemble learning that answers the central question: what factors make an ensemble system good or bad? Previous studies used a variant of Fano's inequality of information theory and derived a lower bound of the classification error rate on the basis of the $\textit{accuracy}$ and $\textit{diversity}$ of models. We revisit the original Fano's inequality and argue that the studies did not take into account the information lost when multiple model predictions are combined into a final prediction. To address this issue, we generalize the previous theory to incorporate the information loss, which we name $\textit{combination loss}$. Further, we empirically validate and demonstrate the proposed theory through extensive experiments on actual systems. The theory reveals the strengths and weaknesses of systems on each metric, which will push the theoretical understanding of ensemble learning and give us insights into designing systems. We propose a fundamental theory on ensemble learning that answers the central question: what factors make an ensemble system good or bad?之前的研究使用了 Fano 信息不等式的变体，并根据模型的 $\textit{accuracy}$ 和 $\textit{diversity}$ 推导了分类错误率的下界。我们重新审视最初的法诺不等式，并认为这些研究没有考虑将多个模型预测组合成最终预测时丢失的信息。 To address this issue, we generalize the previous theory to incorporate the information loss, which we name $\textit{combination loss}$. Further, we empirically validate and demonstrate the proposed theory through extensive experiments on actual systems.该理论揭示了系统在每个指标上的优点和缺点，这将推动对集成学习的理论理解，并让我们深入了解系统设计。 本文重新思考Fano不等式在集成学习中的应用，提出考虑信息组合损失的新理论框架，以更准确分析集成系统的性能。 Terufumi Morishita,Gaku Morio,Shota Horiguchi,Hiroaki Ozaki,Nobuo Nukaga cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Saad Abbasi,Alexander Wong,Mohammad Javad Shafiee
title: MAPLE-X: Latency Prediction with Explicit Microprocessor Prior Knowledge
title_zh: MAPLE-X：利用显式微处理器先验知识进行延迟预测
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) latency characterization is a time-consuming process and adds significant cost to Neural Architecture Search (NAS) processes when searching for efficient convolutional neural networks for embedded vision applications. DNN Latency is a hardware dependent metric and requires direct measurement or inference on target hardware. A recently introduced latency estimation technique known as MAPLE predicts DNN execution time on previously unseen hardware devices by using hardware performance counters. Leveraging these hardware counters in the form of an implicit prior, MAPLE achieves state-of-the-art performance in latency prediction. Here, we propose MAPLE-X which extends MAPLE by incorporating explicit prior knowledge of hardware devices and DNN architecture latency to better account for model stability and robustness. First, by identifying DNN architectures that exhibit a similar latency to each other, we can generate multiple virtual examples to significantly improve the accuracy over MAPLE. Secondly, the hardware specifications are used to determine the similarity between training and test hardware to emphasize training samples captured from comparable devices (domains) and encourages improved domain alignment. Experimental results using a convolution neural network NAS benchmark across different types of devices, including an Intel processor that is now used for embedded vision applications, demonstrate a 5% improvement over MAPLE and 9% over HELP. Furthermore, we include ablation studies to independently assess the benefits of virtual examples and hardware-based sample importance.
summary: Deep neural network (DNN) latency characterization is a time-consuming process and adds significant cost to Neural Architecture Search (NAS) processes when searching for efficient convolutional neural networks for embedded vision applications. DNN Latency is a hardware dependent metric and requires direct measurement or inference on target hardware. A recently introduced latency estimation technique known as MAPLE predicts DNN execution time on previously unseen hardware devices by using hardware performance counters. Leveraging these hardware counters in the form of an implicit prior, MAPLE achieves state-of-the-art performance in latency prediction. Here, we propose MAPLE-X which extends MAPLE by incorporating explicit prior knowledge of hardware devices and DNN architecture latency to better account for model stability and robustness. First, by identifying DNN architectures that exhibit a similar latency to each other, we can generate multiple virtual examples to significantly improve the accuracy over MAPLE. Secondly, the hardware specifications are used to determine the similarity between training and test hardware to emphasize training samples captured from comparable devices (domains) and encourages improved domain alignment. Experimental results using a convolution neural network NAS benchmark across different types of devices, including an Intel processor that is now used for embedded vision applications, demonstrate a 5% improvement over MAPLE and 9% over HELP. Furthermore, we include ablation studies to independently assess the benefits of virtual examples and hardware-based sample importance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 延迟表征是一个耗时的过程，在为嵌入式视觉应用搜索高效的卷积神经网络时，会显着增加神经架构搜索 (NAS) 流程的成本。 DNN 延迟是一个依赖于硬件的指标，需要对目标硬件进行直接测量或推断。最近推出的延迟估计技术（称为 MAPLE）通过使用硬件性能计数器来预测以前未见过的硬件设备上的 DNN 执行时间。通过以隐式先验的形式利用这些硬件计数器，MAPLE 在延迟预测方面实现了最先进的性能。在这里，我们提出了 MAPLE-X，它通过结合硬件设备的显式先验知识和 DNN 架构延迟来扩展 MAPLE，以更好地考虑模型的稳定性和鲁棒性。首先，通过识别彼此表现出相似延迟的 DNN 架构，我们可以生成多个虚拟示例，从而显着提高 MAPLE 的准确性。其次，硬件规格用于确定训练和测试硬件之间的相似性，以强调从可比设备（域）捕获的训练样本，并鼓励改进域对齐。在不同类型的设备（包括现在用于嵌入式视觉应用的英特尔处理器）上使用卷积神经网络 NAS 基准测试的实验结果表明，比 MAPLE 提高了 5%，比 HELP 提高了 9%。此外，我们还进行了消融研究，以独立评估虚拟示例和基于硬件的样本重要性的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAPLE-X方法，通过显式引入硬件和DNN架构的先验知识，提升深度神经网络在嵌入式设备上的延迟预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有延迟预测方法依赖隐式硬件计数器信息，难以有效捕捉模型稳定性与硬件特性的关联，导致预测精度不足。
AI.method: 通过生成相似延迟的虚拟DNN架构样本增强数据多样性，并基于硬件规格进行领域对齐，结合显式先验知识优化预测模型。
AI.result: 在多种嵌入式设备上实现较MAPLE提升5%、较HELP提升9%的延迟预测精度，消融实验验证了虚拟样本和硬件样本权重的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式融合硬件特性与模型架构先验知识能显著提升延迟预测性能，为高效神经网络架构搜索提供可靠支持。

authors_text: Edgar Arribas,Vicent Cholvi,Vincenzo Mancuso
title: Optimizing UAV Recharge Scheduling for Heterogeneous and Persistent Aerial Service
title_zh: 优化无人机充电调度以实现异构和持续的空中服务
abstract: The adoption of UAVs in communication networks is becoming reality thanks to the deployment of advanced solutions for connecting UAVs and using them as communication relays. However, the use of UAVs introduces novel energy constraints and scheduling challenges in the dynamic management of network devices, due to the need to call back and recharge, or substitute, UAVs that run out of energy. In this paper, we design UAV recharging schemes under realistic assumptions on limited flight times and time consuming charging operations. Such schemes are designed to minimize the size of the fleet to be devoted to a persistent service of a set of aerial locations, hence its cost. We consider a fleet of homogeneous UAVs both under homogeneous and heterogeneous service topologies. For UAVs serving aerial locations with homogeneous distances to a recharge station, we design a simple scheduling, that we name HORR, which we prove to be feasible and optimal, in the sense that it uses the minimum possible number of UAVs to guarantee the coverage of the aerial service locations. For the case of non-evenly distributed aerial locations, we demonstrate that the problem becomes NP-hard, and design a lightweight recharging scheduling scheme, PHERR, that extends the operation of HORR to the heterogeneous case, leveraging the partitioning of the set of service locations. We show that PHERR is near-optimal because it approaches the performance limits identified through a lower bound that we formulate on the total fleet size.
summary: The adoption of UAVs in communication networks is becoming reality thanks to the deployment of advanced solutions for connecting UAVs and using them as communication relays. However, the use of UAVs introduces novel energy constraints and scheduling challenges in the dynamic management of network devices, due to the need to call back and recharge, or substitute, UAVs that run out of energy. In this paper, we design UAV recharging schemes under realistic assumptions on limited flight times and time consuming charging operations. Such schemes are designed to minimize the size of the fleet to be devoted to a persistent service of a set of aerial locations, hence its cost. We consider a fleet of homogeneous UAVs both under homogeneous and heterogeneous service topologies. For UAVs serving aerial locations with homogeneous distances to a recharge station, we design a simple scheduling, that we name HORR, which we prove to be feasible and optimal, in the sense that it uses the minimum possible number of UAVs to guarantee the coverage of the aerial service locations. For the case of non-evenly distributed aerial locations, we demonstrate that the problem becomes NP-hard, and design a lightweight recharging scheduling scheme, PHERR, that extends the operation of HORR to the heterogeneous case, leveraging the partitioning of the set of service locations. We show that PHERR is near-optimal because it approaches the performance limits identified through a lower bound that we formulate on the total fleet size.
abstract_zh: 由于部署了连接无人机并将其用作通信中继的先进解决方案，无人机在通信网络中的采用正在成为现实。然而，由于需要回调和充电或替代耗尽能量的无人机，无人机的使用在网络设备的动态管理中引入了新的能源限制和调度挑战。在本文中，我们在有限飞行时间和耗时的充电操作的现实假设下设计了无人机充电方案。此类计划旨在最大限度地减少专门为一组空中位置提供持续服务的机队规模，从而最大限度地减少其成本。我们考虑同构和异构服务拓扑下的同构无人机机队。对于为充电站距离均匀的空中地点提供服务的无人机，我们设计了一种简单的调度方案，将其命名为 HORR，我们证明这是可行且最优的，因为它使用尽可能少的无人机数量来保证空中服务地点的覆盖。对于非均匀分布的空中位置的情况，我们证明了问题变成了 NP 困难，并设计了一种轻量级充电调度方案 PHERR，利用服务位置集的划分，将 HORR 的操作扩展到异构情况。我们证明 PHERR 接近最优，因为它接近通过我们根据总机队规模制定的下限确定的性能限制。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在优化异构和持续空中服务中的无人机（UAV）充电调度，以最小化所需无人机舰队规模并降低运营成本。
AI.motivation: 无人机在通信网络中的应用面临能量限制和调度挑战，需频繁召回充电或替换耗尽能量的无人机，导致成本增加和覆盖效率下降。
AI.method: 针对均匀分布服务点设计HORR调度方案，证明其最优性；针对非均匀分布的NP难问题，提出基于服务点分区的PHERR方案，并通过下界分析证明其近似最优性。
AI.result: HORR在均匀场景下实现最小无人机数量覆盖，PHERR在异构场景下接近理论下界，显著降低舰队规模和运营成本。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的调度方案为持续空中服务提供了高效、低成本的无人机管理策略，适用于均匀与异构服务场景。

We show that PHERR is near-optimal because it approaches the performance limits identified through a lower bound that we formulate on the total fleet size. 由于部署了连接无人机并将其用作通信中继的先进解决方案，无人机在通信网络中的采用正在成为现实。然而，由于需要回调和充电或替代耗尽能量的无人机，无人机的使用在网络设备的动态管理中引入了新的能源限制和调度挑战。在本文中，我们在有限飞行时间和耗时的充电操作的现实假设下设计了无人机充电方案。此类计划旨在最大限度地减少专门为一组空中位置提供持续服务的机队规模，从而最大限度地减少其成本。我们考虑同构和异构服务拓扑下的同构无人机机队。对于为充电站距离均匀的空中地点提供服务的无人机，我们设计了一种简单的调度方案，将其命名为 HORR，我们证明这是可行且最优的，因为它使用尽可能少的无人机数量来保证空中服务地点的覆盖。对于非均匀分布的空中位置的情况，我们证明了问题变成了 NP 困难，并设计了一种轻量级充电调度方案 PHERR，利用服务位置集的划分，将 HORR 的操作扩展到异构情况。我们证明 PHERR 接近最优，因为它接近通过我们根据总机队规模制定的下限确定的性能限制。 本文旨在优化异构和持续空中服务中的无人机（UAV）充电调度，以最小化所需无人机舰队规模并降低运营成本。 Edgar Arribas,Vicent Cholvi,Vincenzo Mancuso cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Sungryull Sohn,Hyunjae Woo,Jongwook Choi,lyubing qiang,Izzeddin Gur,Aleksandra Faust,Honglak Lee
title: Fast Inference and Transfer of Compositional Task Structures for Few-shot Task Generalization
title_zh: 用于小样本任务泛化的组合任务结构的快速推理和迁移
comment: Accepted to UAI 2022 as an oral presentation
comments: Accepted to UAI 2022 as an oral presentation
abstract: We tackle real-world problems with complex structures beyond the pixel-based game or simulator. We formulate it as a few-shot reinforcement learning problem where a task is characterized by a subtask graph that defines a set of subtasks and their dependencies that are unknown to the agent. Different from the previous meta-rl methods trying to directly infer the unstructured task embedding, our multi-task subtask graph inferencer (MTSGI) first infers the common high-level task structure in terms of the subtask graph from the training tasks, and use it as a prior to improve the task inference in testing. Our experiment results on 2D grid-world and complex web navigation domains show that the proposed method can learn and leverage the common underlying structure of the tasks for faster adaptation to the unseen tasks than various existing algorithms such as meta reinforcement learning, hierarchical reinforcement learning, and other heuristic agents.
summary: We tackle real-world problems with complex structures beyond the pixel-based game or simulator. We formulate it as a few-shot reinforcement learning problem where a task is characterized by a subtask graph that defines a set of subtasks and their dependencies that are unknown to the agent. Different from the previous meta-rl methods trying to directly infer the unstructured task embedding, our multi-task subtask graph inferencer (MTSGI) first infers the common high-level task structure in terms of the subtask graph from the training tasks, and use it as a prior to improve the task inference in testing. Our experiment results on 2D grid-world and complex web navigation domains show that the proposed method can learn and leverage the common underlying structure of the tasks for faster adaptation to the unseen tasks than various existing algorithms such as meta reinforcement learning, hierarchical reinforcement learning, and other heuristic agents.
abstract_zh: 我们用超出基于像素的游戏或模拟器的复杂结构来解决现实世界的问题。我们将其表述为一个小样本强化学习问题，其中任务的特征是子任务图，该子任务图定义了代理未知的一组子任务及其依赖关系。与之前尝试直接推断非结构化任务嵌入的meta-rl方法不同，我们的多任务子任务图推理器（MTSGI）首先从训练任务中根据子任务图推断出常见的高级任务结构，并将其用作先验以改进测试中的任务推理。我们在 2D 网格世界和复杂网络导航领域的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以学习并利用任务的共同底层结构，比各种现有算法（例如元强化学习、分层强化学习和其他启发式代理）更快地适应看不见的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子任务图推断的少样本强化学习方法，用于解决复杂结构任务的快速泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统元强化学习方法难以有效利用任务间的结构化共性，导致在复杂任务中适应速度慢且泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计多任务子任务图推断器（MTSGI），从训练任务中学习共享的高层子任务结构，并将其作为先验知识辅助测试任务推断。
AI.result: 在2D网格世界和复杂网页导航任务中，MTSGI相比元强化学习、分层强化学习等方法展现出更快的适应速度和更优的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模任务结构共性，MTSGI有效提升了少样本场景下的任务泛化能力，为复杂结构问题提供了新思路。
