authors_text: Yimin Ou,Rui Yang,Lufan Ma,Yong Liu,Jiangpeng Yan,Shang Xu,Chengjie Wang,Xiu Li
title: UniInst: Unique Representation for End-to-End Instance Segmentation
title_zh: UniInst：端到端实例分割的独特表示
comment: This paper wil appear at Neurocomputing. Code: https://github.com/b03505036/UniInst
comments: This paper wil appear at Neurocomputing. Code: https://github.com/b03505036/UniInst
abstract: Existing instance segmentation methods have achieved impressive performance but still suffer from a common dilemma: redundant representations (e.g., multiple boxes, grids, and anchor points) are inferred for one instance, which leads to multiple duplicated predictions. Thus, mainstream methods usually rely on a hand-designed non-maximum suppression (NMS) post-processing step to select the optimal prediction result, which hinders end-to-end training. To address this issue, we propose a box-free and NMS-free end-to-end instance segmentation framework, termed UniInst, that yields only one unique representation for each instance. Specifically, we design an instance-aware one-to-one assignment scheme, namely Only Yield One Representation (OYOR), which dynamically assigns one unique representation to each instance according to the matching quality between predictions and ground truths. Then, a novel prediction re-ranking strategy is elegantly integrated into the framework to address the misalignment between the classification score and the mask quality, enabling the learned representation to be more discriminative. With these techniques, our UniInst, the first FCN-based box-free and NMS-free instance segmentation framework, achieves competitive performance, e.g., 39.0 mask AP using ResNet-50-FPN and 40.2 mask AP using ResNet-101-FPN, against mainstream methods on COCO test-dev 2017. Moreover, the proposed instance-aware method is robust to occlusion scenes, outperforming common baselines by remarkable mask AP on the heavily-occluded OCHuman benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/b03505036/UniInst.
summary: Existing instance segmentation methods have achieved impressive performance but still suffer from a common dilemma: redundant representations (e.g., multiple boxes, grids, and anchor points) are inferred for one instance, which leads to multiple duplicated predictions. Thus, mainstream methods usually rely on a hand-designed non-maximum suppression (NMS) post-processing step to select the optimal prediction result, which hinders end-to-end training. To address this issue, we propose a box-free and NMS-free end-to-end instance segmentation framework, termed UniInst, that yields only one unique representation for each instance. Specifically, we design an instance-aware one-to-one assignment scheme, namely Only Yield One Representation (OYOR), which dynamically assigns one unique representation to each instance according to the matching quality between predictions and ground truths. Then, a novel prediction re-ranking strategy is elegantly integrated into the framework to address the misalignment between the classification score and the mask quality, enabling the learned representation to be more discriminative. With these techniques, our UniInst, the first FCN-based box-free and NMS-free instance segmentation framework, achieves competitive performance, e.g., 39.0 mask AP using ResNet-50-FPN and 40.2 mask AP using ResNet-101-FPN, against mainstream methods on COCO test-dev 2017. Moreover, the proposed instance-aware method is robust to occlusion scenes, outperforming common baselines by remarkable mask AP on the heavily-occluded OCHuman benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/b03505036/UniInst.
abstract_zh: 现有的实例分割方法已经取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但仍然面临一个常见的困境：为一个实例推断出冗余表示（例如，多个框、网格和锚点），这导致多个重复的预测。因此，主流方法通常依赖于手工设计的非极大值抑制（NMS）后处理步骤来选择最佳预测结果，这阻碍了端到端的训练。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种无盒且无 NMS 的端到端实例分割框架，称为 UniInst，它为每个实例仅生成一个唯一的表示。具体来说，我们设计了一种实例感知的一对一分配方案，即仅产生一个表示（OYOR），它根据预测和真实情况之间的匹配质量动态地为每个实例分配一个唯一的表示。然后，一种新颖的预测重排序策略被优雅地集成到框架中，以解决分类分数和掩模质量之间的不一致问题，使学习到的表示更具辨别力。通过这些技术，我们的 UniInst（第一个基于 FCN 的无框和无 NMS 实例分割框架）与 COCO test-dev 2017 上的主流方法相比，实现了具有竞争力的性能，例如使用 ResNet-50-FPN 的 39.0 mask AP 和使用 ResNet-101-FPN 的 40.2 mask AP。此外，所提出的实例感知方法对遮挡场景具有鲁棒性，在严重遮挡的 OCHuman 基准测试。代码可在 https://github.com/b03505036/UniInst 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需NMS和框的端到端实例分割框架UniInst，通过唯一表示每个实例来解决冗余预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割方法因冗余表示（如多个框、网格和锚点）导致重复预测，需依赖手工设计的NMS后处理，阻碍了端到端训练。
AI.method: 设计了实例感知的一对一分配方案OYOR，动态为每个实例分配唯一表示，并引入预测重排序策略以解决分类得分与掩码质量不匹配问题。
AI.result: 在COCO测试集上，使用ResNet-50-FPN达到39.0 mask AP，ResNet-101-FPN达到40.2 mask AP，在遮挡严重的OCHuman基准上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: UniInst作为首个基于FCN的无框无NMS实例分割框架，在保持竞争力的同时提升了对遮挡场景的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Marco Cotogni,Claudio Cusano
title: TreEnhance: A Tree Search Method For Low-Light Image Enhancement
title_zh: TreEnhance：一种用于低光图像增强的树搜索方法
abstract: In this paper we present TreEnhance, an automatic method for low-light image enhancement capable of improving the quality of digital images. The method combines tree search theory, and in particular the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) algorithm, with deep reinforcement learning. Given as input a low-light image, TreEnhance produces as output its enhanced version together with the sequence of image editing operations used to obtain it. During the training phase, the method repeatedly alternates two main phases: a generation phase, where a modified version of MCTS explores the space of image editing operations and selects the most promising sequence, and an optimization phase, where the parameters of a neural network, implementing the enhancement policy, are updated. Two different inference solutions are proposed for the enhancement of new images: one is based on MCTS and is more accurate but more time and memory consuming; the other directly applies the learned policy and is faster but slightly less precise. As a further contribution, we propose a guided search strategy that "reverses" the enhancement procedure that a photo editor applied to a given input image. Unlike other methods from the state of the art, TreEnhance does not pose any constraint on the image resolution and can be used in a variety of scenarios with minimal tuning. We tested the method on two datasets: the Low-Light dataset and the Adobe Five-K dataset obtaining good results from both a qualitative and a quantitative point of view.

The method combines tree search theory, and in particular the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) algorithm, with deep reinforcement learning. Given as input a low-light image, TreEnhance produces as output its enhanced version together with the sequence of image editing operations used to obtain it. During the training phase, the method repeatedly alternates two main phases: a generation phase, where a modified version of MCTS explores the space of image editing operations and selects the most promising sequence, and an optimization phase, where the parameters of a neural network, implementing the enhancement policy, are updated. Two different inference solutions are proposed for the enhancement of new images: one is based on MCTS and is more accurate but more time and memory consuming; the other directly applies the learned policy and is faster but slightly less precise. Unlike other methods from the state of the art, TreEnhance does not pose any constraint on the image resolution and can be used in a variety of scenarios with minimal tuning. We tested the method on two datasets: the Low-Light dataset and the Adobe Five-K dataset obtaining good results from both a qualitative and a quantitative point of view.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TreEnhance，一种用于低光图像增强的自动方法，能够提高数字图像的质量。该方法将树搜索理论，特别是蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）算法与深度强化学习相结合。给定低光图像作为输入，TreEnhance 会生成其增强版本以及用于获取它的图像编辑操作序列作为输出。在训练阶段，该方法重复交替两个主要阶段：生成阶段，其中 MCTS 的修改版本探索图像编辑操作的空间并选择最有希望的序列；以及优化阶段，更新执行增强策略的神经网络参数。针对新图像的增强，提出了两种不同的推理解决方案：一种是基于MCTS，更准确，但更耗时和消耗内存；另一种是基于MCTS，更准确，但更耗时和消耗内存。另一种方法直接应用学习到的策略，速度更快，但精确度稍差。 As a further contribution, we propose a guided search strategy that "reverses" the enhancement procedure that a photo editor applied to a given input image.与现有技术中的其他方法不同，TreEnhance 不会对图像分辨率造成任何限制，并且可以通过最少的调整用于各种场景。我们在两个数据集上测试了该方法：Low-Light 数据集和 Adob​​e Five-K 数据集，从定性和定量的角度都获得了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TreEnhance，一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和深度强化学习的低光图像增强方法，能够自动生成增强图像及操作序列。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法存在分辨率限制或场景适应性差的问题，需开发无需约束且适用于多场景的高效增强方案。
AI.method: 通过MCTS探索图像编辑操作空间，结合深度强化学习训练增强策略网络，提出两种推理模式（精确但耗资源/快速但稍逊）及反向增强引导策略。
AI.result: 在Low-Light和Adobe Five-K数据集上均取得良好定性与定量结果，验证了方法的有效性和跨场景适应性。
AI.conclusion: TreEnhance通过树搜索与强化学习融合，实现了无分辨率限制的低光图像增强，为实际应用提供了灵活高效的解决方案。

The method combines tree search theory, and in particular the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) algorithm, with deep reinforcement learning. Given as input a low-light image, TreEnhance produces as output its enhanced version together with the sequence of image editing operations used to obtain it. During the training phase, the method repeatedly alternates two main phases: a generation phase, where a modified version of MCTS explores the space of image editing operations and selects the most promising sequence, and an optimization phase, where the parameters of a neural network, implementing the enhancement policy, are updated. Two different inference solutions are proposed for the enhancement of new images: one is based on MCTS and is more accurate but more time and memory consuming; the other directly applies the learned policy and is faster but slightly less precise. As a further contribution, we propose a guided search strategy that "reverses" the enhancement procedure that a photo editor applied to a given input image. Unlike other methods from the state of the art, TreEnhance does not pose any constraint on the image resolution and can be used in a variety of scenarios with minimal tuning. We tested the method on two datasets: the Low-Light dataset and the Adobe Five-K dataset obtaining good results from both a qualitative and a quantitative point of view. 在本文中，我们提出了 TreEnhance，一种用于低光图像增强的自动方法，能够提高数字图像的质量。该方法将树搜索理论，特别是蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）算法与深度强化学习相结合。给定低光图像作为输入，TreEnhance 会生成其增强版本以及用于获取它的图像编辑操作序列作为输出。在训练阶段，该方法重复交替两个主要阶段：生成阶段，其中 MCTS 的修改版本探索图像编辑操作的空间并选择最有希望的序列；以及优化阶段，更新执行增强策略的神经网络参数。针对新图像的增强，提出了两种不同的推理解决方案：一种是基于MCTS，更准确，但更耗时和消耗内存；另一种是基于MCTS，更准确，但更耗时和消耗内存。另一种方法直接应用学习到的策略，速度更快，但精确度稍差。 As a further contribution, we propose a guided search strategy that "reverses" the enhancement procedure that a photo editor applied to a given input image.与现有技术中的其他方法不同，TreEnhance 不会对图像分辨率造成任何限制，并且可以通过最少的调整用于各种场景。我们在两个数据集上测试了该方法：Low-Light 数据集和 Adob​​e Five-K 数据集，从定性和定量的角度都获得了良好的结果。 本文提出TreEnhance，一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）和深度强化学习的低光图像增强方法，能够自动生成增强图像及操作序列。 Marco Cotogni,Claudio Cusano cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Hailong Ma,Xin Xia,Xing Wang,Xuefeng Xiao,Jiashi Li,Min Zheng
title: MoCoViT: Mobile Convolutional Vision Transformer
title_zh: MoCoViT：移动卷积视觉转换器
comment: After evaluation, the relevant technical details are temporarily inconvenient to be disclosed, so the manuscript is temporarily withdrawn. We will wait for the right time to reopen
comments: After evaluation, the relevant technical details are temporarily inconvenient to be disclosed, so the manuscript is temporarily withdrawn. We will wait for the right time to reopen
abstract: Recently, Transformer networks have achieved impressive results on a variety of vision tasks. However, most of them are computationally expensive and not suitable for real-world mobile applications. In this work, we present Mobile Convolutional Vision Transformer (MoCoViT), which improves in performance and efficiency by introducing transformer into mobile convolutional networks to leverage the benefits of both architectures. Different from recent works on vision transformer, the mobile transformer block in MoCoViT is carefully designed for mobile devices and is very lightweight, accomplished through two primary modifications: the Mobile Self-Attention (MoSA) module and the Mobile Feed Forward Network (MoFFN). MoSA simplifies the calculation of the attention map through Branch Sharing scheme while MoFFN serves as a mobile version of MLP in the transformer, further reducing the computation by a large margin. Comprehensive experiments verify that our proposed MoCoViT family outperform state-of-the-art portable CNNs and transformer neural architectures on various vision tasks. On ImageNet classification, it achieves 74.5% top-1 accuracy at 147M FLOPs, gaining 1.2% over MobileNetV3 with less computations. And on the COCO object detection task, MoCoViT outperforms GhostNet by 2.1 AP in RetinaNet framework.
summary: Recently, Transformer networks have achieved impressive results on a variety of vision tasks. However, most of them are computationally expensive and not suitable for real-world mobile applications. In this work, we present Mobile Convolutional Vision Transformer (MoCoViT), which improves in performance and efficiency by introducing transformer into mobile convolutional networks to leverage the benefits of both architectures. Different from recent works on vision transformer, the mobile transformer block in MoCoViT is carefully designed for mobile devices and is very lightweight, accomplished through two primary modifications: the Mobile Self-Attention (MoSA) module and the Mobile Feed Forward Network (MoFFN). MoSA simplifies the calculation of the attention map through Branch Sharing scheme while MoFFN serves as a mobile version of MLP in the transformer, further reducing the computation by a large margin. Comprehensive experiments verify that our proposed MoCoViT family outperform state-of-the-art portable CNNs and transformer neural architectures on various vision tasks. On ImageNet classification, it achieves 74.5% top-1 accuracy at 147M FLOPs, gaining 1.2% over MobileNetV3 with less computations. And on the COCO object detection task, MoCoViT outperforms GhostNet by 2.1 AP in RetinaNet framework.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformer 网络在各种视觉任务上取得了令人印象深刻的成果。然而，它们中的大多数计算成本很高，并且不适合现实世界的移动应用程序。在这项工作中，我们提出了移动卷积视觉变换器（MoCoViT），它通过将变换器引入移动卷积网络以利用两种架构的优点来提高性能和效率。与最近的视觉变压器工作不同，MoCoViT 中的移动变压器模块是为移动设备精心设计的，并且非常轻量级，通过两个主要修改完成：移动自注意力（MoSA）模块和移动前馈网络（MoFFN）。 MoSA通过分支共享方案简化了注意力图的计算，而MoFFN作为变压器中MLP的移动版本，进一步大幅减少了计算量。综合实验验证了我们提出的 MoCoViT 系列在各种视觉任务上的性能优于最先进的便携式 CNN 和 Transformer 神经架构。在 ImageNet 分类上，它在 147M FLOP 下实现了 74.5% 的 top-1 准确率，比 MobileNetV3 以更少的计算量提高了 1.2%。而在 COCO 目标检测任务上，MoCoViT 在 RetinaNet 框架中的性能优于 GhostNet 2.1 AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MoCoViT的移动卷积视觉Transformer模型，旨在结合Transformer与移动卷积网络的优势，提升移动端视觉任务的性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型计算量大，难以部署于移动端；传统移动端CNN虽高效但性能有限，需探索兼顾性能与轻量化的新型架构。
AI.method: 设计轻量化移动Transformer模块，包含Branch Sharing方案的MoSA模块与简化MLP的MoFFN模块，通过分块计算与参数共享减少计算量。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类任务中，MoCoViT以147M FLOPs实现74.5% top-1准确率，较MobileNetV3提升1.2%；在COCO目标检测中，RetinaNet框架下优于GhostNet 2.1 AP。
AI.conclusion: MoCoViT通过创新模块设计，在保持移动端计算效率的同时显著提升模型性能，为视觉Transformer在移动设备的应用提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Hyeongseok Son,Junyong Lee,Sunghyun Cho,Seungyong Lee
title: Real-Time Video Deblurring via Lightweight Motion Compensation
title_zh: 通过轻量级运动补偿进行实时视频去模糊
comment: Computer Graphics Forum (special issue on Pacific Graphics 2022), 2022; Equal contribution from the first two authors
comments: Computer Graphics Forum (special issue on Pacific Graphics 2022), 2022; Equal contribution from the first two authors
abstract: While motion compensation greatly improves video deblurring quality, separately performing motion compensation and video deblurring demands huge computational overhead. This paper proposes a real-time video deblurring framework consisting of a lightweight multi-task unit that supports both video deblurring and motion compensation in an efficient way. The multi-task unit is specifically designed to handle large portions of the two tasks using a single shared network, and consists of a multi-task detail network and simple networks for deblurring and motion compensation. The multi-task unit minimizes the cost of incorporating motion compensation into video deblurring and enables real-time deblurring. Moreover, by stacking multiple multi-task units, our framework provides flexible control between the cost and deblurring quality. We experimentally validate the state-of-the-art deblurring quality of our approach, which runs at a much faster speed compared to previous methods, and show practical real-time performance (30.99dB@30fps measured in the DVD dataset).
summary: While motion compensation greatly improves video deblurring quality, separately performing motion compensation and video deblurring demands huge computational overhead. This paper proposes a real-time video deblurring framework consisting of a lightweight multi-task unit that supports both video deblurring and motion compensation in an efficient way. The multi-task unit is specifically designed to handle large portions of the two tasks using a single shared network, and consists of a multi-task detail network and simple networks for deblurring and motion compensation. The multi-task unit minimizes the cost of incorporating motion compensation into video deblurring and enables real-time deblurring. Moreover, by stacking multiple multi-task units, our framework provides flexible control between the cost and deblurring quality. We experimentally validate the state-of-the-art deblurring quality of our approach, which runs at a much faster speed compared to previous methods, and show practical real-time performance (30.99dB@30fps measured in the DVD dataset).
abstract_zh: While motion compensation greatly improves video deblurring quality, separately performing motion compensation and video deblurring demands huge computational overhead. This paper proposes a real-time video deblurring framework consisting of a lightweight multi-task unit that supports both video deblurring and motion compensation in an efficient way. The multi-task unit is specifically designed to handle large portions of the two tasks using a single shared network, and consists of a multi-task detail network and simple networks for deblurring and motion compensation.多任务单元最大限度地降低了将运动补偿纳入视频去模糊的成本，并实现了实时去模糊。此外，通过堆叠多个多任务单元，我们的框架提供了成本和去模糊质量之间的灵活控制。我们通过实验验证了我们方法的最先进的去模糊质量，与以前的方法相比，该方法的运行速度要快得多，并显示出实用的实时性能（在 DVD 数据集中测量的 30.99dB@30fps）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级实时视频去模糊框架，通过整合运动补偿与去模糊任务降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将运动补偿与视频去模糊分开处理导致计算开销过大，需设计高效融合两者的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级多任务单元，采用共享网络结构同时处理去模糊与运动补偿，并通过堆叠单元灵活平衡计算成本与质量。
AI.result: 在DVD数据集上实现30.99dB@30fps的实时性能，去模糊质量达到SOTA水平且速度显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过任务整合与结构优化，在保证去模糊效果的同时实现了高效的实时视频处理。

search_text: Real-Time Video Deblurring via Lightweight Motion Compensation 通过轻量级运动补偿进行实时视频去模糊 While motion compensation greatly improves video deblurring quality, separately performing motion compensation and video deblurring demands huge computational overhead. This paper proposes a real-time video deblurring framework consisting of a lightweight multi-task unit that supports both video deblurring and motion compensation in an efficient way. The multi-task unit is specifically designed to handle large portions of the two tasks using a single shared network, and consists of a multi-task detail network and simple networks for deblurring and motion compensation. The multi-task unit minimizes the cost of incorporating motion compensation into video deblurring and enables real-time deblurring. Moreover, by stacking multiple multi-task units, our framework provides flexible control between the cost and deblurring quality. We experimentally validate the state-of-the-art deblurring quality of our approach, which runs at a much faster speed compared to previous methods, and show practical real-time performance (30.99dB@30fps measured in the DVD dataset). While motion compensation greatly improves video deblurring quality, separately performing motion compensation and video deblurring demands huge computational overhead. This paper proposes a real-time video deblurring framework consisting of a lightweight multi-task unit that supports both video deblurring and motion compensation in an efficient way. The multi-task unit is specifically designed to handle large portions of the two tasks using a single shared network, and consists of a multi-task detail network and simple networks for deblurring and motion compensation.多任务单元最大限度地降低了将运动补偿纳入视频去模糊的成本，并实现了实时去模糊。此外，通过堆叠多个多任务单元，我们的框架提供了成本和去模糊质量之间的灵活控制。我们通过实验验证了我们方法的最先进的去模糊质量，与以前的方法相比，该方法的运行速度要快得多，并显示出实用的实时性能（在 DVD 数据集中测量的 30.99dB@30fps）。 本文提出一种轻量级实时视频去模糊框架，通过整合运动补偿与去模糊任务降低计算成本。 Hyeongseok Son,Junyong Lee,Sunghyun Cho,Seungyong Lee cs.CV

title: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on High Dynamic Range Imaging: Methods and Results
title_zh: NTIRE 2022 高动态范围成像挑战赛：方法和结果
abstract: This paper reviews the challenge on constrained high dynamic range (HDR) imaging that was part of the New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement (NTIRE) workshop, held in conjunction with CVPR 2022. This manuscript focuses on the competition set-up, datasets, the proposed methods and their results. The challenge aims at estimating an HDR image from multiple respective low dynamic range (LDR) observations, which might suffer from under- or over-exposed regions and different sources of noise. The challenge is composed of two tracks with an emphasis on fidelity and complexity constraints: In Track 1, participants are asked to optimize objective fidelity scores while imposing a low-complexity constraint (i.e. solutions can not exceed a given number of operations). In Track 2, participants are asked to minimize the complexity of their solutions while imposing a constraint on fidelity scores (i.e. solutions are required to obtain a higher fidelity score than the prescribed baseline). Both tracks use the same data and metrics: Fidelity is measured by means of PSNR with respect to a ground-truth HDR image (computed both directly and with a canonical tonemapping operation), while complexity metrics include the number of Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations and runtime (in seconds).
summary: This paper reviews the challenge on constrained high dynamic range (HDR) imaging that was part of the New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement (NTIRE) workshop, held in conjunction with CVPR 2022. This manuscript focuses on the competition set-up, datasets, the proposed methods and their results. The challenge aims at estimating an HDR image from multiple respective low dynamic range (LDR) observations, which might suffer from under- or over-exposed regions and different sources of noise. The challenge is composed of two tracks with an emphasis on fidelity and complexity constraints: In Track 1, participants are asked to optimize objective fidelity scores while imposing a low-complexity constraint (i.e. solutions can not exceed a given number of operations). In Track 2, participants are asked to minimize the complexity of their solutions while imposing a constraint on fidelity scores (i.e. solutions are required to obtain a higher fidelity score than the prescribed baseline). Both tracks use the same data and metrics: Fidelity is measured by means of PSNR with respect to a ground-truth HDR image (computed both directly and with a canonical tonemapping operation), while complexity metrics include the number of Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations and runtime (in seconds).
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了约束高动态范围 (HDR) 成像的挑战，该挑战是与 CVPR 2022 联合举办的图像恢复和增强新趋势 (NTIRE) 研讨会的一部分。本文重点介绍了竞赛设置、数据集、提出的方法及其结果。该挑战赛旨在根据多个各自的低动态范围 (LDR) 观测值估计 HDR 图像，这些图像可能会受到曝光不足或过度曝光区域以及不同噪声源的影响。该挑战由两个赛道组成，重点关注保真度和复杂性约束：在赛道 1 中，要求参与者优化客观保真度分数，同时施加低复杂性约束（即解决方案不能超过给定的操作数量）。在第二轨中，参与者被要求最大限度地降低其解决方案的复杂性，同时对保真度分数施加限制（即要求解决方案获得比规定基线更高的保真度分数）。两个轨道使用相同的数据和指标：保真度是通过相对于真实 HDR 图像的 PSNR 来测量的（直接计算和使用规范色调映射操作计算），而复杂性指标包括乘法累加 (MAC) 操作的数量和运行时间（以秒为单位）。

AI.tldr: 该论文回顾了NTIRE 2022工作坊中关于受限高动态范围（HDR）成像的挑战，重点介绍了竞赛设置、数据集、提出的方法及其结果，旨在从多个低动态范围（LDR）观测中估计HDR图像。
AI.motivation: 高动态范围成像在处理曝光不足或过度区域及噪声时面临挑战，需在保真度与计算复杂度间取得平衡，推动更高效算法的发展。
AI.method: 挑战分为两个赛道：赛道1在低复杂度约束下优化保真度指标（如PSNR）；赛道2在保真度基线约束下最小化复杂度（如MAC操作数和运行时间）。使用相同数据集和评估指标。
AI.result: 竞赛展示了多种方法在保真度与复杂度上的权衡结果，部分方法在特定约束下表现出色，为HDR成像提供了有效解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战验证了在复杂度约束下提升HDR重建效果的可行性，未来研究需进一步探索高效算法以兼顾图像质量与计算效率。

authors_text: Youngjae Yu,Jiwan Chung,Heeseung Yun,Jack Hessel,JaeSung Park,Ximing Lu,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Rowan Zellers,Ronan Le Bras,Gunhee Kim,Yejin Choi
title: Multimodal Knowledge Alignment with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多模态知识与强化学习的结合
abstract: Large language models readily adapt to novel settings, even without task-specific training data. Can their zero-shot capacity be extended to multimodal inputs? In this work, we propose ESPER which extends language-only zero-shot models to unseen multimodal tasks, like image and audio captioning. Our key novelty is to use reinforcement learning to align multimodal inputs to language model generations without direct supervision: for example, in the image case our reward optimization relies only on cosine similarity derived from CLIP, and thus requires no additional explicitly paired (image, caption) data. Because the parameters of the language model are left unchanged, the model maintains its capacity for zero-shot generalization. Experiments demonstrate that ESPER outperforms baselines and prior work on a variety of zero-shot tasks; these include a new benchmark we collect+release, ESP dataset, which tasks models with generating several diversely-styled captions for each image.
summary: Large language models readily adapt to novel settings, even without task-specific training data. Can their zero-shot capacity be extended to multimodal inputs? In this work, we propose ESPER which extends language-only zero-shot models to unseen multimodal tasks, like image and audio captioning. Our key novelty is to use reinforcement learning to align multimodal inputs to language model generations without direct supervision: for example, in the image case our reward optimization relies only on cosine similarity derived from CLIP, and thus requires no additional explicitly paired (image, caption) data. Because the parameters of the language model are left unchanged, the model maintains its capacity for zero-shot generalization. Experiments demonstrate that ESPER outperforms baselines and prior work on a variety of zero-shot tasks; these include a new benchmark we collect+release, ESP dataset, which tasks models with generating several diversely-styled captions for each image.
abstract_zh: 即使没有特定于任务的训练数据，大型语言模型也能轻松适应新的环境。它们的零样本能力可以扩展到多模式输入吗？在这项工作中，我们提出了 ESPER，它将仅语言的零样本模型扩展到看不见的多模态任务，例如图像和音频字幕。 Our key novelty is to use reinforcement learning to align multimodal inputs to language model generations without direct supervision: for example, in the image case our reward optimization relies only on cosine similarity derived from CLIP, and thus requires no additional explicitly paired (image, caption) data.由于语言模型的参数保持不变，因此模型保持了零样本泛化的能力。实验表明，ESPER 在各种零样本任务上的表现优于基线和先前的工作；其中包括我们收集+发布的一个新基准，ESP 数据集，该数据集的任务是为每个图像生成多个不同风格的标题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的多模态知识对齐方法ESPER，无需任务特定数据即可将零样本语言模型扩展到未见过的多模态任务（如图像和音频字幕生成）。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在零样本设置下表现良好，但其能力尚未有效扩展到多模态输入。现有方法通常依赖显式配对数据，限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过强化学习框架，利用CLIP模型的余弦相似度作为奖励信号，对齐多模态输入与语言模型生成内容。无需修改语言模型参数，保持其零样本泛化能力。
AI.result: ESPER在多种零样本任务中优于基线方法，包括新发布的ESP数据集（要求模型为每张图像生成多样风格的字幕）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过无监督的多模态对齐策略，有效提升了零样本语言模型处理多模态任务的能力，为多模态生成任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Multimodal Knowledge Alignment with Reinforcement Learning 多模态知识与强化学习的结合 Large language models readily adapt to novel settings, even without task-specific training data. Can their zero-shot capacity be extended to multimodal inputs? In this work, we propose ESPER which extends language-only zero-shot models to unseen multimodal tasks, like image and audio captioning. Our key novelty is to use reinforcement learning to align multimodal inputs to language model generations without direct supervision: for example, in the image case our reward optimization relies only on cosine similarity derived from CLIP, and thus requires no additional explicitly paired (image, caption) data. Because the parameters of the language model are left unchanged, the model maintains its capacity for zero-shot generalization. Experiments demonstrate that ESPER outperforms baselines and prior work on a variety of zero-shot tasks; these include a new benchmark we collect+release, ESP dataset, which tasks models with generating several diversely-styled captions for each image. 即使没有特定于任务的训练数据，大型语言模型也能轻松适应新的环境。它们的零样本能力可以扩展到多模式输入吗？在这项工作中，我们提出了 ESPER，它将仅语言的零样本模型扩展到看不见的多模态任务，例如图像和音频字幕。 Our key novelty is to use reinforcement learning to align multimodal inputs to language model generations without direct supervision: for example, in the image case our reward optimization relies only on cosine similarity derived from CLIP, and thus requires no additional explicitly paired (image, caption) data.由于语言模型的参数保持不变，因此模型保持了零样本泛化的能力。实验表明，ESPER 在各种零样本任务上的表现优于基线和先前的工作；其中包括我们收集+发布的一个新基准，ESP 数据集，该数据集的任务是为每个图像生成多个不同风格的标题。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的多模态知识对齐方法ESPER，无需任务特定数据即可将零样本语言模型扩展到未见过的多模态任务（如图像和音频字幕生成）。 Youngjae Yu,Jiwan Chung,Heeseung Yun,Jack Hessel,JaeSung Park,Ximing Lu,Prithviraj Ammanabrolu,Rowan Zellers,Ronan Le Bras,Gunhee Kim,Yejin Choi cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Jie Huang,Hanyin Shao,Kevin Chen-Chuan Chang
title: Are Large Pre-Trained Language Models Leaking Your Personal Information?
title_zh: 大型预训练语言模型是否会泄露您的个人信息？
abstract: Are Large Pre-Trained Language Models Leaking Your Personal Information? In this paper, we analyze whether Pre-Trained Language Models (PLMs) are prone to leaking personal information. Specifically, we query PLMs for email addresses with contexts of the email address or prompts containing the owner's name. We find that PLMs do leak personal information due to memorization. However, since the models are weak at association, the risk of specific personal information being extracted by attackers is low. We hope this work could help the community to better understand the privacy risk of PLMs and bring new insights to make PLMs safe.
summary: Are Large Pre-Trained Language Models Leaking Your Personal Information? In this paper, we analyze whether Pre-Trained Language Models (PLMs) are prone to leaking personal information. Specifically, we query PLMs for email addresses with contexts of the email address or prompts containing the owner's name. We find that PLMs do leak personal information due to memorization. However, since the models are weak at association, the risk of specific personal information being extracted by attackers is low. We hope this work could help the community to better understand the privacy risk of PLMs and bring new insights to make PLMs safe.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型是否会泄露您的个人信息？在本文中，我们分析了预训练语言模型（PLM）是否容易泄露个人信息。具体来说，我们在 PLM 中查询电子邮件地址，其中包含电子邮件地址的上下文或包含所有者姓名的提示。我们发现 PLM 确实会因记忆而泄露个人信息。然而，由于模型的关联性较弱，因此攻击者提取特定个人信息的风险较低。我们希望这项工作能够帮助社区更好地了解 PLM 的隐私风险，并为确保 PLM 的安全带来新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了预训练语言模型（PLMs）是否会泄露个人信息，通过查询包含电子邮件地址或所有者姓名的上下文来测试模型行为。
AI.motivation: 随着PLMs的广泛应用，其潜在的隐私风险尚未被充分研究，需评估模型是否可能泄露用户个人敏感信息。
AI.method: 通过构造包含电子邮件地址或姓名的上下文/提示，查询PLMs的输出，分析其是否泄露个人信息并评估攻击风险。
AI.result: 实验发现PLMs因记忆效应会泄露信息，但因关联能力较弱，攻击者提取特定个人信息的风险较低。
AI.conclusion: PLMs存在隐私泄露风险，但实际威胁有限，需进一步研究以提升模型安全性并增强社区对隐私风险的认知。

authors_text: Xinke Li,Henghui Ding,Zekun Tong,Yuwei Wu,Yeow Meng Chee
title: Primitive3D: 3D Object Dataset Synthesis from Randomly Assembled Primitives
title_zh: Primitive3D：从随机组装的基元合成 3D 对象数据集
abstract: Numerous advancements in deep learning can be attributed to the access to large-scale and well-annotated datasets. However, such a dataset is prohibitively expensive in 3D computer vision due to the substantial collection cost. To alleviate this issue, we propose a cost-effective method for automatically generating a large amount of 3D objects with annotations. In particular, we synthesize objects simply by assembling multiple random primitives. These objects are thus auto-annotated with part labels originating from primitives. This allows us to perform multi-task learning by combining the supervised segmentation with unsupervised reconstruction. Considering the large overhead of learning on the generated dataset, we further propose a dataset distillation strategy to remove redundant samples regarding a target dataset. We conduct extensive experiments for the downstream tasks of 3D object classification. The results indicate that our dataset, together with multi-task pretraining on its annotations, achieves the best performance compared to other commonly used datasets. Further study suggests that our strategy can improve the model performance by pretraining and fine-tuning scheme, especially for the dataset with a small scale. In addition, pretraining with the proposed dataset distillation method can save 86\% of the pretraining time with negligible performance degradation. We expect that our attempt provides a new data-centric perspective for training 3D deep models.
summary: Numerous advancements in deep learning can be attributed to the access to large-scale and well-annotated datasets. However, such a dataset is prohibitively expensive in 3D computer vision due to the substantial collection cost. To alleviate this issue, we propose a cost-effective method for automatically generating a large amount of 3D objects with annotations. In particular, we synthesize objects simply by assembling multiple random primitives. These objects are thus auto-annotated with part labels originating from primitives. This allows us to perform multi-task learning by combining the supervised segmentation with unsupervised reconstruction. Considering the large overhead of learning on the generated dataset, we further propose a dataset distillation strategy to remove redundant samples regarding a target dataset. We conduct extensive experiments for the downstream tasks of 3D object classification. The results indicate that our dataset, together with multi-task pretraining on its annotations, achieves the best performance compared to other commonly used datasets. Further study suggests that our strategy can improve the model performance by pretraining and fine-tuning scheme, especially for the dataset with a small scale. In addition, pretraining with the proposed dataset distillation method can save 86\% of the pretraining time with negligible performance degradation. We expect that our attempt provides a new data-centric perspective for training 3D deep models.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的众多进步可以归因于对大规模且注释良好的数据集的访问。然而，由于收集成本高昂，这样的数据集在 3D 计算机视觉中非常昂贵。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种经济高效的方法来自动生成大量带有注释的 3D 对象。特别是，我们简单地通过组装多个随机基元来合成对象。因此，这些对象会使用源自基元的部件标签进行自动注释。这使我们能够通过将监督分割与无监督重建相结合来执行多任务学习。考虑到对生成的数据集进行学习的巨大开销，我们进一步提出了一种数据集蒸馏策略来删除有关目标数据集的冗余样本。我们针对 3D 对象分类的下游任务进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与其他常用数据集相比，我们的数据集及其注释的多任务预训练实现了最佳性能。进一步的研究表明，我们的策略可以通过预训练和微调方案来提高模型性能，特别是对于小规模的数据集。此外，使用所提出的数据集蒸馏方法进行预训练可以节省 86% 的预训练时间，并且性能下降可以忽略不计。我们希望我们的尝试为训练 3D 深度模型提供一个以数据为中心的新视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过随机组装基本几何体生成大规模带标注3D物体数据集的方法，用于训练3D深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 3D计算机视觉领域缺乏大规模且标注成本高昂的数据集，现有数据集难以满足深度学习模型训练需求。
AI.method: 通过随机组合基本几何体生成3D物体，并自动标注部件信息；结合监督分割与无监督重建进行多任务学习，采用数据集蒸馏策略剔除冗余样本。
AI.result: 在3D物体分类任务中，该数据集配合多任务预训练取得最佳性能，且蒸馏方法可节省86%预训练时间而性能损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为3D深度模型训练提供了新的数据驱动视角，尤其适用于小规模数据集的性能提升。

authors_text: Miloš Stanojević
title: Unbiased and Efficient Sampling of Dependency Trees
title_zh: 依赖树的无偏且高效的采样
abstract: Most computational models of dependency syntax consist of distributions over spanning trees. However, the majority of dependency treebanks require that every valid dependency tree has a single edge coming out of the ROOT node, a constraint that is not part of the definition of spanning trees. For this reason all standard inference algorithms for spanning trees are suboptimal for inference over dependency trees. Zmigrod et al. (2021b) proposed algorithms for sampling with and without replacement from the dependency tree distribution that incorporate the single-root constraint. In this paper we show that their fastest algorithm for sampling with replacement, Wilson-RC, is in fact producing biased samples and we provide two alternatives that are unbiased. Additionally, we propose two algorithms (one incremental, one parallel) that reduce the asymptotic runtime of algorithm for sampling k trees without replacement to O(kn3). These algorithms are both asymptotically and practically more efficient.
summary: Most computational models of dependency syntax consist of distributions over spanning trees. However, the majority of dependency treebanks require that every valid dependency tree has a single edge coming out of the ROOT node, a constraint that is not part of the definition of spanning trees. For this reason all standard inference algorithms for spanning trees are suboptimal for inference over dependency trees. Zmigrod et al. (2021b) proposed algorithms for sampling with and without replacement from the dependency tree distribution that incorporate the single-root constraint. In this paper we show that their fastest algorithm for sampling with replacement, Wilson-RC, is in fact producing biased samples and we provide two alternatives that are unbiased. Additionally, we propose two algorithms (one incremental, one parallel) that reduce the asymptotic runtime of algorithm for sampling k trees without replacement to O(kn3). These algorithms are both asymptotically and practically more efficient.
abstract_zh: 大多数依赖语法的计算模型由生成树上的分布组成。然而，大多数依赖树库要求每个有效的依赖树都有一条从 ROOT 节点出来的边，这一约束不是生成树定义的一部分。因此，生成树的所有标准推理算法对于依赖树的推理来说都不是最佳的。兹米格罗德等人。 (2021b) 提出了从包含单根约束的依赖树分布中进行有替换和无替换采样的算法。在本文中，我们展示了他们最快的替换采样算法 Wilson-RC 实际上会产生有偏差的样本，并且我们提供了两种无偏差的替代方案。此外，我们提出了两种算法（一种增量算法，一种并行算法），可以减少 k 树采样算法的渐近运行时间，无需替换为 O(kn3)。这些算法渐近且实际上更高效。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决依赖树采样中的偏差问题，并提出更高效的采样算法。
AI.motivation: 现有依赖树采样算法（如Wilson-RC）存在偏差，且未有效处理依赖树的单根节点约束，导致推理效率低下。
AI.method: 分析Wilson-RC算法的偏差，提出两种无偏采样方法；设计增量和并行算法，将无放回采样时间复杂度降至O(kn³)。
AI.result: 提出两种无偏采样算法，改进后的算法在渐进和实际效率上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 新方法解决了依赖树采样的偏差问题，显著提升效率，为自然语言处理中的句法分析提供更可靠工具。

search_text: Unbiased and Efficient Sampling of Dependency Trees 依赖树的无偏且高效的采样 Most computational models of dependency syntax consist of distributions over spanning trees. However, the majority of dependency treebanks require that every valid dependency tree has a single edge coming out of the ROOT node, a constraint that is not part of the definition of spanning trees. For this reason all standard inference algorithms for spanning trees are suboptimal for inference over dependency trees. Zmigrod et al. (2021b) proposed algorithms for sampling with and without replacement from the dependency tree distribution that incorporate the single-root constraint. In this paper we show that their fastest algorithm for sampling with replacement, Wilson-RC, is in fact producing biased samples and we provide two alternatives that are unbiased. Additionally, we propose two algorithms (one incremental, one parallel) that reduce the asymptotic runtime of algorithm for sampling k trees without replacement to O(kn3). These algorithms are both asymptotically and practically more efficient. 大多数依赖语法的计算模型由生成树上的分布组成。然而，大多数依赖树库要求每个有效的依赖树都有一条从 ROOT 节点出来的边，这一约束不是生成树定义的一部分。因此，生成树的所有标准推理算法对于依赖树的推理来说都不是最佳的。兹米格罗德等人。 (2021b) 提出了从包含单根约束的依赖树分布中进行有替换和无替换采样的算法。在本文中，我们展示了他们最快的替换采样算法 Wilson-RC 实际上会产生有偏差的样本，并且我们提供了两种无偏差的替代方案。此外，我们提出了两种算法（一种增量算法，一种并行算法），可以减少 k 树采样算法的渐近运行时间，无需替换为 O(kn3)。这些算法渐近且实际上更高效。 本文旨在解决依赖树采样中的偏差问题，并提出更高效的采样算法。 Miloš Stanojević cs.CL,cs.DS

authors_text: Xixia Xu,Yingguo Gao,Ke Yan,Xue Lin,Qi Zou
title: Location-free Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 不受位置影响的人体姿势估计
comment: Beijing Jiaotong University, Tencent Toutu Lab
comments: Beijing Jiaotong University, Tencent Toutu Lab
abstract: Human pose estimation (HPE) usually requires large-scale training data to reach high performance. However, it is rather time-consuming to collect high-quality and fine-grained annotations for human body. To alleviate this issue, we revisit HPE and propose a location-free framework without supervision of keypoint locations. We reformulate the regression-based HPE from the perspective of classification. Inspired by the CAM-based weakly-supervised object localization, we observe that the coarse keypoint locations can be acquired through the part-aware CAMs but unsatisfactory due to the gap between the fine-grained HPE and the object-level localization. To this end, we propose a customized transformer framework to mine the fine-grained representation of human context, equipped with the structural relation to capture subtle differences among keypoints. Concretely, we design a Multi-scale Spatial-guided Context Encoder to fully capture the global human context while focusing on the part-aware regions and a Relation-encoded Pose Prototype Generation module to encode the structural relations. All these works together for strengthening the weak supervision from image-level category labels on locations. Our model achieves competitive performance on three datasets when only supervised at a category-level and importantly, it can achieve comparable results with fully-supervised methods with only 25\% location labels on MS-COCO and MPII.
summary: Human pose estimation (HPE) usually requires large-scale training data to reach high performance. However, it is rather time-consuming to collect high-quality and fine-grained annotations for human body. To alleviate this issue, we revisit HPE and propose a location-free framework without supervision of keypoint locations. We reformulate the regression-based HPE from the perspective of classification. Inspired by the CAM-based weakly-supervised object localization, we observe that the coarse keypoint locations can be acquired through the part-aware CAMs but unsatisfactory due to the gap between the fine-grained HPE and the object-level localization. To this end, we propose a customized transformer framework to mine the fine-grained representation of human context, equipped with the structural relation to capture subtle differences among keypoints. Concretely, we design a Multi-scale Spatial-guided Context Encoder to fully capture the global human context while focusing on the part-aware regions and a Relation-encoded Pose Prototype Generation module to encode the structural relations. All these works together for strengthening the weak supervision from image-level category labels on locations. Our model achieves competitive performance on three datasets when only supervised at a category-level and importantly, it can achieve comparable results with fully-supervised methods with only 25\% location labels on MS-COCO and MPII.
abstract_zh: 人体姿态估计（HPE）通常需要大规模训练数据才能达到高性能。然而，收集高质量、细粒度的人体标注是相当耗时的。为了缓解这个问题，我们重新审视 HPE 并提出了一个无需监督关键点位置的无位置框架。我们从分类的角度重新表述了基于回归的 HPE。受基于 CAM 的弱监督对象定位的启发，我们观察到粗略的关键点位置可以通过部分感知 CAM 获得，但由于细粒度 HPE 和对象级定位之间的差距而不能令人满意。为此，我们提出了一个定制的 Transformer 框架来挖掘人类上下文的细粒度表示，并配备结构关系来捕获关键点之间的细微差异。具体来说，我们设计了一个多尺度空间引导上下文编码器来完全捕获全局人类上下文，同时关注部分感知区域和一个关系编码姿势原型生成模块来编码结构关系。所有这些共同作用，加强了位置图像级类别标签的弱监督。当仅在类别级别进行监督时，我们的模型在三个数据集上实现了具有竞争力的性能，重要的是，它可以通过完全监督的方法获得可比的结果，在 MS-COCO 和 MPII 上仅使用 25% 的位置标签。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需关键点位置监督的人体姿态估计框架，仅依赖图像级类别标签进行训练。
AI.motivation: 传统人体姿态估计需要大量精细标注的关键点位置数据，但标注成本高且耗时，因此需要一种减少对位置标注依赖的方法。
AI.method: 将回归型姿态估计重构为分类问题，结合弱监督的类激活映射（CAM）技术，设计多尺度空间引导上下文编码器和关系编码姿态原型生成模块，通过结构关系建模捕捉关键点间的细微差异。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上仅使用类别级监督时表现优异，且在MS-COCO和MPII数据集上仅需25%的位置标签即可达到与全监督方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过弱监督和结构关系建模有效降低了姿态估计对精细标注的依赖，为减少标注成本提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jingnong Qu,Liunian Harold Li,Jieyu Zhao,Sunipa Dev,Kai-Wei Chang
title: DisinfoMeme: A Multimodal Dataset for Detecting Meme Intentionally Spreading Out Disinformation
title_zh: DisinfoMeme：用于检测故意传播虚假信息的 Meme 的多模式数据集
abstract: Disinformation has become a serious problem on social media. In particular, given their short format, visual attraction, and humorous nature, memes have a significant advantage in dissemination among online communities, making them an effective vehicle for the spread of disinformation. We present DisinfoMeme to help detect disinformation memes. The dataset contains memes mined from Reddit covering three current topics: the COVID-19 pandemic, the Black Lives Matter movement, and veganism/vegetarianism. The dataset poses multiple unique challenges: limited data and label imbalance, reliance on external knowledge, multimodal reasoning, layout dependency, and noise from OCR. We test multiple widely-used unimodal and multimodal models on this dataset. The experiments show that the room for improvement is still huge for current models.
summary: Disinformation has become a serious problem on social media. In particular, given their short format, visual attraction, and humorous nature, memes have a significant advantage in dissemination among online communities, making them an effective vehicle for the spread of disinformation. We present DisinfoMeme to help detect disinformation memes. The dataset contains memes mined from Reddit covering three current topics: the COVID-19 pandemic, the Black Lives Matter movement, and veganism/vegetarianism. The dataset poses multiple unique challenges: limited data and label imbalance, reliance on external knowledge, multimodal reasoning, layout dependency, and noise from OCR. We test multiple widely-used unimodal and multimodal models on this dataset. The experiments show that the room for improvement is still huge for current models.
abstract_zh: Disinformation has become a serious problem on social media.特别是，表情包因其格式简短、视觉吸引力强、幽默性等特点，在网络社区传播方面具有显着优势，成为传播虚假信息的有效工具。 We present DisinfoMeme to help detect disinformation memes.该数据集包含从 Reddit 挖掘的模因，涵盖三个当前主题：COVID-19 大流行、Black Lives Matter 运动和素食主义/素食主义。该数据集带来了多种独特的挑战：有限的数据和标签不平衡、对外部知识的依赖、多模态推理、布局依赖性以及 OCR 噪声。 We test multiple widely-used unimodal and multimodal models on this dataset. The experiments show that the room for improvement is still huge for current models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisinfoMeme数据集，用于检测有意传播虚假信息的网络迷因（meme）。
AI.motivation: 虚假信息在社交媒体中传播严重，而迷因因其视觉吸引力和幽默性更易扩散，现有模型在检测此类内容时存在显著不足。
AI.method: 从Reddit收集涵盖新冠疫情、黑人生命重要运动及素食主义三个主题的迷因，构建包含多模态特征（文本、图像、布局）的数据集，并测试多种单模态与多模态模型。
AI.result: 实验表明当前主流模型在该数据集上的表现仍有较大提升空间，尤其在处理多模态推理、OCR噪声和标签不平衡问题时效果有限。
AI.conclusion: DisinfoMeme为未来研究提供了基准数据集，揭示了现有技术在多模态虚假信息检测中的关键挑战，需进一步优化模型设计与训练方法。

tldr: 本文提出DisinfoMeme数据集，用于检测有意传播虚假信息的网络迷因（meme）。
motivation: 虚假信息在社交媒体中传播严重，而迷因因其视觉吸引力和幽默性更易扩散，现有模型在检测此类内容时存在显著不足。
method: 从Reddit收集涵盖新冠疫情、黑人生命重要运动及素食主义三个主题的迷因，构建包含多模态特征（文本、图像、布局）的数据集，并测试多种单模态与多模态模型。
result: 实验表明当前主流模型在该数据集上的表现仍有较大提升空间，尤其在处理多模态推理、OCR噪声和标签不平衡问题时效果有限。
conclusion: DisinfoMeme为未来研究提供了基准数据集，揭示了现有技术在多模态虚假信息检测中的关键挑战，需进一步优化模型设计与训练方法。
search_text: DisinfoMeme: A Multimodal Dataset for Detecting Meme Intentionally Spreading Out Disinformation DisinfoMeme：用于检测故意传播虚假信息的 Meme 的多模式数据集 Disinformation has become a serious problem on social media. In particular, given their short format, visual attraction, and humorous nature, memes have a significant advantage in dissemination among online communities, making them an effective vehicle for the spread of disinformation. We present DisinfoMeme to help detect disinformation memes. The dataset contains memes mined from Reddit covering three current topics: the COVID-19 pandemic, the Black Lives Matter movement, and veganism/vegetarianism. The dataset poses multiple unique challenges: limited data and label imbalance, reliance on external knowledge, multimodal reasoning, layout dependency, and noise from OCR. We test multiple widely-used unimodal and multimodal models on this dataset. The experiments show that the room for improvement is still huge for current models. Disinformation has become a serious problem on social media.特别是，表情包因其格式简短、视觉吸引力强、幽默性等特点，在网络社区传播方面具有显着优势，成为传播虚假信息的有效工具。 We present DisinfoMeme to help detect disinformation memes.该数据集包含从 Reddit 挖掘的模因，涵盖三个当前主题：COVID-19 大流行、Black Lives Matter 运动和素食主义/素食主义。该数据集带来了多种独特的挑战：有限的数据和标签不平衡、对外部知识的依赖、多模态推理、布局依赖性以及 OCR 噪声。 We test multiple widely-used unimodal and multimodal models on this dataset. The experiments show that the room for improvement is still huge for current models. 本文提出DisinfoMeme数据集，用于检测有意传播虚假信息的网络迷因（meme）。 Jingnong Qu,Liunian Harold Li,Jieyu Zhao,Sunipa Dev,Kai-Wei Chang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Thao Minh Le,Vuong Le,Sunil Gupta,Svetha Venkatesh,Truyen Tran
title: Guiding Visual Question Answering with Attention Priors
title_zh: 用注意先验指导视觉问答
abstract: The current success of modern visual reasoning systems is arguably attributed to cross-modality attention mechanisms. However, in deliberative reasoning such as in VQA, attention is unconstrained at each step, and thus may serve as a statistical pooling mechanism rather than a semantic operation intended to select information relevant to inference. This is because at training time, attention is only guided by a very sparse signal (i.e. the answer label) at the end of the inference chain. This causes the cross-modality attention weights to deviate from the desired visual-language bindings. To rectify this deviation, we propose to guide the attention mechanism using explicit linguistic-visual grounding. This grounding is derived by connecting structured linguistic concepts in the query to their referents among the visual objects. Here we learn the grounding from the pairing of questions and images alone, without the need for answer annotation or external grounding supervision. This grounding guides the attention mechanism inside VQA models through a duality of mechanisms: pre-training attention weight calculation and directly guiding the weights at inference time on a case-by-case basis. The resultant algorithm is capable of probing attention-based reasoning models, injecting relevant associative knowledge, and regulating the core reasoning process. This scalable enhancement improves the performance of VQA models, fortifies their robustness to limited access to supervised data, and increases interpretability.

abstract_zh: The current success of modern visual reasoning systems is arguably attributed to cross-modality attention mechanisms.然而，在诸如 VQA 之类的深思熟虑的推理中，注意力在每一步都不受限制，因此可以充当统计池机制，而不是旨在选择与推理相关的信息的语义操作。 This is because at training time, attention is only guided by a very sparse signal (i.e. the answer label) at the end of the inference chain. This causes the cross-modality attention weights to deviate from the desired visual-language bindings. To rectify this deviation, we propose to guide the attention mechanism using explicit linguistic-visual grounding. This grounding is derived by connecting structured linguistic concepts in the query to their referents among the visual objects.在这里，我们仅通过问题和图像的配对来学习基础，而不需要答案注释或外部基础监督。这种基础通过双重机制指导 VQA 模型内部的注意力机制：预训练注意力权重计算以及根据具体情况在推理时直接指导权重。由此产生的算法能够探索基于注意力的推理模型，注入相关的联想知识，并调节核心推理过程。这种可扩展的增强功能提高了 VQA 模型的性能，增强了其对受监督数据的有限访问的鲁棒性，并提高了可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过显式语言-视觉关联引导视觉问答（VQA）中的注意力机制，以提升模型性能和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA模型的注意力机制在推理过程中缺乏约束，易退化为统计池化操作而非语义相关性选择，导致视觉-语言绑定偏离目标。
AI.method: 从问题与图像的配对中学习结构化语言-视觉关联，通过预训练注意力权重计算和推理时的逐例引导机制，无需答案标注即可调整注意力权重。
AI.result: 该方法提升了VQA模型性能，增强了其在有限监督数据下的鲁棒性，并提高了模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言-视觉绑定引导注意力机制，可有效改善VQA模型的推理过程，实现更符合语义的视觉-语言关联。

authors_text: Yuhuai Wu,Albert Q. Jiang,Wenda Li,Markus N. Rabe,Charles Staats,Mateja Jamnik,Christian Szegedy
title: Autoformalization with Large Language Models
title_zh: 大型语言模型的自动形式化
abstract: Autoformalization is the process of automatically translating from natural language mathematics to formal specifications and proofs. A successful autoformalization system could advance the fields of formal verification, program synthesis, and artificial intelligence. While the long-term goal of autoformalization seemed elusive for a long time, we show large language models provide new prospects towards this goal. We make the surprising observation that LLMs can correctly translate a significant portion ($25.3\%$) of mathematical competition problems perfectly to formal specifications in Isabelle/HOL. We demonstrate the usefulness of this process by improving a previously introduced neural theorem prover via training on these autoformalized theorems. Our methodology results in a new state-of-the-art result on the MiniF2F theorem proving benchmark, improving the proof rate from $29.6\%$ to $35.2\%$.
summary: Autoformalization is the process of automatically translating from natural language mathematics to formal specifications and proofs. A successful autoformalization system could advance the fields of formal verification, program synthesis, and artificial intelligence. While the long-term goal of autoformalization seemed elusive for a long time, we show large language models provide new prospects towards this goal. We make the surprising observation that LLMs can correctly translate a significant portion ($25.3\%$) of mathematical competition problems perfectly to formal specifications in Isabelle/HOL. We demonstrate the usefulness of this process by improving a previously introduced neural theorem prover via training on these autoformalized theorems. Our methodology results in a new state-of-the-art result on the MiniF2F theorem proving benchmark, improving the proof rate from $29.6\%$ to $35.2\%$.
abstract_zh: 自动形式化是从自然语言数学自动转换为形式规范和证明的过程。成功的自动形式化系统可以推动形式验证、程序综合和人工智能领域的发展。虽然自动形式化的长期目标在很长一段时间内似乎难以捉摸，但我们表明大型语言模型为实现这一目标提供了新的前景。我们做出了令人惊讶的观察，法学硕士可以正确地将大部分数学竞赛问题（$25.3\%$）完美地转化为 Isabelle/HOL 中的正式规范。我们通过对这些自动形式化定理的训练来改进先前引入的神经定理证明器，从而证明了该过程的有用性。我们的方法在 MiniF2F 定理证明基准上产生了新的最先进的结果，将证明率从 29.6\%$ 提高到 35.2\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用大语言模型（LLMs）实现自然语言数学到形式化规范的自动转换，并提升定理证明性能。
AI.motivation: 自动形式化技术对形式验证、程序合成和人工智能领域具有重要意义，而传统方法难以实现该目标，LLMs为此提供了新可能。
AI.method: 通过训练LLMs将数学竞赛问题转化为Isabelle/HOL形式规范，并基于这些数据改进神经定理证明器。
AI.result: LLMs成功将25.3%的数学问题转化为正确形式规范，且训练后的证明器在MiniF2F基准测试中证明率提升至35.2%。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在自动形式化任务中展现出显著潜力，为形式化验证与人工智能的结合提供了有效途径。

authors_text: Wilson Silva,Maria Carvalho,Carlos Mavioso,Maria J. Cardoso,Jaime S. Cardoso
title: Deep Aesthetic Assessment and Retrieval of Breast Cancer Treatment Outcomes
title_zh: 乳腺癌治疗结果的深度美学评估和检索
abstract: Treatments for breast cancer have continued to evolve and improve in recent years, resulting in a substantial increase in survival rates, with approximately 80\% of patients having a 10-year survival period. Given the serious impact that breast cancer treatments can have on a patient's body image, consequently affecting her self-confidence and sexual and intimate relationships, it is paramount to ensure that women receive the treatment that optimizes both survival and aesthetic outcomes. Currently, there is no gold standard for evaluating the aesthetic outcome of breast cancer treatment. In addition, there is no standard way to show patients the potential outcome of surgery. The presentation of similar cases from the past would be extremely important to manage women's expectations of the possible outcome. In this work, we propose a deep neural network to perform the aesthetic evaluation. As a proof-of-concept, we focus on a binary aesthetic evaluation. Besides its use for classification, this deep neural network can also be used to find the most similar past cases by searching for nearest neighbours in the highly semantic space before classification. We performed the experiments on a dataset consisting of 143 photos of women after conservative treatment for breast cancer. The results for accuracy and balanced accuracy showed the superior performance of our proposed model compared to the state of the art in aesthetic evaluation of breast cancer treatments. In addition, the model showed a good ability to retrieve similar previous cases, with the retrieved cases having the same or adjacent class (in the 4-class setting) and having similar types of asymmetry. Finally, a qualitative interpretability assessment was also performed to analyse the robustness and trustworthiness of the model.
summary: Treatments for breast cancer have continued to evolve and improve in recent years, resulting in a substantial increase in survival rates, with approximately 80\% of patients having a 10-year survival period. Besides its use for classification, this deep neural network can also be used to find the most similar past cases by searching for nearest neighbours in the highly semantic space before classification. We performed the experiments on a dataset consisting of 143 photos of women after conservative treatment for breast cancer. The results for accuracy and balanced accuracy showed the superior performance of our proposed model compared to the state of the art in aesthetic evaluation of breast cancer treatments. In addition, the model showed a good ability to retrieve similar previous cases, with the retrieved cases having the same or adjacent class (in the 4-class setting) and having similar types of asymmetry. Finally, a qualitative interpretability assessment was also performed to analyse the robustness and trustworthiness of the model.
abstract_zh: 近年来，乳腺癌的治疗方法不断发展和改进，导致生存率大幅提高，大约 80% 的患者拥有 10 年生存期。鉴于乳腺癌治疗会对患者的身体形象产生严重影响，从而影响她的自信以及性和亲密关系，因此确保女性接受能够优化生存和美观效果的治疗至关重要。目前，尚无评估乳腺癌治疗美学效果的金标准。此外，没有标准方法向患者展示手术的潜在结果。展示过去的类似案例对于管理妇女对可能结果的期望极其重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个深度神经网络来执行美学评估。作为概念验证，我们专注于二元美学评估。除了用于分类之外，这种深度神经网络还可以用于在分类之前通过在高度语义空间中搜索最近邻居来找到最相似的过去案例。我们在包含 143 张乳腺癌保守治疗后女性照片的数据集上进行了实验。准确性和平衡准确性的结果表明，与乳腺癌治疗美学评估的最新技术相比，我们提出的模型具有优越的性能。此外，该模型显示出检索类似先前案例的良好能力，检索到的案例具有相同或相邻的类别（在 4 类设置中）并且具有相似的不对称类型。最后，还进行了定性可解释性评估，以分析模型的稳健性和可信度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度神经网络模型，用于乳腺癌治疗结果的美学评估及相似病例检索。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌治疗对患者身体形象影响显著，但现有缺乏标准化美学评估手段及术前效果展示方法，需优化治疗方案并管理患者预期。
AI.method: 构建深度神经网络实现二分类美学评估，并通过语义空间近邻搜索检索相似历史病例，基于143张保守治疗后照片进行实验。
AI.result: 模型在准确率和平衡准确率上优于现有方法，可有效检索同类或邻近类别病例，且具有相似不对称性特征。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为乳腺癌治疗美学评估和个性化案例推荐提供了有效工具，有助于提升治疗决策与患者沟通质量。

search_text: Deep Aesthetic Assessment and Retrieval of Breast Cancer Treatment Outcomes 乳腺癌治疗结果的深度美学评估和检索 Treatments for breast cancer have continued to evolve and improve in recent years, resulting in a substantial increase in survival rates, with approximately 80\% of patients having a 10-year survival period. Given the serious impact that breast cancer treatments can have on a patient's body image, consequently affecting her self-confidence and sexual and intimate relationships, it is paramount to ensure that women receive the treatment that optimizes both survival and aesthetic outcomes. Currently, there is no gold standard for evaluating the aesthetic outcome of breast cancer treatment. In addition, there is no standard way to show patients the potential outcome of surgery. The presentation of similar cases from the past would be extremely important to manage women's expectations of the possible outcome. In this work, we propose a deep neural network to perform the aesthetic evaluation. As a proof-of-concept, we focus on a binary aesthetic evaluation. Besides its use for classification, this deep neural network can also be used to find the most similar past cases by searching for nearest neighbours in the highly semantic space before classification. We performed the experiments on a dataset consisting of 143 photos of women after conservative treatment for breast cancer. The results for accuracy and balanced accuracy showed the superior performance of our proposed model compared to the state of the art in aesthetic evaluation of breast cancer treatments. In addition, the model showed a good ability to retrieve similar previous cases, with the retrieved cases having the same or adjacent class (in the 4-class setting) and having similar types of asymmetry. Finally, a qualitative interpretability assessment was also performed to analyse the robustness and trustworthiness of the model. 近年来，乳腺癌的治疗方法不断发展和改进，导致生存率大幅提高，大约 80% 的患者拥有 10 年生存期。鉴于乳腺癌治疗会对患者的身体形象产生严重影响，从而影响她的自信以及性和亲密关系，因此确保女性接受能够优化生存和美观效果的治疗至关重要。目前，尚无评估乳腺癌治疗美学效果的金标准。此外，没有标准方法向患者展示手术的潜在结果。展示过去的类似案例对于管理妇女对可能结果的期望极其重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个深度神经网络来执行美学评估。作为概念验证，我们专注于二元美学评估。除了用于分类之外，这种深度神经网络还可以用于在分类之前通过在高度语义空间中搜索最近邻居来找到最相似的过去案例。我们在包含 143 张乳腺癌保守治疗后女性照片的数据集上进行了实验。准确性和平衡准确性的结果表明，与乳腺癌治疗美学评估的最新技术相比，我们提出的模型具有优越的性能。此外，该模型显示出检索类似先前案例的良好能力，检索到的案例具有相同或相邻的类别（在 4 类设置中）并且具有相似的不对称类型。最后，还进行了定性可解释性评估，以分析模型的稳健性和可信度。 本文提出一种深度神经网络模型，用于乳腺癌治疗结果的美学评估及相似病例检索。 Wilson Silva,Maria Carvalho,Carlos Mavioso,Maria J. Cardoso,Jaime S. Cardoso cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenyang Wang,Junjun Jiang,Xiong Zhou,Xianming Liu
title: ReSmooth: Detecting and Utilizing OOD Samples when Training with Data Augmentation
title_zh: ReSmooth：在使用数据增强进行训练时检测和利用 OOD 样本
comment: The paper is accepted as a TNNLS regular paper. See the published version in "Early Access" area on IEEE Xplore: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9961105
comments: The paper is accepted as a TNNLS regular paper. See the published version in "Early Access" area on IEEE Xplore: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9961105
abstract: Data augmentation (DA) is a widely used technique for enhancing the training of deep neural networks. Recent DA techniques which achieve state-of-the-art performance always meet the need for diversity in augmented training samples. However, an augmentation strategy that has a high diversity usually introduces out-of-distribution (OOD) augmented samples and these samples consequently impair the performance. To alleviate this issue, we propose ReSmooth, a framework that firstly detects OOD samples in augmented samples and then leverages them. To be specific, we first use a Gaussian mixture model to fit the loss distribution of both the original and augmented samples and accordingly split these samples into in-distribution (ID) samples and OOD samples. Then we start a new training where ID and OOD samples are incorporated with different smooth labels. By treating ID samples and OOD samples unequally, we can make better use of the diverse augmented data. Further, we incorporate our ReSmooth framework with negative data augmentation strategies. By properly handling their intentionally created OOD samples, the classification performance of negative data augmentations is largely ameliorated. Experiments on several classification benchmarks show that ReSmooth can be easily extended to existing augmentation strategies (such as RandAugment, rotate, and jigsaw) and improve on them. Our code is available at https://github.com/Chenyang4/ReSmooth.
summary: Data augmentation (DA) is a widely used technique for enhancing the training of deep neural networks. Recent DA techniques which achieve state-of-the-art performance always meet the need for diversity in augmented training samples. However, an augmentation strategy that has a high diversity usually introduces out-of-distribution (OOD) augmented samples and these samples consequently impair the performance. To alleviate this issue, we propose ReSmooth, a framework that firstly detects OOD samples in augmented samples and then leverages them. To be specific, we first use a Gaussian mixture model to fit the loss distribution of both the original and augmented samples and accordingly split these samples into in-distribution (ID) samples and OOD samples. Then we start a new training where ID and OOD samples are incorporated with different smooth labels. By treating ID samples and OOD samples unequally, we can make better use of the diverse augmented data. Further, we incorporate our ReSmooth framework with negative data augmentation strategies. By properly handling their intentionally created OOD samples, the classification performance of negative data augmentations is largely ameliorated. Experiments on several classification benchmarks show that ReSmooth can be easily extended to existing augmentation strategies (such as RandAugment, rotate, and jigsaw) and improve on them. Our code is available at https://github.com/Chenyang4/ReSmooth.
abstract_zh: 数据增强（DA）是一种广泛使用的增强深度神经网络训练的技术。最近实现最先进性能的 DA 技术始终满足增强训练样本多样性的需求。然而，具有高多样性的增强策略通常会引入分布外（OOD）增强样本，因此这些样本会损害性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 ReSmooth，这是一个首先检测增强样本中的 OOD 样本，然后利用它们的框架。具体来说，我们首先使用高斯混合模型来拟合原始样本和增强样本的损失分布，并相应地将这些样本分为分布内（ID）样本和OOD样本。然后我们开始新的训练，其中 ID 和 OOD 样本与不同的平滑标签合并。通过不平等地对待ID样本和OOD样本，我们可以更好地利用多样化的增强数据。此外，我们将 ReSmooth 框架与负数据增强策略相结合。通过正确处理有意创建的 OOD 样本，负数据增强的分类性能得到了很大改善。对多个分类基准的实验表明，ReSmooth 可以轻松扩展到现有的增强策略（例如 RandAugment、旋转和 jigsaw）并对其进行改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Chenyang4/ReSmooth 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReSmooth框架，通过检测并利用数据增强中的分布外（OOD）样本，提升深度神经网络训练性能。
AI.motivation: 数据增强虽能提升模型多样性，但高多样性策略常引入OOD样本，导致模型性能下降。现有方法未有效利用这些OOD样本。
AI.method: 使用高斯混合模型区分原始与增强样本的损失分布，将样本划分为分布内（ID）和OOD两类，并采用不同平滑标签进行训练。结合负样本增强策略，优化OOD样本的利用。
AI.result: 在多个分类基准测试中，ReSmooth显著优于现有增强方法（如RandAugment），且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ReSmooth通过有效处理OOD样本，为数据增强策略提供了改进方向，提升了模型分类性能。

However, an augmentation strategy that has a high diversity usually introduces out-of-distribution (OOD) augmented samples and these samples consequently impair the performance. To alleviate this issue, we propose ReSmooth, a framework that firstly detects OOD samples in augmented samples and then leverages them. To be specific, we first use a Gaussian mixture model to fit the loss distribution of both the original and augmented samples and accordingly split these samples into in-distribution (ID) samples and OOD samples. Then we start a new training where ID and OOD samples are incorporated with different smooth labels. By treating ID samples and OOD samples unequally, we can make better use of the diverse augmented data. Further, we incorporate our ReSmooth framework with negative data augmentation strategies. By properly handling their intentionally created OOD samples, the classification performance of negative data augmentations is largely ameliorated. Experiments on several classification benchmarks show that ReSmooth can be easily extended to existing augmentation strategies (such as RandAugment, rotate, and jigsaw) and improve on them. Our code is available at https://github.com/Chenyang4/ReSmooth. 数据增强（DA）是一种广泛使用的增强深度神经网络训练的技术。最近实现最先进性能的 DA 技术始终满足增强训练样本多样性的需求。然而，具有高多样性的增强策略通常会引入分布外（OOD）增强样本，因此这些样本会损害性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 ReSmooth，这是一个首先检测增强样本中的 OOD 样本，然后利用它们的框架。具体来说，我们首先使用高斯混合模型来拟合原始样本和增强样本的损失分布，并相应地将这些样本分为分布内（ID）样本和OOD样本。然后我们开始新的训练，其中 ID 和 OOD 样本与不同的平滑标签合并。通过不平等地对待ID样本和OOD样本，我们可以更好地利用多样化的增强数据。此外，我们将 ReSmooth 框架与负数据增强策略相结合。通过正确处理有意创建的 OOD 样本，负数据增强的分类性能得到了很大改善。对多个分类基准的实验表明，ReSmooth 可以轻松扩展到现有的增强策略（例如 RandAugment、旋转和 jigsaw）并对其进行改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Chenyang4/ReSmooth 获取。 本文提出ReSmooth框架，通过检测并利用数据增强中的分布外（OOD）样本，提升深度神经网络训练性能。 Chenyang Wang,Junjun Jiang,Xiong Zhou,Xianming Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxing Chen,Renshu Gu,Ouhan Huang,Gangyong Jia
title: VTP: Volumetric Transformer for Multi-view Multi-person 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: VTP：用于多视图多人 3D 姿势估计的体积变换器
abstract: This paper presents Volumetric Transformer Pose estimator (VTP), the first 3D volumetric transformer framework for multi-view multi-person 3D human pose estimation. VTP aggregates features from 2D keypoints in all camera views and directly learns the spatial relationships in the 3D voxel space in an end-to-end fashion. The aggregated 3D features are passed through 3D convolutions before being flattened into sequential embeddings and fed into a transformer. A residual structure is designed to further improve the performance. In addition, the sparse Sinkhorn attention is empowered to reduce the memory cost, which is a major bottleneck for volumetric representations, while also achieving excellent performance. The output of the transformer is again concatenated with 3D convolutional features by a residual design. The proposed VTP framework integrates the high performance of the transformer with volumetric representations, which can be used as a good alternative to the convolutional backbones. Experiments on the Shelf, Campus and CMU Panoptic benchmarks show promising results in terms of both Mean Per Joint Position Error (MPJPE) and Percentage of Correctly estimated Parts (PCP). Our code will be available.
summary: This paper presents Volumetric Transformer Pose estimator (VTP), the first 3D volumetric transformer framework for multi-view multi-person 3D human pose estimation. VTP aggregates features from 2D keypoints in all camera views and directly learns the spatial relationships in the 3D voxel space in an end-to-end fashion. The aggregated 3D features are passed through 3D convolutions before being flattened into sequential embeddings and fed into a transformer. A residual structure is designed to further improve the performance. In addition, the sparse Sinkhorn attention is empowered to reduce the memory cost, which is a major bottleneck for volumetric representations, while also achieving excellent performance. The output of the transformer is again concatenated with 3D convolutional features by a residual design. The proposed VTP framework integrates the high performance of the transformer with volumetric representations, which can be used as a good alternative to the convolutional backbones. Experiments on the Shelf, Campus and CMU Panoptic benchmarks show promising results in terms of both Mean Per Joint Position Error (MPJPE) and Percentage of Correctly estimated Parts (PCP). Our code will be available.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了体积变换器姿势估计器 (VTP)，这是第一个用于多视图多人 3D 人体姿势估计的 3D 体积变换器框架。 VTP 聚合所有摄像机视图中 2D 关键点的特征，并以端到端的方式直接学习 3D 体素空间中的空间关系。聚合的 3D 特征先经过 3D 卷积，然后被展平为顺序嵌入并输入转换器。设计了残差结构以进一步提高性能。此外，稀疏的 Sinkhorn 注意力能够减少内存成本（这是体积表示的主要瓶颈），同时还能实现出色的性能。转换器的输出再次通过残差设计与 3D 卷积特征连接。所提出的 VTP 框架将 Transformer 的高性能与体积表示相结合，可以作为卷积主干的良好替代方案。 Shelf、Campus 和 CMU Panoptic 基准测试的实验在平均每关节位置误差 (MPJPE) 和正确估计零件百分比 (PCP) 方面显示出有希望的结果。我们的代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VTP的三维体素Transformer框架，用于多视角多人三维姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多视角多人三维姿态估计中存在空间关系建模不足和计算效率低的问题，需结合体素表示与Transformer的优势以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过聚合所有视角的2D关键点特征，在三维体素空间中学习空间关系，结合3D卷积与Transformer结构，并采用稀疏Sinkhorn注意力机制优化内存消耗。
AI.result: 在Shelf、Campus和CMU Panoptic数据集上实现了具有竞争力的MPJPE和PCP指标，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VTP通过融合Transformer与体素表示，为多视角多人三维姿态估计提供了高效且性能优越的解决方案。

search_text: VTP: Volumetric Transformer for Multi-view Multi-person 3D Pose Estimation VTP：用于多视图多人 3D 姿势估计的体积变换器 This paper presents Volumetric Transformer Pose estimator (VTP), the first 3D volumetric transformer framework for multi-view multi-person 3D human pose estimation. VTP aggregates features from 2D keypoints in all camera views and directly learns the spatial relationships in the 3D voxel space in an end-to-end fashion. The aggregated 3D features are passed through 3D convolutions before being flattened into sequential embeddings and fed into a transformer. A residual structure is designed to further improve the performance. In addition, the sparse Sinkhorn attention is empowered to reduce the memory cost, which is a major bottleneck for volumetric representations, while also achieving excellent performance. The output of the transformer is again concatenated with 3D convolutional features by a residual design. The proposed VTP framework integrates the high performance of the transformer with volumetric representations, which can be used as a good alternative to the convolutional backbones. Experiments on the Shelf, Campus and CMU Panoptic benchmarks show promising results in terms of both Mean Per Joint Position Error (MPJPE) and Percentage of Correctly estimated Parts (PCP). Our code will be available. 本文提出了体积变换器姿势估计器 (VTP)，这是第一个用于多视图多人 3D 人体姿势估计的 3D 体积变换器框架。 VTP 聚合所有摄像机视图中 2D 关键点的特征，并以端到端的方式直接学习 3D 体素空间中的空间关系。聚合的 3D 特征先经过 3D 卷积，然后被展平为顺序嵌入并输入转换器。设计了残差结构以进一步提高性能。此外，稀疏的 Sinkhorn 注意力能够减少内存成本（这是体积表示的主要瓶颈），同时还能实现出色的性能。转换器的输出再次通过残差设计与 3D 卷积特征连接。所提出的 VTP 框架将 Transformer 的高性能与体积表示相结合，可以作为卷积主干的良好替代方案。 Shelf、Campus 和 CMU Panoptic 基准测试的实验在平均每关节位置误差 (MPJPE) 和正确估计零件百分比 (PCP) 方面显示出有希望的结果。我们的代码将可用。 本文提出了一种名为VTP的三维体素Transformer框架，用于多视角多人三维姿态估计。 Yuxing Chen,Renshu Gu,Ouhan Huang,Gangyong Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Milad Ramezani,Kasra Khosoussi,Gavin Catt,Peyman Moghadam,Jason Williams,Paulo Borges,Fred Pauling,Navinda Kottege
title: Wildcat: Online Continuous-Time 3D Lidar-Inertial SLAM
title_zh: Wildcat：在线连续时间 3D 激光雷达惯性 SLAM
abstract: We present Wildcat, a novel online 3D lidar-inertial SLAM system with exceptional versatility and robustness. At its core, Wildcat combines a robust real-time lidar-inertial odometry module, utilising a continuous-time trajectory representation, with an efficient pose-graph optimisation module that seamlessly supports both the single- and multi-agent settings. The robustness of Wildcat was recently demonstrated in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge where it outperformed other SLAM systems across various types of sensing-degraded and perceptually challenging environments. In this paper, we extensively evaluate Wildcat in a diverse set of new and publicly available real-world datasets and showcase its superior robustness and versatility over two existing state-of-the-art lidar-inertial SLAM systems.
summary: We present Wildcat, a novel online 3D lidar-inertial SLAM system with exceptional versatility and robustness. At its core, Wildcat combines a robust real-time lidar-inertial odometry module, utilising a continuous-time trajectory representation, with an efficient pose-graph optimisation module that seamlessly supports both the single- and multi-agent settings. The robustness of Wildcat was recently demonstrated in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge where it outperformed other SLAM systems across various types of sensing-degraded and perceptually challenging environments. In this paper, we extensively evaluate Wildcat in a diverse set of new and publicly available real-world datasets and showcase its superior robustness and versatility over two existing state-of-the-art lidar-inertial SLAM systems.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 Wildcat，这是一种新颖的在线 3D 激光雷达惯性 SLAM 系统，具有卓越的多功能性和鲁棒性。 Wildcat 的核心是将强大的实时激光雷达惯性测距模块（利用连续时间轨迹表示）与高效的姿态图优化模块相结合，无缝支持单代理和多代理设置。最近，Wildcat 的鲁棒性在 DARPA 地下挑战赛中得到了证明，在各种类型的感知退化和感知挑战环境中，它的表现优于其他 SLAM 系统。在本文中，我们在一系列新的、公开的现实世界数据集中广泛评估了 Wildcat，并展示了其相对于两个现有最先进的激光雷达惯性 SLAM 系统的卓越鲁棒性和多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Wildcat系统，一种结合连续时间轨迹表示和高效位姿图优化的在线3D激光雷达惯性SLAM方法，适用于单/多智能体场景。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM系统在感知退化和复杂环境下鲁棒性不足，需开发更通用可靠的实时定位与建图方案。
AI.method: 融合实时激光雷达惯性里程计（连续时间轨迹建模）与支持单/多智能体的位姿图优化模块，实现动态环境下的高精度定位。
AI.result: 在DARPA地下挑战赛中超越其他系统，在多种公开真实数据集测试中展现更优鲁棒性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: Wildcat通过创新架构显著提升了复杂环境下SLAM的可靠性，为多智能体协同定位提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zohreh Ansari,Farzin Pourhoseini,Fatemeh Hadaeghi
title: Heterogeneous Reservoir Computing Models for Persian Speech Recognition
title_zh: 波斯语语音识别的异构存储计算模型
comment: This paper was accepted for oral presentation in IEEE WCCI 2022 + IJCNN 2022, special session on Reservoir Computing: algorithms, implementations and applications
comments: This paper was accepted for oral presentation in IEEE WCCI 2022 + IJCNN 2022, special session on Reservoir Computing: algorithms, implementations and applications
abstract: Over the last decade, deep-learning methods have been gradually incorporated into conventional automatic speech recognition (ASR) frameworks to create acoustic, pronunciation, and language models. Although it led to significant improvements in ASRs' recognition accuracy, due to their hard constraints related to hardware requirements (e.g., computing power and memory usage), it is unclear if such approaches are the most computationally- and energy-efficient options for embedded ASR applications. Reservoir computing (RC) models (e.g., echo state networks (ESNs) and liquid state machines (LSMs)), on the other hand, have been proven inexpensive to train, have vastly fewer parameters, and are compatible with emergent hardware technologies. However, their performance in speech processing tasks is relatively inferior to that of the deep-learning-based models. To enhance the accuracy of the RC in ASR applications, we propose heterogeneous single and multi-layer ESNs to create non-linear transformations of the inputs that capture temporal context at different scales. To test our models, we performed a speech recognition task on the Farsdat Persian dataset. Since, to the best of our knowledge, standard RC has not yet been employed to conduct any Persian ASR tasks, we also trained conventional single-layer and deep ESNs to provide baselines for comparison. Besides, we compared the RC performance with a standard long-short-term memory (LSTM) model. Heterogeneous RC models (1) show improved performance to the standard RC models; (2) perform on par in terms of recognition accuracy with the LSTM, and (3) reduce the training time considerably.
summary: Over the last decade, deep-learning methods have been gradually incorporated into conventional automatic speech recognition (ASR) frameworks to create acoustic, pronunciation, and language models. Although it led to significant improvements in ASRs' recognition accuracy, due to their hard constraints related to hardware requirements (e.g., computing power and memory usage), it is unclear if such approaches are the most computationally- and energy-efficient options for embedded ASR applications. Reservoir computing (RC) models (e.g., echo state networks (ESNs) and liquid state machines (LSMs)), on the other hand, have been proven inexpensive to train, have vastly fewer parameters, and are compatible with emergent hardware technologies. However, their performance in speech processing tasks is relatively inferior to that of the deep-learning-based models. To enhance the accuracy of the RC in ASR applications, we propose heterogeneous single and multi-layer ESNs to create non-linear transformations of the inputs that capture temporal context at different scales. To test our models, we performed a speech recognition task on the Farsdat Persian dataset. Since, to the best of our knowledge, standard RC has not yet been employed to conduct any Persian ASR tasks, we also trained conventional single-layer and deep ESNs to provide baselines for comparison. Besides, we compared the RC performance with a standard long-short-term memory (LSTM) model. Heterogeneous RC models (1) show improved performance to the standard RC models; (2) perform on par in terms of recognition accuracy with the LSTM, and (3) reduce the training time considerably.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，深度学习方法已逐渐融入传统的自动语音识别（ASR）框架中，以创建声学、发音和语言模型。尽管它显着提高了 ASR 的识别精度，但由于其与硬件要求（例如计算能力和内存使用）相关的严格限制，目前尚不清楚这种方法是否是嵌入式 ASR 应用程序中计算效率和能源效率最高的选择。另一方面，储层计算（RC）模型（例如回声状态网络（ESN）和液体状态机（LSM））已被证明训练成本低廉，参数少得多，并且与新兴硬件技术兼容。然而，它们在语音处理任务中的性能相对较差于基于深度学习的模型。为了提高 ASR 应用中 RC 的准确性，我们提出异构单层和多层 ESN 来创建输入的非线性变换，以捕获不同尺度的时间上下文。为了测试我们的模型，我们在 Farsdat 波斯语数据集上执行了语音识别任务。据我们所知，由于标准 RC 尚未用于执行任何波斯语 ASR 任务，因此我们还训练了传统的单层和深度 ESN，以提供用于比较的基线。此外，我们将 RC 性能与标准长短期记忆 (LSTM) 模型进行了比较。异构 RC 模型 (1) 表现出比标准 RC 模型更好的性能； (2) 在识别精度方面与 LSTM 相当，(3) 大大减少训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出异构水库计算模型用于波斯语语音识别，以提高计算效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽准确但硬件需求高，而水库计算模型（RC）参数少且兼容新兴硬件，但语音任务表现较差，需改进其性能。
AI.method: 设计异构单层和多层回声状态网络（ESN），通过非线性变换捕捉多尺度时序信息，并在Farsdat数据集上与传统ESN和LSTM模型对比。
AI.result: 异构RC模型识别准确率优于标准RC，与LSTM相当，且显著减少训练时间。
AI.conclusion: 异构RC模型在保持高效性的同时提升波斯语语音识别性能，适合嵌入式应用。
