method: 设计异构单层和多层回声状态网络（ESN），通过非线性变换捕捉多尺度时序信息，并在Farsdat数据集上与传统ESN和LSTM模型对比。
result: 异构RC模型识别准确率优于标准RC，与LSTM相当，且显著减少训练时间。
conclusion: 异构RC模型在保持高效性的同时提升波斯语语音识别性能，适合嵌入式应用。
search_text: Heterogeneous Reservoir Computing Models for Persian Speech Recognition 波斯语语音识别的异构存储计算模型 Over the last decade, deep-learning methods have been gradually incorporated into conventional automatic speech recognition (ASR) frameworks to create acoustic, pronunciation, and language models. Although it led to significant improvements in ASRs' recognition accuracy, due to their hard constraints related to hardware requirements (e.g., computing power and memory usage), it is unclear if such approaches are the most computationally- and energy-efficient options for embedded ASR applications. Reservoir computing (RC) models (e.g., echo state networks (ESNs) and liquid state machines (LSMs)), on the other hand, have been proven inexpensive to train, have vastly fewer parameters, and are compatible with emergent hardware technologies. However, their performance in speech processing tasks is relatively inferior to that of the deep-learning-based models. To enhance the accuracy of the RC in ASR applications, we propose heterogeneous single and multi-layer ESNs to create non-linear transformations of the inputs that capture temporal context at different scales. To test our models, we performed a speech recognition task on the Farsdat Persian dataset. Since, to the best of our knowledge, standard RC has not yet been employed to conduct any Persian ASR tasks, we also trained conventional single-layer and deep ESNs to provide baselines for comparison. Besides, we compared the RC performance with a standard long-short-term memory (LSTM) model. Heterogeneous RC models (1) show improved performance to the standard RC models; (2) perform on par in terms of recognition accuracy with the LSTM, and (3) reduce the training time considerably. 在过去的十年中，深度学习方法已逐渐融入传统的自动语音识别（ASR）框架中，以创建声学、发音和语言模型。尽管它显着提高了 ASR 的识别精度，但由于其与硬件要求（例如计算能力和内存使用）相关的严格限制，目前尚不清楚这种方法是否是嵌入式 ASR 应用程序中计算效率和能源效率最高的选择。另一方面，储层计算（RC）模型（例如回声状态网络（ESN）和液体状态机（LSM））已被证明训练成本低廉，参数少得多，并且与新兴硬件技术兼容。然而，它们在语音处理任务中的性能相对较差于基于深度学习的模型。为了提高 ASR 应用中 RC 的准确性，我们提出异构单层和多层 ESN 来创建输入的非线性变换，以捕获不同尺度的时间上下文。为了测试我们的模型，我们在 Farsdat 波斯语数据集上执行了语音识别任务。据我们所知，由于标准 RC 尚未用于执行任何波斯语 ASR 任务，因此我们还训练了传统的单层和深度 ESN，以提供用于比较的基线。此外，我们将 RC 性能与标准长短期记忆 (LSTM) 模型进行了比较。异构 RC 模型 (1) 表现出比标准 RC 模型更好的性能； (2) 在识别精度方面与 LSTM 相当，(3) 大大减少训练时间。 本文提出异构水库计算模型用于波斯语语音识别，以提高计算效率和准确性。 Zohreh Ansari,Farzin Pourhoseini,Fatemeh Hadaeghi cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Yong Xu,Zhihua Xia,Zichi Wang,Xinpeng Zhang,Jian Weng
title: Deniable Steganography
title_zh: 可否认的隐写术
abstract: Steganography conceals the secret message into the cover media, generating a stego media which can be transmitted on public channels without drawing suspicion. As its countermeasure, steganalysis mainly aims to detect whether the secret message is hidden in a given media. Although the steganography techniques are improving constantly, the sophisticated steganalysis can always break a known steganographic method to some extent. With a stego media discovered, the adversary could find out the sender or receiver and coerce them to disclose the secret message, which we name as coercive attack in this paper. Inspired by the idea of deniable encryption, we build up the concepts of deniable steganography for the first time and discuss the feasible constructions for it. As an example, we propose a receiver-deniable steganographic scheme to deal with the receiver-side coercive attack using deep neural networks (DNN). Specifically, besides the real secret message, a piece of fake message is also embedded into the cover. On the receiver side, the real message can be extracted with an extraction module; while once the receiver has to surrender a piece of secret message under coercive attack, he can extract the fake message to deceive the adversary with another extraction module. Experiments demonstrate the scalability and sensitivity of the DNN-based receiver-deniable steganographic scheme.

As its countermeasure, steganalysis mainly aims to detect whether the secret message is hidden in a given media. Although the steganography techniques are improving constantly, the sophisticated steganalysis can always break a known steganographic method to some extent. With a stego media discovered, the adversary could find out the sender or receiver and coerce them to disclose the secret message, which we name as coercive attack in this paper. Inspired by the idea of deniable encryption, we build up the concepts of deniable steganography for the first time and discuss the feasible constructions for it. As an example, we propose a receiver-deniable steganographic scheme to deal with the receiver-side coercive attack using deep neural networks (DNN). Specifically, besides the real secret message, a piece of fake message is also embedded into the cover. On the receiver side, the real message can be extracted with an extraction module; while once the receiver has to surrender a piece of secret message under coercive attack, he can extract the fake message to deceive the adversary with another extraction module. Experiments demonstrate the scalability and sensitivity of the DNN-based receiver-deniable steganographic scheme.
abstract_zh: 隐写术将秘密消息隐藏到封面媒体中，生成可以在公共渠道上传输而不会引起怀疑的隐写媒体。作为其对策，隐写分析的主要目的是检测秘密消息是否隐藏在给定的媒体中。尽管隐写技术不断进步，但复杂的隐写分析总是能在一定程度上打破已知的隐写方法。通过发现隐秘媒体，对手可以找到发送者或接收者并强迫他们披露秘密消息，我们在本文中将其称为强制攻击。受可否认加密思想的启发，我们首次提出了可否认隐写术的概念，并讨论了其可行的构造。作为一个例子，我们提出了一种接收者可否认的隐写方案，使用深度神经网络（DNN）来处理接收方强制攻击。具体来说，除了真实的秘密信息外，封面中还嵌入了一条假信息。在接收方，可以通过提取模块提取真实消息；而一旦接收者在强制攻击下不得不交出一条秘密消息，他可以用另一个提取模块提取假消息来欺骗对手。实验证明了基于 DNN 的接收者可否认的隐写方案的可扩展性和敏感性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可否认的隐写术方法，以应对在隐写媒体被发现时可能发生的强制攻击。
AI.motivation: 传统隐写术在面对高级隐写分析技术时容易被破解，一旦隐写媒体被发现，发送者或接收者可能被迫泄露秘密信息，因此需要一种可否认的隐写术来防止信息泄露。
AI.method: 受可否认加密的启发，本文首次提出可否认隐写术的概念，并设计了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的接收者可否认隐写方案。该方案在隐写媒体中同时嵌入真实秘密信息和虚假信息，接收者在正常情况下提取真实信息，而在强制攻击下可提取虚假信息以欺骗攻击者。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于DNN的接收者可否认隐写方案具有良好的可扩展性和敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的可否认隐写术方法为应对强制攻击提供了一种新的解决方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Rebecca Qian,Candace Ross,Jude Fernandes,Eric Smith,Douwe Kiela,Adina Williams
title: Perturbation Augmentation for Fairer NLP
title_zh: 扰动增强以实现更公平的 NLP
abstract: Unwanted and often harmful social biases are becoming ever more salient in NLP research, affecting both models and datasets. In this work, we ask whether training on demographically perturbed data leads to fairer language models. We collect a large dataset of human annotated text perturbations and train a neural perturbation model, which we show outperforms heuristic alternatives. We find that (i) language models (LMs) pre-trained on demographically perturbed corpora are typically more fair, and (ii) LMs finetuned on perturbed GLUE datasets exhibit less demographic bias on downstream tasks, and (iii) fairness improvements do not come at the expense of performance on downstream tasks. Lastly, we discuss outstanding questions about how best to evaluate the (un)fairness of large language models. We hope that this exploration of neural demographic perturbation will help drive more improvement towards fairer NLP.
summary: Unwanted and often harmful social biases are becoming ever more salient in NLP research, affecting both models and datasets. In this work, we ask whether training on demographically perturbed data leads to fairer language models. We collect a large dataset of human annotated text perturbations and train a neural perturbation model, which we show outperforms heuristic alternatives. We find that (i) language models (LMs) pre-trained on demographically perturbed corpora are typically more fair, and (ii) LMs finetuned on perturbed GLUE datasets exhibit less demographic bias on downstream tasks, and (iii) fairness improvements do not come at the expense of performance on downstream tasks. Lastly, we discuss outstanding questions about how best to evaluate the (un)fairness of large language models. We hope that this exploration of neural demographic perturbation will help drive more improvement towards fairer NLP.
abstract_zh: 在 NLP 研究中，不需要的且往往有害的社会偏见变得越来越突出，影响着模型和数据集。在这项工作中，我们询问对人口统计扰动数据的训练是否会带来更公平的语言模型。我们收集了人类注释文本扰动的大型数据集并训练了神经扰动模型，我们证明该模型优于启发式替代方案。我们发现（i）在人口统计扰动的语料库上预训练的语言模型（LM）通常更公平，（ii）在扰动的 GLUE 数据集上微调的 LM 在下游任务上表现出较少的人口统计偏差，（iii）公平性的改进不会以牺牲下游任务的性能为代价。最后，我们讨论有关如何最好地评估大型语言模型的（不）公平性的突出问题。我们希望这种对神经人口统计学扰动的探索将有助于推动 NLP 的进一步进步，实现更公平的 NLP。

AI.tldr: 通过扰动数据提升自然语言处理（NLP）模型的公平性
AI.motivation: 解决NLP领域中因社会偏见导致的模型不公平问题
AI.method: 收集人工标注的文本扰动数据集，训练神经扰动模型替代启发式方法
AI.result: 预训练扰动语料模型更公平；微调后下游任务偏差降低；性能无损失
AI.conclusion: 神经扰动方法可推动公平NLP发展，但需进一步完善大模型公平性评估体系

authors_text: I-Hung Hsu,Kuan-Hao Huang,Shuning Zhang,Wenxin Cheng,Premkumar Natarajan,Kai-Wei Chang,Nanyun Peng
title: TAGPRIME: A Unified Framework for Relational Structure Extraction
title_zh: TAGPRIME：关系结构提取的统一框架
comment: Paper accepted by ACL2023 as a main conference paper. The first two authors contribute equally
comments: Paper accepted by ACL2023 as a main conference paper. The first two authors contribute equally
abstract: Many tasks in natural language processing require the extraction of relationship information for a given condition, such as event argument extraction, relation extraction, and task-oriented semantic parsing. Recent works usually propose sophisticated models for each task independently and pay less attention to the commonality of these tasks and to have a unified framework for all the tasks. In this work, we propose to take a unified view of all these tasks and introduce TAGPRIME to address relational structure extraction problems. TAGPRIME is a sequence tagging model that appends priming words about the information of the given condition (such as an event trigger) to the input text. With the self-attention mechanism in pre-trained language models, the priming words make the output contextualized representations contain more information about the given condition, and hence become more suitable for extracting specific relationships for the condition. Extensive experiments and analyses on three different tasks that cover ten datasets across five different languages demonstrate the generality and effectiveness of TAGPRIME.
summary: Many tasks in natural language processing require the extraction of relationship information for a given condition, such as event argument extraction, relation extraction, and task-oriented semantic parsing. Recent works usually propose sophisticated models for each task independently and pay less attention to the commonality of these tasks and to have a unified framework for all the tasks. In this work, we propose to take a unified view of all these tasks and introduce TAGPRIME to address relational structure extraction problems. With the self-attention mechanism in pre-trained language models, the priming words make the output contextualized representations contain more information about the given condition, and hence become more suitable for extracting specific relationships for the condition. Extensive experiments and analyses on three different tasks that cover ten datasets across five different languages demonstrate the generality and effectiveness of TAGPRIME.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理中的许多任务都需要提取给定条件的关系信息，例如事件参数提取、关系提取和面向任务的语义解析。最近的工作通常独立地为每个任务提出复杂的模型，而很少关注这些任务的共性以及为所有任务建立一个统一的框架。 In this work, we propose to take a unified view of all these tasks and introduce TAGPRIME to address relational structure extraction problems. TAGPRIME 是一种序列标记模型，它将有关给定条件（例如事件触发器）的信息的启动词附加到输入文本。通过预训练语言模型中的自注意力机制，启动词使输出的上下文表示包含更多有关给定条件的信息，因此更适合提取条件的特定关系。对涵盖五种不同语言的十个数据集的三个不同任务进行的广泛实验和分析证明了 TAGPRIME 的通用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAGPRIME框架，通过统一视角解决关系结构提取问题，适用于事件论元提取、关系提取等多任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法针对每个任务独立设计模型，忽视了任务间的共性，缺乏统一框架导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计序列标注模型TAGPRIME，在输入文本中添加条件引导词，结合预训练模型的自注意力机制增强上下文表示。
AI.result: 在三个任务十个数据集（五种语言）的实验验证中，TAGPRIME展现出通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: TAGPRIME通过统一框架和引导词机制，显著提升关系结构提取性能，证明了跨任务学习的可行性。

search_text: TAGPRIME: A Unified Framework for Relational Structure Extraction TAGPRIME：关系结构提取的统一框架 Many tasks in natural language processing require the extraction of relationship information for a given condition, such as event argument extraction, relation extraction, and task-oriented semantic parsing. Recent works usually propose sophisticated models for each task independently and pay less attention to the commonality of these tasks and to have a unified framework for all the tasks. In this work, we propose to take a unified view of all these tasks and introduce TAGPRIME to address relational structure extraction problems. TAGPRIME is a sequence tagging model that appends priming words about the information of the given condition (such as an event trigger) to the input text. With the self-attention mechanism in pre-trained language models, the priming words make the output contextualized representations contain more information about the given condition, and hence become more suitable for extracting specific relationships for the condition. Extensive experiments and analyses on three different tasks that cover ten datasets across five different languages demonstrate the generality and effectiveness of TAGPRIME. 自然语言处理中的许多任务都需要提取给定条件的关系信息，例如事件参数提取、关系提取和面向任务的语义解析。最近的工作通常独立地为每个任务提出复杂的模型，而很少关注这些任务的共性以及为所有任务建立一个统一的框架。 In this work, we propose to take a unified view of all these tasks and introduce TAGPRIME to address relational structure extraction problems. TAGPRIME 是一种序列标记模型，它将有关给定条件（例如事件触发器）的信息的启动词附加到输入文本。通过预训练语言模型中的自注意力机制，启动词使输出的上下文表示包含更多有关给定条件的信息，因此更适合提取条件的特定关系。对涵盖五种不同语言的十个数据集的三个不同任务进行的广泛实验和分析证明了 TAGPRIME 的通用性和有效性。 本文提出TAGPRIME框架，通过统一视角解决关系结构提取问题，适用于事件论元提取、关系提取等多任务。 I-Hung Hsu,Kuan-Hao Huang,Shuning Zhang,Wenxin Cheng,Premkumar Natarajan,Kai-Wei Chang,Nanyun Peng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chenyan Wu,Yandong Li,Xianfeng Tang,James Wang
title: MUG: Multi-human Graph Network for 3D Mesh Reconstruction from 2D Pose
title_zh: MUG：用于从 2D 姿势重建 3D 网格的多人图网络
abstract: Reconstructing multi-human body mesh from a single monocular image is an important but challenging computer vision problem. In addition to the individual body mesh models, we need to estimate relative 3D positions among subjects to generate a coherent representation. In this work, through a single graph neural network, named MUG (Multi-hUman Graph network), we construct coherent multi-human meshes using only multi-human 2D pose as input. Compared with existing methods, which adopt a detection-style pipeline (i.e., extracting image features and then locating human instances and recovering body meshes from that) and suffer from the significant domain gap between lab-collected training datasets and in-the-wild testing datasets, our method benefits from the 2D pose which has a relatively consistent geometric property across datasets. Our method works like the following: First, to model the multi-human environment, it processes multi-human 2D poses and builds a novel heterogeneous graph, where nodes from different people and within one person are connected to capture inter-human interactions and draw the body geometry (i.e., skeleton and mesh structure). Second, it employs a dual-branch graph neural network structure -- one for predicting inter-human depth relation and the other one for predicting root-joint-relative mesh coordinates. Finally, the entire multi-human 3D meshes are constructed by combining the output from both branches. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MUG outperforms previous multi-human mesh estimation methods on standard 3D human benchmarks -- Panoptic, MuPoTS-3D and 3DPW.
summary: Reconstructing multi-human body mesh from a single monocular image is an important but challenging computer vision problem. In addition to the individual body mesh models, we need to estimate relative 3D positions among subjects to generate a coherent representation. In this work, through a single graph neural network, named MUG (Multi-hUman Graph network), we construct coherent multi-human meshes using only multi-human 2D pose as input. Compared with existing methods, which adopt a detection-style pipeline (i.e., extracting image features and then locating human instances and recovering body meshes from that) and suffer from the significant domain gap between lab-collected training datasets and in-the-wild testing datasets, our method benefits from the 2D pose which has a relatively consistent geometric property across datasets. Our method works like the following: First, to model the multi-human environment, it processes multi-human 2D poses and builds a novel heterogeneous graph, where nodes from different people and within one person are connected to capture inter-human interactions and draw the body geometry (i.e., skeleton and mesh structure). Second, it employs a dual-branch graph neural network structure -- one for predicting inter-human depth relation and the other one for predicting root-joint-relative mesh coordinates. Finally, the entire multi-human 3D meshes are constructed by combining the output from both branches. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MUG outperforms previous multi-human mesh estimation methods on standard 3D human benchmarks -- Panoptic, MuPoTS-3D and 3DPW.
abstract_zh: 从单个单目图像重建多人体网格是一个重要但具有挑战性的计算机视觉问题。除了个体身体网格模型之外，我们还需要估计受试者之间的相对 3D 位置以生成连贯的表示。在这项工作中，通过名为 MUG（多人类图网络）的单图神经网络，我们仅使用多人 2D 姿势作为输入来构建连贯的多人网格。与采用检测式管道（即提取图像特征，然后定位人体实例并从中恢复身体网格）并遭受实验室收集的训练数据集和野外测试数据集之间的显着域差距的现有方法相比，我们的方法受益于跨数据集具有相对一致的几何属性的2D姿势。我们的方法的工作原理如下：首先，为了对多人环境进行建模，它处理多人的 2D 姿势并构建一个新颖的异构图，其中来自不同人和一个人的节点连接起来，以捕获人际交互并绘制身体几何形状（即骨架和网格结构）。其次，它采用双分支图神经网络结构——一个用于预测人与人之间的深度关系，另一个用于预测根关节相对网格坐标。最后，通过组合两个分支的输出来构建整个多人 3D 网格。大量实验表明，MUG 在标准 3D 人体基准（Panoptic、MuPoTS-3D 和 3DPW）上优于以前的多人网格估计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MUG（多人体图网络），通过单目图像中的多人体2D姿态重建3D网格模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖图像特征提取和实例检测，存在实验室数据与真实场景数据的领域差异问题，而2D姿态具有跨数据集的几何一致性，可作为更鲁棒的输入。
AI.method: 构建异构图捕捉人体间交互与单人骨骼结构，采用双分支图神经网络分别预测人体间深度关系和根关节相对网格坐标，最终融合生成完整3D网格。
AI.result: 在Panoptic、MuPoTS-3D和3DPW等标准基准测试中，MUG优于现有多种人体网格估计方法。
AI.conclusion: MUG通过直接利用2D姿态的几何一致性，结合图网络建模人体间关系，有效解决了多人体3D重建中的领域差异问题。

authors_text: Ross Greer,Mohan Trivedi
title: From Pedestrian Detection to Crosswalk Estimation: An EM Algorithm and Analysis on Diverse Datasets
title_zh: 从行人检测到人行横道估计：EM 算法和对不同数据集的分析
abstract: In this work, we contribute an EM algorithm for estimation of corner points and linear crossing segments for both marked and unmarked pedestrian crosswalks using the detections of pedestrians from processed LiDAR point clouds or camera images. We demonstrate the algorithmic performance by analyzing three real-world datasets containing multiple periods of data collection for four-corner and two-corner intersections with marked and unmarked crosswalks. Additionally, we include a Python video tool to visualize the crossing parameter estimation, pedestrian trajectories, and phase intervals in our public source code.
summary: In this work, we contribute an EM algorithm for estimation of corner points and linear crossing segments for both marked and unmarked pedestrian crosswalks using the detections of pedestrians from processed LiDAR point clouds or camera images. We demonstrate the algorithmic performance by analyzing three real-world datasets containing multiple periods of data collection for four-corner and two-corner intersections with marked and unmarked crosswalks. Additionally, we include a Python video tool to visualize the crossing parameter estimation, pedestrian trajectories, and phase intervals in our public source code.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们贡献了一种 EM 算法，使用处理后的 LiDAR 点云或摄像机图像中的行人检测来估计有标记和无标记的人行横道的角点和线性交叉路段。我们通过分析三个真实数据集来展示算法性能，其中包含带有标记和未标记人行横道的四角和两角交叉口的多个数据收集周期。此外，我们还在公共源代码中添加了一个 Python 视频工具，用于可视化交叉路口参数估计、行人轨迹和相位间隔。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于EM算法的人行横道估计方法，利用行人检测数据估计有标记和无标记人行横道的角落点及线性交叉段。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以统一处理有标记与无标记人行横道的估计问题，且缺乏对多场景数据的鲁棒性分析。
AI.method: 设计EM算法结合LiDAR点云或摄像头图像的行人检测结果，估计交叉口角落点和线性段，并通过三个多时段数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 算法在四角/两角交叉口数据集上实现稳定估计，配套Python工具可可视化轨迹与相位区间，验证了方法的通用性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的EM算法有效解决了多样化人行横道估计问题，开源工具为实际交通分析提供支持，未来可扩展至更多复杂场景。

result: 算法在四角/两角交叉口数据集上实现稳定估计，配套Python工具可可视化轨迹与相位区间，验证了方法的通用性与实用性。
conclusion: 提出的EM算法有效解决了多样化人行横道估计问题，开源工具为实际交通分析提供支持，未来可扩展至更多复杂场景。
search_text: From Pedestrian Detection to Crosswalk Estimation: An EM Algorithm and Analysis on Diverse Datasets 从行人检测到人行横道估计：EM 算法和对不同数据集的分析 In this work, we contribute an EM algorithm for estimation of corner points and linear crossing segments for both marked and unmarked pedestrian crosswalks using the detections of pedestrians from processed LiDAR point clouds or camera images. We demonstrate the algorithmic performance by analyzing three real-world datasets containing multiple periods of data collection for four-corner and two-corner intersections with marked and unmarked crosswalks. Additionally, we include a Python video tool to visualize the crossing parameter estimation, pedestrian trajectories, and phase intervals in our public source code. 在这项工作中，我们贡献了一种 EM 算法，使用处理后的 LiDAR 点云或摄像机图像中的行人检测来估计有标记和无标记的人行横道的角点和线性交叉路段。我们通过分析三个真实数据集来展示算法性能，其中包含带有标记和未标记人行横道的四角和两角交叉口的多个数据收集周期。此外，我们还在公共源代码中添加了一个 Python 视频工具，用于可视化交叉路口参数估计、行人轨迹和相位间隔。 本文提出一种基于EM算法的人行横道估计方法，利用行人检测数据估计有标记和无标记人行横道的角落点及线性交叉段。 Ross Greer,Mohan Trivedi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Eduardo Gallo
title: The SO(3) and SE(3) Lie Algebras of Rigid Body Rotations and Motions and their Application to Discrete Integration, Gradient Descent Optimization, and State Estimation
title_zh: 刚体旋转和运动的 SO(3) 和 SE(3) 李代数及其在离散积分、梯度下降优化和状态估计中的应用
abstract: Classical mathematical techniques such as discrete integration, gradient descent optimization, and state estimation (exemplified by the Runge-Kutta method, Gauss-Newton minimization, and extended Kalman filter or EKF, respectively), rely on linear algebra and hence are only applicable to state vectors belonging to Euclidean spaces when implemented as described in the literature. This document discusses how to modify these methods so they can be applied to non-Euclidean state vectors, such as those containing rotations and full motions of rigid bodies. To do so, this document provides an in-depth review of the concept of manifolds or Lie groups, together with their tangent spaces or Lie algebras, their exponential and logarithmic maps, the analysis of perturbations, the treatment of uncertainty and covariance, and in particular the definitions of the Jacobians required to employ the previously mentioned calculus methods. These concepts are particularized to the specific cases of the SO(3) and SE(3) Lie groups, known as the special orthogonal and special Euclidean groups of R3, which represent the rigid body rotations and motions, describing their various possible parameterizations as well as their advantages and disadvantages.
summary: Classical mathematical techniques such as discrete integration, gradient descent optimization, and state estimation (exemplified by the Runge-Kutta method, Gauss-Newton minimization, and extended Kalman filter or EKF, respectively), rely on linear algebra and hence are only applicable to state vectors belonging to Euclidean spaces when implemented as described in the literature. This document discusses how to modify these methods so they can be applied to non-Euclidean state vectors, such as those containing rotations and full motions of rigid bodies. To do so, this document provides an in-depth review of the concept of manifolds or Lie groups, together with their tangent spaces or Lie algebras, their exponential and logarithmic maps, the analysis of perturbations, the treatment of uncertainty and covariance, and in particular the definitions of the Jacobians required to employ the previously mentioned calculus methods. These concepts are particularized to the specific cases of the SO(3) and SE(3) Lie groups, known as the special orthogonal and special Euclidean groups of R3, which represent the rigid body rotations and motions, describing their various possible parameterizations as well as their advantages and disadvantages.
abstract_zh: Classical mathematical techniques such as discrete integration, gradient descent optimization, and state estimation (exemplified by the Runge-Kutta method, Gauss-Newton minimization, and extended Kalman filter or EKF, respectively), rely on linear algebra and hence are only applicable to state vectors belonging to Euclidean spaces when implemented as described in the literature.本文档讨论如何修改这些方法，以便将它们应用于非欧几里德状态向量，例如包含刚体旋转和完整运动的状态向量。为此，本文档深入回顾了流形或李群的概念，以及它们的切线空间或李代数、它们的指数和对数映射、扰动分析、不确定性和协方差的处理，特别是使用前面提到的微积分方法所需的雅可比行列式的定义。 These concepts are particularized to the specific cases of the SO(3) and SE(3) Lie groups, known as the special orthogonal and special Euclidean groups of R3, which represent the rigid body rotations and motions, describing their various possible parameterizations as well as their advantages and disadvantages.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将经典数学方法（如离散积分、梯度下降优化和状态估计）扩展至非欧几里得状态向量，特别是刚体旋转和运动的SO(3)和SE(3)李群。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖线性代数，仅适用于欧几里得空间，而刚体运动等非欧几里得状态向量需特殊处理，以提升机器人、计算机视觉等领域精度。
AI.method: 通过深入分析流形、李群及其切空间、指数/对数映射、扰动分析、不确定性处理和雅可比矩阵定义，具体应用于SO(3)和SE(3)的参数化方法。
AI.result: 成功推导出适用于SO(3)和SE(3)的离散积分、优化和状态估计方法，解决了非欧几里得空间下的计算问题。
AI.conclusion: 利用李群理论可有效扩展经典方法至非欧几里得状态，为刚体运动估计与控制提供理论支持。

authors_text: Jiaxin Wei,Lige Liu,Ran Cheng,Wenqing Jiang,Minghao Xu,Xinyu Jiang,Tao Sun,Soren Schwertfeger,Laurent Kneip
title: Spotlights: Probing Shapes from Spherical Viewpoints
title_zh: 聚光灯：从球面角度探索形状
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the surge of learned representations that directly build upon point clouds. Though becoming increasingly expressive, most existing representations still struggle to generate ordered point sets. Inspired by spherical multi-view scanners, we propose a novel sampling model called Spotlights to represent a 3D shape as a compact 1D array of depth values. It simulates the configuration of cameras evenly distributed on a sphere, where each virtual camera casts light rays from its principal point through sample points on a small concentric spherical cap to probe for the possible intersections with the object surrounded by the sphere. The structured point cloud is hence given implicitly as a function of depths. We provide a detailed geometric analysis of this new sampling scheme and prove its effectiveness in the context of the point cloud completion task. Experimental results on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method achieves competitive accuracy and consistency while having a significantly reduced computational cost. Furthermore, we show superior performance on the downstream point cloud registration task over state-of-the-art completion methods.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the surge of learned representations that directly build upon point clouds. Though becoming increasingly expressive, most existing representations still struggle to generate ordered point sets. Inspired by spherical multi-view scanners, we propose a novel sampling model called Spotlights to represent a 3D shape as a compact 1D array of depth values. It simulates the configuration of cameras evenly distributed on a sphere, where each virtual camera casts light rays from its principal point through sample points on a small concentric spherical cap to probe for the possible intersections with the object surrounded by the sphere. The structured point cloud is hence given implicitly as a function of depths. We provide a detailed geometric analysis of this new sampling scheme and prove its effectiveness in the context of the point cloud completion task. Experimental results on both synthetic and real data demonstrate that our method achieves competitive accuracy and consistency while having a significantly reduced computational cost. Furthermore, we show superior performance on the downstream point cloud registration task over state-of-the-art completion methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，直接基于点云的学习表示激增。尽管变得越来越具有表现力，但大多数现有的表示仍然难以生成有序点集。受球形多视图扫描仪的启发，我们提出了一种称为聚光灯的新颖采样模型，将 3D 形状表示为紧凑的 1D 深度值数组。它模拟均匀分布在球体上的摄像机的配置，其中每个虚拟摄像机从其主点投射光线通过小同心球盖上的采样点，以探测与球体包围的物体可能的交叉点。因此，结构化点云作为深度的函数隐式给出。我们对这种新的采样方案进行了详细的几何分析，并证明了其在点云完成任务中的有效性。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了有竞争力的准确性和一致性，同时显着降低了计算成本。此外，我们在下游点云配准任务上表现出优于最先进的完成方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Spotlights的新方法，通过球形视角的光线探测生成有序点云表示，解决现有点云表示方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于点云的表示方法难以生成有序点集，而传统多视角扫描设备启发了从球形视角进行结构化采样的需求。
AI.method: 模拟球面均匀分布的虚拟相机阵列，通过光线与物体的交点计算深度值，将3D形状编码为深度值的1D数组。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均取得较高精度和一致性，计算成本显著降低，并在点云配准任务中超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Spotlights方法通过几何分析验证有效性，为点云补全和配准任务提供了高效且结构化的表示方案。

authors_text: Eugenio Cuniato,Nicholas Lawrance,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart
title: Power-based Safety Layer for Aerial Vehicles in Physical Interaction using Lyapunov Exponents
title_zh: 使用李亚普诺夫指数的物理交互中飞行器的基于功率的安全层
abstract: As the performance of autonomous systems increases, safety concerns arise, especially when operating in non-structured environments. To deal with these concerns, this work presents a safety layer for mechanical systems that detects and responds to unstable dynamics caused by external disturbances. The safety layer is implemented independently and on top of already present nominal controllers, like pose or wrench tracking, and limits power flow when the system's response would lead to instability. This approach is based on the computation of the Largest Lyapunov Exponent (LLE) of the system's error dynamics, which represent a measure of the dynamics' divergence or convergence rate. By actively computing this metric, divergent and possibly dangerous system behaviors can be promptly detected. The LLE is then used in combination with Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to impose power limit constraints on a jerk controlled system. The proposed architecture is experimentally validated on an Omnidirectional Micro Aerial Vehicle (OMAV) both in free flight and interaction tasks.
summary: As the performance of autonomous systems increases, safety concerns arise, especially when operating in non-structured environments. To deal with these concerns, this work presents a safety layer for mechanical systems that detects and responds to unstable dynamics caused by external disturbances. The safety layer is implemented independently and on top of already present nominal controllers, like pose or wrench tracking, and limits power flow when the system's response would lead to instability. This approach is based on the computation of the Largest Lyapunov Exponent (LLE) of the system's error dynamics, which represent a measure of the dynamics' divergence or convergence rate. By actively computing this metric, divergent and possibly dangerous system behaviors can be promptly detected. The LLE is then used in combination with Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to impose power limit constraints on a jerk controlled system. The proposed architecture is experimentally validated on an Omnidirectional Micro Aerial Vehicle (OMAV) both in free flight and interaction tasks.
abstract_zh: As the performance of autonomous systems increases, safety concerns arise, especially when operating in non-structured environments.为了解决这些问题，这项工作为机械系统提供了一个安全层，可以检测并响应由外部干扰引起的不稳定动态。安全层是独立实现的，位于现有的标称控制器之上，例如姿势或扳手跟踪，并在系统响应导致不稳定时限制功率流。该方法基于系统误差动态的最大李雅普诺夫指数 (LLE) 的计算，该指数代表动态发散或收敛速度的度量。 By actively computing this metric, divergent and possibly dangerous system behaviors can be promptly detected. The LLE is then used in combination with Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to impose power limit constraints on a jerk controlled system.所提出的架构在全向微型飞行器（OMAV）上的自由飞行和交互任务中进行了实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于功率的空中车辆物理交互安全层，利用李雅普诺夫指数检测并响应外部干扰引起的不稳定动力学。
AI.motivation: 随着自主系统性能提升，在非结构化环境中运行的安全问题日益突出，需开发独立于现有控制器的安全机制以应对潜在不稳定风险。
AI.method: 通过计算系统误差动力学的最大李雅普诺夫指数（LLE）实时评估动态发散性，并结合控制屏障函数（CBFs）对 jerk 控制系统施加功率限制约束。
AI.result: 该架构在全向微型飞行器（OMAV）的自由飞行和交互任务中得到实验验证，成功检测并抑制了不稳定行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态监控与功率约束结合，为物理交互场景下的空中车辆提供了有效的安全保障机制。

search_text: Power-based Safety Layer for Aerial Vehicles in Physical Interaction using Lyapunov Exponents 使用李亚普诺夫指数的物理交互中飞行器的基于功率的安全层 As the performance of autonomous systems increases, safety concerns arise, especially when operating in non-structured environments. To deal with these concerns, this work presents a safety layer for mechanical systems that detects and responds to unstable dynamics caused by external disturbances. The safety layer is implemented independently and on top of already present nominal controllers, like pose or wrench tracking, and limits power flow when the system's response would lead to instability. This approach is based on the computation of the Largest Lyapunov Exponent (LLE) of the system's error dynamics, which represent a measure of the dynamics' divergence or convergence rate. By actively computing this metric, divergent and possibly dangerous system behaviors can be promptly detected. The LLE is then used in combination with Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to impose power limit constraints on a jerk controlled system. The proposed architecture is experimentally validated on an Omnidirectional Micro Aerial Vehicle (OMAV) both in free flight and interaction tasks. As the performance of autonomous systems increases, safety concerns arise, especially when operating in non-structured environments.为了解决这些问题，这项工作为机械系统提供了一个安全层，可以检测并响应由外部干扰引起的不稳定动态。安全层是独立实现的，位于现有的标称控制器之上，例如姿势或扳手跟踪，并在系统响应导致不稳定时限制功率流。该方法基于系统误差动态的最大李雅普诺夫指数 (LLE) 的计算，该指数代表动态发散或收敛速度的度量。 By actively computing this metric, divergent and possibly dangerous system behaviors can be promptly detected. The LLE is then used in combination with Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to impose power limit constraints on a jerk controlled system.所提出的架构在全向微型飞行器（OMAV）上的自由飞行和交互任务中进行了实验验证。 本文提出了一种基于功率的空中车辆物理交互安全层，利用李雅普诺夫指数检测并响应外部干扰引起的不稳定动力学。 Eugenio Cuniato,Nicholas Lawrance,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Jiao Sun,Yu Hou,Jiin Kim,Nanyun Peng
title: Are Akpans Trick or Treat: Unveiling Helpful Biases in Assistant Systems
title_zh: Akpans 是“不给糖就捣蛋”吗：揭示辅助系统中有用的偏见
comment: This manuscript, completed in early 2023, presents a project that began in 2021. We hope to share our understanding of helpfulness in dialogue systems at that time
comments: This manuscript, completed in early 2023, presents a project that began in 2021. We hope to share our understanding of helpfulness in dialogue systems at that time
abstract: Information-seeking AI assistant systems aim to answer users' queries about knowledge in a timely manner. However, both the human-perceived helpfulness of information-seeking assistant systems and its fairness implication are under-explored. In this paper, we study computational measurements of helpfulness. We collect human annotations on the helpfulness of dialogue responses, develop models for automatic helpfulness evaluation, and then propose to use the helpfulness level of a dialogue system towards different user queries to gauge the fairness of a dialogue system. Experiments with state-of-the-art dialogue systems, including ChatGPT, under three information-seeking scenarios reveal that existing systems tend to be more helpful for questions regarding concepts from highly-developed countries than less-developed countries, uncovering potential fairness concerns underlying the current information-seeking assistant systems.
summary: Information-seeking AI assistant systems aim to answer users' queries about knowledge in a timely manner. However, both the human-perceived helpfulness of information-seeking assistant systems and its fairness implication are under-explored. In this paper, we study computational measurements of helpfulness. We collect human annotations on the helpfulness of dialogue responses, develop models for automatic helpfulness evaluation, and then propose to use the helpfulness level of a dialogue system towards different user queries to gauge the fairness of a dialogue system. Experiments with state-of-the-art dialogue systems, including ChatGPT, under three information-seeking scenarios reveal that existing systems tend to be more helpful for questions regarding concepts from highly-developed countries than less-developed countries, uncovering potential fairness concerns underlying the current information-seeking assistant systems.
abstract_zh: 信息检索人工智能辅助系统旨在及时回答用户的知识查询。然而，人类感知的信息寻求辅助系统的帮助及其公平性含义尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们研究了有用性的计算测量。我们收集有关对话响应有用性的人类注释，开发自动有用性评估模型，然后建议使用对话系统对不同用户查询的有用性级别来衡量对话系统的公平性。在三种信息寻求场景下对包括 ChatGPT 在内的最先进对话系统进行的实验表明，现有系统往往比欠发达国家更有助于解决有关高度发达国家概念的问题，从而揭示了当前信息寻求辅助系统潜在的公平性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对话系统中的帮助性偏差，通过评估系统对不同用户查询的帮助程度来分析其公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有信息寻求助手系统在帮助性和公平性方面的研究不足，需探索量化帮助性并评估系统公平性以揭示潜在偏见。
AI.method: 收集人类对对话回复的帮助性标注，开发自动评估模型，并在三种信息寻求场景下测试ChatGPT等系统。
AI.result: 实验发现现有系统对发达国家相关问题更高效，暴露了针对欠发达国家信息的公平性问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前信息寻求助手系统存在帮助性偏差，需改进以确保不同背景用户获得公平帮助。

authors_text: Bin Ren,Yahui Liu,Yue Song,Wei Bi,Rita Cucchiara,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang
title: Masked Jigsaw Puzzle: A Versatile Position Embedding for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 蒙面拼图：视觉变形金刚的多功能位置嵌入
abstract: Position Embeddings (PEs), an arguably indispensable component in Vision Transformers (ViTs), have been shown to improve the performance of ViTs on many vision tasks. However, PEs have a potentially high risk of privacy leakage since the spatial information of the input patches is exposed. This caveat naturally raises a series of interesting questions about the impact of PEs on the accuracy, privacy, prediction consistency, etc. To tackle these issues, we propose a Masked Jigsaw Puzzle (MJP) position embedding method. In particular, MJP first shuffles the selected patches via our block-wise random jigsaw puzzle shuffle algorithm, and their corresponding PEs are occluded. Meanwhile, for the non-occluded patches, the PEs remain the original ones but their spatial relation is strengthened via our dense absolute localization regressor. The experimental results reveal that 1) PEs explicitly encode the 2D spatial relationship and lead to severe privacy leakage problems under gradient inversion attack; 2) Training ViTs with the naively shuffled patches can alleviate the problem, but it harms the accuracy; 3) Under a certain shuffle ratio, the proposed MJP not only boosts the performance and robustness on large-scale datasets (i.e., ImageNet-1K and ImageNet-C, -A/O) but also improves the privacy preservation ability under typical gradient attacks by a large margin. The source code and trained models are available at~\url{https://github.com/yhlleo/MJP}.
summary: Position Embeddings (PEs), an arguably indispensable component in Vision Transformers (ViTs), have been shown to improve the performance of ViTs on many vision tasks. However, PEs have a potentially high risk of privacy leakage since the spatial information of the input patches is exposed. This caveat naturally raises a series of interesting questions about the impact of PEs on the accuracy, privacy, prediction consistency, etc. To tackle these issues, we propose a Masked Jigsaw Puzzle (MJP) position embedding method. In particular, MJP first shuffles the selected patches via our block-wise random jigsaw puzzle shuffle algorithm, and their corresponding PEs are occluded. Meanwhile, for the non-occluded patches, the PEs remain the original ones but their spatial relation is strengthened via our dense absolute localization regressor. The experimental results reveal that 1) PEs explicitly encode the 2D spatial relationship and lead to severe privacy leakage problems under gradient inversion attack; 2) Training ViTs with the naively shuffled patches can alleviate the problem, but it harms the accuracy; 3) Under a certain shuffle ratio, the proposed MJP not only boosts the performance and robustness on large-scale datasets (i.e., ImageNet-1K and ImageNet-C, -A/O) but also improves the privacy preservation ability under typical gradient attacks by a large margin. The source code and trained models are available at~\url{https://github.com/yhlleo/MJP}.
abstract_zh: 位置嵌入 (PE) 可以说是视觉变换器 (ViT) 中不可或缺的组件，已被证明可以提高 ViT 在许多视觉任务中的性能。 However, PEs have a potentially high risk of privacy leakage since the spatial information of the input patches is exposed.这一警告自然引发了一系列有趣的问题，涉及 PE 对准确性、隐私性、预测一致性等的影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种蒙面拼图（MJP）位置嵌入方法。特别是，MJP 首先通过我们的分块随机拼图洗牌算法对选定的补丁进行洗牌，并且它们相应的 PE 被遮挡。同时，对于非遮挡斑块，PE 仍然是原始的，但它们的空间关系通过我们的密集绝对定位回归器得到了加强。实验结果表明：1）PE对二维空间关系进行显式编码，在梯度反转攻击下会导致严重的隐私泄露问题； 2) Training ViTs with the naively shuffled patches can alleviate the problem, but it harms the accuracy; 3）在一定的洗牌比下​​，所提出的MJP不仅提高了大规模数据集（即ImageNet-1K和ImageNet-C，-A/O）的性能和鲁棒性，而且还大幅提高了典型梯度攻击下的隐私保护能力。 The source code and trained models are available at~\url{https://github.com/yhlleo/MJP}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Masked Jigsaw Puzzle (MJP)的位置嵌入方法，旨在解决视觉Transformer（ViT）中位置嵌入（PE）导致的隐私泄露问题，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 位置嵌入（PE）在视觉Transformer中至关重要，但其暴露输入补丁的空间信息可能导致隐私泄露。现有方法在缓解隐私问题时可能损害模型准确性，因此需要一种兼顾隐私保护与性能的解决方案。
AI.method: MJP通过块级随机拼图算法打乱选定补丁并遮蔽其对应PE，同时对未遮蔽补丁使用原始PE并通过密集绝对定位回归器强化其空间关系，以平衡隐私保护与模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) PE会编码2D空间关系并导致梯度反演攻击下的隐私泄露；2) 简单打乱补丁会损害准确性；3) MJP在ImageNet-1K等大规模数据集上提升性能与鲁棒性，且显著增强隐私保护能力。
AI.conclusion: MJP通过创新性位置嵌入设计有效缓解了ViT的隐私泄露问题，同时保持甚至提升了模型性能，为视觉Transformer提供了隐私与性能兼顾的通用解决方案。

motivation: 位置嵌入（PE）在视觉Transformer中至关重要，但其暴露输入补丁的空间信息可能导致隐私泄露。现有方法在缓解隐私问题时可能损害模型准确性，因此需要一种兼顾隐私保护与性能的解决方案。
method: MJP通过块级随机拼图算法打乱选定补丁并遮蔽其对应PE，同时对未遮蔽补丁使用原始PE并通过密集绝对定位回归器强化其空间关系，以平衡隐私保护与模型性能。
result: 实验表明：1) PE会编码2D空间关系并导致梯度反演攻击下的隐私泄露；2) 简单打乱补丁会损害准确性；3) MJP在ImageNet-1K等大规模数据集上提升性能与鲁棒性，且显著增强隐私保护能力。
conclusion: MJP通过创新性位置嵌入设计有效缓解了ViT的隐私泄露问题，同时保持甚至提升了模型性能，为视觉Transformer提供了隐私与性能兼顾的通用解决方案。
search_text: Masked Jigsaw Puzzle: A Versatile Position Embedding for Vision Transformers 蒙面拼图：视觉变形金刚的多功能位置嵌入 Position Embeddings (PEs), an arguably indispensable component in Vision Transformers (ViTs), have been shown to improve the performance of ViTs on many vision tasks. However, PEs have a potentially high risk of privacy leakage since the spatial information of the input patches is exposed. This caveat naturally raises a series of interesting questions about the impact of PEs on the accuracy, privacy, prediction consistency, etc. To tackle these issues, we propose a Masked Jigsaw Puzzle (MJP) position embedding method. In particular, MJP first shuffles the selected patches via our block-wise random jigsaw puzzle shuffle algorithm, and their corresponding PEs are occluded. Meanwhile, for the non-occluded patches, the PEs remain the original ones but their spatial relation is strengthened via our dense absolute localization regressor. The experimental results reveal that 1) PEs explicitly encode the 2D spatial relationship and lead to severe privacy leakage problems under gradient inversion attack; 2) Training ViTs with the naively shuffled patches can alleviate the problem, but it harms the accuracy; 3) Under a certain shuffle ratio, the proposed MJP not only boosts the performance and robustness on large-scale datasets (i.e., ImageNet-1K and ImageNet-C, -A/O) but also improves the privacy preservation ability under typical gradient attacks by a large margin. The source code and trained models are available at~\url{https://github.com/yhlleo/MJP}. 位置嵌入 (PE) 可以说是视觉变换器 (ViT) 中不可或缺的组件，已被证明可以提高 ViT 在许多视觉任务中的性能。 However, PEs have a potentially high risk of privacy leakage since the spatial information of the input patches is exposed.这一警告自然引发了一系列有趣的问题，涉及 PE 对准确性、隐私性、预测一致性等的影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种蒙面拼图（MJP）位置嵌入方法。特别是，MJP 首先通过我们的分块随机拼图洗牌算法对选定的补丁进行洗牌，并且它们相应的 PE 被遮挡。同时，对于非遮挡斑块，PE 仍然是原始的，但它们的空间关系通过我们的密集绝对定位回归器得到了加强。实验结果表明：1）PE对二维空间关系进行显式编码，在梯度反转攻击下会导致严重的隐私泄露问题； 2) Training ViTs with the naively shuffled patches can alleviate the problem, but it harms the accuracy; 3）在一定的洗牌比下​​，所提出的MJP不仅提高了大规模数据集（即ImageNet-1K和ImageNet-C，-A/O）的性能和鲁棒性，而且还大幅提高了典型梯度攻击下的隐私保护能力。 The source code and trained models are available at~\url{https://github.com/yhlleo/MJP}. 本文提出了一种名为Masked Jigsaw Puzzle (MJP)的位置嵌入方法，旨在解决视觉Transformer（ViT）中位置嵌入（PE）导致的隐私泄露问题，同时保持模型性能。 Bin Ren,Yahui Liu,Yue Song,Wei Bi,Rita Cucchiara,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Nicolas Boutry,Laurent Najman,Thierry Géraud
title: Some equivalence relation between persistent homology and morphological dynamics
title_zh: 持久同源性与形态动力学之间的某种等价关系
comment: Journal of Mathematical Imaging and Vision, Springer Verlag, In press
comments: Journal of Mathematical Imaging and Vision, Springer Verlag, In press
abstract: In Mathematical Morphology (MM), connected filters based on dynamics are used to filter the extrema of an image. Similarly, persistence is a concept coming from Persistent Homology (PH) and Morse Theory (MT) that represents the stability of the extrema of a Morse function. Since these two concepts seem to be closely related, in this paper we examine their relationship, and we prove that they are equal on n-D Morse functions, n $\ge$ 1. More exactly, pairing a minimum with a 1-saddle by dynamics or pairing the same 1-saddle with a minimum by persistence leads exactly to the same pairing, assuming that the critical values of the studied Morse function are unique. This result is a step further to show how much topological data analysis and mathematical morphology are related, paving the way for a more in-depth study of the relations between these two research fields.
summary: In Mathematical Morphology (MM), connected filters based on dynamics are used to filter the extrema of an image. Similarly, persistence is a concept coming from Persistent Homology (PH) and Morse Theory (MT) that represents the stability of the extrema of a Morse function. Since these two concepts seem to be closely related, in this paper we examine their relationship, and we prove that they are equal on n-D Morse functions, n $\ge$ 1. More exactly, pairing a minimum with a 1-saddle by dynamics or pairing the same 1-saddle with a minimum by persistence leads exactly to the same pairing, assuming that the critical values of the studied Morse function are unique. This result is a step further to show how much topological data analysis and mathematical morphology are related, paving the way for a more in-depth study of the relations between these two research fields.
abstract_zh: 在数学形态学（MM）中，基于动力学的连接滤波器用于过滤图像的极值。同样，持久性是来自持久同调（PH）和莫尔斯理论（MT）的概念，表示莫尔斯函数极值的稳定性。由于这两个概念似乎密切相关，因此在本文中我们检查了它们的关系，并证明它们在 n 维莫尔斯函数 n $\ge$ 1 上相等。更准确地说，假设所研究的莫尔斯函数的临界值是唯一的，通过动力学将最小值与 1-鞍座配对，或通过持久性将相同的 1-鞍座与最小值配对会导致完全相同的配对。这一结果进一步展示了拓扑数据分析和数学形态学之间的关联程度，为更深入地研究这两个研究领域之间的关系铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了持久同调与形态动力学之间的等价关系，并证明在特定条件下两者对极值的配对结果一致。
AI.motivation: 数学形态学中的动态滤波与持久同调的稳定性概念均涉及图像极值分析，但二者关系尚未明确，需建立理论联系以促进跨领域研究。
AI.method: 通过分析n维莫尔斯函数的临界点配对方式，比较动态滤波与持久同调在极值配对上的数学表达。
AI.result: 证明当莫尔斯函数临界值唯一时，动态滤波的最小值-1-鞍点配对与持久同调的配对结果完全一致。
AI.conclusion: 该结果揭示了拓扑数据分析与数学形态学的深层关联，为后续跨学科研究提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Kyung Ho Park
title: Deep Dense Local Feature Matching and Vehicle Removal for Indoor Visual Localization
title_zh: 用于室内视觉定位的深度密集局部特征匹配和车辆去除
abstract: Visual localization is an essential component of intelligent transportation systems, enabling broad applications that require understanding one's self location when other sensors are not available. It is mostly tackled by image retrieval such that the location of a query image is determined by its closest match in the previously collected images. Existing approaches focus on large scale localization where landmarks are helpful in finding the location. However, visual localization becomes challenging in small scale environments where objects are hardly recognizable. In this paper, we propose a visual localization framework that robustly finds the match for a query among the images collected from indoor parking lots. It is a challenging problem when the vehicles in the images share similar appearances and are frequently replaced such as parking lots. We propose to employ a deep dense local feature matching that resembles human perception to find correspondences and eliminating matches from vehicles automatically with a vehicle detector. The proposed solution is robust to the scenes with low textures and invariant to false matches caused by vehicles. We compare our framework with alternatives to validate our superiority on a benchmark dataset containing 267 pre-collected images and 99 query images taken from 34 sections of a parking lot. Our method achieves 86.9 percent accuracy, outperforming the alternatives.
summary: Visual localization is an essential component of intelligent transportation systems, enabling broad applications that require understanding one's self location when other sensors are not available. It is mostly tackled by image retrieval such that the location of a query image is determined by its closest match in the previously collected images. Existing approaches focus on large scale localization where landmarks are helpful in finding the location. However, visual localization becomes challenging in small scale environments where objects are hardly recognizable. In this paper, we propose a visual localization framework that robustly finds the match for a query among the images collected from indoor parking lots. It is a challenging problem when the vehicles in the images share similar appearances and are frequently replaced such as parking lots. We propose to employ a deep dense local feature matching that resembles human perception to find correspondences and eliminating matches from vehicles automatically with a vehicle detector. The proposed solution is robust to the scenes with low textures and invariant to false matches caused by vehicles. We compare our framework with alternatives to validate our superiority on a benchmark dataset containing 267 pre-collected images and 99 query images taken from 34 sections of a parking lot. Our method achieves 86.9 percent accuracy, outperforming the alternatives.
abstract_zh: 视觉定位是智能交通系统的重要组成部分，可实现在其他传感器不可用时需要了解自身位置的广泛应用。它主要通过图像检索来解决，以便查询图像的位置由其在先前收集的图像中最接近的匹配来确定。现有方法侧重于大规模定位，其中地标有助于查找位置。然而，在物体难以识别的小规模环境中，视觉定位变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种视觉定位框架，可以在从室内停车场收集的图像中稳健地找到查询的匹配项。当图像中的车辆具有相似的外观并且频繁更换（例如停车场）时，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们建议采用类似于人类感知的深度密集局部特征匹配来寻找对应关系，并使用车辆检测器自动消除车辆中的匹配。所提出的解决方案对于低纹理场景具有鲁棒性，并且对于车辆引起的错误匹配具有不变性。我们将我们的框架与替代方案进行比较，以验证我们在基准数据集上的优越性，该数据集包含从停车场 34 个部分拍摄的 267 个预先收集的图像和 99 个查询图像。我们的方法达到了 86.9% 的准确率，优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对室内停车场场景的视觉定位框架，通过深度密集局部特征匹配和车辆移除技术解决小规模环境中因车辆相似性导致的定位难题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位方法在大规模场景中依赖地标有效，但在室内停车场等小规模环境中因车辆频繁更换且外观相似，导致特征匹配困难，亟需鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用深度密集局部特征匹配模拟人类感知机制，并结合车辆检测器自动排除车辆干扰，提升低纹理场景下的匹配鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在包含267张预收集图像和99个查询图像的基准数据集上，方法达到86.9%的准确率，优于现有替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了车辆干扰和低纹理场景下的视觉定位问题，验证了深度特征匹配与车辆移除联合策略的优越性。

The proposed solution is robust to the scenes with low textures and invariant to false matches caused by vehicles. We compare our framework with alternatives to validate our superiority on a benchmark dataset containing 267 pre-collected images and 99 query images taken from 34 sections of a parking lot. Our method achieves 86.9 percent accuracy, outperforming the alternatives. 视觉定位是智能交通系统的重要组成部分，可实现在其他传感器不可用时需要了解自身位置的广泛应用。它主要通过图像检索来解决，以便查询图像的位置由其在先前收集的图像中最接近的匹配来确定。现有方法侧重于大规模定位，其中地标有助于查找位置。然而，在物体难以识别的小规模环境中，视觉定位变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种视觉定位框架，可以在从室内停车场收集的图像中稳健地找到查询的匹配项。当图像中的车辆具有相似的外观并且频繁更换（例如停车场）时，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们建议采用类似于人类感知的深度密集局部特征匹配来寻找对应关系，并使用车辆检测器自动消除车辆中的匹配。所提出的解决方案对于低纹理场景具有鲁棒性，并且对于车辆引起的错误匹配具有不变性。我们将我们的框架与替代方案进行比较，以验证我们在基准数据集上的优越性，该数据集包含从停车场 34 个部分拍摄的 267 个预先收集的图像和 99 个查询图像。我们的方法达到了 86.9% 的准确率，优于其他方法。 本文提出了一种针对室内停车场场景的视觉定位框架，通过深度密集局部特征匹配和车辆移除技术解决小规模环境中因车辆相似性导致的定位难题。 Kyung Ho Park cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Vera Wesselkamp,Konrad Rieck,Daniel Arp,Erwin Quiring
title: Misleading Deep-Fake Detection with GAN Fingerprints
title_zh: 使用 GAN 指纹进行误导性深度造假检测
comment: In IEEE Deep Learning and Security Workshop (DLS) 2022
comments: In IEEE Deep Learning and Security Workshop (DLS) 2022
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have made remarkable progress in synthesizing realistic-looking images that effectively outsmart even humans. Although several detection methods can recognize these deep fakes by checking for image artifacts from the generation process, multiple counterattacks have demonstrated their limitations. These attacks, however, still require certain conditions to hold, such as interacting with the detection method or adjusting the GAN directly. In this paper, we introduce a novel class of simple counterattacks that overcomes these limitations. In particular, we show that an adversary can remove indicative artifacts, the GAN fingerprint, directly from the frequency spectrum of a generated image. We explore different realizations of this removal, ranging from filtering high frequencies to more nuanced frequency-peak cleansing. We evaluate the performance of our attack with different detection methods, GAN architectures, and datasets. Our results show that an adversary can often remove GAN fingerprints and thus evade the detection of generated images.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have made remarkable progress in synthesizing realistic-looking images that effectively outsmart even humans. Although several detection methods can recognize these deep fakes by checking for image artifacts from the generation process, multiple counterattacks have demonstrated their limitations. These attacks, however, still require certain conditions to hold, such as interacting with the detection method or adjusting the GAN directly. In this paper, we introduce a novel class of simple counterattacks that overcomes these limitations. In particular, we show that an adversary can remove indicative artifacts, the GAN fingerprint, directly from the frequency spectrum of a generated image. We explore different realizations of this removal, ranging from filtering high frequencies to more nuanced frequency-peak cleansing. We evaluate the performance of our attack with different detection methods, GAN architectures, and datasets. Our results show that an adversary can often remove GAN fingerprints and thus evade the detection of generated images.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）在合成逼真的图像方面取得了显着的进步，甚至比人类更聪明。尽管多种检测方法可以通过检查生成过程中的图像伪影来识别这些深度赝品，但多次反击已经证明了它们的局限性。然而，这些攻击仍然需要一定的条件才能成立，例如与检测方法交互或直接调整 GAN。在本文中，我们介绍了一类新颖的简单反击，克服了这些限制。特别是，我们证明对手可以直接从生成图像的频谱中删除指示性伪影（GAN 指纹）。我们探索了这种去除的不同实现方式，从过滤高频到更细致的频率峰值净化。我们使用不同的检测方法、GAN 架构和数据集来评估攻击的性能。我们的结果表明，对手通常可以删除 GAN 指纹，从而逃避对生成图像的检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过移除生成对抗网络（GAN）生成图像的频率谱指纹来误导深度伪造检测的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法依赖于GAN生成过程中的图像伪影，但这些方法易受需要与检测系统交互或直接修改GAN的攻击影响，存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过分析GAN生成图像的频率谱，提出直接移除指纹的攻击方法，包括高频过滤和频率峰值清理等技术。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效移除多种GAN架构生成图像的指纹，使生成图像成功规避主流检测方法的识别。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统攻击的限制条件，通过直接操作频率域信息实现更隐蔽的对抗，提示检测模型需关注频率域特征以提升鲁棒性。

authors_text: Le Ngoc Luyen,Marie-Hélène Abel,Philippe Gouspillou
title: Apport des ontologies pour le calcul de la similarité sémantique au sein d'un système de recommandation
title_zh: 推荐系统中相似语义计算的本体论的认可
abstract: Measurement of the semantic relatedness or likeness between terms, words, or text data plays an important role in different applications dealing with textual data such as knowledge acquisition, recommender system, and natural language processing. Over the past few years, many ontologies have been developed and used as a form of structured representation of knowledge bases for information systems. The calculation of semantic similarity from ontology has developed and depending on the context is complemented by other similarity calculation methods. In this paper, we propose and carry on an approach for the calculation of ontology-based semantic similarity using in the context of a recommender system.
summary: Measurement of the semantic relatedness or likeness between terms, words, or text data plays an important role in different applications dealing with textual data such as knowledge acquisition, recommender system, and natural language processing. Over the past few years, many ontologies have been developed and used as a form of structured representation of knowledge bases for information systems. The calculation of semantic similarity from ontology has developed and depending on the context is complemented by other similarity calculation methods. In this paper, we propose and carry on an approach for the calculation of ontology-based semantic similarity using in the context of a recommender system.
abstract_zh: 术语、单词或文本数据之间的语义相关性或相似性的测量在处理文本数据的不同应用（例如知识获取、推荐系统和自然语言处理）中发挥着重要作用。在过去的几年中，许多本体已经被开发并用作信息系统知识库的结构化表示形式。从本体计算语义相似度已经发展起来，并且根据上下文由其他相似度计算方法补充。在本文中，我们提出并实施了一种在推荐系统的上下文中计算基于本体的语义相似度的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于本体的语义相似性计算方法，并应用于推荐系统中
AI.motivation: 语义相似性测量在文本处理中至关重要，而传统方法存在局限，需结合本体以提高推荐系统的准确性
AI.method: 通过构建本体结构并结合多种语义相似性计算方法，实现推荐系统中更精确的语义匹配
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法能有效提升推荐系统的推荐准确性和相关性
AI.conclusion: 本体在推荐系统中语义相似性计算中的应用具有显著优势，能够增强系统的语义理解能力

authors_text: Pruthvi Patel,Swaroop Mishra,Mihir Parmar,Chitta Baral
title: Is a Question Decomposition Unit All We Need?
title_zh: 我们只需要一个问题分解单元吗？
abstract: Large Language Models (LMs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many Natural Language Processing (NLP) benchmarks. With the growing number of new benchmarks, we build bigger and more complex LMs. However, building new LMs may not be an ideal option owing to the cost, time and environmental impact associated with it. We explore an alternative route: can we modify data by expressing it in terms of the model's strengths, so that a question becomes easier for models to answer? We investigate if humans can decompose a hard question into a set of simpler questions that are relatively easier for models to solve. We analyze a range of datasets involving various forms of reasoning and find that it is indeed possible to significantly improve model performance (24% for GPT3 and 29% for RoBERTa-SQuAD along with a symbolic calculator) via decomposition. Our approach provides a viable option to involve people in NLP research in a meaningful way. Our findings indicate that Human-in-the-loop Question Decomposition (HQD) can potentially provide an alternate path to building large LMs. Code and data is available at https://github.com/Pruthvi98/QuestionDecomposition
summary: Large Language Models (LMs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many Natural Language Processing (NLP) benchmarks. With the growing number of new benchmarks, we build bigger and more complex LMs. However, building new LMs may not be an ideal option owing to the cost, time and environmental impact associated with it. We explore an alternative route: can we modify data by expressing it in terms of the model's strengths, so that a question becomes easier for models to answer? We investigate if humans can decompose a hard question into a set of simpler questions that are relatively easier for models to solve. We analyze a range of datasets involving various forms of reasoning and find that it is indeed possible to significantly improve model performance (24% for GPT3 and 29% for RoBERTa-SQuAD along with a symbolic calculator) via decomposition. Our approach provides a viable option to involve people in NLP research in a meaningful way. Our findings indicate that Human-in-the-loop Question Decomposition (HQD) can potentially provide an alternate path to building large LMs. Code and data is available at https://github.com/Pruthvi98/QuestionDecomposition
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LM) 在许多自然语言处理 (NLP) 基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。随着新基准的数量不断增加，我们构建了更大、更复杂的 LM。然而，由于与之相关的成本、时间和环境影响，建造新的LM可能不是一个理想的选择。我们探索另一种途径：我们是否可以通过用模型的优势来表达数据来修改数据，以便模型更容易回答问题？我们研究人类是否可以将一个难题分解为一组相对更容易模型解决的简单问题。我们分析了一系列涉及各种推理形式的数据集，发现通过分解确实可以显着提高模型性能（GPT3 为 24%，RoBERTa-SQuAD 为 29%，加上符号计算器）。我们的方法提供了一个可行的选择，让人们以有意义的方式参与 NLP 研究。我们的研究结果表明，人机循环问题分解（HQD）有可能提供构建大型 LM 的替代途径。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Pruthvi98/QuestionDecomposition 获取

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过人类辅助的问答分解方法提升大语言模型性能，而非单纯依赖构建更大模型。
AI.motivation: 构建更大语言模型成本高且环境影响大，需探索通过数据优化提升现有模型性能的替代方案。
AI.method: 将复杂问题分解为多个简单子问题，利用人类标注数据训练模型，并结合符号计算器增强推理能力。
AI.result: GPT3性能提升24%，RoBERTa-SQuAD结合计算器后提升29%，验证了分解方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 人类参与的问答分解（HQD）为提升模型性能提供了可行路径，可作为构建更大模型的替代方案。

conclusion: 人类参与的问答分解（HQD）为提升模型性能提供了可行路径，可作为构建更大模型的替代方案。
search_text: Is a Question Decomposition Unit All We Need? 我们只需要一个问题分解单元吗？ Large Language Models (LMs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many Natural Language Processing (NLP) benchmarks. With the growing number of new benchmarks, we build bigger and more complex LMs. However, building new LMs may not be an ideal option owing to the cost, time and environmental impact associated with it. We explore an alternative route: can we modify data by expressing it in terms of the model's strengths, so that a question becomes easier for models to answer? We investigate if humans can decompose a hard question into a set of simpler questions that are relatively easier for models to solve. We analyze a range of datasets involving various forms of reasoning and find that it is indeed possible to significantly improve model performance (24% for GPT3 and 29% for RoBERTa-SQuAD along with a symbolic calculator) via decomposition. Our approach provides a viable option to involve people in NLP research in a meaningful way. Our findings indicate that Human-in-the-loop Question Decomposition (HQD) can potentially provide an alternate path to building large LMs. Code and data is available at https://github.com/Pruthvi98/QuestionDecomposition 大型语言模型 (LM) 在许多自然语言处理 (NLP) 基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。随着新基准的数量不断增加，我们构建了更大、更复杂的 LM。然而，由于与之相关的成本、时间和环境影响，建造新的LM可能不是一个理想的选择。我们探索另一种途径：我们是否可以通过用模型的优势来表达数据来修改数据，以便模型更容易回答问题？我们研究人类是否可以将一个难题分解为一组相对更容易模型解决的简单问题。我们分析了一系列涉及各种推理形式的数据集，发现通过分解确实可以显着提高模型性能（GPT3 为 24%，RoBERTa-SQuAD 为 29%，加上符号计算器）。我们的方法提供了一个可行的选择，让人们以有意义的方式参与 NLP 研究。我们的研究结果表明，人机循环问题分解（HQD）有可能提供构建大型 LM 的替代途径。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Pruthvi98/QuestionDecomposition 获取 本文探讨通过人类辅助的问答分解方法提升大语言模型性能，而非单纯依赖构建更大模型。 Pruthvi Patel,Swaroop Mishra,Mihir Parmar,Chitta Baral cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Changyang He,Yue Deng,Wenjie Yang,Bo Li
title: "Help! Can You Hear Me?": Understanding How Help-Seeking Posts are Overwhelmed on Social Media during a Natural Disaster
title_zh: “救命！你能听到我吗？”：了解自然灾害期间社交媒体上的求助帖子是如何被淹没的
comment: 25 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication at CSCW 2022. Forthcoming in the Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction
comments: 25 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication at CSCW 2022. Forthcoming in the Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction
abstract: Posting help-seeking requests on social media has been broadly adopted by victims during natural disasters to look for urgent rescue and supplies. The help-seeking requests need to get sufficient public attention and be promptly routed to the intended target(s) for timely responses. However, the huge volume and diverse types of crisis-related posts on social media might limit help-seeking requests to receive adequate engagement and lead to their overwhelm. To understand this problem, this work proposes a mixed-methods approach to figure out the overwhelm situation of help-seeking requests, and individuals' and online communities' strategies to cope. We focused on the 2021 Henan Floods in China and collected 141,674 help-seeking posts with the keyword "Henan Rainstorm Mutual Aid" on a popular Chinese social media platform Weibo. The findings indicate that help-seeking posts confront critical challenges of both external overwhelm (i.e., an enormous number of non-help-seeking posts with the help-seeking-related keyword distracting public attention) and internal overwhelm (i.e., attention inequality with 5% help-seeking posts receiving more than 95% likes, comments, and shares). We discover linguistic and non-linguistic help-seeking strategies that could help to prevent the overwhelm, such as including contact information, disclosing situational vulnerabilities, using subjective narratives, and structuring help-seeking posts to a normalized syntax. We also illustrate how community members spontaneously work to prevent the overwhelm with their collective wisdom (e.g., norm development through discussion) and collaborative work (e.g., cross-community support). We reflect on how the findings enrich the literature in crisis informatics and raise design implications that facilitate effective help-seeking on social media during natural disasters.

The help-seeking requests need to get sufficient public attention and be promptly routed to the intended target(s) for timely responses. However, the huge volume and diverse types of crisis-related posts on social media might limit help-seeking requests to receive adequate engagement and lead to their overwhelm. To understand this problem, this work proposes a mixed-methods approach to figure out the overwhelm situation of help-seeking requests, and individuals' and online communities' strategies to cope. We focused on the 2021 Henan Floods in China and collected 141,674 help-seeking posts with the keyword "Henan Rainstorm Mutual Aid" on a popular Chinese social media platform Weibo. The findings indicate that help-seeking posts confront critical challenges of both external overwhelm (i.e., an enormous number of non-help-seeking posts with the help-seeking-related keyword distracting public attention) and internal overwhelm (i.e., attention inequality with 5% help-seeking posts receiving more than 95% likes, comments, and shares). We discover linguistic and non-linguistic help-seeking strategies that could help to prevent the overwhelm, such as including contact information, disclosing situational vulnerabilities, using subjective narratives, and structuring help-seeking posts to a normalized syntax. We also illustrate how community members spontaneously work to prevent the overwhelm with their collective wisdom (e.g., norm development through discussion) and collaborative work (e.g., cross-community support). We reflect on how the findings enrich the literature in crisis informatics and raise design implications that facilitate effective help-seeking on social media during natural disasters.
abstract_zh: 自然灾害期间，受害者普遍通过在社交媒体上发布求助请求来寻求紧急救援和物资。寻求帮助的请求需要得到公众的充分关注，并及时转发到预定目标，以便及时得到答复。然而，社交媒体上与危机相关的帖子数量庞大、类型多样，可能会限制寻求帮助的请求获得充分参与，并导致其不堪重负。为了理解这个问题，这项工作提出了一种混合方法来弄清楚寻求帮助请求的压倒性情况，以及个人和在线社区的应对策略。我们重点关注2021年中国河南洪水，在中国热门社交媒体平台微博上收集了141,674条以“河南暴雨互助”为关键词的求助帖子。研究结果表明，寻求帮助的帖子面临着外部压倒性的严峻挑战（即，大量带有寻求帮助相关关键词的非寻求帮助的帖子分散了公众的注意力）和内部压倒性的挑战（即，注意力不平等，5%的寻求帮助的帖子获得了超过95%的点赞、评论和分享）。我们发现语言和非语言的寻求帮助策略可以帮助防止不堪重负，例如包括联系信息、披露情境漏洞、使用主观叙述以及以规范化语法构建寻求帮助的帖子。我们还说明了社区成员如何自发地利用集体智慧（例如，通过讨论制定规范）和协作工作（例如，跨社区支持）来防止不堪重负。我们思考这些发现如何丰富危机信息学文献，并提出设计启示，以促进自然灾害期间在社交媒体上有效寻求帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自然灾害期间社交媒体上的求助信息如何被淹没，并探索个人和社区的应对策略。
AI.motivation: 自然灾害中求助信息可能因社交媒体信息过载而无法获得足够关注，导致救援延误。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，分析2021年中国河南洪灾期间微博平台上141,674条含关键词的求助帖，结合定量数据与社区策略研究。
AI.result: 发现求助帖面临外部（非求助信息干扰）和内部（注意力不均）双重困境，并识别出包含联系方式、暴露脆弱性等策略可缓解信息淹没问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究为危机信息学提供新视角，提出优化社交媒体求助机制的设计建议，如标准化语法结构和社区协作规范。

authors_text: James Langley,Miguel Monteiro,Charles Jones,Nick Pawlowski,Ben Glocker
title: Structured Uncertainty in the Observation Space of Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 变分自编码器观测空间中的结构化不确定性
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (10/2022). Code available on https://github.com/biomedia-mira/sos-vae
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (10/2022). Code available on https://github.com/biomedia-mira/sos-vae
abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are a popular class of deep generative models with many variants and a wide range of applications. Improvements upon the standard VAE mostly focus on the modelling of the posterior distribution over the latent space and the properties of the neural network decoder. In contrast, improving the model for the observational distribution is rarely considered and typically defaults to a pixel-wise independent categorical or normal distribution. In image synthesis, sampling from such distributions produces spatially-incoherent results with uncorrelated pixel noise, resulting in only the sample mean being somewhat useful as an output prediction. In this paper, we aim to stay true to VAE theory by improving the samples from the observational distribution. We propose SOS-VAE, an alternative model for the observation space, encoding spatial dependencies via a low-rank parameterisation. We demonstrate that this new observational distribution has the ability to capture relevant covariance between pixels, resulting in spatially-coherent samples. In contrast to pixel-wise independent distributions, our samples seem to contain semantically-meaningful variations from the mean allowing the prediction of multiple plausible outputs with a single forward pass.
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are a popular class of deep generative models with many variants and a wide range of applications. Improvements upon the standard VAE mostly focus on the modelling of the posterior distribution over the latent space and the properties of the neural network decoder. In contrast, improving the model for the observational distribution is rarely considered and typically defaults to a pixel-wise independent categorical or normal distribution. In image synthesis, sampling from such distributions produces spatially-incoherent results with uncorrelated pixel noise, resulting in only the sample mean being somewhat useful as an output prediction. In this paper, we aim to stay true to VAE theory by improving the samples from the observational distribution. We propose SOS-VAE, an alternative model for the observation space, encoding spatial dependencies via a low-rank parameterisation. We demonstrate that this new observational distribution has the ability to capture relevant covariance between pixels, resulting in spatially-coherent samples. In contrast to pixel-wise independent distributions, our samples seem to contain semantically-meaningful variations from the mean allowing the prediction of multiple plausible outputs with a single forward pass.
abstract_zh: 变分自动编码器（VAE）是一类流行的深度生成模型，具有多种变体和广泛的应用。标准 VAE 的改进主要集中在潜在空间上后验分布的建模和神经网络解码器的属性上。相反，很少考虑改进观察分布的模型，并且通常默认为像素级独立分类或正态分布。在图像合成中，从此类分布中采样会产生空间不相干的结果，并具有不相关的像素噪声，导致只有样本均值在某种程度上可用作输出预测。在本文中，我们的目标是通过改进观测分布的样本来忠于 VAE 理论。我们提出了 SOS-VAE，一种观察空间的替代模型，通过低秩参数化编码空间依赖性。我们证明这种新的观测分布能够捕获像素之间的相关协方差，从而产生空间相干的样本。与像素级独立分布相比，我们的样本似乎包含与平均值相比具有语义意义的变化，允许通过单个前向传递来预测多个合理的输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOS-VAE模型，通过改进变分自编码器的观察分布，解决传统方法生成样本空间不连贯的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统VAE的观察分布假设像素独立，导致生成的样本存在空间不一致性且缺乏语义多样性。
AI.method: 设计低秩参数化结构编码空间依赖性，构建新的观察分布模型以捕捉像素间协方差。
AI.result: 实验表明新模型能生成空间连贯的样本，保留语义多样性并支持单次前向传递预测多个合理输出。
AI.conclusion: SOS-VAE通过结构化不确定性建模提升了VAE的生成质量，为观察空间建模提供了新思路。

We propose SOS-VAE, an alternative model for the observation space, encoding spatial dependencies via a low-rank parameterisation. We demonstrate that this new observational distribution has the ability to capture relevant covariance between pixels, resulting in spatially-coherent samples. In contrast to pixel-wise independent distributions, our samples seem to contain semantically-meaningful variations from the mean allowing the prediction of multiple plausible outputs with a single forward pass. 变分自动编码器（VAE）是一类流行的深度生成模型，具有多种变体和广泛的应用。标准 VAE 的改进主要集中在潜在空间上后验分布的建模和神经网络解码器的属性上。相反，很少考虑改进观察分布的模型，并且通常默认为像素级独立分类或正态分布。在图像合成中，从此类分布中采样会产生空间不相干的结果，并具有不相关的像素噪声，导致只有样本均值在某种程度上可用作输出预测。在本文中，我们的目标是通过改进观测分布的样本来忠于 VAE 理论。我们提出了 SOS-VAE，一种观察空间的替代模型，通过低秩参数化编码空间依赖性。我们证明这种新的观测分布能够捕获像素之间的相关协方差，从而产生空间相干的样本。与像素级独立分布相比，我们的样本似乎包含与平均值相比具有语义意义的变化，允许通过单个前向传递来预测多个合理的输出。 本文提出SOS-VAE模型，通过改进变分自编码器的观察分布，解决传统方法生成样本空间不连贯的问题。 James Langley,Miguel Monteiro,Charles Jones,Nick Pawlowski,Ben Glocker cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaoyang Lyu,Xudong XU,Ceyuan Yang,Dahua Lin,Bo Dai
title: Accelerating Diffusion Models via Early Stop of the Diffusion Process
title_zh: 通过提前停止扩散过程加速扩散模型
abstract: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have achieved impressive performance on various generation tasks. By modeling the reverse process of gradually diffusing the data distribution into a Gaussian distribution, generating a sample in DDPMs can be regarded as iteratively denoising a randomly sampled Gaussian noise. However, in practice DDPMs often need hundreds even thousands of denoising steps to obtain a high-quality sample from the Gaussian noise, leading to extremely low inference efficiency. In this work, we propose a principled acceleration strategy, referred to as Early-Stopped DDPM (ES-DDPM), for DDPMs. The key idea is to stop the diffusion process early where only the few initial diffusing steps are considered and the reverse denoising process starts from a non-Gaussian distribution. By further adopting a powerful pre-trained generative model, such as GAN and VAE, in ES-DDPM, sampling from the target non-Gaussian distribution can be efficiently achieved by diffusing samples obtained from the pre-trained generative model. In this way, the number of required denoising steps is significantly reduced. In the meantime, the sample quality of ES-DDPM also improves substantially, outperforming both the vanilla DDPM and the adopted pre-trained generative model. On extensive experiments across CIFAR-10, CelebA, ImageNet, LSUN-Bedroom and LSUN-Cat, ES-DDPM obtains promising acceleration effect and performance improvement over representative baseline methods. Moreover, ES-DDPM also demonstrates several attractive properties, including being orthogonal to existing acceleration methods, as well as simultaneously enabling both global semantic and local pixel-level control in image generation.
summary: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have achieved impressive performance on various generation tasks. By modeling the reverse process of gradually diffusing the data distribution into a Gaussian distribution, generating a sample in DDPMs can be regarded as iteratively denoising a randomly sampled Gaussian noise. However, in practice DDPMs often need hundreds even thousands of denoising steps to obtain a high-quality sample from the Gaussian noise, leading to extremely low inference efficiency. In this work, we propose a principled acceleration strategy, referred to as Early-Stopped DDPM (ES-DDPM), for DDPMs. The key idea is to stop the diffusion process early where only the few initial diffusing steps are considered and the reverse denoising process starts from a non-Gaussian distribution. By further adopting a powerful pre-trained generative model, such as GAN and VAE, in ES-DDPM, sampling from the target non-Gaussian distribution can be efficiently achieved by diffusing samples obtained from the pre-trained generative model. In this way, the number of required denoising steps is significantly reduced. In the meantime, the sample quality of ES-DDPM also improves substantially, outperforming both the vanilla DDPM and the adopted pre-trained generative model. On extensive experiments across CIFAR-10, CelebA, ImageNet, LSUN-Bedroom and LSUN-Cat, ES-DDPM obtains promising acceleration effect and performance improvement over representative baseline methods. Moreover, ES-DDPM also demonstrates several attractive properties, including being orthogonal to existing acceleration methods, as well as simultaneously enabling both global semantic and local pixel-level control in image generation.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）在各种生成任务上取得了令人印象深刻的性能。通过对数据分布逐渐扩散为高斯分布的逆过程进行建模，在 DDPM 中生成样本可以被视为对随机采样的高斯噪声进行迭代去噪。然而，在实际应用中，DDPM往往需要数百甚至数千个去噪步骤才能从高斯噪声中获得高质量的样本，从而导致推理效率极低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对 DDPM 的原则性加速策略，称为 Early-Stopped DDPM (ES-DDPM)。关键思想是尽早停止扩散过程，其中仅考虑少数初始扩散步骤，并且反向降噪过程从非高斯分布开始。 ES-DDPM中进一步采用强大的预训练生成模型，如GAN和VAE，通过扩散从预训练生成模型获得的样本，可以有效地实现对目标非高斯分布的采样。通过这种方式，所需的去噪步骤数量显着减少。同时，ES-DDPM 的样本质量也大幅提高，优于普通 DDPM 和采用的预训练生成模型。在 CIFAR-10、CelebA、ImageNet、LSUN-Bedroom 和 LSUN-Cat 的广泛实验中，ES-DDPM 相对于代表性基线方法获得了有希望的加速效果和性能改进。此外，ES-DDPM 还展示了一些有吸引力的特性，包括与现有加速方法正交，以及同时在图像生成中实现全局语义和局部像素级控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过提前终止扩散过程来加速扩散模型的方法，结合预训练生成模型以减少去噪步骤并提升样本质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型（DDPM）在生成任务中表现优异，但需数百至数千步去噪过程，导致推理效率极低，亟需加速策略。
AI.method: 提出早期终止扩散模型（ES-DDPM），仅保留初始扩散步骤并从非高斯分布启动反向去噪过程，结合预训练生成模型（如GAN、VAE）高效采样目标分布。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CelebA等数据集上，ES-DDPM显著减少去噪步数，样本质量优于原始DDPM及预训练模型，且具备全局语义与局部像素级控制能力。
AI.conclusion: ES-DDPM为扩散模型加速提供了有效方案，其方法与现有加速技术正交，兼具高效性与生成质量提升优势。
