authors_text: Rongjie Huang,Jinglin Liu,Huadai Liu,Yi Ren,Lichao Zhang,Jinzheng He,Zhou Zhao
title: TranSpeech: Speech-to-Speech Translation With Bilateral Perturbation
title_zh: TranSpeech：双边扰动的语音到语音翻译
abstract: Direct speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) with discrete units leverages recent progress in speech representation learning. Specifically, a sequence of discrete representations derived in a self-supervised manner are predicted from the model and passed to a vocoder for speech reconstruction, while still facing the following challenges: 1) Acoustic multimodality: the discrete units derived from speech with same content could be indeterministic due to the acoustic property (e.g., rhythm, pitch, and energy), which causes deterioration of translation accuracy; 2) high latency: current S2ST systems utilize autoregressive models which predict each unit conditioned on the sequence previously generated, failing to take full advantage of parallelism. In this work, we propose TranSpeech, a speech-to-speech translation model with bilateral perturbation. To alleviate the acoustic multimodal problem, we propose bilateral perturbation (BiP), which consists of the style normalization and information enhancement stages, to learn only the linguistic information from speech samples and generate more deterministic representations. With reduced multimodality, we step forward and become the first to establish a non-autoregressive S2ST technique, which repeatedly masks and predicts unit choices and produces high-accuracy results in just a few cycles. Experimental results on three language pairs demonstrate that BiP yields an improvement of 2.9 BLEU on average compared with a baseline textless S2ST model. Moreover, our parallel decoding shows a significant reduction of inference latency, enabling speedup up to 21.4x than autoregressive technique. Audio samples are available at \url{https://TranSpeech.github.io/}
summary: Direct speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) with discrete units leverages recent progress in speech representation learning. Specifically, a sequence of discrete representations derived in a self-supervised manner are predicted from the model and passed to a vocoder for speech reconstruction, while still facing the following challenges: 1) Acoustic multimodality: the discrete units derived from speech with same content could be indeterministic due to the acoustic property (e.g., rhythm, pitch, and energy), which causes deterioration of translation accuracy; 2) high latency: current S2ST systems utilize autoregressive models which predict each unit conditioned on the sequence previously generated, failing to take full advantage of parallelism. In this work, we propose TranSpeech, a speech-to-speech translation model with bilateral perturbation. To alleviate the acoustic multimodal problem, we propose bilateral perturbation (BiP), which consists of the style normalization and information enhancement stages, to learn only the linguistic information from speech samples and generate more deterministic representations. With reduced multimodality, we step forward and become the first to establish a non-autoregressive S2ST technique, which repeatedly masks and predicts unit choices and produces high-accuracy results in just a few cycles. Experimental results on three language pairs demonstrate that BiP yields an improvement of 2.9 BLEU on average compared with a baseline textless S2ST model. Moreover, our parallel decoding shows a significant reduction of inference latency, enabling speedup up to 21.4x than autoregressive technique. Audio samples are available at \url{https://TranSpeech.github.io/}
abstract_zh: 具有离散单元的直接语音到语音翻译（S2ST）利用了语音表示学习的最新进展。具体来说，从模型中预测以自监督方式导出的离散表示序列，并将其传递给声码器进行语音重建，但仍面临以下挑战：1）声学多模态：由于声学属性（例如节奏、音调和能量），从具有相同内容的语音导出的离散单元可能是不确定的，这会导致翻译精度下降； 2）高延迟：当前的S2ST系统使用自回归模型，该模型根据先前生成的序列来预测每个单元，未能充分利用并行性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TranSpeech，一种具有双边扰动的语音到语音翻译模型。为了缓解声学多模态问题，我们提出了双边扰动（BiP），它由风格归一化和信息增强阶段组成，仅从语音样本中学习语言信息并生成更具确定性的表示。随着多模态的减少，我们向前迈进，成为第一个建立非自回归 S2ST 技术的人，该技术反复屏蔽和预测单元选择，并在短短几个周期内产生高精度结果。三种语言对的实验结果表明，与基线无文本 S2ST 模型相比，BiP 平均提高了 2.9 BLEU。此外，我们的并行解码显示推理延迟显着减少，与自回归技术相比，加速速度高达 21.4 倍。音频样本可在 \url{https://TranSpeech.github.io/} 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出TranSpeech模型，通过双边扰动技术解决语音到语音翻译中的声学多模态性和高延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有直接语音到语音翻译系统因声学多模态性导致翻译准确性下降，并依赖自回归模型造成高延迟。
AI.method: 设计双边扰动（BiP）方法，包含风格归一化和信息增强阶段，学习语言信息并生成确定性表征；采用非自回归解码技术降低延迟。
AI.result: 在三个语言对实验中，BLEU分数平均提升2.9，推理延迟最高减少21.4倍。
AI.conclusion: TranSpeech通过双边扰动和非自回归技术有效解决了声学多模态性和高延迟问题，提升了翻译质量与效率。

Experimental results on three language pairs demonstrate that BiP yields an improvement of 2.9 BLEU on average compared with a baseline textless S2ST model. Moreover, our parallel decoding shows a significant reduction of inference latency, enabling speedup up to 21.4x than autoregressive technique. Audio samples are available at \url{https://TranSpeech.github.io/} 具有离散单元的直接语音到语音翻译（S2ST）利用了语音表示学习的最新进展。具体来说，从模型中预测以自监督方式导出的离散表示序列，并将其传递给声码器进行语音重建，但仍面临以下挑战：1）声学多模态：由于声学属性（例如节奏、音调和能量），从具有相同内容的语音导出的离散单元可能是不确定的，这会导致翻译精度下降； 2）高延迟：当前的S2ST系统使用自回归模型，该模型根据先前生成的序列来预测每个单元，未能充分利用并行性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TranSpeech，一种具有双边扰动的语音到语音翻译模型。为了缓解声学多模态问题，我们提出了双边扰动（BiP），它由风格归一化和信息增强阶段组成，仅从语音样本中学习语言信息并生成更具确定性的表示。随着多模态的减少，我们向前迈进，成为第一个建立非自回归 S2ST 技术的人，该技术反复屏蔽和预测单元选择，并在短短几个周期内产生高精度结果。三种语言对的实验结果表明，与基线无文本 S2ST 模型相比，BiP 平均提高了 2.9 BLEU。此外，我们的并行解码显示推理延迟显着减少，与自回归技术相比，加速速度高达 21.4 倍。音频样本可在 \url{https://TranSpeech.github.io/} 获取 本文提出TranSpeech模型，通过双边扰动技术解决语音到语音翻译中的声学多模态性和高延迟问题。 Rongjie Huang,Jinglin Liu,Huadai Liu,Yi Ren,Lichao Zhang,Jinzheng He,Zhou Zhao cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ashish V. Thapliyal,Jordi Pont-Tuset,Xi Chen,Radu Soricut
title: Crossmodal-3600: A Massively Multilingual Multimodal Evaluation Dataset
title_zh: Crossmodal-3600：大规模多语言多模式评估数据集
abstract: Research in massively multilingual image captioning has been severely hampered by a lack of high-quality evaluation datasets. In this paper we present the Crossmodal-3600 dataset (XM3600 in short), a geographically diverse set of 3600 images annotated with human-generated reference captions in 36 languages. The images were selected from across the world, covering regions where the 36 languages are spoken, and annotated with captions that achieve consistency in terms of style across all languages, while avoiding annotation artifacts due to direct translation. We apply this benchmark to model selection for massively multilingual image captioning models, and show superior correlation results with human evaluations when using XM3600 as golden references for automatic metrics.
summary: Research in massively multilingual image captioning has been severely hampered by a lack of high-quality evaluation datasets. In this paper we present the Crossmodal-3600 dataset (XM3600 in short), a geographically diverse set of 3600 images annotated with human-generated reference captions in 36 languages. The images were selected from across the world, covering regions where the 36 languages are spoken, and annotated with captions that achieve consistency in terms of style across all languages, while avoiding annotation artifacts due to direct translation. We apply this benchmark to model selection for massively multilingual image captioning models, and show superior correlation results with human evaluations when using XM3600 as golden references for automatic metrics.
abstract_zh: Research in massively multilingual image captioning has been severely hampered by a lack of high-quality evaluation datasets.在本文中，我们提出了 Crossmodal-3600 数据集（简称 XM3600），这是一组地理上不同的 3600 张图像，并用 36 种语言的人类生成的参考标题进行注释。这些图像选自世界各地，涵盖使用 36 种语言的地区，并使用字幕进行注释，以实现所有语言风格的一致性，同时避免直接翻译导致的注释伪影。我们将此基准应用于大规模多语言图像字幕模型的模型选择，并在使用 XM3600 作为自动指标的黄金参考时显示出与人类评估的优异相关性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模多语言多模态评估数据集XM3600，用于改进多语言图像描述生成模型的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏高质量的多语言图像描述评估数据集，限制了模型性能的客观衡量与改进。
AI.method: 从全球不同地区采集3600张图像，由人工生成36种语言的参考字幕，确保跨语言风格一致且避免翻译痕迹，并将其用于模型选择与自动评估指标验证。
AI.result: 使用XM3600作为黄金参考时，自动评估指标与人类评估结果的相关性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: XM3600为多语言图像描述生成提供了可靠评估基准，有助于推动相关模型的研究与优化。

authors_text: Sushruth Nagesh,Asfiya Baig,Savitha Srinivasan,Akshay Rangesh,Mohan Trivedi
title: Structure Aware and Class Balanced 3D Object Detection on nuScenes Dataset
title_zh: nuScenes 数据集上的结构感知和类平衡 3D 对象检测
abstract: 3-D object detection is pivotal for autonomous driving. Point cloud based methods have become increasingly popular for 3-D object detection, owing to their accurate depth information. NuTonomy's nuScenes dataset greatly extends commonly used datasets such as KITTI in size, sensor modalities, categories, and annotation numbers. However, it suffers from severe class imbalance. The Class-balanced Grouping and Sampling paper addresses this issue and suggests augmentation and sampling strategy. However, the localization precision of this model is affected by the loss of spatial information in the downscaled feature maps. We propose to enhance the performance of the CBGS model by designing an auxiliary network, that makes full use of the structure information of the 3D point cloud, in order to improve the localization accuracy. The detachable auxiliary network is jointly optimized by two point-level supervisions, namely foreground segmentation and center estimation. The auxiliary network does not introduce any extra computation during inference, since it can be detached at test time.
summary: 3-D object detection is pivotal for autonomous driving. Point cloud based methods have become increasingly popular for 3-D object detection, owing to their accurate depth information. NuTonomy's nuScenes dataset greatly extends commonly used datasets such as KITTI in size, sensor modalities, categories, and annotation numbers. However, it suffers from severe class imbalance. The Class-balanced Grouping and Sampling paper addresses this issue and suggests augmentation and sampling strategy. However, the localization precision of this model is affected by the loss of spatial information in the downscaled feature maps. We propose to enhance the performance of the CBGS model by designing an auxiliary network, that makes full use of the structure information of the 3D point cloud, in order to improve the localization accuracy. The detachable auxiliary network is jointly optimized by two point-level supervisions, namely foreground segmentation and center estimation. The auxiliary network does not introduce any extra computation during inference, since it can be detached at test time.
abstract_zh: 3D 物体检测对于自动驾驶至关重要。基于点云的方法由于其准确的深度信息而在 3D 物体检测中变得越来越流行。 NuTonomy 的 nuScenes 数据集在大小、传感器模式、类别和注释数量方面极大地扩展了常用数据集（例如 KITTI）。然而，它存在严重的阶级失衡。类平衡分组和采样论文解决了这个问题，并提出了增强和采样策略。然而，该模型的定位精度受到缩小特征图中空间信息丢失的影响。我们建议通过设计辅助网络来增强CBGS模型的性能，充分利用3D点云的结构信息，以提高定位精度。可拆卸辅助网络通过两个点级监督（即前景分割和中心估计）联合优化。辅助网络在推理过程中不会引入任何额外的计算，因为它可以在测试时分离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构感知且类别平衡的3D目标检测方法，针对nuScenes数据集的类别不平衡和定位精度问题，设计可分离的辅助网络以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: nuScenes数据集存在严重类别不平衡问题，现有方法在降采样特征图中丢失空间信息导致定位精度下降，需改进模型以兼顾类别平衡与定位准确性。
AI.method: 设计可分离的辅助网络，通过前景分割和中心估计两点级监督联合优化，充分利用点云结构信息，推理时可分离以避免额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在保持类别平衡的同时提升定位精度，辅助网络在推理阶段不增加计算负担，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的辅助网络有效解决了类别不平衡与定位精度矛盾，为点云目标检测提供了高效且准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Yi Wan,Richard S. Sutton
title: Toward Discovering Options that Achieve Faster Planning
title_zh: 寻找实现更快规划的选项
abstract: We propose a new objective for option discovery that emphasizes the computational advantage of using options in planning. In a sequential machine, the speed of planning is proportional to the number of elementary operations used to achieve a good policy. For episodic tasks, the number of elementary operations depends on the number of options composed by the policy in an episode and the number of options being considered at each decision point. To reduce the amount of computation in planning, for a given set of episodic tasks and a given number of options, our objective prefers options with which it is possible to achieve a high return by composing few options, and also prefers a smaller set of options to choose from at each decision point. We develop an algorithm that optimizes the proposed objective. In a variant of the classic four-room domain, we show that 1) a higher objective value is typically associated with fewer number of elementary planning operations used by the option-value iteration algorithm to obtain a near-optimal value function, 2) our algorithm achieves an objective value that matches it achieved by two human-designed options 3) the amount of computation used by option-value iteration with options discovered by our algorithm matches it with the human-designed options, 4) the options produced by our algorithm also make intuitive sense--they seem to move to and terminate at the entrances of rooms.
summary: We propose a new objective for option discovery that emphasizes the computational advantage of using options in planning. In a sequential machine, the speed of planning is proportional to the number of elementary operations used to achieve a good policy. For episodic tasks, the number of elementary operations depends on the number of options composed by the policy in an episode and the number of options being considered at each decision point. To reduce the amount of computation in planning, for a given set of episodic tasks and a given number of options, our objective prefers options with which it is possible to achieve a high return by composing few options, and also prefers a smaller set of options to choose from at each decision point. We develop an algorithm that optimizes the proposed objective. In a variant of the classic four-room domain, we show that 1) a higher objective value is typically associated with fewer number of elementary planning operations used by the option-value iteration algorithm to obtain a near-optimal value function, 2) our algorithm achieves an objective value that matches it achieved by two human-designed options 3) the amount of computation used by option-value iteration with options discovered by our algorithm matches it with the human-designed options, 4) the options produced by our algorithm also make intuitive sense--they seem to move to and terminate at the entrances of rooms.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了选项发现的新目标，强调在规划中使用选项的计算优势。在顺序机器中，规划的速度与用于实现良好策略的基本操作的数量成正比。对于情景任务，基本操作的数量取决于情景中策略组成的选项数量以及每个决策点考虑的选项数量。为了减少规划中的计算量，对于给定的情景任务集和给定数量的选项，我们的目标更喜欢通过组成较少的选项来实现高回报的选项，并且也更喜欢在每个决策点选择较小的选项集。我们开发了一种优化提议目标的算法。在经典四房间域的变体中，我们表明：1）较高的目标值通常与选项值迭代算法用于获得接近最优值函数的基本规划操作数量较少相关，2）我们的算法实现了与两个人类设计的选项所实现的目标值相匹配的目标值3）我们的算法发现的选项的选项值迭代所使用的计算量与人类设计的选项相匹配，4）我们的算法生成的选项也具有直观意义 - 它们似乎在移动到达并终止于房间的入口处。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的目标函数，用于发现能够提升规划效率的选项。
AI.motivation: 传统规划速度受基本操作数量限制，通过优化选项组合与选择数量可减少计算量。
AI.method: 开发了一种优化该目标的算法，结合选项发现与规划。
AI.result: 实验显示算法减少计算步骤，匹配人工设计选项效果，并生成直观的选项。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成高效且直观的选项，提升规划效率。

search_text: Toward Discovering Options that Achieve Faster Planning 寻找实现更快规划的选项 We propose a new objective for option discovery that emphasizes the computational advantage of using options in planning. In a sequential machine, the speed of planning is proportional to the number of elementary operations used to achieve a good policy. For episodic tasks, the number of elementary operations depends on the number of options composed by the policy in an episode and the number of options being considered at each decision point. To reduce the amount of computation in planning, for a given set of episodic tasks and a given number of options, our objective prefers options with which it is possible to achieve a high return by composing few options, and also prefers a smaller set of options to choose from at each decision point. We develop an algorithm that optimizes the proposed objective. In a variant of the classic four-room domain, we show that 1) a higher objective value is typically associated with fewer number of elementary planning operations used by the option-value iteration algorithm to obtain a near-optimal value function, 2) our algorithm achieves an objective value that matches it achieved by two human-designed options 3) the amount of computation used by option-value iteration with options discovered by our algorithm matches it with the human-designed options, 4) the options produced by our algorithm also make intuitive sense--they seem to move to and terminate at the entrances of rooms. 我们提出了选项发现的新目标，强调在规划中使用选项的计算优势。在顺序机器中，规划的速度与用于实现良好策略的基本操作的数量成正比。对于情景任务，基本操作的数量取决于情景中策略组成的选项数量以及每个决策点考虑的选项数量。为了减少规划中的计算量，对于给定的情景任务集和给定数量的选项，我们的目标更喜欢通过组成较少的选项来实现高回报的选项，并且也更喜欢在每个决策点选择较小的选项集。我们开发了一种优化提议目标的算法。在经典四房间域的变体中，我们表明：1）较高的目标值通常与选项值迭代算法用于获得接近最优值函数的基本规划操作数量较少相关，2）我们的算法实现了与两个人类设计的选项所实现的目标值相匹配的目标值3）我们的算法发现的选项的选项值迭代所使用的计算量与人类设计的选项相匹配，4）我们的算法生成的选项也具有直观意义 - 它们似乎在移动到达并终止于房间的入口处。 提出一种新的目标函数，用于发现能够提升规划效率的选项。 Yi Wan,Richard S. Sutton cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: D. M. A. Ayanthi,Sarasi Munasinghe
title: Text-to-Face Generation with StyleGAN2
title_zh: 使用 StyleGAN2 生成文本到面对面
abstract: Synthesizing images from text descriptions has become an active research area with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks. The main goal here is to generate photo-realistic images that are aligned with the input descriptions. Text-to-Face generation (T2F) is a sub-domain of Text-to-Image generation (T2I) that is more challenging due to the complexity and variation of facial attributes. It has a number of applications mainly in the domain of public safety. Even though several models are available for T2F, there is still the need to improve the image quality and the semantic alignment. In this research, we propose a novel framework, to generate facial images that are well-aligned with the input descriptions. Our framework utilizes the high-resolution face generator, StyleGAN2, and explores the possibility of using it in T2F. Here, we embed text in the input latent space of StyleGAN2 using BERT embeddings and oversee the generation of facial images using text descriptions. We trained our framework on attribute-based descriptions to generate images of 1024x1024 in resolution. The images generated exhibit a 57% similarity to the ground truth images, with a face semantic distance of 0.92, outperforming state-of-the-artwork. The generated images have a FID score of 118.097 and the experimental results show that our model generates promising images.
summary: Synthesizing images from text descriptions has become an active research area with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks. The main goal here is to generate photo-realistic images that are aligned with the input descriptions. Text-to-Face generation (T2F) is a sub-domain of Text-to-Image generation (T2I) that is more challenging due to the complexity and variation of facial attributes. It has a number of applications mainly in the domain of public safety. Even though several models are available for T2F, there is still the need to improve the image quality and the semantic alignment. In this research, we propose a novel framework, to generate facial images that are well-aligned with the input descriptions. Our framework utilizes the high-resolution face generator, StyleGAN2, and explores the possibility of using it in T2F. Here, we embed text in the input latent space of StyleGAN2 using BERT embeddings and oversee the generation of facial images using text descriptions. We trained our framework on attribute-based descriptions to generate images of 1024x1024 in resolution. The images generated exhibit a 57% similarity to the ground truth images, with a face semantic distance of 0.92, outperforming state-of-the-artwork. The generated images have a FID score of 118.097 and the experimental results show that our model generates promising images.
abstract_zh: 随着生成对抗网络的出现，从文本描述合成图像已成为一个活跃的研究领域。这里的主要目标是生成与输入描述一致的逼真图像。文本到面部生成（T2F）是文本到图像生成（T2I）的子域，由于面部属性的复杂性和变化而更具挑战性。它有许多应用，主要在公共安全领域。尽管有多种模型可用于 T2F，但仍然需要提高图像质量和语义对齐。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于生成与输入描述非常一致的面部图像。我们的框架利用高分辨率人脸生成器 StyleGAN2，并探索在 T2F 中使用它的可能性。在这里，我们使用 BERT 嵌入将文本嵌入 StyleGAN2 的输入潜在空间中，并使用文本描述监督面部图像的生成。我们使用基于属性的描述来训练我们的框架，以生成分辨率为 1024x1024 的图像。生成的图像与地面实况图像的相似度为 57%，人脸语义距离为 0.92，优于最新技术。生成的图像的 FID 分数为 118.097，实验结果表明我们的模型生成了有前景的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN2的文本到人脸生成框架，通过将文本嵌入潜空间以生成与描述语义对齐的高分辨率人脸图像。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到人脸生成模型在图像质量和语义对齐方面仍有不足，而高质量人脸生成在公共安全等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN2的高分辨率人脸生成能力，结合BERT文本嵌入技术将描述文本注入潜空间，并基于属性描述训练模型生成1024x1024分辨率图像。
AI.result: 生成图像与真实图像相似度达57%，面部语义距离为0.92，FID得分为118.097，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了文本到人脸生成的图像质量与语义对齐能力，为相关应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Yukita Fujitani,Tomoki Yamauchi,Yuki Miyashita,Toshiharu Sugawara
title: Deadlock-Free Method for Multi-Agent Pickup and Delivery Problem Using Priority Inheritance with Temporary Priority
title_zh: 具有临时优先级的优先级继承解决多代理取货和送货问题的无死锁方法
comment: The paper was accepted at 26th International Conference on Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information & Engineering Systems (KES 2022)
comments: The paper was accepted at 26th International Conference on Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information & Engineering Systems (KES 2022)
abstract: This paper proposes a control method for the multi-agent pickup and delivery problem (MAPD problem) by extending the priority inheritance with backtracking (PIBT) method to make it applicable to more general environments. PIBT is an effective algorithm that introduces a priority to each agent, and at each timestep, the agents, in descending order of priority, decide their next neighboring locations in the next timestep through communications only with the local agents. Unfortunately, PIBT is only applicable to environments that are modeled as a bi-connected area, and if it contains dead-ends, such as tree-shaped paths, PIBT may cause deadlocks. However, in the real-world environment, there are many dead-end paths to locations such as the shelves where materials are stored as well as loading/unloading locations to transportation trucks. Our proposed method enables MAPD tasks to be performed in environments with some tree-shaped paths without deadlock while preserving the PIBT feature; it does this by allowing the agents to have temporary priorities and restricting agents' movements in the trees. First, we demonstrate that agents can always reach their delivery without deadlock. Our experiments indicate that the proposed method is very efficient, even in environments where PIBT is not applicable, by comparing them with those obtained using the well-known token passing method as a baseline.

Our proposed method enables MAPD tasks to be performed in environments with some tree-shaped paths without deadlock while preserving the PIBT feature; it does this by allowing the agents to have temporary priorities and restricting agents' movements in the trees. First, we demonstrate that agents can always reach their delivery without deadlock. Our experiments indicate that the proposed method is very efficient, even in environments where PIBT is not applicable, by comparing them with those obtained using the well-known token passing method as a baseline.
abstract_zh: This paper proposes a control method for the multi-agent pickup and delivery problem (MAPD problem) by extending the priority inheritance with backtracking (PIBT) method to make it applicable to more general environments. PIBT is an effective algorithm that introduces a priority to each agent, and at each timestep, the agents, in descending order of priority, decide their next neighboring locations in the next timestep through communications only with the local agents. Unfortunately, PIBT is only applicable to environments that are modeled as a bi-connected area, and if it contains dead-ends, such as tree-shaped paths, PIBT may cause deadlocks. However, in the real-world environment, there are many dead-end paths to locations such as the shelves where materials are stored as well as loading/unloading locations to transportation trucks. Our proposed method enables MAPD tasks to be performed in environments with some tree-shaped paths without deadlock while preserving the PIBT feature;它通过允许代理具有临时优先级并限制代理在树中的移动来实现这一点。首先，我们证明代理始终可以在没有僵局的情况下完成交付。 Our experiments indicate that the proposed method is very efficient, even in environments where PIBT is not applicable, by comparing them with those obtained using the well-known token passing method as a baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于临时优先级的优先级继承算法，解决多智能体拣货与配送问题中的死锁问题，适用于包含死端路径的复杂环境。
AI.motivation: 现有PIBT算法无法处理含死端（如树形路径）的现实环境，而实际场景中仓库货架、装卸区等常存在此类结构，导致算法失效。
AI.method: 通过引入临时优先级机制与树形路径移动限制，扩展PIBT算法，使智能体在死端区域按临时优先级协调行动，避免死锁。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在含树形路径的环境中可高效完成配送任务，且性能优于传统令牌传递法，验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的临时优先级机制有效解决了PIBT在复杂环境中的死锁问题，为多智能体物流场景提供了可行的路径规划方案。

This paper proposes a control method for the multi-agent pickup and delivery problem (MAPD problem) by extending the priority inheritance with backtracking (PIBT) method to make it applicable to more general environments. PIBT is an effective algorithm that introduces a priority to each agent, and at each timestep, the agents, in descending order of priority, decide their next neighboring locations in the next timestep through communications only with the local agents. Unfortunately, PIBT is only applicable to environments that are modeled as a bi-connected area, and if it contains dead-ends, such as tree-shaped paths, PIBT may cause deadlocks. However, in the real-world environment, there are many dead-end paths to locations such as the shelves where materials are stored as well as loading/unloading locations to transportation trucks. Our proposed method enables MAPD tasks to be performed in environments with some tree-shaped paths without deadlock while preserving the PIBT feature;它通过允许代理具有临时优先级并限制代理在树中的移动来实现这一点。首先，我们证明代理始终可以在没有僵局的情况下完成交付。 Our experiments indicate that the proposed method is very efficient, even in environments where PIBT is not applicable, by comparing them with those obtained using the well-known token passing method as a baseline. 本文提出一种基于临时优先级的优先级继承算法，解决多智能体拣货与配送问题中的死锁问题，适用于包含死端路径的复杂环境。 Yukita Fujitani,Tomoki Yamauchi,Yuki Miyashita,Toshiharu Sugawara cs.MA,cs.AI

authors_text: Gi-Cheon Kang,Sungdong Kim,Jin-Hwa Kim,Donghyun Kwak,Byoung-Tak Zhang
title: The Dialog Must Go On: Improving Visual Dialog via Generative Self-Training
title_zh: 对话必须继续：通过生成式自我训练改善视觉对话
abstract: Visual dialog (VisDial) is a task of answering a sequence of questions grounded in an image, using the dialog history as context. Prior work has trained the dialog agents solely on VisDial data via supervised learning or leveraged pre-training on related vision-and-language datasets. This paper presents a semi-supervised learning approach for visually-grounded dialog, called Generative Self-Training (GST), to leverage unlabeled images on the Web. Specifically, GST first retrieves in-domain images through out-of-distribution detection and generates synthetic dialogs regarding the images via multimodal conditional text generation. GST then trains a dialog agent on the synthetic and the original VisDial data. As a result, GST scales the amount of training data up to an order of magnitude that of VisDial (1.2M to 12.9M QA data). For robust training of the synthetic dialogs, we also propose perplexity-based data selection and multimodal consistency regularization. Evaluation on VisDial v1.0 and v0.9 datasets shows that GST achieves new state-of-the-art results on both datasets. We further observe the robustness of GST against both visual and textual adversarial attacks. Finally, GST yields strong performance gains in the low-data regime. Code is available at https://github.com/gicheonkang/gst-visdial.

Specifically, GST first retrieves in-domain images through out-of-distribution detection and generates synthetic dialogs regarding the images via multimodal conditional text generation. GST then trains a dialog agent on the synthetic and the original VisDial data. As a result, GST scales the amount of training data up to an order of magnitude that of VisDial (1.2M to 12.9M QA data). For robust training of the synthetic dialogs, we also propose perplexity-based data selection and multimodal consistency regularization. Evaluation on VisDial v1.0 and v0.9 datasets shows that GST achieves new state-of-the-art results on both datasets. We further observe the robustness of GST against both visual and textual adversarial attacks. Finally, GST yields strong performance gains in the low-data regime. Code is available at https://github.com/gicheonkang/gst-visdial.
abstract_zh: 视觉对话 (VisDial) 是一项使用对话历史记录作为上下文来回答基于图像的一系列问题的任务。之前的工作仅通过监督学习或利用相关视觉和语言数据集的预训练，在 VisDial 数据上训练对话代理。本文提出了一种基于视觉的对话的半监督学习方法，称为生成自我训练（GST），以利用网络上未标记的图像。具体来说，GST 首先通过分布外检测检索域内图像，并通过多模态条件文本生成生成有关图像的合成对话。然后，GST 在合成数据和原始 VisDial 数据上训练对话代理。因此，GST 将训练数据量扩大到 VisDial 的一个数量级（1.2M 到 12.9M QA 数据）。为了对合成对话进行鲁棒训练，我们还提出了基于困惑的数据选择和多模态一致性正则化。对 VisDial v1.0 和 v0.9 数据集的评估表明，GST 在这两个数据集上都取得了新的最先进结果。我们进一步观察 GST 针对视觉和文本对抗性攻击的稳健性。最后，GST 在低数据情况下带来了强劲的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/gicheonkang/gst-visdial 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习方法GST，通过生成合成对话数据提升视觉对话任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉对话模型受限于VisDial数据集标注数据量不足，且未充分利用网络上大量未标注图像资源。
AI.method: GST通过分布外检测筛选网络图像，利用多模态条件文本生成合成对话，结合困惑度筛选和多模态一致性正则化进行训练。
AI.result: 在VisDial v1.0和v0.9数据集上均取得SOTA结果，对抗攻击鲁棒性强，低数据场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: GST通过有效利用未标注图像生成高质量合成数据，显著提升了视觉对话系统的性能和泛化能力。

authors_text: Harsh Trivedi,Niranjan Balasubramanian,Tushar Khot,Ashish Sabharwal
title: Teaching Broad Reasoning Skills for Multi-Step QA by Generating Hard Contexts
title_zh: 通过生成硬上下文来教授多步骤 QA 的广泛推理技能
abstract: Question-answering datasets require a broad set of reasoning skills. We show how to use question decompositions to teach language models these broad reasoning skills in a robust fashion. Specifically, we use widely available QDMR representations to programmatically create hard-to-cheat synthetic contexts for real questions in six multi-step reasoning datasets. These contexts are carefully designed to avoid reasoning shortcuts prevalent in real contexts that prevent models from learning the right skills. This results in a pretraining dataset, named TeaBReaC, containing 525K multi-step questions (with associated formal programs) covering about 900 reasoning patterns. We show that pretraining standard language models (LMs) on TeaBReaC before fine-tuning them on target datasets improves their performance by up to 13 F1 points across 4 multi-step QA datasets, with up to 21 point gain on more complex questions. The resulting models also demonstrate higher robustness, with a 5-8 F1 point improvement on two contrast sets. Furthermore, TeaBReaC pretraining substantially improves model performance and robustness even when starting with numerate LMs pretrained using recent methods (e.g., PReasM, POET). Our work thus shows how to effectively use decomposition-guided contexts to robustly teach multi-step reasoning.
summary: Question-answering datasets require a broad set of reasoning skills. We show how to use question decompositions to teach language models these broad reasoning skills in a robust fashion. Specifically, we use widely available QDMR representations to programmatically create hard-to-cheat synthetic contexts for real questions in six multi-step reasoning datasets. These contexts are carefully designed to avoid reasoning shortcuts prevalent in real contexts that prevent models from learning the right skills. This results in a pretraining dataset, named TeaBReaC, containing 525K multi-step questions (with associated formal programs) covering about 900 reasoning patterns. We show that pretraining standard language models (LMs) on TeaBReaC before fine-tuning them on target datasets improves their performance by up to 13 F1 points across 4 multi-step QA datasets, with up to 21 point gain on more complex questions. The resulting models also demonstrate higher robustness, with a 5-8 F1 point improvement on two contrast sets. Furthermore, TeaBReaC pretraining substantially improves model performance and robustness even when starting with numerate LMs pretrained using recent methods (e.g., PReasM, POET). Our work thus shows how to effectively use decomposition-guided contexts to robustly teach multi-step reasoning.
abstract_zh: 问答数据集需要广泛的推理技能。我们展示了如何使用问题分解以稳健的方式教授语言模型这些广泛的推理技能。具体来说，我们使用广泛使用的 QDMR 表示形式，以编程方式为六个多步骤推理数据集中的真实问题创建难以欺骗的合成上下文。这些上下文经过精心设计，以避免真实上下文中普遍存在的推理捷径，从而阻止模型学习正确的技能。这会产生一个名为 TeaBReaC 的预训练数据集，其中包含 525K 个多步骤问题（以及相关的正式程序），涵盖约 900 个推理模式。我们表明，在对目标数据集进行微调之前，在 TeaBReaC 上对标准语言模型 (LM) 进行预训练，可在 4 个多步骤 QA 数据集上将其性能提高最多 13 个 F1 点，在更复杂的问题上最多可提高 21 点。所得模型还表现出更高的稳健性，两个对比集的 F1 点提高了 5-8 个。此外，即使从使用最新方法（例如 PReasM、POET）预训练的计算 LM 开始，TeaBReaC 预训练也能显着提高模型性能和鲁棒性。因此，我们的工作展示了如何有效地使用分解引导的上下文来稳健地教授多步骤推理。

AI.tldr: 通过生成难以作弊的合成上下文，教授语言模型多步骤问答的广泛推理技能。
AI.motivation: 现有问答数据集中的真实上下文存在推理捷径，阻碍模型学习正确的多步骤推理能力。
AI.method: 利用QDMR表示生成合成上下文，构建包含525K多步骤问题和900种推理模式的TeaBReaC预训练数据集。
AI.result: 预训练后模型在4个多步骤QA数据集上提升13 F1点，复杂问题提升21点，鲁棒性提高5-8 F1点。
AI.conclusion: 分解指导的上下文能有效提升模型多步骤推理能力及鲁棒性，且对数值预训练模型同样有效。

authors_text: Prayash Dutta,Albert Lee,Kang L. Wang,Alex K. Jones,Sanjukta Bhanja
title: A Multi-domain Magneto Tunnel Junction for Racetrack Nanowire Strips
title_zh: 用于跑道纳米线带的多域磁隧道结
comment: This paper is under review for possible publication by the IEEE
comments: This paper is under review for possible publication by the IEEE
abstract: Domain-wall memory (DWM) has SRAM class access performance, low energy, high endurance, high density, and CMOS compatibility. Recently, shift reliability and processing-using-memory (PuM) proposals developed a need to count the number of parallel or anti-parallel domains in a portion of the DWM nanowire. In this paper we propose a multi-domain magneto-tunnel junction (MTJ) that can detect different resistance levels as a function of a the number of parallel or anti-parallel domains. Using detailed micromagnetic simulation with LLG, we demonstrate the multi-domain MTJ, study the benefit of its macro-size on resilience to process variation and present a macro-model for scaling the size of the multi-domain MTJ. Our results indicate scalability to seven-domains while maintaining a 16.3mV sense margin.
summary: Domain-wall memory (DWM) has SRAM class access performance, low energy, high endurance, high density, and CMOS compatibility. Recently, shift reliability and processing-using-memory (PuM) proposals developed a need to count the number of parallel or anti-parallel domains in a portion of the DWM nanowire. In this paper we propose a multi-domain magneto-tunnel junction (MTJ) that can detect different resistance levels as a function of a the number of parallel or anti-parallel domains. Using detailed micromagnetic simulation with LLG, we demonstrate the multi-domain MTJ, study the benefit of its macro-size on resilience to process variation and present a macro-model for scaling the size of the multi-domain MTJ. Our results indicate scalability to seven-domains while maintaining a 16.3mV sense margin.
abstract_zh: 畴壁存储器 (DWM) 具有 SRAM 级访问性能、低能耗、高耐用性、高密度和 CMOS 兼容性。最近，移位可靠性和使用存储器处理 (PuM) 提案提出了对 DWM 纳米线一部分中并行或反并行域的数量进行计数的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种多域磁隧道结（MTJ），它可以检测不同电阻水平作为平行或反平行域数量的函数。我们使用 LLG 进行详细的微磁仿真，展示了多域 MTJ，研究了其宏观尺寸对过程变化弹性的好处，并提出了用于缩放多域 MTJ 尺寸的宏观模型。我们的结果表明可扩展至七个域，同时保持 16.3mV 的检测裕度。

AI.tldr: 设计一种多域磁隧道结（MTJ）以检测赛道纳米线中平行或反平行域的数量，用于提升领域墙存储器（DWM）的可靠性和处理-使用-内存（PuM）效率。
AI.motivation: 领域墙存储器（DWM）虽具备高性能和低能耗优势，但现有技术难以准确统计纳米线中域的数量，限制了其在移位可靠性和处理-使用-内存（PuM）应用中的性能。
AI.method: 基于微磁模拟与LLG方程，设计多域MTJ结构，分析其宏观尺寸对工艺波动的鲁棒性，并建立宏观模型以扩展器件尺寸。
AI.result: 实现支持七域检测的多域MTJ，保持16.3mV的感应裕度，验证其可扩展性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 多域MTJ设计有效解决了域计数难题，兼具可扩展性与工艺鲁棒性，为未来高密度存储与计算提供可行方案。

search_text: A Multi-domain Magneto Tunnel Junction for Racetrack Nanowire Strips 用于跑道纳米线带的多域磁隧道结 Domain-wall memory (DWM) has SRAM class access performance, low energy, high endurance, high density, and CMOS compatibility. Recently, shift reliability and processing-using-memory (PuM) proposals developed a need to count the number of parallel or anti-parallel domains in a portion of the DWM nanowire. In this paper we propose a multi-domain magneto-tunnel junction (MTJ) that can detect different resistance levels as a function of a the number of parallel or anti-parallel domains. Using detailed micromagnetic simulation with LLG, we demonstrate the multi-domain MTJ, study the benefit of its macro-size on resilience to process variation and present a macro-model for scaling the size of the multi-domain MTJ. Our results indicate scalability to seven-domains while maintaining a 16.3mV sense margin. 畴壁存储器 (DWM) 具有 SRAM 级访问性能、低能耗、高耐用性、高密度和 CMOS 兼容性。最近，移位可靠性和使用存储器处理 (PuM) 提案提出了对 DWM 纳米线一部分中并行或反并行域的数量进行计数的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种多域磁隧道结（MTJ），它可以检测不同电阻水平作为平行或反平行域数量的函数。我们使用 LLG 进行详细的微磁仿真，展示了多域 MTJ，研究了其宏观尺寸对过程变化弹性的好处，并提出了用于缩放多域 MTJ 尺寸的宏观模型。我们的结果表明可扩展至七个域，同时保持 16.3mV 的检测裕度。 设计一种多域磁隧道结（MTJ）以检测赛道纳米线中平行或反平行域的数量，用于提升领域墙存储器（DWM）的可靠性和处理-使用-内存（PuM）效率。 Prayash Dutta,Albert Lee,Kang L. Wang,Alex K. Jones,Sanjukta Bhanja cs.ET

authors_text: Zhiyang Xu,Jay-Yoon Lee,Lifu Huang
title: Improve Event Extraction via Self-Training with Gradient Guidance
title_zh: 通过梯度引导自训练改进事件提取
abstract: Data scarcity has been the main factor that hinders the progress of event extraction. To overcome this issue, we propose a Self-Training with Feedback (STF) framework that leverages the large-scale unlabeled data and acquires feedback for each new event prediction from the unlabeled data by comparing it to the Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) graph of the same sentence. Specifically, STF consists of (1) a base event extraction model trained on existing event annotations and then applied to large-scale unlabeled corpora to predict new event mentions as pseudo training samples, and (2) a novel scoring model that takes in each new predicted event trigger, an argument, its argument role, as well as their paths in the AMR graph to estimate a compatibility score indicating the correctness of the pseudo label. The compatibility scores further act as feedback to encourage or discourage the model learning on the pseudo labels during self-training. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets, including ACE05-E, ACE05-E+, and ERE, demonstrate the effectiveness of the STF framework on event extraction, especially event argument extraction, with significant performance gain over the base event extraction models and strong baselines. Our experimental analysis further shows that STF is a generic framework as it can be applied to improve most, if not all, event extraction models by leveraging large-scale unlabeled data, even when high-quality AMR graph annotations are not available.
summary: Data scarcity has been the main factor that hinders the progress of event extraction. To overcome this issue, we propose a Self-Training with Feedback (STF) framework that leverages the large-scale unlabeled data and acquires feedback for each new event prediction from the unlabeled data by comparing it to the Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) graph of the same sentence. Specifically, STF consists of (1) a base event extraction model trained on existing event annotations and then applied to large-scale unlabeled corpora to predict new event mentions as pseudo training samples, and (2) a novel scoring model that takes in each new predicted event trigger, an argument, its argument role, as well as their paths in the AMR graph to estimate a compatibility score indicating the correctness of the pseudo label. The compatibility scores further act as feedback to encourage or discourage the model learning on the pseudo labels during self-training. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets, including ACE05-E, ACE05-E+, and ERE, demonstrate the effectiveness of the STF framework on event extraction, especially event argument extraction, with significant performance gain over the base event extraction models and strong baselines. Our experimental analysis further shows that STF is a generic framework as it can be applied to improve most, if not all, event extraction models by leveraging large-scale unlabeled data, even when high-quality AMR graph annotations are not available.
abstract_zh: 数据稀缺一直是阻碍事件提取进展的主要因素。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种带反馈的自我训练（STF）框架，该框架利用大规模未标记数据，并通过将其与同一句子的抽象含义表示（AMR）图进行比较，从未标记数据中获取每个新事件预测的反馈。具体来说，STF 包括 (1) 在现有事件注释上训练的基本事件提取模型，然后应用于大规模未标记语料库来预测新的事件提及作为伪训练样本，以及 (2) 一个新颖的评分模型，该模型接受每个新的预测事件触发器、参数、其参数角色以及它们在 AMR 图中的路径，以估计指示伪标签正确性的兼容性分数。兼容性分数进一步充当反馈，以鼓励或阻止模型在自我训练期间在伪标签上学习。在 ACE05-E、ACE05-E+ 和 ERE 等三个基准数据集上的实验结果证明了 STF 框架在事件提取（尤其是事件参数提取）方面的有效性，与基本事件提取模型和强大的基线相比，具有显着的性能提升。我们的实验分析进一步表明，STF 是一个通用框架，因为它可以通过利用大规模未标记数据来改进大多数（如果不是全部）事件提取模型，即使在高质量 AMR 图注释不可用时也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自训练与梯度引导改进事件抽取的方法，利用未标注数据和抽象意义表示（AMR）图进行反馈优化。
AI.motivation: 事件抽取任务面临标注数据稀缺的问题，现有方法难以充分利用大规模未标注数据。
AI.method: 构建包含基础事件抽取模型和兼容性评分模型的STF框架，通过AMR图路径分析伪标签的正确性并反馈指导模型训练。
AI.result: 在ACE05-E、ACE05-E+和ERE三个数据集上显著优于基线模型，尤其在事件论元抽取方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: STF框架具有通用性，即使在缺乏高质量AMR标注的情况下也能通过大规模未标注数据提升事件抽取性能。

search_text: Improve Event Extraction via Self-Training with Gradient Guidance 通过梯度引导自训练改进事件提取 Data scarcity has been the main factor that hinders the progress of event extraction. To overcome this issue, we propose a Self-Training with Feedback (STF) framework that leverages the large-scale unlabeled data and acquires feedback for each new event prediction from the unlabeled data by comparing it to the Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR) graph of the same sentence. Specifically, STF consists of (1) a base event extraction model trained on existing event annotations and then applied to large-scale unlabeled corpora to predict new event mentions as pseudo training samples, and (2) a novel scoring model that takes in each new predicted event trigger, an argument, its argument role, as well as their paths in the AMR graph to estimate a compatibility score indicating the correctness of the pseudo label. The compatibility scores further act as feedback to encourage or discourage the model learning on the pseudo labels during self-training. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets, including ACE05-E, ACE05-E+, and ERE, demonstrate the effectiveness of the STF framework on event extraction, especially event argument extraction, with significant performance gain over the base event extraction models and strong baselines. Our experimental analysis further shows that STF is a generic framework as it can be applied to improve most, if not all, event extraction models by leveraging large-scale unlabeled data, even when high-quality AMR graph annotations are not available. 数据稀缺一直是阻碍事件提取进展的主要因素。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种带反馈的自我训练（STF）框架，该框架利用大规模未标记数据，并通过将其与同一句子的抽象含义表示（AMR）图进行比较，从未标记数据中获取每个新事件预测的反馈。具体来说，STF 包括 (1) 在现有事件注释上训练的基本事件提取模型，然后应用于大规模未标记语料库来预测新的事件提及作为伪训练样本，以及 (2) 一个新颖的评分模型，该模型接受每个新的预测事件触发器、参数、其参数角色以及它们在 AMR 图中的路径，以估计指示伪标签正确性的兼容性分数。兼容性分数进一步充当反馈，以鼓励或阻止模型在自我训练期间在伪标签上学习。在 ACE05-E、ACE05-E+ 和 ERE 等三个基准数据集上的实验结果证明了 STF 框架在事件提取（尤其是事件参数提取）方面的有效性，与基本事件提取模型和强大的基线相比，具有显着的性能提升。我们的实验分析进一步表明，STF 是一个通用框架，因为它可以通过利用大规模未标记数据来改进大多数（如果不是全部）事件提取模型，即使在高质量 AMR 图注释不可用时也是如此。 本文提出了一种通过自训练与梯度引导改进事件抽取的方法，利用未标注数据和抽象意义表示（AMR）图进行反馈优化。 Zhiyang Xu,Jay-Yoon Lee,Lifu Huang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Aman Madaan,Dheeraj Rajagopal,Niket Tandon,Yiming Yang,Antoine Bosselut
title: Conditional set generation using Seq2seq models
title_zh: 使用 Seq2seq 模型生成条件集
abstract: Conditional set generation learns a mapping from an input sequence of tokens to a set. Several NLP tasks, such as entity typing and dialogue emotion tagging, are instances of set generation. Seq2Seq models, a popular choice for set generation, treat a set as a sequence and do not fully leverage its key properties, namely order-invariance and cardinality. We propose a novel algorithm for effectively sampling informative orders over the combinatorial space of label orders. We jointly model the set cardinality and output by prepending the set size and taking advantage of the autoregressive factorization used by Seq2Seq models. Our method is a model-independent data augmentation approach that endows any Seq2Seq model with the signals of order-invariance and cardinality. Training a Seq2Seq model on this augmented data (without any additional annotations) gets an average relative improvement of 20% on four benchmark datasets across various models: BART, T5, and GPT-3. Code to use SETAUG available at: https://setgen.structgen.com.
summary: Conditional set generation learns a mapping from an input sequence of tokens to a set. Several NLP tasks, such as entity typing and dialogue emotion tagging, are instances of set generation. Seq2Seq models, a popular choice for set generation, treat a set as a sequence and do not fully leverage its key properties, namely order-invariance and cardinality. We propose a novel algorithm for effectively sampling informative orders over the combinatorial space of label orders. We jointly model the set cardinality and output by prepending the set size and taking advantage of the autoregressive factorization used by Seq2Seq models. Our method is a model-independent data augmentation approach that endows any Seq2Seq model with the signals of order-invariance and cardinality. Training a Seq2Seq model on this augmented data (without any additional annotations) gets an average relative improvement of 20% on four benchmark datasets across various models: BART, T5, and GPT-3. Code to use SETAUG available at: https://setgen.structgen.com.
abstract_zh: 条件集生成学习从标记的输入序列到集合的映射。一些 NLP 任务，例如实体打字和对话情感标记，都是集合生成的实例。 Seq2Seq models, a popular choice for set generation, treat a set as a sequence and do not fully leverage its key properties, namely order-invariance and cardinality.我们提出了一种新颖的算法，用于在标签顺序的组合空间上有效地采样信息顺序。 We jointly model the set cardinality and output by prepending the set size and taking advantage of the autoregressive factorization used by Seq2Seq models.我们的方法是一种独立于模型的数据增强方法，它赋予任何 Seq2Seq 模型顺序不变性和基数的信号。 Training a Seq2Seq model on this augmented data (without any additional annotations) gets an average relative improvement of 20% on four benchmark datasets across various models: BART, T5, and GPT-3.使用 SETAUG 的代码位于：https://setgen.structgen.com。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Seq2seq模型方法，用于条件集生成任务，通过引入顺序不变性和基数建模提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Seq2seq模型将集视为序列，未能有效利用集的无序性和基数特性，导致生成效果受限。
AI.method: 提出SETAUG数据增强方法，通过预置集大小并联合建模基数与输出，利用自回归分解实现模型无关的顺序不变性建模。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，BART、T5和GPT-3等模型平均相对提升20%性能，无需额外标注数据。
AI.conclusion: SETAUG通过数据增强有效注入集生成的关键特性信号，为各类Seq2seq模型提供通用改进方案。

result: 在四个基准数据集上，BART、T5和GPT-3等模型平均相对提升20%性能，无需额外标注数据。

search_text: Conditional set generation using Seq2seq models 使用 Seq2seq 模型生成条件集 Conditional set generation learns a mapping from an input sequence of tokens to a set. Several NLP tasks, such as entity typing and dialogue emotion tagging, are instances of set generation. Seq2Seq models, a popular choice for set generation, treat a set as a sequence and do not fully leverage its key properties, namely order-invariance and cardinality. We propose a novel algorithm for effectively sampling informative orders over the combinatorial space of label orders. We jointly model the set cardinality and output by prepending the set size and taking advantage of the autoregressive factorization used by Seq2Seq models. Our method is a model-independent data augmentation approach that endows any Seq2Seq model with the signals of order-invariance and cardinality. Training a Seq2Seq model on this augmented data (without any additional annotations) gets an average relative improvement of 20% on four benchmark datasets across various models: BART, T5, and GPT-3. Code to use SETAUG available at: https://setgen.structgen.com. 条件集生成学习从标记的输入序列到集合的映射。一些 NLP 任务，例如实体打字和对话情感标记，都是集合生成的实例。 Seq2Seq models, a popular choice for set generation, treat a set as a sequence and do not fully leverage its key properties, namely order-invariance and cardinality.我们提出了一种新颖的算法，用于在标签顺序的组合空间上有效地采样信息顺序。 We jointly model the set cardinality and output by prepending the set size and taking advantage of the autoregressive factorization used by Seq2Seq models.我们的方法是一种独立于模型的数据增强方法，它赋予任何 Seq2Seq 模型顺序不变性和基数的信号。 Training a Seq2Seq model on this augmented data (without any additional annotations) gets an average relative improvement of 20% on four benchmark datasets across various models: BART, T5, and GPT-3.使用 SETAUG 的代码位于：https://setgen.structgen.com。 本文提出一种改进的Seq2seq模型方法，用于条件集生成任务，通过引入顺序不变性和基数建模提升性能。 Aman Madaan,Dheeraj Rajagopal,Niket Tandon,Yiming Yang,Antoine Bosselut cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Pedram Hosseini,Christopher R. Wolfe,Mona Diab,David A. Broniatowski
title: GisPy: A Tool for Measuring Gist Inference Score in Text
title_zh: GisPy：测量文本中要点推理分数的工具
comment: Accepted to the 4th Workshop on Narrative Understanding @ NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted to the 4th Workshop on Narrative Understanding @ NAACL 2022
abstract: Decision making theories such as Fuzzy-Trace Theory (FTT) suggest that individuals tend to rely on gist, or bottom-line meaning, in the text when making decisions. In this work, we delineate the process of developing GisPy, an open-source tool in Python for measuring the Gist Inference Score (GIS) in text. Evaluation of GisPy on documents in three benchmarks from the news and scientific text domains demonstrates that scores generated by our tool significantly distinguish low vs. high gist documents. Our tool is publicly available to use at: https://github.com/phosseini/GisPy.
summary: Decision making theories such as Fuzzy-Trace Theory (FTT) suggest that individuals tend to rely on gist, or bottom-line meaning, in the text when making decisions. In this work, we delineate the process of developing GisPy, an open-source tool in Python for measuring the Gist Inference Score (GIS) in text. Evaluation of GisPy on documents in three benchmarks from the news and scientific text domains demonstrates that scores generated by our tool significantly distinguish low vs. high gist documents. Our tool is publicly available to use at: https://github.com/phosseini/GisPy.
abstract_zh: 模糊追踪理论（FTT）等决策理论表明，个人在做出决策时倾向于依赖文本中的主旨或底线含义。在这项工作中，我们描述了开发 GisPy 的过程，GisPy 是一个 Python 开源工具，用于测量文本中的要点推理分数 (GIS)。 GisPy 对来自新闻和科学文本领域的三个基准文档的评估表明，我们的工具生成的分数可以显着区分低要点文档和高要点文档。我们的工具可公开使用：https://github.com/phosseini/GisPy。

AI.tldr: 开发了一个名为GisPy的工具，用于测量文本中的Gist推理分数（GIS）。
AI.motivation: 基于模糊痕迹理论（FTT），需要开发工具来评估文本的主旨推理能力，以支持决策研究。
AI.method: 开发了一个开源的Python工具GisPy，并在新闻和科学文本的三个基准数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的评估显示，GisPy生成的分数能有效区分低和高gist文档。
AI.conclusion: GisPy工具有效，且作为开源工具公开可用，有助于相关研究。

authors_text: Wei Liu,Jingyu Li,Tan Lee
title: An Investigation on Applying Acoustic Feature Conversion to ASR of Adult and Child Speech
title_zh: 将声学特征转换应用于成人和儿童语音 ASR 的研究
abstract: The performance of child speech recognition is generally less satisfactory compared to adult speech due to limited amount of training data. Significant performance degradation is expected when applying an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system trained on adult speech to child speech directly, as a result of domain mismatch. The present study is focused on adult-to-child acoustic feature conversion to alleviate this mismatch. Different acoustic feature conversion approaches, including deep neural network based and signal processing based, are investigated and compared under a fair experimental setting, in which converted acoustic features from the same amount of labeled adult speech are used to train the ASR models from scratch. Experimental results reveal that not all of the conversion methods lead to ASR performance gain. Specifically, as a classic unsupervised domain adaptation method, the statistic matching does not show an effectiveness. A disentanglement-based auto-encoder (DAE) conversion framework is found to be useful and the approach of F0 normalization achieves the best performance. It is noted that the F0 distribution of converted features is an important attribute to reflect the conversion quality, while utilizing an adult-child deep classification model to make judgment is shown to be inappropriate.
summary: The performance of child speech recognition is generally less satisfactory compared to adult speech due to limited amount of training data. Significant performance degradation is expected when applying an automatic speech recognition (ASR) system trained on adult speech to child speech directly, as a result of domain mismatch. The present study is focused on adult-to-child acoustic feature conversion to alleviate this mismatch. Different acoustic feature conversion approaches, including deep neural network based and signal processing based, are investigated and compared under a fair experimental setting, in which converted acoustic features from the same amount of labeled adult speech are used to train the ASR models from scratch. Experimental results reveal that not all of the conversion methods lead to ASR performance gain. Specifically, as a classic unsupervised domain adaptation method, the statistic matching does not show an effectiveness. A disentanglement-based auto-encoder (DAE) conversion framework is found to be useful and the approach of F0 normalization achieves the best performance. It is noted that the F0 distribution of converted features is an important attribute to reflect the conversion quality, while utilizing an adult-child deep classification model to make judgment is shown to be inappropriate.
abstract_zh: 由于训练数据量有限，与成人语音相比，儿童语音识别的性能通常不太令人满意。当将成人语音训练的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统直接应用于儿童语音时，由于域不匹配，预计性能会显着下降。本研究的重点是成人到儿童的声学特征转换，以减轻这种不匹配。在公平的实验环境下研究和比较了不同的声学特征转换方法，包括基于深度神经网络和基于信号处理的方法，其中使用来自相同数量的标记成人语音的转换后的声学特征来从头开始训练 ASR 模型。实验结果表明，并非所有转换方法都能带来 ASR 性能增益。具体来说，作为经典的无监督域适应方法，统计匹配并没有表现出有效性。基于解缠结的自动编码器 (DAE) 转换框架被发现是有用的，并且 F0 归一化方法实现了最佳性能。需要指出的是，转换特征的F0分布是反映转换质量的重要属性，而利用成人-儿童深度分类模型来进行判断则被证明是不合适的。

AI.tldr: 研究通过声学特征转换技术提升儿童语音识别系统的性能，解决成人语音识别模型直接应用于儿童语音时的领域不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 儿童语音识别因训练数据不足表现较差，直接使用成人语音训练的ASR系统会导致性能显著下降，需通过声学特征转换缓解领域差异。
AI.method: 对比了基于深度神经网络和信号处理的声学特征转换方法，在相同量级的成人语音数据下训练ASR模型，评估不同转换技术的效果。
AI.result: 统计匹配方法无效，基于解耦的自编码器（DAE）和F0归一化方法有效，其中F0分布是衡量转换质量的关键指标，而成人-儿童分类模型判断方式不适用。
AI.conclusion: F0归一化在声学特征转换中表现最佳，转换后特征的F0分布直接影响效果，需避免使用不适应的分类模型进行评估。
